14.4: Amma bǝrniwudǝ yaktane laa yaudiyadǝa geya, laa ye kǝngayambadǝa geya.
14.5: Daji kǝrdiya so, yaudiya so fuwuwunja-a rokko sawardane tayia basarjane dongur kauyen ceyesi yera.
14.6: Kǝngayambadǝ adǝa fangeranniya, cagase bǝrniya cidi Likoniyaye Listǝra-a Darbe-a bǝlamaskiyanja-aro leyera.
14.7: Na ani yen kawuɍi kǝjidǝa ambo wulyeyera. Bulus-a Barnabas-a bǝrni Listǝrayelan
14.8: Bǝrni Listǝrayelan kam laa si canaa mbeji. Tǝn tambǝnayen ti ngurdiyi, koro ngaltema sinjun lejǝnni.
14.9: Kamdǝ mana Bulussea kǝrǝnji duwon, Bulus tia simnin cappo cure kambǝrsenju ngaduyea kirunniya,
14.10: kowo sapce tiro: «Cine, sinǝmlan cǝkko dane!» yeno. Sadǝman kamdǝ wup cije dadadu badiyeno.
14.11: Jamadǝ awo Bulus cǝdǝnadǝa kerunniya, tǝlamnja Likoniyayen kowo sapcane: «Akko alawa laa camuno kamben samelan jǝmsaana!» cane
14.12: Barnabassa Jewuslan bowojane Bulus yea Hermeslan bowoyera, tima mana diomadǝ wo nangaro.
14.13: Daji ɍiman Jewusse ti duwon fado sǝnǝmnjuye fuwu bǝlayen dǝganadǝ dalowa-a fǝɍeya-a ngaworam bǝrnidǝyero kiwudo, ti-a jamadǝ-a rokko bu fida dio caraana nangaro.
14.14: Amma kǝngayamba Barnabas-a Bulus-adǝ adǝa fangeranniya, kalwunja karjane dǝgaljane dawu jamadǝyero ngasaye kowo dunoaro sapcane
14.15: tayiro: «Jama, awiro awo ania diwi? Andi ye am nayi gai, diye! Koro nayiro kawuɍi kǝji wulduwuro kadiye. Awo bowu ania kollowo, Ala Kǝndǝgaima ti same-a cidi-a teku-a awo curonjan dasaana samma-aa alakcǝnadǝro tǝmdǝgǝnowo!
14.16: Jaman kureyen jama sammaa kolje jawalnja caraanaa ngoyera.
14.17: Adǝson sawiso awo ngǝla cǝdidǝ shedanjuro waljǝna. Ngaima samelan ingi cudduri, koro nemadǝa sanjulan fanduwi. Kǝmbo njade karwundo kǝjiji,» yera.
14.18: Mana ania caddima, kiaddin jama capkadadǝro bu fida adǝa tayi nangaro dio dapkeyera.
14.19: Daji yaudiya laa bǝrni Antakiyaye-a Ikoniyaye-alan isane jamadǝa kaanjaro kedǝnniya, Bulusso dongur kauye gǝgǝpcagane nuna cane gǝrjane ngawo bǝlayen kolyera.
14.20: Amma fuwurawadǝ isane tia dirijane kǝlyeranniya, cije walde bǝrnidǝro kǝrgawo. Wajǝnanjua Barnabas-a rokko bǝrni Darbeyero leyera. Bulus-a Barnabas-aye bǝrni Antakiya cidi Siriyero waldu
14.21: Bulus-a Barnabas-a kawuɍi kǝjidǝa bǝrni Darbeyelan wuljane am kada Isaa gawuro walyeranniya, bǝrni Listǝraye-a Ikoniyaye-a Antakiyaye-aro walladara.
14.22: Karwu fuwurawadǝyero duno casakke kambǝrsenjan fuwu jaworo kowoɍi cade tayiro: «Sai jauro bone yaiyeya duwon, nodo bargaa Alayero ngayiye,» yera.
14.23: Curo jama Isaa gawu fiye yayen amwurawa galayeranniya, moduwa-a asem-a cade tayia mukko Kǝma mǝrsajanadǝyero kesakko.
14.24: Daji cidi Bisidiyayea rejane kojane lardu Bamfiliyayero leyera.
14.25: Bǝla Fǝrgayelan kawuɍidǝa wulyeranniya, bǝla Attaliyayero koyera.
14.26: Nadǝn maararo ngasaye bǝrni Antakiya cidi Siriyero kadira. Caman bǝrnidǝn Isaa gawudǝ tayiro kida kǝrma tumojaanadǝro ser Alaye cakkorǝna.
14.27: Kadiranniya, jama Isaa gawudǝa capcane awo Ala tayi yindiyen cǝdǝna samma-a jiɍi kǝrdiyaro cinna kambǝrse fandoye kajǝgǝna-aa tayiro wulyeyera.
14.28: Bulus-a Barnabas-a kawu kadaro dawu fuwurawadǝyen napkera.

15.1: Am laa cidi Yahudiyayen bǝrni Antakiyayero isane kǝramiyadǝa alamdu badiyera. Tayiro: «Ada Nawi Musaye gawe nayia kajanjannia, ranguwe njǝkkawo fanduwwawo,» yera.
15.2: Bulus-a Barnabas-a mananjadǝa kasatturo wajane kambiwu jau fit kedǝnniya, jama sawardane Bulus-a Barnabas-a amnja gade laa-a Jerujalembo na kǝngayamba-a amwurawa-ayero leja kǝla mana adǝyen gasipca yera.
15.3: Jama Isaa gawudǝ tayia kenodǝnniya, lardu Fenisiye-a Samariyaye-a rejane kojai duwon, kǝramiyadǝro lawar Alaro waldu kǝrdiyayedǝa wuljagane tayi samma jauro kǝji fangera.
15.4: Jerujalembo kadiranniya, jama Isaa gawu-a kǝngayamba-a amwurawa-adǝ tayia mukko yindin kemowo. Daji awo Ala tayiyen cǝdǝna sammaa wulyera.
15.5: Amma Isaa gawu kǝwu Farisawaye laa cijane tayiro: «Sai tayia kajajane Attaura Nawi Musayea jaaro tayiro wada cadiya duwon,» yera.
15.6: Daji kǝngayambadǝ-a amwurawadǝ-a kǝla lamar adǝyen sawariro capkadara.
15.7: Ngǝwuro gasipkeranniya, Biturus cije tayiro: «Kǝramiya, tussǝna Ala wua curondon kǝresǝna kǝrdiyaso cinilan kawuɍi kǝji fanja kasaccaro nayi nonuwwa.
15.8: Koro Ala ti karwu nodumadǝ Ruhunju andiro sadǝnadǝ gai, tayi yero ce tayia ardijǝnadǝa shedayeno.
15.9: Andi-a tayi-a gayirsanni, kambǝrsenja nangaro karwunjaa tulje tayirro walyera.
15.10: To, awiro Alaa rijammuwe kurwowu duwon bi kaariyandema bi andima rangiye ngoniyendedǝa fuwurawa aniro gǝnagǝwidǝ?
15.11: A'a! Tayi ser Kǝma Isayen njǝkkawo cawandǝnadǝ gai, andi ye ngaiman fandiyenaro kasaddiyena.»
15.12: Jama captanadǝ samma gǝm cadǝna kǝrǝnjai duwon, Barnabas-a Bulus-a alama so, awo ajabba so Ala tayiyen dawu kǝrdiyayen cǝdǝna sammaa tayiro wulyeyera.
15.13: Mananja cade keseranniya, Yakubaye tayiro: «Kǝramiya, manani fannowo!
15.14: Siman jiɍi Ala burwoman kǝrdiyaa njunoje curonjan am jamanjuro waljaro kǝrejǝnadǝa wulsaana.
15.15: Koro mana nawiyaye ye adǝa tabbaccaana, akko awo kitawulan ruwuwadadǝ:
15.16: “Alaye: ‘Ngawo adǝyen isǝkke leima Daudaye curǝnadǝa waldǝkke tandǝkki. Awo wurdǝnadǝa bǝɍinno sǝgapkǝkke tandǝkki.
15.17: Adǝgaima adamgǝna gapcanadǝ, har kǝrdiya samma duwon tayia cunilan bowojaidǝ, wu Kǝmanjaa masai,’ yeno Kǝmande awo ania cǝde
15.19: «Adǝma nangaro, kǝramiyani, wuyenna, bare am jama kǝrdiyaye Alaa gawuro waldu cadidǝa suwolliyende,
15.20: amma sai da sǝnǝmbo tina ngǝro so, kǝnjǝna dio so, lǝman duwadǝnni ngǝro so, bu nja soa wajaro tayiro ruwuniyo.
15.21: Awoa tǝn jaman kureyen yim tustuye nguson bǝrni fin yaye dandalnin Attaura Nawi Musayedǝa jamaro kǝrajagane alamjai.» Kǝramiya fǝrdunja kǝrdiro wotiya juwaduwu
15.22: Daji kǝngayamba-a amwurawa-a jama Isaa gawu samma-a am curonjan kǝrenǝme Bulus-a Barnabas-aro kǝlgǝme bǝrni Antakiyayero juwaduwuro ngǝlaro kero. Am jamadǝlan darajaa Yahusa tiro Barsabas cani-a Silas-aa kǝrejane
15.23: wotiya ngai ruwuwada mukkonjaro kesakko: «Andi kǝramiya kǝngayamba-a amwurawa-a nayi kǝramiyande fǝrdundo kǝrdi bǝrni Antakiyaye-a cidi Siriye-a Kilikiyaye-aro, salam!
15.24: Am laa amari yiyende duwon curonden caluwe alamdunjan nayia suwolnjane hangalndo casangǝnadǝa fanniyena nangaro,
15.25: andi samma ci tiloaro am laaa kǝrenǝme sawawande Barnabas-a Bulus-a jauro rayiyenadǝro kǝlgǝme nandoro juwaduwuro ngǝlaro kiruiye,
15.26: tayi duwon cu Kǝmande Isa Almasiwuye nangaro ronja caladǝnadǝ.
15.27: Adǝ nangaro Yahusa-a Silas-aa kinodiye, tayi ye awo ruwuniyenadǝa cinjalan wulnjagai.
15.28: Ruhu Alaye-a andi-a kurwowu gade nayiro gǝnanjagaiyewaworo ngǝlaro ruiyena, sai awo nayiro wajip ani, tayima
15.29: da sǝnǝmbo tina ngǝro so, bu nja so, lǝman duwadǝnni ngǝro so, kǝnjǝna dio so wanowo! Awo aniro kanuwia, ngǝla diwwa. Kǝlewan dǝgaiwo!»
15.30: Daji jama tayia salamgeranniya, bǝrni Antakiyayero lejane jama Isaa gawudǝa capcane tayiro wotiyadǝa kedo.
15.32: Yahusa-a Silas-a tayi kǝlanjama nawiyadǝ kǝramiyadǝro kowoɍi cade mana kadan karwunjaro duno kesakko.
15.33: Kawu ganaro bǝrnidǝn napkeranniya, kǝramiyadǝ na jama tayia juwajaanayedǝro waldaro tayia alakǝlewayera.
15.34: [Amma Silas nadǝn napci yeno, Yahusa runju Jerujalembo walladan.]
15.35: Bulus-a Barnabas-a bǝrni Antakiyayelan napcane am gade ngǝwu-a rokko kawuɍi kǝji kǝla mana Kǝmandeyen alamjane wuljai kasarga. Bulus-a Barnabas-aye firda
15.36: Ngawo kawu ganayen Bulusse Barnabasso: «Waldiyo, kǝramiya bǝlawa na mana Kǝmandeye wulliyena sammayedǝa dalliyo, naptunja ruiyo!» yeno.
15.37: Barnabasdǝ Yahaya tiro Markus canidǝ yea ngojane rokko lejaiya, cǝraana,
15.38: amma Bulusse kam tayi-a rokko kidaro lejai duwon cidi Bamfiliyayen tayia koljǝnadǝa bare ngojanni yeno.
15.39: Kambiwu jau fit cade, har firgadara. Barnabas Markussa ngoje maararo ngasaye cuku Kuwirussero leyera.
15.40: Bulus ye Silassa kǝreje kǝramiyadǝ Kǝmandeyen tayiro ser cakkorǝne alakǝlewajane leyera.
15.41: Daji Bulus larduwa Siriye-a Kilikiyaye-aa jǝgane jama Isaa gawudǝye karwunjaro duno cakki kǝrga.

16.1: Bulus bǝrni Darbeye-a Listǝraye-aro leyeno. Nadǝn fuwura laa cunju Timoti mbeji. Ti tada kamu laa yaudi Isaa gamaye, amma bawanjudǝ kam lardu Gǝresse.
16.2: Kǝramiya bǝrni Listǝraye-a Ikoniyaye-alan dasaanadǝ Timotiye ngǝlanju wuljai.
16.3: Bulus ti-a kallo lejaro cǝraye yaudiya na anin dasaana samma bawanju kam Gǝressero nojana nangaro tia kajayeno.
16.4: Bǝrni bǝrniro lejai duwon, sawari kǝngayamba-a amwurawa-a Jerujalemnin dasaanaye kamjanadǝa tayiro cadǝne jaa yera.
16.5: Adǝgaima jama Isaa gawu kambǝrsenjan duno cawande yim nguson nanngǝwunja tǝrgai kǝrga. Wahayi Bulusse
16.6: Ruhu Alaye Bulus-a Silas-aro cidi Asiyayelan mana Kǝmaye wuldu dapcǝgǝnadǝ, larduwa Firijiyaye-a Galatiyaye-ayen rejane koyera.
16.7: Karǝn cidi Misiyayero kadiranniya, cidi Bitiniyayero ledu mayera, amma Ruhu Isaye tayiro amarjǝgǝnni.
16.8: Daji cidi Misiyayen kojane bǝrni Taruwassero leyera.
16.9: Curo buneyen Bulusso wahayi fǝlediye, kam laa lardu Makidoniyaye daada tiro: «Are Makidoniyaro, andiro banasagane!» cǝne tia lowoji kiro.
16.10: Wahayidǝa kirunniyama, Makidoniyaro ledu mayeiye, Ala tayiro kawuɍi kǝjidǝa wulduwuro bowosanaro noniyena nangaro. Kamu fǝrdu kǝrdiye Isaa gamaro waldu
16.11: Daji bǝrni Taruwassen maararo ngayiye cuku Samotǝraki caniyero cǝkko leyeiye. Wajǝnanjua bǝrni Niyabolissero kadiyendeya,
16.12: nadǝn bǝrni Romanwuye duwon bǝrni kura lardu Makidoniyaye Filibi canidǝro isiye kawu ganaro napkeiye.
16.13: Yim tustuyea ngaworam bǝrnidǝyen luwiye ci bǝrǝmbe na moduwa cadi tǝmaniyenadǝro leyeiye. Napkeiyendeya, kamuwa captanadǝro manaduwu badiyeiye.
16.14: Kamu Ala ridama laa batta kime ladoma bǝrni Tiyatiraye tiro Lidiya cani manadǝa kǝrǝnji, Ala awo Bulus wuljidǝa kasatturo karwunjuro kekko.
16.15: Ti-a am fannjuye-aro kasala kiddiyendeya, andia lowosane: «Wu Kǝmaa mǝrsadumaro ngosuwwaa, arowo fannin jǝmmowo!» cǝne andia sasakke leyeiye. Gureduma kosorambe-a am fannjuye-aye Isaa gawuro waldu
16.16: Yim laa na moduwa dioyedǝro ledu diye duwon, kir laa karuwama ise andia kamseyera. Sedandǝ tia cakke kuro cǝde ngainin kǝmawanjuro wuɍi kada cukkudi.
16.17: Daji Bulus-a andi-aa ga ngǝsse kowo sapce: «Am ani kadunowu Ala Kǝma Samemaye, nayiro jawal njǝkkawo fandoyedǝa wulnjagai,» cǝni.
16.18: Kawu kadaro ngai cǝdidǝ, kǝla Bulussen njǝn culuwe suworde sedandǝro: «Cu Isa Almasiwuyen niro wulnjǝgǝkki, tia kolle luwe!» yeno. Sadǝman tia kolyeno.
16.19: Amma kǝmawanjudǝ tǝmanja wuɍi fandoye baworo waljǝnaro asuyeranniya, Bulus-a Silas-aa cadane gǝrjane farsambo na fuwuwuyero kesado.
16.20: Daji fuwu alkaliyayero kewudǝnniya, tayiro: «Am ani yaudiya, bǝrnindero fitǝna cawudi,
16.21: ada duwon kasattunju bi ganju wowom andi Romanwuro damsaanaa cakkarai.»
16.22: Jamadǝ ye Bulus-a Silas-aro capkaadara. Daji alkaliyadǝ kajǝmu Bulus-a Silas-ayea dunon ɍinjane wada cade kalan bakkera.
16.23: Ngǝwuro tayia bakkeranniya, kosoro casakke guredumadǝro wada cade fǝrǝstaiwaworo rojo yera.
16.24: Wada adǝa kiwandǝnniya, tayia curo kosoramben sulluru daryeyedǝro cakke sinjaa dǝmbǝllo tuyeyeno.
16.25: Bune dǝrdu Bulus-a Silas-a moduwa cadi Alaro aiya njungoroye yejagai, kosowu gade ye tayia kǝrǝnjai ngai duwon,
16.26: cidi dama baworo loloje fǝrdu kosoramdǝye moji badiyeno. Sadǝman cinnaso samma fǝrǝmdane saɍga kosowu sammaye wuiyadara.
16.27: Guredumadǝ kǝnǝmnin cije cinna samma kaada kirunniya, kosowu nga cagasǝna cǝne kǝlanju njejoro kashagar fitkeno.
16.28: Amma Bulus kowo sapce: «Bare kǝlanǝm lorunǝmmi! Andi samma menna,» yeno.
16.29: Guredumadǝ fatǝla cuwore gangadaro ngaye lolojiaro fuwu Bulus-a Silas-ayen tungurumje nguyeno.
16.30: Tayia deyaro cuttuluwe: «Malǝmba, awi dikke njǝkkawo fandǝkki?» cǝne kiworǝnniya,
16.31: tiro: «Kǝma Isaa mǝrsane, ni-a am fannǝmbe samma-a njǝkkawo fanduwi,» yera.
16.32: Daji ti-a am fannjuye samma-aro kawuɍi Kǝmayea wulyeyera.
16.33: Bune sa adǝman tayia cade tunonjaso tulyeno. Tulyenniyama, Bulus-a Silas-adǝ ti-a am fannjuye samma-aro kasala keddo.
16.34: Tayia fannjuro kiwudǝnniya, masǝna tayiro kaino, koro Alaa mǝrsajǝna nangaro ti-a am fannjuye-aye karwunja jauro kǝjiyeno.
16.35: Dunia wayenniya, alkaliyadǝ sojiya canode: «Am ania kolle leja!» yera.
16.36: Daji guredumadǝ mana ania Bulusso wuljiye tiro: «Alkaliyaye nayia kolnjakko canna. Adǝ nangaro luwowo, kǝlewan lenowo!» yeno.
16.37: Amma Bulusse tayiro: «A! Andi Romanwu duwon, shara saddǝnnin fuwu jamayen bansane kosoro sesakko! Kǝrma asǝrlan andia koldu majai wa? Suwana! Tayi kǝlanjama isa kolsa!» yenniya,
16.38: sojiyadǝ waldane alkaliyadǝro mana Bulussedǝa wulyeyera. Alkaliyadǝ ye Bulus-a Silas-aa Romanwuro fangeranniya, rijane
16.39: isane nanjan gawara cawore kosolan cattuluwe tayia lowojane bǝrnidǝn caluwo yera.
16.40: Bulus-a Silas-a kosolan keluwunniya, fado Lidiyayero leyera. Nadǝn kǝramiya-a tade tayiro kowoɍi cade sapkadara.

17.1: Bulus-a Silas-a bǝrni Amfibolis-a Aboloniya-ayen rejane koyeranniya, Tasalonika bǝrni duwon curonjun dandal yaudiyaye laa dǝganadǝro kadira.
17.2: Kǝla adanjuyen Bulus nanjaro ngaye yim tustuye gadegade yakkuro awo kitawulan ruwuwadadǝa tayiro fisarjiye
17.3: Ala kadarjǝna Almasiwudǝ bone cane nune karmolan ciji adǝa bayinje tabbacciye tayiro: «Isa kam kǝlanjun mana njaddǝkkidǝ, tima Almasiwudǝ wo!» yeno.
17.4: Yaudiyadǝye laanja-a am Gǝresse Ala ridawu kada-a kamuwa darajaa gǝnagǝni-a mananjudǝa kasaccane Bulus-a Silas-aro kǝllaadara.
17.5: Amma yaudiya laa kanduɍijane kǝladowa am bowuye farsamnin majane tǝmbaljagane hangalsango bǝrnidǝn casange Bulus-a Silas-aa fuwu jamayero kudoro fado Jasonnero cagase leyera.
17.6: Tayia najagannidǝ, Jason-a kǝramiya gade laa-aa fuwu fuwuwu bǝrnidǝyero gǝrjane kowo sapcane: «Am dunia ngan hangalsango cadidǝ na adǝ yero isane,
17.7: Jason ye tayia fannjun cǝsaana. Tayi samma wowom Kaisarre ga wajane mai gade Isa cani menna wuljai,» yera.
17.8: Jama-a fuwuwudǝ-a adǝa fangeranniya, hangalnja ciyeno.
17.9: Jasonsoyen beli kemowonniya, koljane leyera. Bulus-a Silas-a bǝrni Biriyayelan
17.10: Dunia lǝmgenniyama, kǝramiyadǝ Bulus-a Silas-aa casakke bǝrni Biriyayero leyera. Kadiranniya, dandal yaudiyayero kasargawo.
17.11: Yaudiya ani am bǝrni Tasalonikayedǝro kǝla fǝrǝmgadaa wo. Kawuɍidǝa mukko yindin camoye, har awo ani jire waro noduro yim nguson kitawudǝa fǝsanjane carui.
17.12: Adǝ nangaro amnja ngǝwu Isaa kasatkera, koro curo am Gǝressedǝn kamuwa darajaa-a kongwawa-a gǝnagǝni ye kasatkera.
17.13: Amma yaudiya Tasalonikayedǝ Bulus Biriya yelan mana Alaye wuljidǝa fangeranniya, na adǝ yero isane jamaa tǝmbaljagane fitǝna kewudo.
17.14: Sadǝman kǝramiyadǝ Bulusso ci tekuyedǝro lejo cane sapkadan, amma Silas-a Timoti-a nadǝn napkera.
17.15: Am Bulussa casadduwunadǝ tia har bǝrni Atinayero kesado. Daji Bulus tayiro wada ce Silas-a Timoti-a nanjuro duwaduwan isa yenniya, sapkadara. Jawawi Bulusse bǝrni Atinayelan
17.16: Bulus bǝrni Atinayen Silas-a Timoti-aa guredu cǝdi duwon, bǝladǝn ndaran yaye gumkiyaaro curunadǝ, karwunju kuttayeno.
17.17: Adǝ nangaro Bulus curo dandalle yen yaudiya-a Ala ridawu-a manadai, farsam yen yim nguson am tadidǝ-a ngai cadi.
17.18: Koro ilmuwu laa kǝwu Abikuriyaye-a Sitokiyaye-a ye ti-a jandedu badiyera. Laanjaye: «Kam kalala ngǝwua adǝ, awi gǝle wulji?» cani, laa ye: «Alamanju sǝnǝmba lardu gadeye mawoduma,» cani. Adǝa wuldunjadǝ, Bulus kawuɍi kǝji kǝla Isa-a karmolan cidu-ayen wulji nangaro.
17.19: Daji tia ngojane fuwu majilis na duwon tiro Kǝri Arasaye caniyedǝro caade tiro: «Nda awo bǝɍin alammǝmidǝa andiro wulsagane, ngǝlaro fanniyo!
17.20: Ilmu yikkǝrami kaande-a gade adǝye maananju noduro maniye,» yera.
17.21: Awoa am bǝrni Atinaye samma-a kusottowa bǝrnidǝn dasaana-adǝ ilmu bǝɍin wuldu-a fandu-a gǝnia, awima gade cadiwawo.
17.22: Daji Bulus cije dawu majilisdǝyen daje tayiro: «Am bǝrni Atinaye, nayi jiɍi fin yaye jauro adinwuro rukkǝna.
17.23: Bǝrnindon dadanǝkke gumkiyando rukki duwon, curonjan har laya duwaduram laa kǝlanjun adǝ kurgadaa kirukko: “Ala laa nodǝnniye.” Awo nonuwwilan ambǝtkǝwi adǝ, timaa isanonjagakki.
17.24: Ala duwon dunia-a awowa curonjun dasaana samma-aa alakcǝnadǝ, ti Kǝma same-a cidi-aye nangaro, curo fadowa kam cǝdandǝnayen gǝni kǝrga.
17.25: Koro mǝradunju bawo nangaro, mukko adamgǝnayen gǝni kistiyi, tima wundu yayero ro-a sindu-a awo gade samma-aa njoma wo.
17.26: Kam falnin jama gadegade sammaa alakkeno, duniaye ndaranjun yaye dasaaro. Jama sammaro jaman kǝndǝgainjaye kamjiye koro cidinjaro kaɍangi kiddo.
17.27: Adǝa dionjudǝ, farafaraja tia maja, yoyenoa, cawandoro. Jiremaro katte ti-a wundundeye-a kuruwu gǝni.
17.28: Manawundo laasomaye cannadǝ gai: “Tiyen ro kiwandiye, dadaniye, kǝrgaiye,” koro: “Andi ye kaduwunju.”
17.29: «To, andi kaduwunjudǝ, bare tia gumki dinarre so, ɍiwullaye so, kauye so awo duwon amso ilmunja-a nangoninja-anin cadandǝnadǝye camunno ngoniyende.
17.30: Jaman nodunambuyen Ala wowom gǝnaduwu wajǝna yaye, kǝrmadǝ am samma ndaran kasarga yaye tuwa cado yeno,
17.31: dalilnjudǝ kam shara diomaro galajǝnayen duniaro yim falnin shara jireye cǝddi cǝne sardu kamjǝgǝna. Nianju adǝa wundu yayero tabbattuwuro kamdǝa karmolan kisango.»
17.32: Mana kǝla karmolan ciduyedǝn fangeranniya, laanja rudu gǝnayera, amma laa ye: «Gademinno kǝla adǝyen nia kǝrǝnnjiye,» yera.
17.34: Amma am laa tiro kǝldagane Isaa kasatkera. Curonjan Diyonisiyas tima majilisma-a kamu laa Damaris cani-a am gade-a.

18.1: Ngawo adǝyen Bulus bǝrni Atinayedǝa kolje bǝrni Korintiyero leyeno.
18.2: Nadǝn yaudi laa cidi Fantussen tambǝna Akila cani-a kattado. Ti-a kamunju Bilkisu-a tussǝnni lardu Italiyayen isana, Kaisar Kǝlodiyus wada ce yaudiya samma bǝrni Rombea kolja cǝnna nangaro. Daji Bulus nanjaro leje,
18.3: tayi samma sanianja tilo leima tandodǝ, tayiro kǝldiye fannjan napce rokko kida kedo.
18.4: Yim tustuye nguson Bulus dandallan jama-a manadai, yaudiya-a am Gǝresse-a Isaa gawuro waljaro maji.
18.5: Daji Silas-a Timoti-a lardu Makidoniyayen kadiranniya, Bulus mana Alaye sattuwuro kǝlanju ce yaudiyaro Isadǝ tima Almasiwu wo cǝne shedaji kǝrga.
18.6: Amma yaudiyadǝ tia wajane rarayeranniya, kajǝmunju kagakce tayiro: «Ala bundo kǝlandoro kalakcuwo, wu dawun bawo! Kua adǝn fuwun na kǝrdiyayero lekki,» yeno.
18.7: Daji nadǝn sapte fado kam laa Ala ridama tiro Titus Justus caniyero leyeno. Fannjudǝ gǝre dandaldǝyen kǝrga.
18.8: Kǝrifus kura dandaldǝye-a am fannjuye samma-a Kǝmaa kasatkera. Koro Korintiwu kada ye fangeranniya, kasaccane tayiro kasala keddo.
18.9: Bune laa wahayilan Kǝmaye Bulusso: «Bare rinǝmmi! Manane, bare gǝm dimmi!
18.10: Wu ni-a rokko. Wunduma nia lenje basarnjiwawo, bǝla adǝn ammi ngǝwu mbeji nangaro,» yeno.
18.11: Daji kǝrwu fal redaaro napce curonjan mana Alayea alamji kǝrga.
18.12: Jaman Gomna Galiyo lardu Akayaye cunodidǝn, yaudiyadǝ citilo cade Bulussa cadane shararambo caade
18.13: tiro: «Kam adǝ jiɍi wowom amarjǝgǝnnin amba Alaro ambǝttuwuro tǝmbaljiyi,» yera.
18.14: Bulus cinju kaji duwon, Gomnaye yaudiyadǝro: «Ca ayau laa bi biwu kura laaro walyenoa, dalil nayi yaudiyadǝa kǝrǝnduye menna.
18.15: Amma lamar kalma so, cu so, wadando so wujǝnadǝ, nayima awondo nonuw! Wudǝ alkali awo aniyero waldu wakkǝna,» cǝne
18.17: Daji tayi samma Sastanisu fuwuma dandalledǝa cadane fuwu shararamdǝyeman babakkera, amma Gomnaye kistuwunjuma cuwudǝnni. Bulusse bǝrni Antakiya cidi Siriyero waldu
18.18: Bulus kawu kadaro bǝrni Korintiyelan napkenniya, cije kǝramiyadǝa alakǝlewaje Ya Bilkisu-a Akila-a rokko cidi Siriyero leduro maararo kasargawo. Bǝla Kankariyayen Bulus kansi juwuna nangaro kǝlanju kilaro.
18.19: Bǝrni Afisayero kadiranniya, Bulus tayia nadǝn kolje ti kǝlanju dandallo ngaye yaudiya-a kǝla mana Alayen manaadara.
18.20: Tia kawu kadaro napcoro lowoyeranniya, waje
18.21: tayiro: «Alaye cǝdia, nandoro waldǝkke isǝkki,» cǝne maararo ngaye bǝrni Afisayedǝa kolyeno.
18.22: Bǝrni Kaisariyayen jǝpce Jerujalembo leje jama Isaa gawua lewayenniya, bǝrni Antakiyayero koyeno.
18.23: Antakiyanin kawu ganaro napkenniya, cije bǝla bǝlaso lardu Galatiyaye-a Firijiyaye-a jǝgane fuwurawadǝye karwunjaro duno kekko. Ya Bilkisu-a kwanju Akila-a Afolus-a bǝrni Afisayelan
18.24: Adǝgaima yaudi laa bǝrni Aleksandariyayelan tambǝna tiro Afolus cani bǝrni Afisayero kadio. Tidǝ manama kura, koro kitawuwa Alayedǝa ngǝlaro nojǝna.
18.25: Jawal Kǝmaye ga cǝɍǝna, koro jauro karwu kǝjiaro kalkallo kǝla awowa Isaa wujanayen amba alamji, amma kasala Nawi Yahayaye runjuma nojo.
18.26: Daji ridu bawoaro dandallan mana badiyeno. Ya Bilkisu-a Akila-a tia fangeranniya, tia ngojane cayea kojǝnaro kalkallo jawal Alayea bayingeyera.
18.27: Afolus lardu Akayayero ledu mayenniya, kǝramiyadǝ tiro kowoɍi cade fuwurawa cididǝyero wotiya ruwujagane tia ngǝlaro sosaja yera. Kadinniya, am duwon ser Alayen Isaa gawuro waljanadǝa jauro banayeyeno,
18.28: awoa Isama Almasiwudǝ woro kitawuyen tabbacciye fuwu jamayen yaudiyadǝa kǝnduwoaro manan yapkeyeno.

19.1: Afolus bǝrni Korintiyelan duwon, Bulus cidi kau kaua koje bǝrni Afisayero kadinniya, fuwurawa laaa najiye
19.2: tayiro: «Sa Isaa kasadduwwadǝn, Ruhu Alaye jǝmnjaana wa?» cǝne kiworo. Tiro: «A'a, andi Ruhu Alaye mbejimaro fanniyende,» yera.
19.3: Bulusse: «Kasala fi gǝle nayiro njaddo?» cǝne kiworǝnniya, tayiye: «Kasala Nawi Yahayaye,» yera.
19.4: Daji Bulusse: «Nawi Yahaya ambo kasala tuwaye cǝdde tayiro kam ngawonjun isidǝa kasacca jaa cǝni. Kamdǝ tima Isa wo.»
19.5: Adǝa fangeranniya, cu Kǝma Isayen tayiro kasala keddo.
19.6: Daji Bulus tayiro mukko gǝnayeyenniya, Ruhu Alaye tayiro jǝpciye tǝlamba gadegaden manajane nawinawi dio badiyera.
19.7: Am ani, tayi alama kongwa mewun yindin gai.
19.8: Bulus dandallo ngaye kǝndawu yakkuro ridu bawoaro kambiwuje kǝla nodo bargaa Alayen jamaa alamje kasaccaro maji.
19.9: Amma laanja kǝlakibbu cade kasattu wajane fuwu jamayen Jawaldǝro rudu gǝnayeyeranniya, Bulus tayia kolje fuwurawadǝa ngoje leje yim nguson alamduram kam tiro Tiranus caniyen tayia alamji kǝrga.
19.10: Kǝrwu yindiro alamji ngai duwon, am cidi Asiyayen dasaana samma mana Kǝmadǝye fangera, yaudiya yen kal, yaudiya gǝni yen kal. Tadawa tulur Sibaye
19.11: Ala mukko Bulussen awo jauro ajabba ajabba cǝde
19.12: har batta so, kajǝmu so tia lejanadǝa cawude am dondiro gǝnajagaiya, kasuwanjan ngajai, sedanso ye tayilan caluwi.
19.13: Yaudiya sedan dudawu dadajaiso laa ye cu Kǝma Isayen sedanna dudu majane tayiro: «Cu Isa kam Bulus mawojidǝyen wulnjagakki, luwowo!» cani.
19.14: Ɍiman kura laa tiro Siba caniye tadawanju tulur ngai cadi duwon,
19.15: sedandǝye tayiro: «Isadǝa nokkǝna, Bulus yea nokkǝna, amma nayidǝ wunduso?» cǝne
19.16: karuwamadǝ kǝlanjaro sǝktiye dunonja koje nasarje, har de sul loruwada cagase fadodǝlan keluwo.
19.17: Am bǝrni Afisayelan dasaana samma, yaudiya yen kal, yaudiya gǝni yen kal, lawar adǝa fangeranniya, tayi samma rijane cu Kǝma Isayero daraja kedo.
19.18: Am Isaa kasaccanadǝye ngǝwunja isane awo diwi diwi cadǝnadǝa fuwu jamayen wulyera,
19.19: koro am ngǝwu sagawu cadǝnadǝ ye kitawunja cawude capcane fuwu jama sammayen kannu ketta. Tamannja isapkeranniya, cungo ɍiwullaye dǝwu fiwu.
19.20: Adǝgaima mana Kǝmaye tatardiye kǝnduwoaro walji kǝrga. Hangalsango bǝrni Afisayelan
19.21: Ngawo awo ani wakkajanayen, kǝnduwo Ruhu Alayen Bulus nia larduwa Makidoniya-a Akaya-ayen renǝme konǝme Jerujalembo leduye ngoje kǝlanjuro: «Ngawo na aniro lekkǝnayen, sai bǝrni Rombe yea rukkiya!» yeno.
19.22: Daji banawunjuye yindi Timoti-a Erastus-aa lardu Makidoniyayero kinodo, amma ti kǝlanju kawu ganaro cidi Asiyayen napkeno.
19.23: Jaman adǝn hangalsango kura Jawaldǝ nangaro ciyeno.
19.24: Ɍiwulla karoma laa tiro Dimitǝriyus cani mbeji. Tidǝ fado sǝnǝm Ya Artimasse ɍiwullan cǝdande saniawuro riwa gǝnagǝni cukkudi.
19.25: Daji saniawudǝ-a am kidanja kaanja-a camun-aa capce tayiro: «Jama, saniande adǝn fandinde diyero nonuwwa.
19.26: Ruwe fannuwwadǝ gai, bǝrni Afisaye runjun gǝni, na ganaro kajia, Asiya samman Bulus adǝ gumkiya mukkon tagarǝnadǝ alawa jireye gǝni cǝne am ngǝwu mananju ngojane jawallan caluwuna.
19.27: Adǝ cakke saniandero diwi wulduwu runju gǝni, har sǝnǝm kura Ya Artimas ti duwon am Asiyaye so, dunia ngaye so samma ambǝccagaidǝye fannju ye awima gǝniro walji, darajanju ye baworo walji,» yeno.
19.28: Adǝa fangeranniya, tai dajane gǝrgajane kowo sapcane: «Ya Artimas Afisayema kura wo!» cani.
19.29: Daji hangalsangodǝ bǝrni ngaro tatargaada. Jamadǝ Gayus-a Aristarkus-a am lardu Makidoniyaye Bulussa casadduwunadǝa cadane kǝla tilonna farsambo gangadaro kesado.
19.30: Bulus curo cammodǝyero ngawo cǝraana duwon, fuwurawadǝ tiro dapkeyera,
19.31: koro fuwuwu kura kura cidi Asiyaye laa tayi duwon sawawanjudǝ tiro am cakkunode bare farsamdǝro lejǝnniro lowoyera.
19.32: Am captanadǝye hangalnja cijǝna nangaro, laanja awo laa yiljane wuljai, laadǝ ye awo gade yiljane wuljai. Koro ngǝwunja awiro capkadaramaro nojanni.
19.33: Daji yaudiyadǝ Aleksandaa tǝmbaljagane am laa jamadǝye tia casakke fuwuro koje dayenniya, mukko sapce jamadǝro jawawi cǝddi yeno.
19.34: Amma ti yaudiro asuyeranniya, tayi samma kǝla tilonna sa yindi gairo yiljaiaro: «Ya Artimas Afisayema kura wo!» cani.
19.35: Kakkaduma bǝrnidǝye jamadǝa cakke nǝmgeranniya, tayiro: «Am bǝrni Afisaye, wundu gǝle bǝrni Afisaye tima gureduma fado Ya Artimas darajaadǝye-a gumkinju kauye samelan curǝnadǝye-a nojǝnnidǝ?
19.36: To, wunduma awo ania rakce angǝrjiwawodǝ, kǝdǝk nammowo, bare hangal bawolan awima diwwi.
19.37: Am ania na adǝro kuduwwa, amma awima diwi fado Ya Artimassen cadǝnni ye, tia rajanni ye.
19.38: Dimitǝriyus-a saniawu amanju-a kǝla kam laayen sonjaaa, shararam menna, alkaliya ye menna. Kattenjan burwuda!
19.39: Koro manando gade laa mennaa, jama majilisso captaiya, lamardǝa sharajai.
19.40: Hangal gǝnanowo, awo ku wakkajǝna adǝ hangalsango cane burwusaiya, rangiye dǝlwu jussǝna falma cammonde adǝye yiyewawo.»

20.1: Ngawo hangalsangodǝ cerǝnayen, Bulus fuwurawadǝa bowoje karwunjaro kowoɍi ce tayia alakǝlewayenniya, lardu Makidoniyayero leduro sapkadan.
20.2: Lardudǝa jǝgane mana kadan tayi yero kowoɍi kenniya, lardu Gǝressero leje
20.3: kǝndawu yakkuro napkeno. Cidi Siriyero maaralan ledu maji duwon, yaudiya laa tiro niadiwi caddi cane ci kǝlyera. Daji lardu Makidoniyayen renǝme koduro nia ngoyeno.
20.4: Am tia casadduwunadǝ tayima Sofata tada Firusse kam bǝrni Biriyaye, Aristarkus-a Sakundus-a bǝrni Tasalonikaye, Gayus kam bǝrni Darbeye, Timoti, koro Tikikus-a Tarofimus-a cidi Asiyaye.
20.5: Tayi ani andin fuwunno lejane bǝrni Taruwasselan guresera.
20.6: Andidǝ ye ngawo sala Burodi Yis Bawoayen bǝrni Filibiyen maararo ngayiye sapkadaiye. Ngawo kawu uwuyen tayia Taruwasnin nagǝiye mawuro napkeiye. Bulus bǝrni Taruwasselan
20.7: Mawuye yim burwoyea burodi fǝsakturo capkadaiyendeya, har dǝrdu Bulus jamadǝro kuruwuro jandeyeyeno, dalilnjudǝ wajiya leji cǝnna nangaro.
20.8: Soro sameye na captiyenadǝn fatǝla kada waskada duwon,
20.9: jairo laa cunju Yutikus kǝla takayen napkada kǝnǝm dio badiyeno. Bulus manaji manaji duwon, kǝnǝm jairodǝa cotto ngoje soro sameye kǝnyakkuyen cidiro kikkuro. Kesangǝranniya, ro bawo nuna.
20.10: Daji Bulus jǝpce ngujiye tia ngoje nganjiro fakciye tayiro: «Bare hangalndo cijǝnni, ronjua, diye!» yeno.
20.11: Bulus walde tacce burodi fǝsakce gigǝrǝnniya, ngǝwuro manajiyi duwon, har dunia waje sapkadan.
20.12: Jairodǝa ronjua caade karwunja jauro kǝjiyeno. Bulusse amwurawa Afisayea alakǝlewadu
20.13: Andidǝ fuwuniye bǝla Assossero leduro maararo kǝrgayiye. Bulus calan wuljǝnadǝ gai, nadǝn tia ngoniye niye, ti silan leji cǝnna nangaro.
20.14: Andia Assoslan naseyeranniya, tia maaradǝn ngoniye bǝrni Mitileyero leyeiye.
20.15: Nadǝn ciyeiyendeya, wajǝnanjua gǝre cuku Kiyossero kadiye. Waarenjua cuku Samossen koniye, waarendonjua duwon bǝrni Militussero isiye jǝpkeiye.
20.16: Bare cidi Asiyayen tussǝnniro Bulus caman bǝrni Afisayelan dajǝnnin koji cǝne nia ngojǝna. Gandunju adǝ, yojia, ngǝmǝri Fentikosse tia Jerujalemlan najiyi cǝrawo.
20.17: Bulus bǝrni Militusselan duwon, am cunode amwurawa jama Isaa gawu bǝrni Afisayedǝa bowoja isa yeno.
20.18: Kadiranniya, tayiro: «Tǝn yim burwoyen cidi Asiyayero isǝkkǝnadǝn naptu curondon kullum dikkǝnadǝa nonuwwa.
20.19: Kida Kǝmaye rokura bawoalan dikke har soma dikkǝna, koro yaudiya laa wuro citilo saddǝnadǝro leiya ye yakkǝna.
20.20: Koro nayiro awima gǝranjagakkǝniro awi yaye nayiro faidaa wulnjagakke farsam yen, fado fado yen alamnjakkǝnaro nonuwwa.
20.21: Ai, wuye yaudiya-a am Gǝresse-a sammaro Alaro walda tuwa cado Kǝmande Isaa mǝrsajaro wulgǝkke shedanǝkkǝna yero nonuwwa.
20.22: «Akko kǝrma Ruhu Alaye wua sakke Jerujalembo lekki, awo nadǝn wua suwandidǝa nokkǝni,
20.23: sai bǝrni fin yaye Ruhu Alaye wuro koso-a leiya nja-a guresaidǝa tabbansiyi kǝrga.
20.24: Adǝ yaye ronidǝa awimaro ngokkǝni, nanin tamannju bawo, sai kida duwon Kǝma Isa wuro sina, wotte kawuɍi kǝji ser Alaye shedadudǝa tumogǝkkiya bas, raakko!
20.25: «To, nayi duwon dawundolan dǝgakke kawuɍi kǝji nodo bargaa Alaye wullǝkkǝnadǝ samma wua gadero suruwwaworo nokkǝna.
20.26: Adǝma nangaro ku nayiro shedanǝkki, bu wundundoyema kǝlanin bawo,
20.27: dalilnjudǝ nia Alaye sammaa falma gǝranjagakkǝniro wulnjagakkǝna.
20.28: Kǝlando-a bǝri duwon kǝlanjun Ruhu Alaye nayia sǝniyaro galanjanadǝ samma-a ngǝlaro ronowo! Jama Alaa gawuro kiskǝnowo, jama duwon bunjulan kaanjuro cǝdǝnadǝ.
20.29: Ngawo saptǝkkǝnayen, buldu diwi diwi curondoro ngasaye bǝridǝa basarjairo nokkǝna.
20.30: Koro curondoman am laa cijane fuwurawaa ngawonjan gǝrduro jiredǝa kattuwuro kalakcai.
20.31: Adǝ nangaro faadaro dǝgaiwo! Saa yakkuro bune-a kausu-aro har simmin simaloaro wundundoyema sǝmo kasta kollǝkkǝnidǝa tangowo!
20.32: «To, kǝrma nayia mukko Ala-a mananju ser fandoye-ayero njasakkǝkkǝna, mana duwon rakce nayia isawuranjagai ye, curo am Ala kaanjuro cǝdǝna sammayen warasa njadi yedǝ.
20.33: Ɍiwulla, bi dinar, bi kajǝmu wunduyemaa luwammǝkkǝni.
20.34: Nayi kǝlandoma nonuwwa, mukkonin kida dikke wu-a am rokko leniye-aye mǝradunde galyekko.
20.35: Curo awo aniyen nayiro dole ngǝnǝptowo kida dewo talaawaa bananoworo fǝlenjagakkǝna. Mana Kǝma Isa ti kǝlanju wuljǝnadǝa tangowo: “Njoma moworo bargaa wo.”»
20.36: Bulus awo ania wulyenniya, tungurumje tayi samma-a rokko moduwa kedo.
20.37: Cesiriaro Bulusso kǝrdagane lewa kǝrawoye keddo.
20.38: Bulusse mana wulje tia gadero caruiwawo cǝnnadǝro, karwunja jaumaro kuttayeno. Daji tia na maaradǝyero kesadduwo.

21.1: Ngawo tayia alakǝlewaniyenayen, maararo ngayiye cǝkko cuku Kossero leyeiye. Wajǝnanjua cuku Rudassero koniye nadǝn bǝrni Fatarayero kadiye.
21.2: Fataralan maara lardu Fenisiyero leduma laa kiwandiyendeya, tiro ngayiye sapkadaiye.
21.3: Cuku Kuwirusse ruiye wailanden kolyeiyendeya, cidi Siriyero leniye bǝrni Tirren jǝpkeiye, nadǝn kare maarayedǝa casayi nangaro.
21.4: Fuwurawa laaa fandiye nanjan mawuro napkeiye, tayidǝ Ruhu Alayen Bulusso bare Jerujalembo lejǝnni yera.
21.5: Adǝ yaye sande ciduye kidǝnniya, ciyeiye. Tayi samma kamuwanja-a yallanja-a andia har ngawo bǝrnidǝyero sasadduwo. Ci tekuyen tungurummiye moduwa kidiyendeya,
21.6: alakǝlewadaiye. Daji andi maararo ngayiye, tayi ye fannjaro walladara.
21.7: Bǝlawuronde bǝrni Tirren kerǝnniya, bǝrni Tolemayissen jǝmmiye kǝramiyadǝa lewaniye kawu fallo nanjan napkeiye.
21.8: Wajǝnanjua saptiye bǝrni Kaisariyayero kadiyendeya, fado Filibus kawuɍi kǝji Alaye wuldumadǝyen jǝpkeiye. Tidǝ am tulurdǝye falnja.
21.9: Ferowanju dewu ngaltema kwa nojanni nawinawi cadi mbeji.
21.10: Kawu ngǝwuro nammiyena duwon, nawi laa tiro Agabus cani cidi Yahudiyayen kadio.
21.11: Nandero ise ngiri Bulusse cǝmoye ti kǝlanju si-a mukko-aro cikkere andiro: «Akko awo Ruhu Alaye wuljǝnadǝ: “Adǝgainin yaudiya Jerujalemlan kǝma ngiri adǝyedǝa cakkere mukko kǝrdiyayero sǝrǝccagai,”» yeno.
21.12: Adǝa fangeiyendeya, andi-a am nadǝye-a Bulussa bare Jerujalembo lejǝnniro lowoyeiye.
21.13: Daji Bulusse andiro: «Attǝ awi diwidǝ? Sondolan dauni namdu wa rawuw? Cu Kǝma Isaye nangaro, wudǝ koso runju gǝni, karmoma Jerujalemnin kasaddǝkkǝna,» yeno.
21.14: Rangiye tia jawalndero yakkiyewaworo kiruiyendeya, manadǝa kolliye: «Awo Kǝma cǝraanadǝ tǝdo!» yeiye.
21.15: Ngawo kawu aniyen dabbardiye Jerujalembo leyeiye.
21.16: Fuwurawa bǝrni Kaisariyaye laa ye andia sasadduwe fado Manason kam cuku Kuwirusselan jǝmmiyoro nanjuro seado. Manasondǝ fuwurawa burwoyedǝye falnja. Bulusse Yakuba-a amwurawa-aa daldu
21.17: Jerujalembo kadiyendeya, kǝramiyadǝ andia karwu kǝjiaro semowo.
21.18: Wajǝnanjua Bulus andi-a rokko na Yakubayero leyeiye, amwurawa samma ye capkadara.
21.19: Bulus tayia lewayenniya, awo Ala kidanjuyen dawu kǝrdiyayen cǝdǝnadǝa fal fallen tayiro wulyeyeno.
21.20: Adǝa fangeranniya, Alaa kengoro. Daji Bulusso: «Kǝrami, yaudiya kada kadami Isaa kasaccanaro rumma, koro tayi samma karwu tiloan Attauraa jaana.
21.21: Amma nidǝ yaudiya larduwa kǝrdiyayen dasaana sammaa alammǝme wada Nawi Musaye ga kolja, bare tadawanjaa kajajanni bi adadǝa jaanni nǝmiro fangera.
21.22: To, awi gǝle diye? Ni na adǝro isǝmmadǝa fagatto fanjai.
21.23: Ngo awo wulnjǝgǝiye adǝa de. Curonden am dewu Alaro kansi jabbuna mbeji.
21.24: Am ania ngone lamar tayirro walduyedǝa tayi-a rokko dewo, wuɍinjadǝa biyane kǝlanja calaroro. Adǝgainin tayi samma awo kǝlanǝmlan wuldidǝ awima gǝni, ni yea Attauraa gamaro nonjai.
21.25: Amma kǝrdiya Isaa kasaccanadǝ, nia ngoniye tayiro da sǝnǝmbo tina ngǝro so, bu nja so, lǝman duwadǝnni ngǝro so, kǝnjǝna dio so wajaro wotiya ruwugǝiyena.»
21.26: Wayenniya, Bulus am dewudǝa ngoje lejane lamar tayirro walduyedǝa kallo kedo. Daji Fado Alayero ngaye sardu yimnja tayirro waljai ye, sadaa wundunja yayero caddidǝ yea isanoyeyeno. Bulussa Fado Alayen ta
21.27: Kawu tulurdǝ njeronju del karǝnjǝna duwon, yaudiya laa cidi Asiyaye Bulussa Fado Alayen kerunniya, jama sammaa casange tia cadane
21.28: yiljane: «Jama Israyilaye, banasaganowo! Akko kam duwon alamdunjun ndaran yaye jamande-a Attaura-a na adǝ-a sammaro rudu gǝnajiye, har kǝrdiyamaa Fado Alayero cuwude nadǝa tayir gǝniro cǝdǝnadǝ!» yera.
21.29: Awoa Tarofimus kam Afisaye ti-a kallo bǝrnidǝn carune Bulus tia Fado Alayero cuwudǝnaro tǝmayera.
21.30: Hangal bǝrni sammaye caa cije, jama cagasiaro isane Bulussa cadane gǝrjane Fado Alayen kettuluwunniyama, cinnadǝa jakkera.
21.31: Tia njejoro majai duwon, kajalla sojiya Rombe lawar hangalsango Jerujalem ngan cijǝnayedǝa fangeno.
21.32: Sadǝman kǝwuwa sojiyaye-a kuranja-aa ngoje jamadǝyero ngǝrǝmbaro kadira. Jamadǝ tayia kerunniya, Bulussa baktu kolyera.
21.33: Daji kajalladǝ karǝnje tia cǝdane wada ce tia saɍga yindin cakkero yeno. Ti wundu, koro awi cǝdo cǝne kiworo.
21.34: Curo jamadǝyen laanja awo laa yiljane wuljai, laa ye awo gade yiljane wuljai. Hangalsangodǝro awima rakce asujiwawodǝ, wada ce Bulussa sojidiro caado yeno.
21.35: Bulus kǝmbaramdǝro kadinniya, gǝrgadu jamadǝye nangaro sojiyadǝ tia samero ngoyera.
21.36: Jama samma yiljaiaro: «Yeje tia!» cane tayia geya. Bulusse kǝla mowo fuwu cammo yaudiyayen
21.37: Sa Bulussa sojidiro casakkidǝn, kajalladǝro: «Amarsǝgǝne, awo laa wulnjǝgǝkke,» yeno. Tiro: «Ase, tǝlam Gǝresse nonǝmma wa?
21.38: Ni gǝni wa kam Masarre tussǝnni tuɍu cǝde karaaro kamceji dǝwu dewu cadǝnadǝ?» cǝne kiworo.
21.39: Bulusse: «Wu yaudi bǝrni Tarsus cidi Kilikiyaye, kam bǝladeyaye gǝni. Lowonjǝkkǝna, kolsǝne jamaro jandegǝkko,» yeno.
21.40: Amari kenniya, Bulus kǝmbaramdǝlan daje jamaro mukko sapkeyeno. Tayi samma gǝm kedǝnniya, tǝlam yaudiyaudin tayiro:

22.1: «Kǝramiya so, bawani so, awo kǝlani moworo kǝrma wulnjagakkidǝa fannowo!» yeno.
22.2: Tǝlam yaudiyaudin tayiro jandejiyiro fangeranniya, cayemaa kojǝnaro gǝm kedo. Daji Bulusse tayiro:
22.3: «Wu yaudi, bǝrni Tarsus cidi Kilikiyayen katambǝkko, amma bǝrni adǝn wurayekko. Fuwura Gamaliyellero wallǝkke wadawa kaariyandeye sammaa taldu bawoaro ga kiɍǝkko. Caman wuye Alaa kasattuni dama bawo, ku nayi diwidǝ gai.
22.4: Am jawal Isayea jagaidǝa basarnǝkke har laa sanuna, laa yea kwan kamun gerǝkke kosoro kekkǝkko,
22.5: ɍiman kura-a majiliswu samma-a ye kǝlanin shedajaidǝ gai. Nanjan wotiyawa kǝramiya yaudiyaro ruwuwada kimowokkǝniya, tayi bǝrni Damassen dasaana yea Jerujalembo tikkerǝna kudǝkke ajawu tayiro gǝnajagai nǝkke jawal kidakko. Bulusse kǝla Isaa gamaro walduyen wuldu
22.6: «Kausu dawu gai ledu dikki duwon, Damassa karǝngekkǝniya, sadǝman nur kura sameye laa yiyilje wua dirise kǝlseno.
22.7: Cidiro bǝp yurukke kowo laa nukce wuro: “Shawulu, Shawulu, awiro wua basarsǝmidǝ?” cǝne fangekko.
22.8: Wuye: “Kǝma, ni wundu?” nǝkke kiworǝkkǝniya, tiye: “Wuma Isa kam Najaratte basarsǝmidǝ wo,” yeno.
22.9: Am wua sasadduwidǝ nurdǝa caruna, amma kowo ti wuro jandesiyidǝyedǝa fanjanni.
22.10: Daji wuye: “Awi gǝle dikki, Kǝma?” nǝkke kiworǝkkǝniya, Kǝmadǝye wuro: “Cine Damasso lene, na todǝn awo Ala niro kadarnjǝgǝna dimi sammaa wulnjagai,” yeno.
22.11: Nur kuradǝ cakke har rukkiwaworo wallǝkkǝna nangaro, am wua sasadduwidǝ mukkoyen jesane Damasso kadikko.
22.12: «Damaslan kam laa tiro Ananiya cani mbeji. Tidǝ Attaura Nawi Musayelan mumin, koro yaudiya bǝrnidǝn dasaana samma ngǝlanju wuljai.
22.13: Daji naniro ise daje: “Kǝramini Shawulu, sim fande!” yeno. Sadǝman sim fandǝkke tia kirukko.
22.14: Koro walde wuro: “Ala kaariyandeyedǝ rawonjua none, Jiremadǝa rui, koro kowo cinjuyedǝa fannero nia kǝrenjǝna,
22.15: dalilnjudǝ shedamanjuro wallǝme adamgǝna sammaro awo rumma-a fannǝmma-aa wulgǝmi nangaro.
22.16: Kǝrma, awi gurenǝmi? Cine, cunju bowonǝmiaro kasala njaddo, biwuwanǝm tulja!” yeno. Bulusse na kǝrdiyayero nodo
22.17: «Jerujalembo walladakkǝniya, Fado Alayen moduwa dikki duwon, wahayi laa wua sǝdane
22.18: Kǝmaye wuro: “Jǝktǝgǝne, duwaduwan Jerujalemlan luwe, shedanǝm kǝla wuyen ngojaiwawo nangaro,” cǝni kirukko.
22.19: Wuye: “Kǝma, calan wudǝ dandal dandalnin am nia kasannjanaa kosoro yakkǝkke kowonǝkkidǝa tayi kǝlanjama nojana.
22.20: Koro sa Istifanus shedamanǝmdǝye bunju fijanadǝn, wu ye nanjan danǝkke kasaddǝkke, har kalwu am tia ceyesiyedǝa gureyekko.”
22.21: Daji Kǝmaye wuro: “Lene, kuruwuro na kǝrdiyayero njunodǝkki!” yeno.» Bulus sojidilan
22.22: Jamadǝ Bulussa kǝrǝnjai ngai duwon, mana kǝla kǝrdiyayen wulyenniya, kowo sapcane yiljane: «Yeje, tia dunian sigǝne! Tia roa koldu jussǝnni!» yera.
22.23: Yiljane kalwunja gǝpcane katti samero yiyirjagai ngai duwon,
22.24: dalil jamadǝ kǝlanjun yiljaidǝa nodu cǝraana nangaro, kajalladǝ wada ce sojiyadǝ tia cada sojididǝro casakko kowoja yeno.
22.25: Tia kowojaro kekkerǝnniya, Bulus soji kura fuwunjun daadadǝro: «Wowom Rombe amarnjagane shara yidduwwilan kam Rombea kowonuwi wa?» cǝne kiworo.
22.26: Soji kuradǝ adǝa fangenniya, leje kajalladǝro: «Awi dio manǝmi? Kam adǝ kam Rombe, diye!»
22.27: Daji kajalladǝ na Bulussero ise tiro: «Wulsǝgǝne, ni kam Rombe wa?» cǝne kiworǝnniya, tiro: «Aaa,» yeno.
22.28: Kajalladǝye: «Wu wuɍi kadan kam Rombero walyekko,» yenniya, Bulusse: «Wudǝ, kam Rombe katambǝkko!» yeno.
22.29: Sadǝman am tia kororo dabbardanadǝ koljane sapkadara. Kajalladǝ ye riyeno, dalilnjudǝ ti kam Rombe, koro tia cikkerǝna nangaro. Bulus fuwu majilissen
22.30: Wayenniya, kajalla Rombedǝ dalil yaudiya Bulusso ayau gǝnajaanadǝyea tabbatto noduro maji nangaro, wurawa ɍimannaye-a majiliswu samma-aro wada captuye ce Bulussa wuije caade fuwunjan dayeno.

23.1: Bulus majiliswudǝa ninije tayiro: «Kǝramiyani, har kuro karwunin saɍiwu bawoaro fuwu Alayen kǝrgakko,» yeno.
23.2: Ɍiman kura Ananiya am gǝre Bulussen daadadǝro cinju bakca yeno.
23.3: Daji Bulusse tiro: «Ala nia bannji, ni garu garuda bullan cingadadǝ! Attauraa gamilan shara sǝddero napkadanǝm duwon, wua bansa nǝme Attaura ga wayem!»
23.4: Am nadǝn daadadǝye tiro: «Ɍiman kura Alayedǝa ranǝmi wa?» yeranniya,
23.5: Bulusse: «Kǝramiyani, tima ɍiman kura woro nokkǝni, kitawulan ruwuwada: “Bare kǝla fuwuma jamanǝmben manakuttu wullǝmmi!”» yeno.
23.6: Bulus laanja Sadusiya, laa ye Farisawaro asuyenniya, majilislan kowo sapce: «Kǝramiya, wu Farisa, tada Farisawaye. Kǝla karmolan cidu mbejiro tǝmakkǝnayen wuro shara saddi,» yeno.
23.7: Adǝa wulyenniya, katte Farisawa-a Sadusiya-ayen kambiwu cije majilisdǝ yakkadan.
23.8: Awoa Sadusiyadǝ cinowo ye bawo, malaiya so, jinni so ye bawo cani, amma Farisawadǝ awo ani samma mennaro kasaccana.
23.9: Daji kalala ngǝwu ciyeno. Malǝmba Attauraye kǝwu Farisawaye laa cijane mana jau cade: «Kam adǝn awima diwi fandiyende. Jinni bi malaiya laa tiro jandejǝgǝnaa, nda?» yera.
23.10: Kambiwudǝ tai daje jaujǝnaro walyenniya, kajalladǝ Bulussa njanjakcairo rijǝna nangaro, wada ce kǝwu sojiyaye ngasawo tia dawunjan cada sojididǝro kalakca yeno.
23.11: Buneyenniya, Kǝma gǝrenjun daje tiro: «Karwunǝm gere! Jerujalemnin kǝlanin shedanǝmmadǝ gai, sai bǝrni Rombe yen shedanǝmiya!» yeno. Bulussa roro njejoro mada
23.12: Wayenniya, yaudiya laa ci kǝljane awima jawuiwawo casaiwaworo kansi jawune sai Bulussa roro ceyesiya duwon yera.
23.13: Am ci kǝlda adǝa cadǝnadǝ tayi fidewumaa kojǝna.
23.14: Daji na wurawa ɍimannaye-a amwurawa-ayero lejane tayiro: «Awima buiyewawo yaiyewaworo kansi jau buiyena, sai Bulussa roro yejiyeya duwon!
23.15: To, kǝrma nayidǝ majiliswu-a rokko lamarnju kalkallo koruwi gairo kajalladǝro tia nandoro cuwudo wullowo. Andi ye kawu isimaro, tia njejoro dabbardiyena,» yera.
23.16: Amma Bulusse tadanju tiro rawama wo ci kǝlda adǝa fangenniya, sojididǝro leje ngaye Bulusso wulyeyeno.
23.17: Daji Bulus sojiya kuraye falnja bowoje tiro: «Jairo adǝa kajalladǝyero yade, awo laa tiro wulduwuye cǝdana,» yeno.
23.18: Daji sojidǝ tia ngoje na kajalladǝyero cade tiro: «Bulus kosoma wua bowose jairo adǝa nanǝmbo kudǝkko yeno, awo laa niro wulnjiyi mbeji nangaro.»
23.19: Kajalladǝ jairodǝa mukkoyen cǝdane sǝgǝriro cuttuluwe tiro: «Awi wuro wulduwuye tam?» cǝne kiworo.
23.20: Tiye: «Yaudiya laa kǝla Bulussen kalkallo cawori gairo baɍi majilisso yadero njawori cane cinja kǝljana.
23.21: Amma bare tayia kasaddǝmmi, curonjan am fidewumaa kojana cinja kǝljane tia ceyesǝnnin awima jawuiwawo casaiwaworo kansi jawuna. Kǝrmadǝ tayi dabbardana, amarinǝm bas gurejai,» yeno.
23.22: Daji kajalladǝ jairodǝro: «Bare wundumaro awo ania wulsǝgǝmmaro wulgǝmmi!» cǝne tia kolje leyeno. Bulussa mukko Gomna Felissero njakko
23.23: Kajalladǝ soji kura yindi bowoje tayiro: «Soji yer yindi-a soji fǝrwu fitulur-a soji kajaaa yer yindi-a cammowo, sa lǝgar buneyen bǝrni Kaisariyayero leduro dabbardǝnowo!
23.24: Fǝr kǝmbaye ye dabbarnowo, Bulus tiro juwa kǝlewa salainin tia na Gomna Felissero yadowo!» cǝne
23.26: «Barganǝmmin Gomna Felis, ngǝwuro dǝgai! Wuma Kǝlodiyus Lisiyas.
23.27: Kam adǝa yaudiya cadana roro ceyesi duwon, ti kam Rombero fangekkǝniya, wu-a sojiyani-a isiye tia mukkonjalan kimowokko.
23.28: Ayau fi tiro gǝnajagaidǝa nokkoro tia majilisnjaro kiadǝkko.
23.29: Kǝla mana laa wadanjayen ayau gǝnajaaro asuyekko, amma ayaunju fima karmo bi kosoro njakkoye wajipcǝnni.
23.30: Kǝlanjun ci kǝlda mbejiro fangekkǝniya, sadǝman tia juwanjǝgǝkke am tiro ayau gǝnajaanadǝ yero fuwunǝmnin sonja njaddo yekko.»
23.31: Daji sojiyadǝ wadanja jaane Bulussa ngojane curo buneyen bǝrni Antifatirissero kesado.
23.32: Wajǝnanjua fǝrwudǝ tia casadduworo koljane sojididǝro walladara.
23.33: Soji fǝrwudǝ bǝrni Kaisariyayero isane wotiyadǝa Gomnaro kedǝnniya, Bulus yea mukkonjuro kesakko.
23.34: Gomna wotiyadǝa kǝrayenniya, Bulusso ti lardu fiye cǝne kiworo. Ti lardu Kilikiyayero fangenniya,
23.35: tiye: «Am niro ayau gǝnanjaanadǝ isaiya, mananǝm fakki,» yeno. Daji Bulussa mairi Mai Hirudussero caado gureja yeno.

24.1: Ngawo kawu uwuyen ɍiman kura Ananiya-a amwurawa laa-a goninja sharaye tiro Tartulus cani-a bǝrni Kaisariyayero isane sonja kǝla Bulussen Gomnaro keddo.
24.2: Bulussa kewudǝnniya, Tartulus tiro ayau gǝnaduwu badiyeno. Gomnaro: «Barganǝmmin, kǝrmainǝmlan naptu nanlewayen kǝrgaiye. Curo nanrashidunǝmben awowa bǝɍin nianǝme jamandero yiddǝmmadǝ casakke kǝjiro lardu adǝ tai daje fuwu juwuna.
24.3: Ndaran yaye sa fin yaye, Gomna, awowa dimma ani nga nangaro nia jaumaro wusenjiyena!
24.4: Barganǝmmin, manani kuruwujiwawo. Adǝ nangaro marne lowonjǝkkǝna, kanadinǝmbo kanadi yirgai, gana laaro kǝrǝnsane.
24.5: Kam adǝa fitǝnama kuraro kiruiye, dunia ngan curo yaudiyayen hangalsango cǝsangi, koro ti kǝwu adin kattuwuye tiro Najaratwu canidǝye fuwuma.
24.6: Fado Alayedǝmaa tayir gǝniro dio majǝna duwon, tia kidaiye. [Kǝla wadandeyen tiro shara njǝddoro kirayiye,
24.7: amma Lisiyas kajalladǝ ise duno bul foknin tia mukkonden cǝmoye
24.8: am tiro ayau gǝnajaanadǝro nanǝmbo isa yeno.] Tia korǝmia, ni kǝlanǝmma awo kǝlanjun wulliyena sammaa nonǝmi.»
24.9: Yaudiyadǝ ye ayaudǝro duno cade jirero tabbatkeyera. Bulusse kǝla mowo fuwu Gomna Felissen
24.10: Daji Gomna tiro manajoro alama kenniya, Bulusse: «Ku kǝrwu kada jama adǝro shara yiddǝmi nokkǝnadǝro, karwu kǝjiaro fuwunǝmnin kǝlani mowokki.
24.11: Barganǝmmin, rangǝme tabbatto nonǝmidǝ gai, ku kawu mewun yindin kojǝnni Jerujalembo Alaro ambǝttuwuro lekkǝna.
24.12: Fado Alayen, bi curo dandallayen, bi curo bǝrniyen kambiwu wunduma-a diye ye sarunni, jamaa yakkǝkke hangalsango cadi ye nasaganni.
24.13: Koro awo kǝrma kǝrsaanadǝa rakcane fuwunǝmnin tabbaccagaiwawo.
24.14: Amma adǝa federo wulnjǝgǝkki, Ala kaariyandeyero ambǝtkǝkke Jawal duwon tayi adin jireye gǝni canidǝa gakki. Awo Attaura-a kitawuwa nawiyaye-alan ruwuwada sammaa kasaddǝkkǝna.
24.15: Koro cinowo jirewu-a jirenambuwu-a sammaye mbejiro Alalan tǝmania, tǝma duwon tayi kǝlanja kasaccanadǝ.
24.16: Adǝ nangaro sawi yaye kowoɍinǝkke karwunin saɍiwu bawoaro fuwu Ala-a jama-ayen kǝrgakko.
24.17: «Ngawo kǝrwu kadayen wuɍi sadaaye jamandero kudǝme bu fida Alaro njǝddoro waldǝkke kadikko.
24.18: Ngaima duwon, Fado Alayen lamar tayirro walduye dikkǝnaye ngawon naseyera. Nanilan jama ye bawo, hangalsango ye bawo.
24.19: Amma yaudiya laa cidi Asiyaye mbeji. Awo laa wuro kǝrduwuye cadanaa, ngǝlanjudǝ tayima nanǝmbo isa wuro kǝrsaa.
24.20: Bi am anima sa fuwu majilissen dakkǝnadǝn ayau wulan cawandǝnadǝa wulja.
24.21: Ra, fuwunjan danǝkke kowo dunoaro sammǝkke mana fal adǝa dikke: “Kǝla cinowo am sanunayen ku sharasuwi,” wullǝkkǝnadǝ?»
24.22: Daji Gomna Felis Jawaldǝa ngǝlaro nojǝnadǝ, manadǝa fuwuro gǝrje tayiro: «Yim Lisiyas kajalladǝ isiya, shara njaddǝkki,» cǝne
24.23: soji kura laaro wada ce Bulussa kosoramlan roja, amma tiro kasam cado koro bare amnjuro isǝme meradunju galdu dapcaganni yeno. Bulus fuwu Gomna Felis-a kamunju Durusila-ayen
24.24: Ngawo kawu ganayen Gomna Felis kamunju yaudi tiro Durusila cani-a rokko kadinniya, cunode Bulussa cawude tia kǝla Isa Almasiwua kasattuyen manaje kǝrǝngeno.
24.25: Kǝla jire dio so, kǝla ɍiwo so, shara Alaye fuwun isi soyen jandejiyi ngai duwon, Gomna rije tiro: «Kǝrma kolle lene, dama fandǝkkiya, bowonjǝkki,» yeno.
24.26: Sa adǝ yen Bulus tiro wuɍi ciro tǝmajǝna nangaro, ngǝwuro tia bowoje jandejai.
24.27: Kǝrwu yindi kidǝnniya, Gomna Felis jǝpce cujunjuro Fokiyus Festus giwa. Yaudiyadǝro ser njǝddo cǝraana nangaro, Gomna Felis Bulussa curo kosoyen kolyeno.

25.1: Gomna Festus lardudǝro isǝnaye kawu yakkua, bǝrni Kaisariyayen cije Jerujalembo leyeno.
25.2: Wurawa ɍimannaye-a fuwuwu yaudiyaye-a nanjuro isane Bulusso ayau gǝnajagane lowojane
25.3: tayiro ser laa cǝddo Bulussa Jerujalembo kalakcoro keworo, tia jawallan kapkǝgǝme njejoye nia ngojana nangaro.
25.4: Amma Gomnaye tayiro: «Bulussa bǝrni Kaisariyayen rojai, koro wu kǝlani tussǝkkiwawo bǝrnidǝro waldǝkki.
25.5: Fuwuwundo laa wua saa leniyo, kamdǝn awo laa diwi mennaa, tia burwuja!» yeno.
25.6: Gomna dawunjan kawu wusku bi mewua kojǝnniro napkenniya, bǝrni Kaisariyayero walladan. Wajǝnanjua shararambo leje napce Bulussa cawudo yeno.
25.7: Kewudǝnniya, yaudiya Jerujalemlan isanadǝ tia dirijane kǝljane ayau kada jau fit gǝnayeyera, amma tayiro tabbattuwu katkero.
25.8: Bulusse kǝlanju moworo: «Wada yaudiyayero, bi Fado Alayero, bi Kaisarro biwu fimaa yiddǝkkǝni!» yeno.
25.9: Gomna yaudiyaro ser njǝddo cǝraana nangaro, Bulusso: «Jerujalembo lenǝme na todǝn kǝla awo adǝyen shara njǝddǝkki raamma wa?» cǝne tia kiworo.
25.10: Bulusse: «Akkoni shararam Kaisarren daada, na adǝman sharani kamduma jussǝna wo. Awima diwi yaudiyaro yiddǝkkǝniro ni kǝlanǝm dam nonǝmma.
25.11: Jireni bawoa, bi awo laa diwi shara karmoye dikkǝnaa, karmoro kadǝkkiwawo. Amma ayau am ani wuro gǝnasaanadǝ jire gǝnia, wundumaro wua mukkonjaro njakko amardǝgǝnni. Kaisar wuro shara sǝddo!» yeno.
25.12: Daji Gomna Festus galawunju-a sawargadaranniya, tiro: «Kaisar niro shara njǝddiya, raam? To, na Kaisarrero lenǝmi!» yeno. Sawari Gomna Festus-a Mai Agarifa-aye kǝla Bulussen
25.13: Kawu gana koyenniya, Mai Agarifa-a Mairam Baniyatu-a lewa Gomna Festussero bǝrni Kaisariyayero kadira.
25.14: Bǝrnidǝn kawu kadaro napcana duwon, Gomna Festus awo Bulussa wujǝnaa maidǝro wuljiye tiro: «Na adǝn curo kosoyen kam laa Gomna Felis koljǝna mbeji.
25.15: Jerujalembo leyekkǝniya, wurawa ɍimannaye-a amwurawa yaudiyaye-a kǝlanjun sonja sakkude tiro shara karmoye kekkoro.
25.16: Wuye tayiro kam burwujanadǝ fuwu am tia burwujanayen kǝlanju moworo sonjaye kǝlan dama mana dioye cuwandǝnnin sharanju kamdudǝ ada am Rombe gǝni yekko.
25.17: «Daji bǝrni adǝro kadiranniya, wajǝnanjua dǝgallǝkke shararambo lekke nammǝkke kamdǝa cawudo yekko.
25.18: Am burwujanadǝ mana dioro dayeranniya, ayau jau tǝmakkǝnadǝa gǝni gǝnajaa,
25.19: biya kǝla adinnja-a kam laa cunju Isa nuna duwon Bulusse ti roa cǝni-ayen kambiwudai.
25.20: Wu ye jiɍi dikke awo ania kokorǝkkiro nokkǝnidǝ, Bulusso Jerujalembo leje na todǝn tiro shara yiddǝkki cǝraana wa nǝkke tia kiworǝkko.
25.21: Amma waje Bargaanju Kaisar sharanju cǝddoro tia roja yenniya, har kawu na Kaisarrero juwagǝkkiro tia kosolan roja yekko.»
25.22: Mai Agarifaye: «Wu ye kam adǝa kǝrǝnnǝkkiya, raakko,» yenniya, Gomna Festusse tiro: «Baɍi tia kǝrǝnnǝmi,» yeno.
25.23: Wajǝnanjua Mai Agarifa-a Mairam Baniyatu-a ngawomaila jauro darajaalan isane tayi-a kajallawa-a fuwuwu bǝrnidǝye-a soro kura majilissero kasargawo. Gomna Festus wada kenniya, Bulus yea kewudo.
25.24: Daji Gomnaye: «Mai Agarifa-a nayi captuwwa samma-a, akko kam kǝlanjun jama yaudiya samma Jerujalemnin kal, bǝrni adǝn kal lowosane dunoaro kowo sapcane dunian baworo waljiya, jusso cannadǝa ruwi.
25.25: Wudǝ, awima tia roro njejoye cǝdǝnniro asunǝkkǝna. Amma Bargaanju Kaisar tiro shara cǝddiya cǝrawo cǝnnadǝro, nia ngokke tia nanjuro juwagǝkki yekko.
25.26: Mana kibbu kǝlanjun kǝmaniro ruwuduwuye takkǝni. Adǝma nangaro tia fuwundoro kiwudǝkko, tagǝnasso fuwunǝmbo, Mai Agarifa, tia kokoriyeya, awo ruwuduye fandǝkkoro,
25.27: dalilnjudǝ kosoma ayaunju ruwudǝnni duwon juwaduwudǝ jussǝnniro kirukko.»

26.1: Daji Mai Agarifaye Bulusso: «Kǝlanǝmnin mana dioro niro amardǝgǝna,» yenniya, Bulus mukko sapce kǝlanju moworo mana badiyeno:
26.2: «Barganǝmmin, ku kǝla ayau yaudiya gǝnasaana sammayen kǝlani moworo fuwunǝmlan mana dikkidǝ, kǝji fakki,
26.3: tagǝnasso ada so, kambiwu so yaudiyaye ngaa ngǝlamaro nonǝmmadǝro. Adǝ nangaro lowonjǝkkǝna, marne wua kanadilan kǝrǝnsǝne.
26.4: «Yaudiya samma tǝn gananilan dawu jamandeye yen, Jerujalem yen kǝndǝgaini dikkǝnadǝa nojana.
26.5: Tussǝna wua nosanadǝ, caraanaa, wu kǝwu adinnde jau fit Farisawayedǝa gakkǝnaro rakcane shedasai.
26.6: Koro kǝrma wadu duwon Ala kaariyandero ngojǝgǝnadǝyen tǝmania nangaro, shara kamsagai.
26.7: Jiɍinde mewun yindin ye wadu adǝn tǝmanjaa bune-a kausu-a dadu baworo Alaro ambǝccagai. Barganǝmmin, wadu adǝma nangaro yaudiya wuro ayau gǝnaseyera!
26.8: A! Awiro gǝle nayiye Ala amba karmolan cǝsangidǝro tǝmmaro yojiwawo nuwidǝ?
26.9: «Calan wu kǝlanidǝ cu Isa kam Najarattea baworo dioro awo ngǝwu dikkoro ngǝlaro kirukko.
26.10: Adǝmaa Jerujalemlan dikko. Na wurawa ɍimannayen amari fandǝkke muminna kada kosoro kekkǝkko. Koro sa tayia roro ceyesǝnadǝn, wu ye kasaddǝkkǝna.
26.11: Dandal samman ngǝwuro Isaa bassaro tayiro wowom gǝnagǝkki. Karwuni tayia wul wajǝna nangaro, har bǝrniya lardu gadeyero lekke tayia basarnǝkki. Bulusse waldǝme kǝla Isaa gamaro walduyen wuldu
26.12: «Adǝgaima kǝnduwo-a amari-a wurawa ɍimannayealan bǝrni Damassero lekki duwon,
26.13: Barganǝmmin, kausu kǝla dawu gai jawallan nur sameye laa kǝngalmaa yiyildun kojǝna wu-a am sasadduwi-aa wasse dirisane kǝlsana kirukko.
26.14: Andi samma cidiro kikkuruiyendeya, kowo laa tǝlam yaudiyaudin wuro: “Shawulu, Shawulu, awiro wua basarsǝmidǝ? Ka satǝran baktu niro jau,” cǝne fangekko.
26.15: “Kǝma, ni wundu?” nǝkke kiworǝkkǝniya, Kǝmadǝye: “Wuma Isa basarsǝmidǝ wo.
26.16: Kua cine, dane! Dalil niro fǝledǝgǝkkǝnayedǝ, tima kadunomani ye, shedamani awo ku rumma-a fuwun fǝlenjǝgǝkki-aye yero njǝdǝkkoro.
26.17: Mukko jamanǝm-a jama kǝrdiyaye-ayen nia njǝmowokki. Kǝrdiyadǝyero juwanjǝgǝkke
26.18: simnja kanǝmi, tayia curo duwuyen tuluwume nurro yakkǝmi, koro tayia kǝnduwo Yiwulissen tuluwume Alayero kalakkǝmi. Adǝgaima gawara biwuye cawandi, koro curo am duwon kambǝrsenja nangaro tayirro waljanadǝyen nuwanja ye cawandi.”
26.19: «Barganǝmmin, adǝ nangaro wahayi sameye adǝa ga wakkǝni,
26.20: amma burwon am Damassero mana Alaye wulyeyekko, daji am Jerujalembe-a cidi Yahudiyaye sammaye-aro, har jama kǝrdiyaro wulyeyekko. Tayiro tǝmja, na Alayero walda, koro kǝndo tuwa jireye fǝlejisoa cado yekko.
26.21: Adǝma nangaro yaudiya laa Fado Alayen wua sadane njejoro masera.
26.22: Amma har kumaro bana Alaye fandǝkkǝna, nadǝn danǝkke am kuran ganan sammaro shedagǝkki. Awima gade wullǝkkiwawo, sai awo Nawi Musa-a nawiya gade-a wakkaji cannadǝ:
26.23: Almasiwu bone cai, tima burwon karmolan ciji, koro amnde-a jama kǝrdiya-aro nur mawojiyi.» Bulusse Mai Agarifaa Isaa garo dodu
26.24: Bulus awo ania kǝlanju moworo wuldu cǝdi ngai duwon, Gomna Festus kowo sapce tiro: «Bulus, ni joɍi! Kǝranǝm ngǝwu nia njakke joɍinǝmma!» yenniya,
26.25: Bulusse tiro: «Barganǝmmin Gomna Festus, wu joɍi gǝni. Hangalnia cor jire bas makki.
26.26: Mai Agarifa awo ani sammaa nojǝna, koro tiro ridu bawoaro jandegǝkki. Asǝrramben gǝni wakkajanadǝro, awo maidǝ nojǝnni falma baworo nokkǝna.
26.27: Barganǝmmin Mai Agarifa, nawiyadǝa kasaddǝmma wa? Kasaddǝmmaro nokkǝna!»
26.28: Daji maidǝye Bulusso: «A! Sam falnin wa wua kǝristaro sǝdǝmi tǝmanǝm?» yenniya,
26.29: Bulusse tiro: «Sam falnin yaye, ngǝwun yaye, ni runǝm gǝni, am ku wua kǝrǝnsai samma saɍga aniro kajia, wu gairo waljaro Alaa korǝkki.»
26.30: Daji maidǝ-a gomnadǝ-a Mairam Baniyatu-a am tayi-a rokko napkada-a cijane
26.31: keluwunniya, kattenjan: «Kam adǝ awima karmo bi kosoro njakkoye wajipcǝna cǝdi bawo,» cani.
26.32: Daji Mai Agarifaye Gomna Festusso: «Ca Kaisar tiro shara cǝddo cǝnnia, rangiye tia kolliye,» yeno.

27.1: Lardu Italiyayero maaran leniyero nia ngoyeranniya, Bulus-a kosowu gade laa-a mukko Juliyus soji kura laa kǝwu sojiya Kaisarrero kesakko.
27.2: Maara bǝrni Adǝramitiyaye laa bǝrniya jarara cidi Asiyayea jǝgairo ngayiye leyeiye. Curonden kam laa bǝrni Tasalonika lardu Makidoniyaye tiro Aristarkus cani mbeji.
27.3: Wajǝnanjua bǝrni Sidonnero kadiyendeya, Juliyus nanngǝla Bulusso fǝlejiye tia kolje sawawanjuyero mǝradunju galjaro leyeno.
27.4: Na adǝn sapkadaiyendeya, karuwa ledu damsagaidǝro, kanji karuwa duno bawoa cuku Kuwirussen gaiye koyeiye.
27.5: Daji kanji lardu Kilikiyaye-a Bamfiliyaye-a kaduniyearo tekudǝa falliye koniye bǝrni Mira lardu Lisiyayero kadiye.
27.6: Nadǝn soji kuradǝ maara laa bǝrni Aleksandariyaye lardu Italiyayero leji cuwande andia curonjuro sesakko.
27.7: Kawu kadaro yila yilayen fuwuniye duwon, kiaddin bǝrni Kinidusse karǝngeiye. Karuwa kolsane kǝla fuwunna leniyewawodǝ, kanji karuwa duno bawoa cuku Kǝrettero leniye niye fuwu bǝla Salmoniyen diriniye koyeiye.
27.8: Jararadǝa gaiyearo kiaddin fuwuro leniye duwon, na tiro Daduram Ngǝla Maara Ingiye cani karǝn bǝrni Lasiyayero kadiye.
27.9: Bǝlawuronde kawu ngǝwu juwe asemdǝ kojǝna nangaro maaran ledudǝ jauro masiwaaro walyeno. Adǝ nangaro Bulus am ti-a kallo lejaiye sǝmo kasse
27.10: tayiro: «Jama, bǝlawurodǝ maara-a kare-a runja gǝni, rondemaro banna so, asar kura so cukkudiro rukki.»
27.11: Amma soji kuradǝ awo Bulus wulji yayero mana kura maara kǝriduwuye-a kǝma maaramaye-ayedǝmaa ardijo.
27.12: Nangǝɍilan daduram maaraye adǝn naptudǝ kǝji gǝni nangaro, amdǝye ngǝwunja nadǝn saptuye nia ngoyera. Yojia, Fenisso lejane nadǝn nangǝɍi kojai yera, Fenisdǝ daduram maaraye cuku Kǝrette anǝmfǝde-a yalafǝde-aro ci. Karuwa dunoa tekuye
27.13: Kasam laa anǝmbe fudu badiyenniya, maarawudǝ awo majaidǝa cawandǝna cane sunu ingilan cattuluwe jarara cuku Kǝrette jaane leyera.
27.14: Amma sam kidǝnniya, karuwa dunoa tiro Karuwa Yalagǝdimi cani kanji cukudǝyen tai daje fuje
27.15: maaradǝa dap kida. Kanji karuwadǝyero suwordu tiyero nangaro, kolliye karuwadǝ andia seado.
27.16: Cuku tǝngǝɍi laa tiro Kauda canidǝye kanjinju karuwa gana fuludǝnadǝro koyeiyendeya, kiaddin maara ganadǝa kanjindero gǝrniye
27.17: maaradǝro isatatkeyeiye, maarawudǝ jelan maara kuradǝa cidiya samennaro dirijane kǝljane mit kekkero. Bare Sirtisdǝro gǝmdaganniro batta maara judaramdǝa casaye koljane karuwadǝ maaradǝa tǝmbalyeno.
27.18: Karuwadǝ jaumaro bansaidǝ, dunia wayenniya, kare curo tekuyero gǝptuwu badiyera.
27.19: Koro yimbe yakkua kare kidaye maaradǝyea mukkonjaman ingidǝro gǝpkeyera.
27.20: Keyera dama bawodǝro kawu kadaro kǝngal bi sillowu ruiyende, har tǝmande njǝkkawoye sammaa kolyeiye.
27.21: Tussǝna kǝmbo jawunnidǝ, Bulus dawunjan daje tayiro: «Jama, ca manani bare cuku Kǝrette kolliyendedǝa ngonuwwaa, banna-a asar-a ani ngaro kaniyena.
27.22: Amma kǝrma marnowo, karwundo gerowo! Wundundoma nuiwawo, maaradǝ runjumaa fuddiye.
27.23: Fannowo, bune adǝman malaiya Ala duwon wu kaanju ye, gakki yedǝye gǝrenin daje
27.24: wuro: “Bulus, bare rinǝmmi! Dole fuwu Kaisarren danǝmi, koro akko Ala njunonje njadduwowunǝm sammaye ro cǝkkayi,” yeno.
27.25: To, jama, karwundo gerowo! Wulsǝgǝnadǝ gai kalkallo wakkajiro Alaa mǝrsanǝkkǝna.
27.26: Amma sai cuku laaro gǝmdiyiyeya,» yeno.
27.27: Kawu mewu deri kidǝnniya, bunenjua karuwa dunoadǝ andia kǝla teku Adariyayen tǝmbaldu cǝdi duwon, dǝrdu yindi gai maarawudǝ cidi karǝnniyenaro tǝmayera.
27.28: Nankuruwu ingiye ngalyeranniya, nganji findi kewando. Gana fuwujane gademinno ngalyeranniya, mewu wuri kewando.
27.29: Maaradǝ kauwasoro gǝgǝmdiyiro rijanadǝ, sunu dewu ngawo maaradǝyen ingiro talarjagane wadu duniaye waryera.
27.30: Daji maarawudǝ kǝlanja njǝkkaworo gaɍinjagane fuwu maaradǝyen sunuwa ingiro talarjagai cane maara ganadǝa ingiro kolduwu badiyera.
27.31: Bulusse soji kuradǝ-a sojiyadǝ-aro: «Maarawu ani maaradǝn napcaiwawoa, ranguwe rondo yikkawuwwawo!»
27.32: Daji sojiyadǝ je maara ganayedǝa kamjane koljane kikkuro.
27.33: Fajar Bulus kǝmbo jaworo tayi sammaa lowoje: «Akko ku kawundo mewu deri awima buwwi awo wakkaji gurenuwidǝ!
27.34: To, lowonjakkǝna, nanlewandoro buiwo! Ai, kanduɍi kǝla wundundoyema facciyiwawo.»
27.35: Adǝa wulyenniya, Bulus burodi ngoje fuwu tayi sammayen Alaro ardije fǝsakce ngǝro badiyeno.
27.36: Daji tayi samma ye duno cawande gewo.
27.37: Curo maaradǝyen andi am yer yindin fitulurnin lukko arakkun.
27.38: Jawune kulyeranniya, maaradǝ kamboijoro algamadǝa tekuro fiyeyera. Lǝptu maaraye
27.39: Dunia wayenniya, maarawudǝ cididǝa nojanni, amma ci bǝrǝmbe na laa kattia kero. Rakcaia, maaradǝa nadǝro njadoro majai yera.
27.40: Daji sunuwadǝa suwuccane tekun kolyera. Sadǝman je kǝriduramsodǝa rojǝnaa wuijane batta maara judaramdǝa karuwaro casangiye na kattiadǝro gǝrdu badiyera.
27.41: Amma na laa ingi kuruwu gǝniro isane maaradǝa cidiro gǝmgeranniya, fuwunjudǝ kak daje, ngawonjudǝ ye duno tǝmbaɍiyaye cakke nanamdu badiyeno.
27.42: Bare wundunjama kambi cǝde ngǝrǝmjǝnniro, sojiyadǝ kosowu sammaa njejoro nia ngoyera.
27.43: Amma kuranjadǝ Bulussa njǝkkawo cǝraana nangaro, tayiro awo niajanadǝa dapkeyeno. Am kambi nojanadǝro wada ce burwon sǝkta ingiro gǝptaa kambi cado ci tekuyero leja cǝne
27.44: am gadedǝ ye katako so, njongo maaraye soyen kǝlan leja yeno. Adǝgainin wundu yaye kǝlewa salainin ci tekuyero kadio.

28.1: Kǝlewa salainin kadiyendeya, cukudǝro Malita cani fangeiye.
28.2: Am nadǝn dasaanadǝ andiro ser dama baworo fǝleseyera. Ingi cuduri koro kakua nangaro, kannu fujane andi sammaa sosasera.
28.3: Bulus kǝska kǝla fal capce kannuro fiyeyenniya, fusi laa kannu fanje culuwe mukkonjua calje tangaadan.
28.4: Am nadǝyedǝ kadi mukkonjuro tangaada talarji kerunniya, kattenjan: «Jiremaro, kam adǝ kamceji! Tekun ronju kajǝna yaye, shara roa koljiwawo!» yera.
28.5: Daji Bulus kadidǝa secce kannuro gǝpciye kuttu fima tia cuwandǝnni.
28.6: Fuji bi ro bawoa bǝp curiro tǝmajana duwon, ngǝwuro gurejane awima tia cuwandǝnnidǝ, kuronja faljane ti sǝnǝm cani badiyera.
28.7: Karǝn na adǝyen cidi laa lawan cukudǝye Faliyus caniye mbeji. Tidǝ andia kǝjiro kamsagane fannjun kawu yakkuro sosasera.
28.8: Bawa Faliyussedǝ dondi bowada, kange-a njarwo-a tia cadana. Bulus nanjuro leyenniya, mukko gǝnajiye moduwa cǝde isangayeyeno.
28.9: Ngawo adǝyen am dondi cukudǝye gapcana isane tayi ye ngayera.
28.10: Adǝ nangaro andiro jauro bǝrsǝm sade har sa cidundeye kidǝnniya, awo mǝradundero faidaa sammaa sedo. Bulusse bǝrni Rombero kǝnsio
28.11: Ngawo kǝndawu yakkuyen maara laa bǝrni Aleksandariyaye cukudǝn nangǝɍi kojǝna kǝlanjun alama Kawuwa Sǝnǝmbe cǝgarǝnadǝro ngayiye sapkadaiye.
28.12: Bǝrni Sirakussero kadiyendeya, kawu yakkuro napkeiye.
28.13: Nadǝn jararadǝa gaiye duwon, tekudǝa falliye bǝrni Rigiyumbero kadiye. Wajǝnanjua karuwa anǝmbe fudu badiyenniya, kǝla fuwunna ciniye kawu yindin duwon bǝrni Futiyoli canidǝro isiye jǝpkeiye.
28.14: Nadǝn kǝramiya laaa nayeyeiye. Andia dosane dawunjan mawuro napkeiye. Adǝgainin bǝrni Rombero leyeiye.
28.15: Kǝramiya Rombedǝ isiyero fangeranniya, andia kaptuwuro har Kasuwu Afiyusse-a Kusottoram Yakku-aro kadira. Bulus tayia kirunniya, Alaro ardije karwunjun duno kiwando.
28.16: Rombo kadiyendeya, koljane Bulus runju soji gadimanju-a rokko napkeno. Bulusse kawuɍi nodo bargaa Alaye bǝrni Romben alamdu
28.17: Ngawo kawu yakkuyen Bulus fuwuwu yaudiyayea bowoje capkadaranniya, tayiro: «Kǝramiya, awima diwi jamande-a ada kaariyandeye-aro yiddǝkkǝni yaye, Jerujalemlan kosoma gai wua sadane mukko am Rombero sǝrǝnseyera.
28.18: Koro seddǝranniya, ayau fima njejoye wulan bawo nangaro wua koldu kerawo.
28.19: Amma yaudiyadǝ wajanadǝro, ayau jamaniro gǝnaduwuye takkǝni yaye, doleniro sai Kaisar wuro shara sǝddiya yekko.
28.20: Adǝmaro nayia njarukke mana njaddǝkke nǝkke bowongerakko. Nonowo, tǝma Israyilawuye nangaro wu saɍga adǝlan tikkerǝkkǝnadǝ!»
28.21: Daji tayiye tiro: «Andidǝ, wotiya falma lardu Yahudiyaye kǝlanǝmlan fandiyende, koro curo kǝramiyande na todǝn isanayen wunduma diwinǝm wulji fanniyende.
28.22: Amma niyen awo tǝmanǝmma fanduro rayiyena, dalilnjudǝ ndaran yaye kǝwu adǝa wajanaro noniyena,» yera.
28.23: Daji Bulusso sardu kamgeyeranniya, tayi nanngǝwun cayemaa kojǝnaro nanjuro kadira. Suwan tai har kajiriro kude, Bulus nodo bargaa Alayea shedaje Attaura Nawi Musaye-a kitawuwa nawiyaye-alan njuttiye awo Isaa wujǝnaa kasaccaro tayiro kawuɍi kiddo.
28.24: Awo wuljǝnadǝa laanja kasatkera, laa ye kasattu wayera.
28.25: Fandannin duwon, kawu lejaidǝro Bulusse tayiro mana fal cǝdde: «Awo Ruhu Alaye ci Nawi Ishayayen kaariyandoro wuljǝgǝnadǝ jire.
28.26: Tiye: «“Lene, jama adǝro wulle: Ngǝlaro fannuwi duwon, kǝlandoro tǝmmaro ngayiwawo. Koro ngǝlaro ruwi duwon, tǝmmaro asunuwwawo.
28.27: Awoa karwu jama adǝyedǝ kibbajǝna, kiaddin sǝmonja fanjai, simnja yea jakcana, bare simnjan carunni, sǝmonjan fanjanni, koro karwunjan asujanniro. Ngai gǝnia, naniro waldane tuwa cade tayia isangagǝkki.”
28.28: «To, fannowo, lawar njǝkkawo Alaye adǝ jama kǝrdiyayero juwadǝgǝna. Tayidǝ fanjai!»
28.29: [Adǝa wulyenniya, yaudiya kattenjan kambiwu cadiaro sapkadara.]
28.30: Kǝrwu yindi latto Bulus fannju agǝriyen napce, am tia kuroro isai sammaa mukko yindin kapciye,
28.31: wunduma tiro dapcǝgǝnnin tayiro federo kawuɍi nodo bargaa Alaye cǝdde awo Kǝma Isa Almasiwua wujǝnaa alamji kǝrga.

1.1: Wuma Bulus wolodi Isa Almasiwuye ye, kǝngayambo walduro bowowada ye, kawuɍi kǝji Alaye wulduro galaada ye,
1.2: kawuɍi kǝji duwon Ala kuren nawiyanjuyen kitawuwa darajaalan ci cǝne wadu ngojǝnadǝ.
1.3: Kawuɍi kǝjidǝ kǝla Tadanjuyen, ti duwon naptunju adamgǝnayen kaduwu Nawi Daudaye,
1.4: koro kǝla Ruhu Alayen karmolan cidunju nangaro kǝnduwoaro Tada Alayero tabbaccaanadǝ, tima Kǝmande Isa Almasiwu wo.
1.5: Tilaman ser-a nankǝngayam-aa kiwandiye, cunju nangaro amso curo kǝrdiya sammayen tia kasacca jaaro.
1.6: Curonjan nayi ye jama Isa Almasiwuyero walduro bowowada.
1.7: Nayi duwon Ala njaraana ye, muminno walduro bowonjana ye bǝrni Romben dǝgawwa sammaro: Ala Bawande-a Kǝma Isa Almasiwu-a nayiro ser-a nanlewa-a njado! Bulusse Isaa gawu bǝrni Rombea kuroro rawo
1.8: Burwo sallammin Isa Almasiwuyen nayi samma nangaro Alania wusenǝkki, mana kambǝrsendoye dunia ngalan cadidǝro.
1.9: Ala shedamani, ti duwon ronilan ambǝtkǝkke kawuɍi kǝji Tadanjuyea mawonǝkkidǝ, dadu baworo nayia tannjakke
1.10: kullum moduwa njaddǝkki, koro Alaye cǝdia, dama nandoro leduye fandǝkkoro tia korǝkki.
1.11: Nayia kuroro jauro raakkǝna, kǝnjo serre Ruhu Alayen karwundoro duno njoma laa nayiro njaddǝkkoro,
1.12: wotte kattenden kambǝrse kaando-a kakke-ayen andi samma duno fandiyoro.
1.13: Kǝramiya, adǝa nonuwiya, raakko: Kǝrdiya larduwa gadeyen gai, curondo yen nema laa fandǝkkoro ngǝwuro nia nandoro leduye ngokkǝna, amma har kuro fandǝkke lekkǝni.
1.14: Am kǝla fǝrǝmgada yen kal, fǝrǝmdǝnni yen kal, ilmuwu yen kal, ilmuwu gǝni yen kal, tayi sammaro kawuɍi kǝji wulduwuro kǝlaro ngokkǝna.
1.15: Adǝma nangaro nayi bǝrni Romben dǝgawwadǝ yero kawuɍi kǝji wulduwu jauro raakǝnadǝ. Kǝnduwo kawuɍi kǝjiye
1.16: Kǝla kawuɍi kǝjidǝyen nangukkǝni, tima kǝnduwo Alaye kam tia kasaccǝnama fi yayero njǝkkawo kudomadǝ wo, burwon yaudiyaro, koro yaudiya gǝni yero.
1.17: Curo kawuɍi kǝjidǝyen nanjire Alaye fǝledi, nanjire duwon kambǝrseyen isi ye, kambǝrsero simojiyi yedǝ, kitawulan ruwuwadadǝ gai: «Kam jiremadǝ kambǝrseyen roa dǝgai.» ADAMGƎNA SAMMA BIWUWU Kǝrdiya na Alayen biwuwu
1.18: Gǝrgadu Alaye samen kǝla awo nanmuminne gǝni so, jirenambu so samma am jirenambulan jiredǝa gǝrajaidǝyen fǝledi,
1.19: dalilnjudǝ awo kǝla Alayen nodidǝ tayiro farak, Ala tayiro isanojǝgǝna.
1.20: Tǝn dunia alaktǝnayen awowa Alaye taruiwawodǝ nowada, awo alaktǝnadǝyeman federo tarui nangaro, tayima kǝnduwonju sawisoye-a naptunju Alaye-a wo. Adǝgaima amdǝye dalilnja Alaa nodunambuye bawo,
1.21: dalilnjudǝ Alaa nojana yaye, tiro daraja cadǝnni bi tia wusejanni, amma hangalnja ye bowuro walje karwunja hangal bawoadǝ ye duwuaro waljǝna nangaro.
1.22: Hangal kǝjiaro kǝlanjaa ngoyera, amma joɍiyaro waljane
1.23: daraja Ala tǝmmaro nuiwawoyedǝa gumkiya adamgǝna so, ngudowa so, lǝmanna si dewua so, nganjin gǝrdawu soye camunolan falyera.
1.24: Adǝ nangaro mangar diwi karwunjayen Ala tayia curo tayirnambuyen kolje tiyinjan faidadane awo nangua kattenjan kedo.
1.25: Jire Alayedǝa kattuwulan faljane Alaktuma yayero awo alaktǝnaro ambǝccagane sujada keddo. Ala Alaktumadǝmaro har abadaro njungoro tio! Amin.
1.26: Adǝmaro Ala tayia curo jarawa nanguayen kolyeno. Kamuwanja kǝndo kalkaldǝa awo kalkal gǝnilan falyera,
1.27: koro jiɍi adǝgainin kongwawa ye kamuwa-a kǝndo kalkal koljane mǝradu kamanjaye jauro cadane katte kongwawayen awo nangua cade ajawu jawallan luwonjaye wajipcǝnadǝ kǝlanjaro kikkuro.
1.28: Alaa nodudǝa awo ngǝlaro ngoduro wajana nangaro, Ala tayia hangal yeskadaro awo jussǝnni cadoro kolyeyeno.
1.29: Karwunjadǝ jirenambu so, nankǝlado so, mangar diwi so, niadiwi so samma yen cǝmbǝɍǝna, mandǝna so, kam njejo so, lawala so, curoyindi so, awo diwi diwi so yen rapkada. Tayi tarwawu,
1.30: ngadarwu, kǝladowa Alaye, am jau, rokurawu, kǝla fǝleduwu, diwi dioro masku, amwurawanjaa ganambuwu,
1.31: hangalnja bawo, nan'adal so, kǝrawo so, kanjimaɍi so ye bawo.
1.32: Shara Alaye duwon am kǝndo aniso gai cadimadǝro wowom karmoye wajipcǝgǝnadǝa dam nojana yaye, tayi runjua gǝni cadi, koro am cadidǝ yea ardijai.

2.1: Adǝ nangaro, ni duwon ambo shara yiddǝmidǝ, wunduro walyem yaye, dalilnǝm adǝa dioye falma bawo, dalilnjudǝ ni am gadero shara yiddǝmiya, kǝlanǝm sharanǝmi, awo cadidǝmaa dimidǝro.
2.2: Shara Alaye kǝla am kǝndo ania cadimadǝyedǝ jirero noniyena.
2.3: Ni kam, am awo ania cadimadǝro shara yiddǝmi duwon ni ye tayi gai dimidǝ, wowom Alayero kanǝmi wa tǝmanǝm?
2.4: Ra, Alaye nanngǝlanju-a afunju-a kanadinju-a tǝrǝmdǝa ruyem? Nanngǝlanjudǝ tuwa dioro simonjiyidǝa nonǝmmi wa?
2.5: Kǝlakibbunǝm-a tuwanambu karwunǝmbe-a nangaro yim gǝrgadu Alaye-a sharanju jireye fǝledidǝ-aro ajawu jau fit kǝlanǝmbo capkǝgǝmi.
2.6: Ala wundu yayero kǝla kǝndonjuyen kalkallo ci:
2.7: Am duwon kǝndo ngǝla diolan neccane daraja-a bǝrsǝm-a ro njǝpciwawodǝ-aa majaimadǝro ro sawisoye ci,
2.8: amma am duwon kǝla rawon jiredǝa wajane jirenambu jagaimadǝro gǝrgadu-a karwujau-a fǝlejiyi.
2.9: Wundu duwon awo diwi diomadǝ, basari-a bone-a tia cawandi, burwon yaudia, daji yaudi gǝni yea cawandi,
2.10: amma daraja-a bǝrsǝm-a nanlewa-a ti ngǝla diomadǝa cawandi, burwon yaudia, daji yaudi gǝni yea cawandi.
2.11: Nonowo, Ala amba gayirjiwawo.
2.12: Am samma Attauraa nojannin biwu cadimadǝ Attaura bawolan sanui, koro am samma fǝrdu kǝnduwo Attaurayen duwon biwu cadimadǝ, Attauralan tayia sharajai.
2.13: Attauraa kǝrǝndumaso fuwu Alayen jirewu gǝni, amma Attauraa gamasoma jirewuro waljai wo.
2.14: Awoa kǝrdiya Attaura cadanni duwon halnja tayia simojiye awo Attauraye amarjǝnadǝa cadiya, cadanni yaye, awo cadidǝ naptu wadanjayero walji.
2.15: Naptunjayen awo Attaura amarjǝnadǝ karwunjan ruwuwadaro fǝlejai, halnja ye ngai shedaji, koro karwunja sa laan tayia saɍiwuji, sa laa yen jirewuro asujiyi.
2.16: Kǝla kawuɍi kǝji mawonǝkkidǝyen yim duwon Ala Isa Almasiwuyen asǝr ambea sharajidǝn awo ani wakkajai. Yaudiya na Alayen biwuwu
2.17: To, ni kǝlanǝmbo yaudi nǝmidǝ, Attauraro njuttǝgǝmi, Alalan awulo bumi,
2.18: rawo Alayedǝa nonǝmma, Attauradǝa kǝranǝmma nangaro awo ngǝladǝa gayirnǝmi,
2.19: nima tabbatto kambuwaye jeduma woro nonǝmma, nima koro am curo duwuyen dasaanaro nur kudoma,
2.20: am hangal bawoaye alamduma, yallaye malǝm woro nonǝmma, ni Attauralan ilmu-a jire-a sammaa kalkallo tammadǝ,
2.21: to, am gadero yikkǝrami duwon, kǝlanǝmbo yikkǝrambawo wa? Ni duwon bare nambarwu cadǝnni wullǝmidǝ, nambarwu dimbawo wa?
2.22: Ni duwon bare kǝnjǝna cadǝnni nǝmidǝ, kǝnjǝna dimbawo wa? Ni duwon gumkiyaa haramgadaro ngonǝmidǝ, kare fadowa sǝnǝmbe ndallǝmbawo wa?
2.23: Ni kǝla Attaurayen awulo bumidǝ, ganambunǝmlan Alaro daraja njo wanǝmi.
2.24: Kitawulan ruwuwadadǝ gai: «Nayi nangaro kǝrdiya cu Alayedǝa bassai.»
2.25: Wada Attauraye gamia, kajadǝ faidaa, amma Attauraa ganambumaro wallǝmia, kajanǝmdǝ kajanamburo waljǝna.
2.26: Ngaima jǝmbǝlǝm wada Attauraye jǝgaia, kajanambunju kajaro ngojaiwawo wa?
2.27: Koro kam tiyilan jǝmbǝlǝm duwon awo Attauraye amarjǝnadǝa cǝdidǝ nia sharanji, ni kitawu so, kaja so tamma duwon Attauraa ganambumadǝ.
2.28: Yaudidǝ kam deyan yaudiro fǝlediyi gǝni, koro kaja jireyedǝ awo tiyiye turui gǝni,
2.29: amma yaudidǝ kam curon yaudi wo, koro kajadǝ ye awo karwuye wo, arawuyen gǝni, Ruhu Alayen kadio. Njungoronju na amben gǝni, na Alayen wo.

3.1: Adǝ nangaro naptu yaudiyedǝ awi faidanju wo? Awi kajadǝye riwanju wo?
3.2: Jiɍi fin yaye ngǝwu mbeji. Kuranjudǝ, mukko yaudiyadǝyero kawuɍi Alaye casakkǝna.
3.3: To, nda? Laanja kasaccannia, kasattunambunjadǝ aman Alaye baworo cǝdi wa?
3.4: A'a, tǝmmaro ngai gǝni! Kam fi yaye kattuwumaro walji yaye, Aladǝ jirema dǝgai, kitawulan ruwuwadadǝ gai: «Mananǝmlan jiremaro nonjai ye, sharanjaiya, kǝnnasar fandǝmi ye.»
3.5: Amma jirenambundedǝ nanjire Alaye fǝlejia, awi wulliye? Ala ajawu gǝnaduwumadǝ jirenambuma wa? Kǝla mana kamben manayekko.
3.6: A'a, tǝmmaro ngai gǝni! Adǝ gǝnia, ndayin gǝle Ala am duniayea sharaji?
3.7: Kattuwunilan jire Alaye ngǝwuro tǝrgane Alaro daraja cadia, awiro gǝle koro yaye wua biwumaro sharasai?
3.8: Koro awiro gǝle har ngai wuldiwawodǝ: Nda diwi diyo, ngǝla isoro? Am laa manande cadi adǝmaa yikkǝraiye cani. Tayidǝ, wowomnja jussǝna! Jirema falma bawo
3.9: Awi gǝle? Andi yaudiyadǝ am gadero wa ngalwo? A'a, tǝmmaro ngai gǝni! Yaudiya-a kǝrdiya-a samma fǝrdu kǝnduwo biwuyen dasaanaro calan fǝleniyena.
3.10: Kitawulan ruwuwadadǝ gai: «Jirema bawo, falma bawo,
3.11: kam asujǝna bawo, Alaa madama bawo.
3.12: Tayi samma jawal koljana, kǝla tilonna faida baworo waljana, kam ngǝla dioma bawo, falma bawo.
3.13: Ngowoljonja kauri kaada gai, tǝlamnjan amba jambajai. Fǝrdu ka cinjayen dawi fusiyea.
3.14: Cinja baskudu-a manakuttu-an cǝmbǝɍǝna.
3.15: Sinja kam njejoro doi,
3.16: jawalnjan masiwa-a kudǝra-aa,
3.17: koro jawal nanlewaye nojanni.
3.19: Awi yaye Attaura wuljidǝ, am fǝrdu kǝnduwo Attaurayen dasaanaro wuljiyiro noniyena, ngainin ci wunduye yaye gǝm cǝdo, dunia sammaa shara Alayero caado.
3.20: Ai, nodu biwuyedǝ Attaurayen isi, adǝ nangaro wunduma wada Attauraye galan fuwu Alayen jiremaro waljiwawo. KAMBƎRSELAN JIREMARO WALDU Wada Attaurayen gǝni, kambǝrselan
3.21: Amma kǝrmadǝ nanjire Alaye wada Attauraye galan gǝni tuwandi, Attaura-a kitawuwa nawiyaye-a tia shedajana.
3.22: Nanjire Alayedǝ Isa Almasiwuye mǝrsaduyen am kasattuwu sammaro isi, gayirdu bawo.
3.23: Tayi samma biwu cadǝna ye, daraja Alaye najaganni ye,
3.24: amma merudu Isa Almasiwulan tuwandidǝyen dero sernjulan jirewuro waljai.
3.25: Ala nanjirenju fǝlejoro, Almasiwua laya fastu gǝrgadunjuyero kaino, koro ngainin tia bunjuyen kambǝrselan kasaccane jirewuro waljai. Awoa Ala afunju nangaro biwuwa kureye wowomjǝnni.
3.26: Adǝa dionjudǝ, jaman kǝrmayen nanjirenju fǝlejoro, ngainin Aladǝma jire ye, kam Isaa kasattumadǝa jiremaro cǝdima ye wo.
3.27: Nda gǝle awulo bodǝ? Bawo! Kǝla wada jiɍi fiyen? Kǝla wada kidayen? A'a, kǝla wada kambǝrseyen.
3.28: Nonowo, kam wada galan gǝni, kambǝrselan jiremaro waljiro tabbatkeyeiye.
3.29: Ra, Aladǝ Ala yaudiya runjaye wa? Kǝrdiyaye ye, gǝna? Aaa, kǝrdiyaye ye,
3.30: Aladǝ falma nangaro, ti duwon am kajaadaa kambǝrseyen jirewuro cǝdi, koro jǝmbǝlǝmba yea kambǝrseyen jirewuro cǝdidǝ.
3.31: Adǝ nangaro kǝla kambǝrseyen Attauradǝa baworo diye wa? A'a, tǝmmaro ngai gǝni! Attauradǝa tabbatkeyeiye.

4.1: To, kaarinde Nawi Ibrahimdǝ, awi gǝle wulliye? Naptunju adamgǝnayen, kǝla kambǝrseyen awi asujo?
4.2: Ca Nawi Ibrahim kida diolan jiremaro walyenoa, dalil awulo boye cǝdana, amma fuwu Alayen gǝni.
4.3: To, awi kitawu wuljo? «Nawi Ibrahim Alaa mǝrsajǝna nangaro, Ala tia jiremaro ngoyeno.»
4.4: Kam kida cǝdidǝro biyanjudǝ kǝnjo gǝni, alwasi.
4.5: Adǝ yaye kam duwon kida cǝdiwawo, amma Ala am diwia jirewuro diomaa mǝrsajidǝ, kambǝrsenju nangaro tia jiremaro ngoji.
4.6: Nawi Dauda ye kam duwon Ala tia kidanju gǝni nangaro jiremaro ngojidǝye barganju wuljǝnadǝ gai:
4.7: «Barganja am ayauwanja ye gawurdǝna, biwuwanja ye jakkadadǝ.
4.8: Barganju kam Kǝmande tiro biwunju tǝmmaro gǝnajiyiwawodǝ.»
4.9: Barga adǝ am kajaada runjayema wa? Ra, jǝmbǝlǝmba ye cawandi? Kambǝrse Nawi Ibrahimbe nangaro Ala tia jiremaro ngojǝnaro wulliye.
4.10: Dǝlwu filan tia jiremaro ngoyera? Kajanjualan ra jǝmbǝlǝmlan? Sa ti kajaadalan gǝni, jǝmbǝlǝmdǝlaman.
4.11: Kajadǝa alama gairo kiwando, alama duwon sa kajadǝnnin kambǝrsenju nangaro nanjire cuwandǝnadǝa tabbacciyidǝ. Ngainin Nawi Ibrahim bawa am kambǝrsea jǝmbǝlǝm dasaana sammayero walyeno, tayi yea kambǝrsenja nangaro jirewuro ngojaro.
4.12: Koro bawa am kajaadaye yero walyeno, tayi duwon kajaada runju gǝni, jawal kambǝrseye bawande Nawi Ibrahim sa jǝmbǝlǝmlan jǝganadǝ yea jagaidǝ. Wadu Alaye-a kambǝrse kambe-a
4.13: Ala Nawi Ibrahim-a kaduwunju-aro warasama duniayero walji cǝne wadu ngoyeno, wadu duwon wada Attauraye galan gǝni, nanjire kambǝrselan isidǝyen tiro cinadǝ.
4.14: Ca wada galan amso warasawuro walyeraa, kambǝrsedǝ ye bowu fat, wadudǝ ye faidanju baworo waljǝna,
4.15: wadadǝ gǝrgadu Alaye cuwudi nangaro. Na wada bawolan wada ganambu ye bawo.
4.16: Adǝma nangaro wadudǝ awo kambǝrseye wo. Dalil wadu serlan isidǝ, tima kaduwu sammaro tabbaccuworo, kam wada jǝganama runjuro gǝni, kam kambǝrse Nawi Ibrahimbea jǝganama yero, ti duwon bawa andi sammayedǝ.
4.17: Kitawulan ruwuwadadǝ gai: «Nia bawa jama kada kadamiyero ngidǝkko.» Tidǝ Alaa kasaccǝna, Ala duwon am sanunaro ro cakke awo bawoa mennaro cǝdidǝ.
4.18: Tǝma bawo yaye, Nawi Ibrahim tǝmaje Alaa mǝrsaje ngainin bawa jama kadayero walyeno, Alaye tiro: «Kaduwunǝm ngǝwujai,» cǝnnadǝ gai.
4.19: Ti kǝrwunju mia gai duwon, kiarijǝna ye, koro Saratu ye cambiwaworo curuna yaye, kambǝrsenju duno baworo waljǝnni.
4.20: Wadu Alaye shekku bawoalan kasacce kambǝrsenjulan dunoaro walyeno, koro Alaro daraja kaino,
4.21: awo Ala cǝdi cǝnnadǝa cǝdiro tabbatto mǝrsajǝna nangaro.
4.22: Ngainin kambǝrsenju nangaro Ala tia jiremaro ngoyeno.
4.23: Mana ruwuwada adǝ: «Tia jiremaro ngoyeno,» ti runjuro gǝni,
4.24: andi yero ruwuwaada. Ala andi yea jirewuro ngosai, ti duwon Kǝmande Isaa karmolan cǝsangǝnadǝa mǝrsaniyena nangaro.
4.25: Isadǝa biwuwande nangaro sǝrǝccagane kano, koro jirewuro walliyoro karmolan ciyeno.

5.1: Adǝ nangaro, kambǝrselan jirewuro walliyenadǝ, Kǝmande Isa Almasiwuyen katte andi-a Ala-ayen naptu nanlewayea.
5.2: Isa nangaro jawal kambǝrseyen ser curonjun dǝgaiyena adǝro ngawo fandiyena, koro karwunde curo tǝma daraja Alayen kǝjijǝna.
5.3: Koro adǝa kojǝnaro curo boneyeman karwunde kǝjijǝna, bonedǝ kanadi cuwudiro noniyenadǝro.
5.4: Kanadidǝ ye hal ngǝla cuwudi, koro hal ngǝladǝ ye tǝma cuwudi.
5.5: Tǝmadǝ tiyisam cuwudiwawo, Ala karwundero Ruhunju sadǝnayen kǝrawonju cakkǝnadǝro.
5.6: Awima rangiyena bawoalan Almasiwu am Alaa ga wajana nangaro sa kalkalnin kano.
5.7: Kiaddin kam laa kam jirema nangaro ronju ci, waneye kam laa kam ngǝla nangaro rakce ronju ci.
5.8: Amma Ala andiro kǝrawonju ngainin fǝlesagai: Andi biwuwu duwon, Almasiwu andi nangaro kano.
5.9: To, andi kǝrma bunjuyen jirewuro walliyenadǝro, adǝa kojǝnaro tiyen gǝrgadu Alayero kaniye.
5.10: Sa andi kǝladowadǝn karmo Tada Alayen Ala-a solodiyenaa, adǝa kojǝnaro solodiyenadǝ ronjuyen njǝkkawo fandiye.
5.11: Koro adǝ runju gǝni, Kǝmande Isa Almasiwuyen na Alayen karwunde kǝjijǝna, tiyen kǝrma solo fandiyenadǝ. Nawi Adam-a Isa Almasiwu-a
5.12: Adǝ nangaro, jiɍi kam fallen biwu duniaro ngaye biwuyen karmo ngaanadǝ gai, ngainin karmodǝ am sammaro tatargaada, tayi samma biwu cadǝnadǝro.
5.13: Kawu Ala Attaura ciro, dunialan biwu mbeji, amma sa Attaura bawodǝn wowom gǝnadiyiwawo.
5.14: Adǝ yaye jaman Nawi Adamben tai Nawi Musayero kudero karmodǝ kǝla am sammayen kǝrga, har am biwuwa yestu Nawi Adambe-a camun cadǝnnidǝmaa lejǝna. Nawi Adamdǝ camuno ti fuwun kǝndemadǝye.
5.15: Amma kǝnjodǝ ayaudǝ-a camun gǝni. Ayau kam faldǝye nangaro am ngǝwu kasunoa, adǝa kojǝnaro ser Alaye-a kǝnjo ser Isa Almasiwu kam faldǝye-a am ngǝwuro tasargaana.
5.16: Koro kǝnjodǝ awo ayau kam faldǝye cuwudǝnadǝ-a camun gǝni. Awoa shara ayau fal jǝganadǝ wowom kiwudo, amma kǝnjo ayau kadaa jǝganadǝ nanjire kiwudo.
5.17: Kam fal nangaro kǝla ayau kam faldǝyen karmo kǝla am sammayen kǝrmai cunodi, adǝa kojǝnaro am ser ngǝwu-a kǝnjo nanjireye-a camoyimasodǝ Isa Almasiwu wotte kam faldǝyen roa dasaane kǝrmai canodi.
5.18: Adǝ nangaro, jiɍi ayau kam falle am sammaro wowom cuwudidǝ gai, ngainin kǝndo nanjireye kam falle am sammaro jiremaro waldu-a ro-a cuwudi.
5.19: Awoa ganambu kam fallen am ngǝwu biwuwuro waljanadǝ gai, ngainin ga kam fallen am ngǝwu jirewuro waljai.
5.20: Koro ayaudǝ ngǝwujoro Attaura kadio, amma na biwu ngǝwujǝnadǝn, ser Alaye tia jauro kojiro ngǝwuyeno.
5.21: Ngainin jiɍi biwudǝ karmolan kǝrmai cunodǝnadǝ gai, ngaiman ser Alaye nanjireyen kǝrmai cunode ro sawisoye Kǝmande Isa Almasiwuyen cuwudi.

6.1: To, awi gǝle wulliye? Ser Alaye ngǝwujoro curo biwuyen wa dǝgaiye?
6.2: A'a, tǝmmaro ngai gǝni! Andi biwuro nuiyenadǝ, jiɍi fin gǝle curodǝn koro dǝgaiye?
6.3: Wundunde yayero kasala sadde Isa Almasiwuro kǝlsaanadǝ, karmonjuro kǝlsaanaro nonuwwi wa?
6.4: Adǝ nangaro, kasala karmonjuro kǝlsaanadǝlan ti-a rokko sittǝrasanadǝ, ngainin jiɍi Almasiwudǝ daraja Bawadǝyen karmolan cijǝnadǝ gai, andi ye kǝndǝgai bǝɍin diye.
6.5: Karmonju-a camunno tiro kǝldiyiyenadǝ, tabbatto karmolan cidunju-a camunno tiro kǝldiyiye.
6.6: Halnde caye dǝgaiyenadǝa ti-a rokko kǝskaro jajaanaro noniyena, duno biwuyedǝ baworo waljo, bare gadero kaɍea biwuyero walliyendero.
6.7: Kam nunadǝ biwu-a firdane nankam kǝlaye cuwandǝna.
6.8: Almasiwu-a kallo nuiyenadǝ, ti-a kallo roa dǝgaiyero mǝrsaniyena,
6.9: koro Almasiwu karmolan cijǝna nangaro, gadero nuiwaworo noniyena. Kǝnduwo karmoyedǝ kǝlanjun bawo.
6.10: Nonjudǝ, tilo lonno biwua baworo dioro kano, amma ronjuadǝ, Alaro daraja njoro roa dǝgai.
