6.11: Jiɍi adǝgainin nayi ye nuwe kǝnduwo biwuye kǝlandon baworo waljǝna ye, koro Isa Almasiwulan roa dǝgawe Alaro daraja yiwi yero kǝlandoa ngonowo.
6.12: Adǝma nangaro bare biwu kǝla tiyindo nomayen kǝrmai cunode mangarnjua gawwi.
6.13: Bare tiyindo kare kida jirenambu dioye gai mukko biwuyero yakkuwwi, amma karmolan roa cinuwwadǝ, kǝlandoa Alaro yowo, tiyindo ye kare kida nanjire dioye gai Alaro yowo.
6.14: Kǝnduwo biwuyedǝ gadero kǝlandon bawo, nayidǝ fǝrdu wadayen gǝni, fǝrdu ser Alayen dǝgawi nangaro. Kaɍeawa nanjireye
6.15: To, awi gǝle? Andi fǝrdu kǝnduwo wadayen gǝni, fǝrdu ser Alayen dǝgaiyenadǝ, koro yaye biwu diye wa? A'a, tǝmmaro ngai gǝni!
6.16: Kamba garo tiro kaɍea gai kǝlando kewwa, ti gawidǝye kaɍeawaro walluwiro nonuwwi wa? Biwu gadǝ karmoro cadi, koro Alaa gadǝ nanjire cuwudi.
6.17: Amma Alaa wuseniyo! Nayi calan kaɍeawa biwuyedǝ kǝrma karwundo samman alamdu jiɍi njasakkǝranadǝa gawe
6.18: biwu-a firduwe nankam kǝlaye fanduwe kaɍeawa nanjireyero walluwwa.
6.19: Naptundo adamgǝnaye nangaro mana kamben manayekko. Jiɍi calan tiyindo tayirnambu so, nandiwi soro kaɍea gai kǝlando yiwe na kojǝnaro nandiwiro cadǝnadǝ gai, adǝgainin kǝrma kaɍea gai tiyindo nanjirero yowo tayirro walloworo.
6.20: Sa nayi kaɍeawa biwuyedǝn, nayi fǝrdu kǝnduwo nanjireyen bawo.
6.21: Awowa duwon kǝrma tayia nangunuwidǝ, sadǝn awi faidanja wo? Awoa awo aniye leduwuramnja karmo.
6.22: Amma kǝrma biwu-a firduwe nankam kǝlaye fanduwe kaɍeawa Alayero walluwwadǝ, faidanjudǝ tima nantayir wo, leduwuramnju ye ro sawisoye.
6.23: Awoa alwasi biwuyedǝ karmo, amma kǝnjo Alayedǝ Kǝmande Isa Almasiwuyen ro sawisoye.

7.1: Kǝramiya, nayi Attaura nonuwwasoro wulnjagakki, kam ronjualan, kǝnduwo wadayedǝ kǝlanjun mennaro nonuwwi wa?
7.2: Misallo kamu kwaadǝ tiro wadalan kǝllaada kwadǝ ronjuamaa. Amma kwadǝ kanoa, wadadǝ kǝlanjun bawo.
7.3: Adǝ nangaro kwadǝ ronjua duwon kwa gade kidoa, tia kǝnjǝnamaro ngojai. Amma kwanju kanoa, wada adǝ kǝlanjun bawo, kwa gade kido yaye, ti kǝnjǝnama gǝni.
7.4: Kǝramiyani, jiɍi adǝgainin nayi ye tiyi Almasiwuyen wadaro nuwwa, ngainin kam gadeyero walluwi, ti karmolan cijǝnadǝyero, koro nema Alaro yakkiye.
7.5: Sa hal tiyiyelan dǝgaiyenadǝn, jarawande biwuye wada cǝsangǝnadǝ tiyindea cakke nema karmoye kekkiye.
7.6: Amma awo calan rosanadǝ-a firdiye nuiyena nangaro, kǝrma wadadǝ kǝlanden bawo, ngainin jawal caye wada ruwuwadayen gǝni, jawal bǝɍin Ruhuyen wolodiya Alayero walliye. Hal biwuye
7.7: To, awi gǝle wulliye? Wada Attaurayedǝ biwu wa? A'a, tǝmmaro ngai gǝni! Wadayen gǝnia, biwu nokkiwawo. Misallo ca wadaye: «Bare mangar dimmi,» cǝnnia, mangardǝa asukkǝni.
7.8: Amma biwudǝ wadayen dama kiwandǝnniya, mangar jiɍi jiɍi karwuniro kekko, wada bawonin biwu nuna nangaro.
7.9: Calan sa wada bawolan ronia kǝrgakko, amma wadadǝ kadinniya, biwudǝ roaro walje wudǝ kanukko.
7.10: Wada ro kudomadǝ wuro karmo sukkudo.
7.11: Biwudǝ wadayen dama cuwande wua jambase wadadǝyen roro seso.
7.12: Adǝgaima Attauradǝ tayir, koro wadanjudǝ tayir ye, jire ye, ngǝla ye. Karwunden biwua
7.13: To, awo ngǝla adǝ wuro karmo wa sukkudo? A'a, tǝmmaro ngai gǝni! Biwudǝma biwuro fǝledoro awo ngǝladǝyen kidanju karmoye wulan cǝdo, wadadǝyen biwudǝ na kojǝnaro biwuro waljoro.
7.14: Wadadǝ awo Ruhuyero noniyena, amma wudǝ awo tiyiye, kaɍea fǝrdu biwuye gai saladǝna.
7.15: Kǝndonidǝmaa asunǝkkiwawo. Awoa awo raakkǝnadǝa gǝni, awo wakkǝnadǝmaa dikki.
7.16: Awo wakkǝnadǝa dikkia, wadadǝ awo ngǝlaro ardinǝkkǝna.
7.17: Ngaima kǝrma wu gǝni, biwu wulan dǝganamadǝ awo ania cǝdi.
7.18: Wulan, wotte naptuni adamgǝnayelan, awo ngǝla fima dǝganniro nokkǝna. Akko nia awo ngǝla dioye nanin mbeji, amma duno tia dioye bawo.
7.19: Ngǝla raakkǝnadǝa dikkiwawo, amma diwi wakkǝnadǝ tima awo dikkidǝ wo.
7.20: Awo wakkǝnadǝa dikkia, kǝrma wu gǝni dikki, amma biwu wulan dǝganamadǝ cǝdi.
7.21: Adǝ nangaro wada adǝa wulan fandǝkki: Awo ngǝla dio raakkǝna duwon, diwi ye nanin mbeji.
7.22: Karwunin wada Alaye tai dakke raakkǝna,
7.23: amma wada laa gade tiyinin rukki. Wada adǝ wada hangalniyero kǝriwu cǝkkade wua kosoma wada biwuye tiyinin dǝganadǝye sǝddi.
7.24: Kuttuni, awo njunoduye wu! Wundu gǝle wua tiyi karmoye adǝlan sǝmoyi wo?
7.25: Kǝmande Isa Almasiwuyen Alaa wuseniyo! Ai, hangalnin wada Alaye gakki, amma naptuni adamgǝnayelan wada biwuye gakki.

8.1: Adǝ nangaro kǝrma am Isa Almasiwua gawudǝro wowom fima bawo,
8.2: dalilnjudǝ wada Ruhuye duwon Isa Almasiwuyen ro njomadǝ wu-a wada biwuye-a karmoye-a firsane nankam kǝlaye sina nangaro.
8.3: Awo duwon wada naptu adamgǝnaye nangaro lawu rakce cǝdǝnnidǝa Ala kido. Biwu nangaro Tadanjua alama tiyinde biwumaye gainin juwajiye tiyilan biwudǝro wowom gǝnayeyeno.
8.4: Adǝa dionjudǝ, nanjire wada wuljǝnadǝ andi duwon naptu tiyiyen gǝni, Ruhuyen dǝgaiyenadǝlan tǝdo.
8.5: Am duwon hal tiyiyen dasaanamadǝ hangalnja kǝla awo tiyiyen kǝrga, amma am duwon hal Ruhuyen dasaanamadǝ hangalnja kǝla awo Ruhuyen kǝrga.
8.6: Hal tiyiyedǝ karmo, amma hal Ruhuyedǝ ro-a nanlewa-a.
8.7: Awoa hal tiyiyedǝ kǝlado Alaye, dalilnjudǝ wada Alaye jǝgaiwawo, tǝmmaro rakce jǝgaiwawo.
8.8: Am hal tiyiyea gawudǝ rakcane ardiya Alaye cawandiwawo.
8.9: Amma nayidǝ hal tiyiyen gǝni, Ruhuyen kǝrgaw, Ruhu Alaye nayilan dǝgana nangaro. Kam duwon Ruhu Almasiwuye tilan dǝgannidǝ, tidǝ Almasiwuye gǝni.
8.10: Almasiwudǝ nayilan kǝrgaa, tiyidǝ biwu nangaro nuna, amma Ruhudǝ nanjire nangaro ro ci.
8.11: Koro ti Isaa karmolan cǝsangǝnadǝye Ruhunju nayilan kǝrgaa, daji ti Almasiwua karmolan cǝsangǝnadǝ Ruhunju nayin dǝganadǝyen tiyindo nomadǝ yero ro cakki.
8.12: Kǝramiya, adǝma nangaro wajipnde mbeji, amma hal tiyiyen dǝgaro gǝni,
8.13: awoa hal tiyiyen dǝgawwaa, nuwi, amma Ruhudǝyen kǝndo tiyiyedǝa yejuwwaa, roa dǝgawi.
8.14: Am duwon Ruhu Alaye tayia simojimadǝ tayima tadawa Alayedǝ wo.
8.15: Ruhu fanduwwadǝ nayia kaɍeawaro gǝni ngedo har walduwe rinuwidǝ, amma Ruhu nayia tadawa Alayero diomadǝa fanduwwa, tilan kowo sammiye: «Abba, Bawa!» niye.
8.16: Ruhu Alaye kǝlanjudǝ karwunde-a rokko andi tadawa Alaye woro shedaji,
8.17: koro andi tadawadǝro, andi ye warasawu, warasawu Alaye ye, wotte Almasiwu-a rokko warasawu. Ti-a kallo bone kiaiyea, ti-a kallo ye daraja fandiye. Tǝma darajaye
8.18: Wuyenna bone jaman kǝrmayedǝ martawa daraja andiro fuwun fǝlediyidǝyea najiyiwawo.
8.19: Awowa alaktǝna samma fǝledu tadawa Alayea gangadaaro gurejai.
8.20: Awo alakkadadǝ faida baworo kalaktǝna, amma rawonjun gǝni, Ala duwon tia kalakcǝnadǝ nangaro. Alaye rawonjudǝ tima
8.21: awo alakkada kǝlanjudǝ nankaɍea njǝptuye-a firdane nankam kǝlaye darajaa tadawa Alayedǝyen nuwanju ye cuwandi.
8.22: Kua yaye awo alakkada samma kǝla tilonna njǝmje bone kǝnjambiye cairo noniyena.
8.23: Awo alakkada runju gǝni, andi duwon Ruhu Alaye nema burwoyero fandiyenadǝ, andi ye karwunden njǝmmiye tadawa Alayero waldunde, wotte tiyindea merududǝa gangadaaro gureniye.
8.24: Tǝma taiyena adǝlan njǝkkawo fandiyena, awoa tǝma turuidǝ tǝma gǝni. Wundu gǝle awo curuidǝa tǝmaji?
8.25: Amma awo ruiyewawodǝa tǝmaniyenaa, neddiye kanadilan tia gureniye.
8.26: Koro ngaiman Ruhudǝ dawu nanlawundeyen banasagai, jiɍi moduwa ngǝlaro diyedǝa noniyende, amma Ruhudǝ kǝlanju andiro mana wuldiwawolan Alaa sakkori.
8.27: Ti awo karwun dǝgana kuromadǝ nia Ruhuye nojǝna, ti Ruhudǝ kǝla awo Ala cǝraanayen muminnaro cukkori.
8.28: Koro Ala am tia caraana ye, kǝla fasalnjuyen bowojǝna yero awi yayea ngǝlaro cǝddiro noniyena.
8.29: Awoa am duwon Ala caman tayia nojǝnadǝ, tayi ye camuno Tadanjuyero waljaro kadarjǝna, ti karu tadawa ngǝwuyero waljoro.
8.30: Tayi kadarjǝnadǝa bowoyeno, koro tayi bowojǝnadǝa jirewuro kido, koro tayi jirewuro cǝdǝnadǝro daraja kaino. Kǝrawo Alaye
8.31: To, kǝla awo aniyen awi gǝle wulliye? Aladǝ kaandea, wundu wadumandero walji?
8.32: Ti duwon Tadanjudǝmaa koljǝnni andi samma nangaro cinadǝ, ndayin gǝle andiro ti-a kallo awo sammaa serraro sadiwawo?
8.33: Wundu am Ala kǝrejǝnaa ngadarji? Aladǝma tayia jirewuro dioma wo!
8.34: Wundu gǝle ti duwon wowom gǝnajiyidǝ? Isa Almasiwudǝ tima nunadǝ wo, adǝa kojǝnaro tima karmolan cijǝna ye, kǝmboram Alayen andiro Alaa sakkori yedǝ wo.
8.35: Wundu andia kǝrawo Almasiwuye-a firsagai? Bone wa, ra kuttu, ra basari, ra kǝna, ra kajǝmunambu, ra masiwa, ra kashagar wa?
8.36: Kitawulan ruwuwadadǝ gai: «Ni nangaro andia dabdu sǝrambo roro seyesi. Dimiya duwarambo njadoye gairo andia ngosana.»
8.37: Amma curo awo ani sammayen ti andia saraanadǝyen kǝnnasarwumaa kojǝnaro walliyena.
8.38: Tabbatto nokkǝna, karmo bi ro, malaiyawa bi kǝrmaiya, lamarra kǝrmaye bi fuwuye, bi kǝnduwowa,
8.39: awo sameye bi cidiye, bi awo alakkada gade fima rakce andia kǝrawo Alaye Kǝmande Isa Almasiwulan tuwandidǝ-a firsaiwawo.

9.1: Almasiwulan jire wullǝkki, kattuwu gǝni, halni ye Ruhu Alayen shedasi,
9.2: karwukutta kura-a jǝktu ceriwawo-a curo karwuniyen fakki.
9.3: Ca yojia, kǝramiyani jama tilon tambiyena nangaro wu kǝlani baskuwada ye, Almasiwu-a faiyada yero raakko.
9.4: Tayidǝ Israyilawu, koro Ala tayia dapce tadawanjuro cǝde daraja ce aman ndǝpcane Attaura so, kida ambǝttuwuye so tayiro waduwa ngoyeyeno.
9.5: Kaariyadǝ kaanja, Almasiwudǝ ye kǝla naptunju adamgǝnayen tayiyeman kadio, tima Ala sawisoro bargaa same awo fiyen yaye kǝrgadǝ wo! Amin.
9.6: Mana Alaye faida baworo waljǝna wa? A'a. Awoa kaduwu Israyilaye samma gǝni Israyiladǝ wo,
9.7: koro tadawa Nawi Ibrahimbe samma gǝni kaduwunju wo. Alaye: «Am Isakuyen tasambidǝmaa kaduwunǝmlan bowojai,» cǝnna.
9.8: Maana adǝyedǝ tima tadawa tiyiye gǝni tadawa Alayedǝ, amma tadawa waduyedǝmaa kaduwuro ngojai wo.
9.9: Akko mana waduyedǝ: «Baɍiminna kua gai isǝkki, Saratu tada cambi.»
9.10: Adǝ runju gǝni, Rabeka ye kam fal kaarinde Nawi Isakuyen curo ngoyenniya,
9.11: kawu kawuwadǝ tasambe ngǝla bi diwi cadiro, fasal Alaye kadarjǝnadǝ tabbaccuworo,
9.12: Rabekadǝro: «Karudǝ kaɍea kannadǝyero walji,» yeno. Ngaiman fasal Alayedǝ kǝla kidayen gǝni, kǝla ti bowojidǝyen kǝrga.
9.13: Kitawulan ruwuwadadǝ gai: «Yakubaa raakko, Yesawua wayekko.»
9.14: To, awi gǝle wulliye? Na Alayen jirenambua wa? A'a, tǝmmaro ngai gǝni!
9.15: Tiye Nawi Musaro: «Kam tiro kanjimaɍi fǝlegǝkkidǝro kanjimaɍi fǝlegǝkki, koro kam tia njunokkidǝa njunokki,» cǝnna.
9.16: Adǝ nangaro rawo bi kowoɍi kamben gǝni, Ala kanjimaɍi fǝlejiyidǝman kǝrga.
9.17: Kitawulan Alaye Fira'aunaro: «Dalil nia galanjǝkkǝnadǝ, tima kǝnduwoni nilan fǝlegǝkko, koro cuni dunia ngan culuworo,» cǝnna.
9.18: Adǝma nangaro kam kǝrejǝnaro kanjimaɍi fǝlejiyi, koro kam kǝrejǝnaye kǝlanju kibbajiyi. Wowom-a kanjimaɍi-a Alaye
9.19: Daji niye wuro: «To, ngairo walyenoa, awiro kua yaye ayau gǝnajidǝ? Wundu gǝle rakce rawonju wajidǝ?» nǝme suworǝmi.
9.20: Amma ni kam, ni wundu duwon Alaro mana kalakkǝmidǝ? Awo tǝdandǝnadǝye ti tia cǝdandǝnadǝro: «Awiro wua ngai sǝdǝm?» cǝni wa?
9.21: Duwuramma kǝnduwo kǝla tulo kamatkadayen kalwo laa darajaa-a laa ye daraja bawoa-a tandoye cǝdanni wa?
9.22: To, Ala gǝrgadunju fǝledu-a dunonju isanoduwu-a cǝraye tayi gǝrgadunjuye duwon siduwuro dabbargadadǝa jauro kanadilan mǝrjǝnaa, nda?
9.23: Adǝa dionjudǝ, darajanju tǝrǝm tayi kanjimaɍiye duwon darajaro dabbargadadǝro isanoduwu cǝraanaa, nda?
9.24: Andimaa curo yaudiya runjayen gǝni, curo kǝrdiyayen bowosana,
9.25: curo kitawu Nawi Hosiyayen wuljǝnadǝ gai: «Tayi duwon jamani gǝnidǝa jamanilan bowokki, ti duwon tǝraannidǝ yea tǝraanalan bowokki.»
9.26: Koro: «Na duwon tayiro: “Nayi jamani gǝni,” wuljanadǝman tayia tadawa Ala Kǝndǝgaimayelan bowojai.»
9.27: Nawi Ishayaye kǝla Israyilawuyen kowo sapce: «Tadawa Israyilaye nanngǝwunja cidi kesa ci tekuyea cadǝna yaye, amnjaye ganama njǝkkawo cawandi,
9.28: tussiwawo Kǝmande dunia ngaro sharanju cotto kamjiyi,» cǝnna.
9.29: Nawi Ishaya calan kawu wakkajidǝro wuljǝnadǝ gai: «Ala Kǝmande Martawama kaduwu laaa kolsaganniro walyenoa, andi bǝrni Sodombe gairo walliye, bǝrni Gomorre-a camuniyena.» Kambǝrsenambu Israyilawuye
9.30: To, awi gǝle wulliye? Kǝrdiya nanjire majannimasodǝ nanjire cawandǝna, wotte nanjire kambǝrseyen isidǝ,
9.31: amma jama Israyilaye wada nanjireye majaidǝa cawandǝnni.
9.32: Awiro? Kambǝrselan gǝni, kida diolan gai tia majana nangaro. Tayidǝ kǝla kau talduyedǝn taljana,
9.33: kitawulan ruwuwadadǝ gai: «Akko Siyonnin kau talduye ye, takkalduma ye gǝnanǝkki, kam tia mǝrsajǝnamadǝ, nangu tia cǝdaiwawo.»

10.1: Kǝramiya, awo jauro karwuni cǝraana ye, moduwa dikki yedǝ, tima Israyilawu njǝkkawo cawando.
10.2: Jaumaro Alaa jagairo tayia shedanǝkki, amma kǝla noduyen gǝni,
10.3: awoa nanjire Alayedǝa nojannin nanjire kaanja majana, wotte nanjire Alayedǝa kasaccane jaanni,
10.4: dalilnjudǝ Almasiwudǝ tima leduwuram wadayedǝ wo, wundu duwon kambǝrseadǝ nanjire cuwandoro. Njǝkkawo fando
10.5: Nawi Musa kǝla nanjire wadalan isidǝyen ngai ruwujǝna: «Kam awo ania cǝdimadǝ tayiyen roa dǝgai.»
10.6: Amma nanjire kambǝrselan isidǝ ngai cǝni: Bare karwunǝmlan: «Wundu samero leji?» wotte Almasiwua saworo,
10.7: bi: «Wundu bǝlaa daduram bawoaro jǝpciyi?» wotte Almasiwua karmolan sangoro wullǝmmi.
10.8: Amma awi gǝle wuljidǝ? «Manadǝ karǝnnǝm delnin, ti curo cinǝmben ye, curo karwunǝmben ye,» wotte mana kambǝrseye mawoniyedǝ.
10.9: Cinǝmlan «Isama Kǝmadǝ wo!» nǝme karwunǝmlan Ala tia karmolan cǝsangǝnaro kasatkemma, njǝkkawo fandǝmi.
10.10: Awoa karwulaman kam mǝrsaje jiremaro walji, koro cilaman kasacce njǝkkawo cuwandi,
10.11: kitawulan ruwuwadadǝ gai: «Wundu duwon tia mǝrsajǝnamadǝ, nangu tia cǝdaiwawo.»
10.12: Awima yaudi-a yaudi gǝni-a gayirji bawo, ti Kǝma am dunia sammayedǝ tayi duwon tia bowojai sammaro jauro barga dǝpciyi,
10.13: awoa: «Wundu duwon cu Kǝmandeyea bowojǝnamadǝ njǝkkawo cuwandi.»
10.14: To, ndayin gǝle ti mǝrsajannidǝa bowojai? Koro ndayin ti kǝlanjun fanjannidǝa mǝrsajai? Koro ndayin mawoduma bawoa fanjai?
10.15: Koro tayia canode lejannia, ndayin mawojai? Kitawulan ruwuwadadǝ gai: «Si am lawar kǝji kudomasoyedǝ jauro shawa!»
10.16: Amma am samma gǝni kawuɍi kǝjidǝa jaa. Nawi Ishayaye: «Kǝmande, wundu kawuɍinde kasacco?» cǝnna.
10.17: Ngaima kambǝrsedǝ kawuɍi fandayen isi, kawuɍi fandadǝ ye mana Almasiwuyen isi.
10.18: Amma wuye: «Fanjanni wa?» nǝkke korǝkki. Tabbatto fanjana! «Kowonja dunia ngan nukcǝna, mananja har ci dajiram duniayero lejǝna.»
10.19: Amma wuye: «Jama Israyilaye asujanni wa?» nǝkke korǝkki. Burwon Nawi Musaye: «Am jama gǝnia yakkǝkke nandǝɍi nayia njadai, jama hangal bawoalan faidadǝkke njasakke gǝrganuwi,» cǝnna.
10.20: Daji ridu bawoaro Nawi Ishayaye: «Am wua masanni wua sewando, am wua saworǝnniro kǝlani fǝleyekko,»
10.21: amma kǝla jama Israyilayen tiye: «Dabdu sǝrambo jama ganambuma koro tuɍumaro mukkoni sayeyekko,» cǝnna.

11.1: Adǝ nangaro korǝkki: «Ala jamanjua wayeno wa?» A'a, tǝmmaro ngai gǝni! Wu kǝlanima Israyilama, kaduwu Nawi Ibrahimbe, jiɍi Biliyaminuye.
11.2: Ala jamanju caman nojǝnadǝa wajǝnni. Ra, awo kitawu kǝla Nawi Iliyayen wuljǝna, jiɍi sonju kǝla Israyilawuyen Alaro cǝddǝnadǝa nonuwwi wa?
11.3: Tiye: «Kǝmande, nawiyanǝmba ceyesǝna, laya duwadurammǝm wurjana, wu runima gammǝkko, koro wua njejoro masai,» cǝnna.
11.4: Awi Ala jaawuro co? «Am fuwu Ba'allen tungurumjanni dǝwu tulur kǝlaniro gǝnayekko,» cǝnna.
11.5: Jaman kǝrmayen ye ngaima, am laa gana gapcana Ala sernjun kǝrejǝna mbeji.
11.6: Amma kǝrenjudǝ kǝla serren nangaro, tidǝ kǝla kidayen gǝni tǝdi. Adǝ gǝnia, ser Alayedǝ gadero ser gǝni.
11.7: To, awi gǝle? Jama Israyilaye awo majidǝa cuwandǝnni. Adǝ yaye tayi duwon Ala kǝrejǝnadǝ cawandǝna, tayi gadedǝye Ala kǝlanja kibbajǝgǝna,
11.8: kitawulan ruwuwadadǝ gai: «Ala karwunjaa jakcǝna, tayiro sim caruiwawo ye, sǝmo fanjaiwawo ye cina, har kumaro.»
11.9: Koro Nawi Daudaye: «Masǝnanja kel-a kutti-a takkal-aro waljo, nianja ye kǝlanjaro waljo!
11.10: Simnja duwuaro waljo bare curunniro, ngawonja ye kullumbo nguwadaro waljo!» cǝnna. Kǝrdiyaye njǝkkawo fando
11.11: Daji korǝkki: «Jama Israyilaye taldunjadǝ, casurǝna cijaiwawo wa?» A'a, tǝmmaro ngai gǝni! Amma ayaunjayeman njǝkkawodǝ kǝrdiyaro kadio, nandǝɍi jama Israyilayea cǝdaro.
11.12: Taldunjadǝ barga duniaro kikkudoa, koro njuronjadǝ barga kǝrdiyaro kikkudoa, balle Alaro waldunja!
11.13: Nayi fǝrdundo kǝrdidǝro wulnjagakki, wu kǝngayam kǝrdiyayedǝro, kidanidǝa jajangǝkki,
11.14: ngainin kǝramiyania yakkǝkke nandǝɍi tayia cǝdai, laanja njǝkkawo cawandoro.
11.15: Tayia sǝgǝriro njakkodǝ solo duniaye kiwudoa, awi gǝle mowonja ye cuwudi? Karmolan roaro cidu, gǝna?
11.16: Sadaa rungo nema burwoyedǝ tayirdǝro, rungodǝ samma ngai, koro si kǝskayedǝ tayirdǝro, dǝlambadǝ ye ngai.
11.17: Dǝlamba laaa kǝska jaitun fadoyen kamjane, ni ye dǝlam ya jaitun karaaye duwon tiro tannjagane, nuwanǝm si ambaduma ya jaitunnedǝlan kiwandǝmba,
11.18: bare kǝla dǝlamba aniyen kǝlanǝm jajangǝmmi! Amma jajangǝmiro walyenoa, ni gǝni sidǝa ronǝmi, sidǝ nia ronjiro tange!
11.19: Daji niye: «Wua kǝskadǝro tansaaro dǝlambadǝa kamjana,» nǝmi.
11.20: Jiremaro, kambǝrsenambunja nangaro kamgera, amma nidǝ kambǝrsenǝm nangaro danǝmma. To, bare rokuramaro wallǝmmi, biya rine!
11.21: Ala dǝlamba alaladǝa koljǝnniro walyenoa, ni yea sam kolnjiwawo.
11.22: Nanngǝla-a nanjau-a Alayea rui, nanjau kanji am casurǝnayen, amma nanngǝlanju kanjinǝmlan. Sai nanngǝlanjudǝlan dǝgamiya, adǝ gǝnia, ni yea kamnjai.
11.23: Koro tayi ye, kambǝrsenambulan dasaanniro walyenoa, waldane tayia tanjai, na Alayen kǝnduwo tayia tanduye mbeji.
11.24: Nidǝ, dǝlam ya jaitun karaayelan kamnjane ya jaitun fadoyero tanngeyera, niro alala gǝni. Balle tayi dǝlamba kǝska fadoyedǝ, ya jaitun kaanjayero tanduwudǝ jau wa? Israyila sammaye njǝkkawo fando
11.25: Kǝramiya, asǝr adǝa nonuwiya, raakko, bare ilmuwuro kǝlandoa ngonuwwi: Kǝlakibbu jama Israyilaye laanjaa cǝdana, har curo kǝrdiyayen nanngǝwunja samma Alaro isairo.
11.26: Ngainin jama Israyilaye samma njǝkkawo cawandi, kitawulan ruwuwadadǝ gai: «Njǝkkayima Siyonlan isi, kaduwu Yakubaye-a awo nanmuminne gǝnidǝ-a faiji.
11.27: Adǝma aman tayi-a ndǝmmiyedǝ: Biwuwanja cinnǝkki.»
11.28: Kanji kawuɍi kǝjidǝyen nayi nangaro tayidǝ kǝlado Alaye, amma kanji kǝre Alayedǝyen kaariyadǝ nangaro tayidǝ taraana.
11.29: Awoa Ala kǝnjonju-a bowodunju-aa tǝmmaro faljiwawo.
11.30: Nayidǝ calan Alaa ganambuwu duwon kǝrma ganambunja nangaro nayia njunonjana.
11.31: Ngaiman tayidǝ ye kǝrma ganambuwu nangaro kanjimaɍi fanduwwa, tayi ye kǝrma kanjimaɍi cawandoro.
11.32: Ala kanjimaɍinju am sammaro fǝlejuworo, tayia cakke kosowu ganambuyero walyera.
11.33: Alaye nanrashidunju-a ilmunju-adǝ jaumaro kura, cinjama bawo! Wowomnju ye nodiwawo, jawalnju ye asudiwawo!
11.34: «Wundu gǝle nia Kǝmandeye nojo? Wundu gǝle galamanjuro waljo?»
11.35: «Wundu gǝle burwon Alaro awo laa co, tiro cǝkkǝrǝmbiro?»
11.36: Awoa awo samma tilan ye, tiyen ye, ti nangaro ye dǝgai. Tiro har abadaro daraja tio! Amin.

12.1: Adǝ nangaro, kǝramiya, kǝla kanjimaɍi Alayen nayia lowonjakki, tiyindo laya roa gai tayir ye, Ala ardijǝna yero yowo, ngaiman jiɍi wajipcǝnalan tiro ambǝtkǝwi, awoa adǝma ambǝttuwundo jireye wo.
12.2: Bare camuno jaman adǝyero walluwwi, amma hangal bǝɍin ngonowo, faldǝnowo, ngainin awo Ala cǝraana, wotte awo ngǝla ye, tǝraana ye, kalkal yedǝa asunuwi.
12.3: Kǝla ser Ala sinadǝyen wuye wundundo yayero wulgǝkki, bare kǝlandoa awo jussǝnaa kojǝnaro ngonuwwi, amma Ala wundundo yayero nuwanju kambǝrseye dagarjǝgǝnadǝ gai, hangal ngǝlan tǝmanowo.
12.4: Jiɍi andi tiyi falnin nasha ngǝwu taiyena kidanja tilo gǝnidǝ gai,
12.5: jiɍi adǝgainin andi ngǝwu yaye, Almasiwulan andi tiyi fal, koro wundunde yaye nasha kamanjuye.
12.6: Kǝla ser Ala sadǝnadǝyen, kǝnjonde gadegade. Kam laa kǝnjonju nawinawi dioro walyenoa, duno kambǝrsenjuyen cǝdo.
12.7: Kida banayero walyenoa, kida adǝa cǝdo. Alamdumaro walyenoa, alamjo.
12.8: Karwuro duno njomaa, duno co, bana njomaa, karwu tilon co, fuwumaa, kasaduaro cunodo, koro kanjimaɍimaa, karwu kǝjiaro cǝdo. Noduram jama Isaa gawuye
12.9: Kǝrawondodǝ nanmǝnafǝk bawoaro waljo! Awo diwidǝa wanowo, awo ngǝladǝa taiwo.
12.10: Kattendon kǝrawo nanyaanayelan tǝrawowo, kamandoro daraja yowo, nayiro ngalworo ngonowo.
12.11: Bare kasadulan lusurro walluwwi, nia ngonowo karwundo samman Kǝmandea gaiwo.
12.12: Tǝmandolan karwundo kǝjijo, bone njalan neddowo, moduwa diolan dǝgaiwo.
12.13: Mǝradu muminnaye gallowo, mukko yindin kusotto sawowo.
12.14: Am nayia basarnjanadǝro barga dǝpkǝnowo. Aaa, tayiro barga dǝpkǝnowo, bare tayia baskunuwwi.
12.15: Am karwunja kǝji-a rokko karwundo kǝjijo, am cesiri-a rokko yirowo.
12.16: Kattendon hangalndo tilojo. Bare rokura diwwi, talaawaro kǝldǝgǝnowo. Bare kǝlandoa rashiduro ngonuwwi.
12.17: Bare wundumaro kuttua kuttun yikkǝrǝmbuwwi, amma hangal gǝnanowo awo duwon fuwu am sammayen ngǝladǝa dewo.
12.18: Yojia, nayiro mowonjiyiro walyenoa, am samma-a rokko nanlewan dǝgaiwo.
12.19: Kǝrawowuni, bare kǝlandoro koro mowuwwi, kollowo gǝrgadu Alaye dama cuwando, kitawulan ruwuwadadǝ gai: «Kǝmandeye: “Wowom gǝnaduwudǝ kakke, wuma rǝmbǝkki,” cǝnna.»
12.20: Amma wadumanǝm kǝnanjuaa, awo kǝmboye ye juwo. Ngudunjuaa, awo kǝnjaye ye ca. Ngai dimilan kaɍimi kannua kǝlanjuro lapkǝmi.
12.21: Bare kollǝme nandiwi ranjǝgǝnni, amma awo ngǝla diolan kǝla diwidǝyen nasardǝne.

13.1: Wundu yaye fuwuwu kǝrmai canodidǝro dau koljuwo, kǝnduwo duwon Alayen isiwawodǝ falma bawo, koro tayi dasaanadǝa Ala galajo.
13.2: Adǝ nangaro kam fuwumaa ga wajimadǝ awo Ala galajǝnadǝa ga wajǝna, koro tayi wajanamadǝ wowom kǝlanjaro gǝrjagai.
13.3: Awoa fuwuwudǝ am ngǝla cadisoro gǝni, am diwi cadisoro awo riduye wo. Fuwumadǝa ridu raammi? To, awo ngǝla de, ardiya nanjun fandǝmi.
13.4: Tidǝ kidama Alaye nanlewanǝm nangaro. Amma diwi dimiro walyenoa, tia rine, bowuro gǝni kashagarnjuadǝ. Aaa, tidǝ Alaye kidamanju, tima rǝmboma duwon gǝrgadu Alaye kam diwi cǝdǝnaro gǝrjiyimadǝ wo.
13.5: To, dolero fuwuwudǝro dau kolgǝwi, gǝrgadu Alaye rida runjuro gǝni, saɍiwu karwundoye nangaro.
13.6: Kǝla adǝyeman akki biyanuwidǝ, awoa fuwuwudǝ kidawu Alaye awo mukkonjaro cakkǝnaa kissagai.
13.7: Wundu yayero awo wajipnjudǝa yowo. Akkia, akki biyanowo. Julaa, jula biyanowo. Martawaa, martawa yowo. Darajaa, daraja yowo. Kǝrawo kǝramiyaye
13.8: Wundu yaye kamanjua rawo gǝnia, bare wunduma tia awo laaro jǝganni, kam kamanjua cǝraanadǝ awo wadaye sammaa cǝdǝna nangaro.
13.9: Wadawa ani: «Bare kǝnjǝna dimmi, bare ro kambe tuluwummi, bare nambarwu dimmi, bare mangar dimmi,» koro wada gade samma curo mana adǝyeman tuwandǝna: «Kǝmaskinǝmba kǝlanǝm gairo raye!»
13.10: Kǝrawodǝ diwi kamanjuro cǝddiwawo. Kǝrawodǝ tima awo wadaye sammaa diodǝ wo. Yim Almasiwuye karǝnjǝna
13.11: Jaman filan kǝrgaiyero nonuwwa. Sa kǝnǝmlan ciduye cǝdǝna, njǝkkawodǝ kǝrma sa kasattu badiniyenadǝ yayero gǝrende del karǝnjǝna nangaro.
13.12: Bune ye kodu cǝdi, dunia wadu ye karǝnjǝna. Kida duwuye waniyo, baɍimi nurre ngoniyo.
13.13: Kǝndǝgai jussǝna kausu gairo diyo, kǝlaɍiwonambu-a sagarandu-alan gǝni, kǝnjǝna-a nanjane-alan gǝni, koro lawala-a nandǝɍi-alan gǝni.
13.14: Amma hal Kǝmande Isa Almasiwuyea ngonowo, bare mangar tiyiye galdu dabbarnuwwi.

14.1: Kam kambǝrsenju duno bawoa mukko yindin mowowo, bare kǝla raayinjuyen kambiwu diwwi.
14.2: Kam laa awo sammaa juwuiro mǝrsajǝna, laa ye kambǝrsenju duno bawoadǝro kǝɍijuwo runju juwui.
14.3: Bare kam juwuidǝ kam juwuiwawodǝa rujǝnni, koro bare kam juwuiwawodǝ kam juwuidǝa sharajǝnni, Ala kam juwuidǝ yea ardijǝna nangaro.
14.4: Ni wundu duwon wolodi kam gadeyea sharanǝmidǝ? Dajǝna bi dajǝnni, adǝ awo kǝmanjuye, koro daji, na Kǝmandeyen kǝnduwo tia isadaduwuye mbeji.
14.5: Kam laa yim laa yim gadea kojǝnaro tǝmajǝna, kam laa ye yim samma tiloro tǝmajǝna. Wundu yaye awo karwunjuyedǝa tabbatto kasacco.
14.6: Kam yimdǝa jǝgaimadǝ Kǝmande nangaro jǝgai. Kam juwuimadǝ ye Kǝmande nangaro juwe Alaa wuseji. Koro kam juwuiwawomadǝ ye Kǝmande nangaro juwuiwawo, Alaa wuseji.
14.7: Wunduma curonden kǝlanjuro gǝni roa dǝgai, koro wunduma curonden kǝlanjuro gǝni nui,
14.8: dalilnjudǝ roa kǝrgaiyea, Kǝmande nangaro dǝgaiye, koro kanuiyea, Kǝmande nangaro nuiye. Ngaima roa dǝgaiye bi nuiye, andidǝ Kǝmandeye.
14.9: Dalil Almasiwu nune walde roaro cijǝnadǝ tima Kǝma am sanuna-a roa-a sammayero waljo.
14.10: To, ni, awiro kǝraminǝmba sharanǝmidǝ? Ra ni, awiro kǝraminǝmba runǝmidǝ? Awoa andi samma fuwu shararam Alayen daniye,
14.11: kitawulan ruwuwadadǝ gai: «Kǝmandeye: “Wu mbejidǝ jiredǝ gai, ngurumngurum fi yaye fuwunin fidi, koro tǝlam fi yaye wuma Ala woro sacci,” cǝnna.»
14.12: Ngainin wundunde yaye kǝla awo cǝdǝna sammayen Alaro wuljiyi. Bare kǝraminǝmba yakkǝme taljǝnni!
14.13: Adǝ nangaro bare gadero kattenden shara diyende, cuju adǝyero nia ngonowo bare jawal kǝramiyero takkal bi awo talduye gǝnagǝwwi.
14.14: Kǝma Isa nangaro nokkǝna, koro tabbatto ardinǝkkǝna, awo duwon ciduramnjun tayir gǝnidǝ bawo, amma kam duwon awo laaa tayir gǝniro ngojǝnadǝ, tiro awodǝ tayir gǝni.
14.15: Kǝla awo bumiyen yakkǝme karwu kǝraminǝmbe kuttayenoa, daji jawal kǝrawoyen luwumma. Bare kǝla awo bumiyen kam duwon ti nangaro Almasiwu nunadǝ faccǝgǝnni,
14.16: bi awo nayiro kǝjidǝro diwi wuljanni,
14.17: awoa nodo bargaa Alayedǝ awo kǝmbo-a kǝnja-ayen gǝni kǝrga, tidǝ awo nanjire-a nanlewa-a karwukǝji-a Ruhu Alaye cuwudiyen kǝrga.
14.18: Kam nanwolodi Almasiwuro ngainin cǝddidǝ, Ala tia cǝraana, koro am ye tia ardijana.
14.19: Daji ngainin awo duwon nanlewa cuwudi ye, amba cakke kattenjan isadunoajagai yedǝa maniyo!
14.20: Bare kǝla kǝmboyen kida Alaye wurnǝmmi. Awi yaye tayir, amma jawal kam gadeyero kǝla awo juwuiyen awo talduye laa gǝnaduwudǝ, diwi.
14.21: Awo ngǝladǝ tima da ngǝro so, diben nja so, awo gade samman yakkǝme kǝraminǝm taljidǝa wadu.
14.22: Nidǝ, kambǝrse kǝla awo aniyen tammadǝa katte ni-a Ala-ayen rone. Barganju kam duwon kǝla awo ardijǝnayen kǝlanju sharajiwawodǝ.
14.23: Amma kam shekkunjuadǝ, juwuiro walyenoa, Ala tiro shara kamjiyi, awo cǝdidǝ kambǝrseyen gǝni kadio nangaro, koro awo kambǝrseyen isǝnni samma biwu.

15.1: Andi kambǝrsende dunoadǝ, ardiya kǝlandero mada gǝni, am kambǝrsenja duno bawoadǝa nettu andiro wajimsaana.
15.2: Wundunde yaye kambǝrse kamanjuyero duno njakkoro nanlewanju nangaro ardiya tiro majuwo.
15.3: Awoa Almasiwuma ardiya kǝlanjuro majǝgǝnni, amma kitawulan ruwuwadadǝ gai: «Radu am nia ranjaidǝye kǝlaniro casukkurǝna.»
15.4: Awo kuren kitawulan ruwuwada samma andia alamsaro ruwuyera, ngainin nettu yen, duno njo kitawuye yen tǝma fandiye.
15.5: Ala nettu-a duno-a njomadǝ cakko kǝla Isa Almasiwuyen hangalndo tilojo,
15.6: ngainin karwu falnin ci tiloaro Ala Bawa Kǝmande Isa Almasiwuyero daraja yiwi. Almasiwudǝ tǝma yaudiya-a kǝrdiya-aye
15.7: Adǝ nangaro Almasiwu nayia njamowonadǝ gai, wundundo yaye kamanjua cǝmowo, Alaro daraja tioro.
15.8: Nayiro wulnjagakki, jire Alaye fǝleduro Almasiwu wolodi am kajaadayero walyeno. Adǝa dionjudǝ, wadu duwon Ala kaariyaro ngojǝgǝnadǝa tabbaccuworo,
15.9: koro kǝrdiya ye kanjimaɍi Alaye nangaro tiro daraja cadoro, kitawulan ruwuwadadǝ gai: «Adǝ nangaro dawu kǝrdiyayen nia njungorǝkki, cunǝmbo aiya yegǝkki.»
15.10: Koro walde: «Nayi kǝrdiyaso, jamanju-a rokko kǝji fannowo!»
15.11: Koro walde: «Nayi kǝrdiya samma, Kǝmandedǝa yungorowo! Jama samma tia congoro!»
15.12: Adǝgaima koro Nawi Ishayaye: «Kaduwu Yisaiye isi, ti duwon kǝrdiyaa nodoro cijidǝ, koro timaro kǝrdiyadǝ tǝmanja casakki.»
15.13: Ala tǝma njomadǝ nayiro karwukǝji-a nanlewa-a samma kambǝrseyen na kojǝnaro njado, tǝmando kǝnduwo Ruhu Alayen ngǝwuro tǝrga. LEWA DARYEYE Kida Bulusse dawu kǝrdiyayen
15.14: Kǝramiyani, nayi awo ngǝlan kek tǝmbǝɍuwwa ye, ilmu sammaa tawwa ye, koro ranguwe kattendon alamduwi yero wu kǝlani tabbatto nokkǝna.
15.15: Adǝ yaye nayiro isatannjagakkoro kǝla awowa laayen ridu bawoaro ruwunjagakkǝna, Ala wuro ser sǝdde
15.16: kǝrdiyadǝro kidama Isa Almasiwuyero wallǝkkǝna nangaro. Kǝrdiyadǝ sadaa laa Ala ardijǝnaro walja, Ruhu Alaye tayia tayirro cǝdoro, ɍiman gai kida kawuɍi kǝji Alaye dikki.
15.17: Adǝ nangaro Isa Almasiwuyen kidani Alaye dikki adǝn dalil awulo boye takkǝna.
15.18: Awo Almasiwu kǝrdiya Alaa jaaro wuyen cǝdǝnadǝa gǝnia, awo gade wullǝkkiwawo, mana-a kǝndo-alan,
15.19: kǝnduwo alama so, awo ajabba soye yen, koro kǝnduwo Ruhunjuye yen adǝa kido. Ngainin Jerujalemlan tai cidi Ilirikumbero yadero dirikke kawuɍi kǝji Almasiwuyedǝa wullǝkke tumogǝkkǝna.
15.20: Nianidǝ kawuɍi kǝjidǝa na cu Almasiwuye koro yaye nojannin mawodu, bare kǝla fǝrdu kam gade gǝnajǝnayen tandǝkkǝniro.
15.21: Amma kitawulan ruwuwadadǝ gai: «Am duwon tayiro mana kǝlanjun wuljagannidǝ carui, koro am fanjannidǝ asujai.» Bulusse bǝrni Rombero leduro mada
15.22: Dǝlwu adǝma nangaro nandoro ngǝwuro ledu raakkǝnama fandǝkke lekkǝni.
15.23: Amma kǝrma nani kidaye cidi anin gadero bawodǝ, koro saa kada nandoro leduro makkidǝ,
15.24: sa kokke lardu Espaniyayero lekkiya, nayia njarukkiro tǝmakkǝna, koro mǝraduni sa ganaro nayia kuroye gallǝkkǝnaye ngawon, lardudǝro lekkoro banasǝgǝwi yero tǝmakkǝna.
15.25: Kǝrmadǝro Jerujalembo kida muminnadǝro njǝddoro lekki,
15.26: awoa kǝramiya lardu Makidoniyaye-a Akayaye-ayedǝ talaawa muminna Jerujalemlan dasaanadǝro bana laa kudoro ngǝlaro caruna.
15.27: Aaa, adǝa nanngǝlanjan kedo, koro wajipdǝ kǝlanjan mbeji. Kǝrdiyadǝ curo awowa Ruhuyen nuwanja kewandoa, daji kanji kareyayen banadudǝ tayi yero wajipcǝgǝna.
15.28: Adǝ nangaro, sa kida adǝa yerǝkke awo capcanadǝa tayiro yikkiya, nandoyen lardu Espaniyayero lekki.
15.29: Nandoro isǝkkiya, barga Almasiwuyen cap isǝkkiro nokkǝna.
15.30: Kǝramiya, Kǝmande Isa Almasiwu-a kǝrawo Ruhuye-a nangaro nayia lowonjakki, wu-a rokko mǝldǝnowo wuro Alaa sukkorowo.
15.31: Ala wua mukko ganambuwu cidi Yahudiyayero sǝmowo, koro muminnadǝ bana tayiro Jerujalemlan yadǝkkidǝa kǝjiro cawandoro moduwa dewo.
15.32: Ngainin Alaye cǝdia, nandoro karwu kǝjiaro isǝkki, nandon tustu fandǝkki.
15.33: Ala nanlewaye nayi sammalan dǝga! Amin.

16.1: Kǝraminde Ya Fibi banama jama Isaa gawu bǝla Kankariyayedǝa nayiro asunjagakki.
16.2: Kǝmande nangaro jiɍi muminnaro jussǝnalan tia mukko yindin mowowo, lamar fin yaye nayin mǝradunjuadǝn tiro banagǝnowo, tima am ngǝwu wun kundenno bana sadǝna nangaro.
16.3: Ya Bilkisu-a kwanju Akila-aa lewanowo, wu-a rokko Isa Almasiwuye kidawu,
16.4: tayi duwon roni nangaro kaanja caladǝnadǝ. Wu runi gǝni, jama Isaa gawu fǝrdunja kǝrdi samma ye tayia ardijana.
16.5: Jama Isaa gawu fannjan captaisodǝ yea lewanowo. Afanitus raakkǝnadǝa lewanowo, tima Isaa gama burwoye cidi Asiyaye wo.
16.6: Meram nayi nangaro jauro ngǝnǝptǝnadǝa lewanowo.
16.7: Andaronikus-a Ya Yuniyatu-a, kǝramiyani ye, sawawani kosoye yedǝa lewanowo, tayidǝ dawu kǝngayambayen nowada, koro wun burwonno Almasiwua jaana.
16.9: Urbanus sawande kida Almasiwuyen-a Sitakis raakkǝnadǝ-aa lewanowo.
16.10: Afalus Almasiwulan ardiyadadǝa lewanowo. Am fado Aristabulussea lewanowo.
16.11: Kǝramini Hirudiyanna lewanowo. Am Kǝmaa gawu fado Narkisussea lewanowo.
16.12: Ya Tarafina-a Ya Tarafosa-a kida Kǝmandeyen jauro ngǝnǝptanadǝa lewanowo. Ya Farsi tǝraanadǝa lewanowo, ti ye kida Kǝmandeyen jauro ngǝnǝptǝna.
16.13: Rufus kam Kǝmande tia kǝrejǝnadǝ-a yanju ti yani gai yedǝ-aa lewanowo.
16.14: Asinkǝrit-a Filegon-a Hermes-a Fatǝrobas-a Hermas-a kǝramiya tayi-a rokkodǝ-aa lewanowo.
16.15: Filologus-a Ya Yuliyatu-a Niriyus-a yanjugǝna kamuye-a Olimfas-a muminna tayi-a rokko samma-aa lewanowo.
16.16: Kattendon lewa kǝrawoyen lewadǝnowo. Jama Almasiwua gawu samma nayia lewanjai.
16.17: Kǝramiya, lowonjakki, am alamdu fanduwwadǝa wajane yaktu cadimaso, takkal cakkimasoro hangaldǝnowo, tayiro kadǝnowo!
16.18: Am ani gai Kǝmande Almasiwuro gǝni, curonjamaro kida caddi, koro manakǝjinja-a jajaktunja-an karwu am awo diwi asujaiwawoyedǝa jambajai.
16.19: Lawar gandoyedǝa wundu yaye nojǝna. Nayi nangaro karwuni kǝjijǝna, amma kǝla awo ngǝlayen rashiduro walluwe kǝla awo diwiyen biwu bawoaro walluwiya, raakko.
16.20: Ala nanlewaye tussǝnnin cidiya sindoyen Yiwulissa gǝrneji. Ser Kǝmande Isaye nayilan dǝga!
16.21: Timoti sawani kidayedǝ nayia lewanjai, adǝgaima Lusiyas-a Jason-a Sosifata-a kǝramiyanidǝ ye lewanjai.
16.22: Wu Tartiyus wotiya adǝa ruwunǝkkǝnadǝ cu Kǝmandeyen nayia lewanjakki.
16.23: Gayus ti duwon wu-a jama Isaa gawu samma-aye sosamandedǝ lewanjai. Erastus asusuma bǝlaye kǝraminde Kartus-a rokko ye lewanjai.
16.24: [Ser Kǝmande Isa Almasiwuye nayi sammalan dǝga! Amin.] Barga daryeye
16.25: [To, Alaro daraja tio, kǝla kawuɍi kǝji Isa Almasiwuye mawonǝkkiyen kǝnduwo nayiro duno njoye nanjun mbeji. Koro kǝla fasal Alaye kǝrdiyaa wujǝna tǝn jaman kureyen jaktǝna duwon,
16.26: kǝrma awo nawiya ruwujana nangaro jama duniaye sammaro bayinjiye isanojaanayen, koro wada Ala Sawisomaye, wada duwon tayi tia mǝrsaja jaaro cinadǝ yen,
16.27: Ala tilo nanrashidu cǝdanadǝro Isa Almasiwuyen har abada abadinno daraja tio! Amin.]

1.1: Wuma Bulus rawo Alayen kǝngayam Isa Almasiwuyero walduro bowowada-a kǝraminde Sastanisu-adǝ
1.2: jama Alaye bǝrni Korintiyen dasaana, wotte am duwon Isa Almasiwulan tayir ye, mumin yero walduro bowowadadǝro, koro am na fin yaye cu Kǝmande Isa Almasiwuye Kǝmanja ye, kaande yea bowojai samma yero:
1.3: Ala Bawande-a Kǝma Isa Almasiwu-a nayiro ser-a nanlewa-a njado!
1.4: Sawi yaye nayi nangaro Alania wusenǝkki, dalilnjudǝ nayiro Isa Almasiwulan ser njadǝna nangaro.
1.5: Jiɍi fin yaye mana samma-a ilmu samma-alan arsiyi jireye tilan fanduwwa,
1.6: sheda kǝla Almasiwuyen dawundon tabbatkaadadǝ gai,
1.7: ngainin kǝnjo Ruhu Alaye falma nayia maunjannin fǝledu Kǝmande Isa Almasiwuye gangadaaro gurenuwi.
1.8: Ti kǝlanju har sa njerorambero duno njade yim Kǝmande Isa Almasiwuyen saɍiwu bawoaro walluwi.
1.9: Ala amanma, ti duwon Tadanju Isa Almasiwu Kǝmandedǝ-a rokko naptu nanyaanaye deworo bowonjanadǝ. JAAWU BULUSSE KƎLA AWO FANJƎNADƎYEN Yaktu jama Isaa gawuye
1.10: Kǝramiya, cu Kǝmande Isa Almasiwuyen nayia lowonjakki, nayi sammaye cindo tilojo, bare kattendon yaktu mbejiro waljǝnni, amma hangalndo tilojo, niando ye tilojo.
1.11: To, kǝramiyani, am fado Ya Kǝlowuye wuro dawundon kambiwuaro wulsaana.
1.12: Awo wullǝkkidǝ tima wundundo yaye: «Wudǝ Bulusse,» laaye: «Wudǝ Afolusse,» laaye: «Wudǝ Kefasse,» laaye: «Wudǝ Almasiwuye,» cǝni.
1.13: Almasiwudǝ yakkada wa? Bulussa wa nayi nangaro kǝska karmoyero jajaa? Ra, cu Bulussen wa nayiro kasala ngeddo?
1.14: Kǝrifus-a Gayus-aro gǝnia, wundundomaro kasala yiddǝkkǝniro Alaa wusenǝkkǝna,
1.15: bare wunduma kasala nayiro cunilan njaddǝnaro wuljǝnniro.
1.16: Ase, am fado Istifanusse yero kasala yiddǝkkǝna, amma tayin ngawon am gadero kasala yiddǝkkǝnaa nokkǝni.
1.17: Almasiwu wua ambo kasala njǝddoro gǝni, kawuɍi kǝji wulduwuro sunodo, koro mana nanrashiduyen gǝni, bare kǝska karmoye Almasiwuyedǝ bowuro waljǝnniro. Almasiwudǝ nanrashidu Alaye
1.18: Am faccagaidǝro kawuɍi kǝska karmoyedǝ hangalnambu, amma andi njǝkkawo fandiyedǝro ti kǝnduwo Alaye,
1.19: kitawulan ruwuwadadǝ gai: «Nanrashidu rashiduwayedǝa baworo dikki, ilmu ilmuwuyedǝ yea baworo kalangǝkki.»
1.20: To, nda kam rashidudǝ? Nda goni Attaurayedǝ? Nda manama jaman adǝyedǝ? Ala nanrashidu dunia adǝyedǝa hangalnamburo kalakcǝnni wa?
1.21: Awoa nanrashidu Alayen am duniaye nanrashidunjalan tia nojannidǝ, Ala dǝlwu hangalnambu mawoniyedǝyen kambǝrsewua njǝkkaworo ngǝlaro kiro.
1.22: Yaudiya alama cawori, am Gǝresse ye nanrashidu majai,
1.23: amma andi Almasiwu kǝskaro jaadaa mawoniye, yaudiyadǝro awo talduye, yaudiya gǝnidǝro awo hangalnambuye.
1.24: Amma am Alaye bowojǝnadǝ, yaudiya yen kal, yaudiya gǝni yen kal, Almasiwudǝ kǝnduwo Alaye ye, nanrashidu Alaye ye,
1.25: dalilnjudǝ awo na Alayen hangalnamburo caruidǝ kamba nanrashidun kojǝna, koro awo na Alayen nanlawuro tǝmajanadǝ ye kamba dunon kojǝna nangaro.
1.26: Kǝramiya, bowodundo ruiwo: Kǝla naptu nan'adamgǝnayen dawundon rashidu ngǝwu bawo, kǝnduwoa ye ngǝwu bawo, am darajaa ye ngǝwu bawo.
1.27: Amma Ala rashiduwaa nanguro cakkoro awo dunian hangalnambuyedǝa kǝrejǝna, am dunoaa nanguro cakkoro awo dunian lawudǝ yea kǝrejǝna,
1.28: koro awowa mennaa baworo dioro awo dunian batti ye, waada ye, bawo yedǝa kǝrejǝna,
1.29: bare adamgǝna fima fuwu Alayen awulo juwunniro.
1.30: Tiyeman nayidǝ Isa Almasiwuyero walyew, ti duwon Alayen nanrashidundero waljǝnadǝ, nanjire-a nantayir-a merudu-an kundenno.
1.31: Ngainin kitawulan ruwuwadadǝ gai: «Kam awulo juwuimadǝ Kǝmanden awulo juwo!»

2.1: Wudǝ, kǝramiya, sa nandoro isǝkkǝnadǝ, mana nodu-a nanrashidu-alan gǝni asǝr Alaye wulduro kadikko.
2.2: Isa Almasiwu, ti duwon kǝskaro jaadadǝro kajia, awima gade curondon nokkiwaworo nia ngokkǝna.
2.3: Wudǝ, duno bawoa-a ridua-a lolodu ngǝwua-alan nandoro kadikko,
2.4: koro kawuɍini-a mawoduni-adǝa mana faiduye-a nanrashiduye-an gǝni, tabbattuwu Ruhu Alaye-a kǝnduwoye-alan kidǝkko,
2.5: ngainin kambǝrsendodǝ nanrashidu kamben gǝni, kǝnduwo Alayen kǝrga. Bayin Ruhu Alaye
2.6: Adǝ yaye curo am kambǝrsenjan wurajanayen mana nanrashiduye wulliye, amma nanrashidu dunia adǝye bi kǝnduwowu dunia adǝye faccagaidǝye gǝni,
2.7: nanrashidu Alaye asǝrlan gǝraada wulliye, nanrashidu duwon Ala kawu dunia alaktiman darajandero kadarjǝnadǝ.
2.8: Kǝnduwowu dunia adǝye wundunjama adǝa asujǝnni, ca asujanaa, Kǝma Darajayedǝa kǝskaro jajaganni.
2.9: Amma kitawulan ruwuwadadǝ gai: «Awo sim curunni, sǝmo fanjǝnni, karwu kambero ngaannidǝ, awo ania Ala am tia caraanaro dabbarjǝgǝna.»
2.10: Andiro Ala awo ania Ruhunjuyen isanosaa. Awoa Ruhudǝ awo sammaa noduma, har awowa Alaye nodu jauadǝmaa.
2.11: Wundu gǝle awo karwu kamben dǝganadǝa nojo, ruhu kambe tilan dǝganadǝro kajia? Ngaima Ruhu Alayero kajia, wunduma awowa Alaye nojiwawo.
2.12: Andi ruhu dunia adǝye gǝni, Ruhu Alaye fandiyena, ngainin kǝnjo serre Ala andiro sadǝnadǝa noniye.
2.13: Koro awo animaa mananiye, mana duwon nanrashidu kamben gǝni, Ruhu Alaye alamjǝnadǝlan wulliye, awo Ruhuyedǝa am Ruhuyedǝro fisargǝiye.
2.14: Kam Ruhu tilan dǝgannimadǝ awo Ruhu Alayedǝa kasacciwawo, dalilnjudǝ tiro awo hangalnambuye, koro rakce asujiwawo, Ruhuyen asudai nangaro.
2.15: Kam tilan Ruhu dǝgaimadǝ awi yayea rijapci, amma ti kǝlanjudǝa wunduma rijapciwawo.
2.16: «Wundu gǝle nia Kǝmandeye nojo, har tia galaji?» Amma andidǝ nia Almasiwuye taiyena.

3.1: Kǝramiya, wudǝ rangǝkke nayiro am Ruhu tayia simoji gairo mananjagakkǝni, sai am hal tiyiyen dasaana, wotte am Almasiwulan timal gairo.
3.2: Kǝmbo gǝni, kiam nayiro njadǝkke yaw, ranguwwawodǝro. Koro yaye tia ranguwwawo,
3.3: kuamison nayi hal tiyiyen kǝrgaw nangaro. Dawundon nandǝɍi-a lawala-aadǝ, hal tiyiyen dǝgawe kǝla kǝndǝgai adamgǝnayen diwi, gǝna?
3.4: Kam laaye: «Wu Bulusse,» laaye: «Wu Afolusse,» cǝniya, kǝndǝgai adamgǝnaye diwwawo wa?
3.5: To, Afolusdǝ wundu? Bulusdǝ wundu? Tayidǝ wolodiya tayiyen mǝrsanuwwadǝ, Kǝmande finja yayero kida cinadǝ gai.
3.6: Wu nadǝkko, Afolus ketto, amma Ala cakke wurajo.
3.7: Adǝ nangaro kam cǝnadimadǝ-a cattimadǝ-a awima gǝni, sai Ala cakke wurajimadǝ.
3.8: Kam cǝnadimadǝ-a cattimadǝ-a samma tilo, wundunja yaye alwasi kidanjuye kalkal cuwandi.
3.9: Andidǝ sawawa kida Alaye, nayidǝ ye kulo Alaye, tando Alaye.
3.10: Kǝla ser Ala wuro sinadǝyen, goni soro tandoye gai fǝrdu gǝnayekko, kam laa gade kǝladǝn cǝdandi. Amma wundu yaye jiɍi cǝttandiro hangal gǝnajo!
3.11: Awoa wunduma rakce fǝrdu gade gǝnajiwawo, ti gǝnaadadǝro kajia, tima Isa Almasiwu wo.
3.12: Wundu duwon kǝla fǝrdudǝyen dinarlan, bi ɍiwullan, bi kau tamanna tamannalan, bi kǝskalan, bi kangalelan, bi kajǝmlan tando cǝdimadǝ,
3.13: kidanju federo culuwi, yim kiyamaa tia isanojiyi, koro kannun kida wunduye yaye rijapte jiɍinju fǝledi nangaro.
3.14: Kam laaye kidanju cǝttandǝnadǝ napkenoa, mukowa cuwandi.
3.15: Kam kidanju kannuye juwunadǝ tia fucci. Ti kǝlanju njǝkkawo cuwandi, amma dawu kannuyen kojǝna gai.
3.16: Nayidǝ Fado Alaye ye, Ruhu Alaye nayilan kǝrga yero nonuwwi wa?
3.17: Kam laa Fado Alayea wuryenoa, Ala tia sijiyi, awoa Fado Alayedǝ tayir, koro Fadodǝ nayima.
3.18: Bare wunduma jambadǝnni. Kamndo laa kǝla dunia adǝyen kǝlanju rashiduro ngoyenoa, hangal bawoa gairo waljo, rashiduro waljoro.
3.19: Awoa nanrashidu dunia adǝye na Alayen hangalnambu, kitawulan ruwuwadadǝ gai: «Ala rashiduwaa nanganjan cǝdai,»
3.21: Adǝma nangaro bare wunduma kǝla kamben awulo juwunni, awoa awo samma kaando,
3.22: Bulus, bi Afolus, bi Kefas, bi dunia, bi ro, bi karmo, bi awowa kǝrmaye, bi awowa fuwuye. Ai, awo samma kaando,
3.23: nayi ye Almasiwuye, Almasiwu ye Alaye.

4.1: Adǝgainin andidǝa wolodiya Almasiwuye-a kistuwuwu asǝr Alaye-aro ngosa.
4.2: Kǝla adǝyen dole kistuwumadǝ amannaro waljo.
4.3: Wuyenna shara wuro sǝdduwiya, bi alkali adamgǝnaye laa sǝddiya, awima gǝni. Ai, kǝlanimaro shara yiddǝkkiwawo.
4.4: Karwunilan saɍiwuaro tǝmakkǝni, amma adǝ gǝni wua jiremaro sǝdi, sharamanidǝ Kǝmande.
4.5: Adǝ nangaro bare kawu sanju cǝdiro wundumaro shara yidduwwi, sai Kǝmande isiya, ti duwon awo curo duwuyen gǝraada ye fǝleji, nia karwu kamben dǝgana ye federo cuttuluwidǝ. Sadǝn wundu yaye jajaktunju kalkal na Alayen cuwandi.
4.6: To, kǝramiya, kǝndǝgaindeyen bare awo kitawulan ruwuwadaa konuwwiro ɍiworo, nayi nangaro awo ania wu kǝlani-a Afolus-aa wusanaro ngokkǝna. Ngainin wundundoma rokura cǝde kam laaa cuju kam gadeyero jǝgaiwawo.
4.7: Wundu amba konǝmmaro nia njǝdo? Awi tamma duwon mowommi wo? Mowommaa, awi nangaro mowommi gai awulo bumi?
4.8: Har kulluwwa! Har gaɍiwunuwwa! Nayi andi-a rokko gǝni maiyaro walluwwa! Ca maiyaro walluwwaa, andi ye nayi-a rokko kǝrmai nodiye!
4.9: Amma kuroniyen Ala andi kǝngayambadǝa na kǝndaryeyero gǝnasaana, am duwon tayiro shara karmoye caddǝnadǝ gai. Fuwu dunia-a malaiyawa-a amso-ayen awo manayero walliyena.
4.10: Almasiwu nangaro andidǝ hangalnambuwu, amma nayidǝ Almasiwulan rashiduwa! Andidǝ dunonde bawo, amma nayidǝ dunondoa! Nayidǝ darajaa, andidǝ ruwada.
4.11: Har kǝrmaro kǝna-a ngudu-a fanniye, kare dina luwadaa, babakkada, fado bawoa ye kǝrgaiye,
4.12: koro ngǝnǝptiye mukkonden kida diye. Rarasaiya, barga dǝpkǝiye, basarsaiya, neddiye,
4.13: manakuttu andiro wulsagaiya, ser yiddiye. Andi jambo duniaye gairo walliyena, ngabdula am sammaye gairo, har kumaro.
4.14: Nayiro adǝa ruwudunidǝ, nayia nanguro njakkoro gǝni, tadawani jauro raakkǝna gai sǝmondo kasturo.
4.15: Awoa malǝmba dǝwu kada Almasiwulan fanduwi yaye, bawa kada gǝni taw. Wuma kawuɍi kǝjiyen Isa Almasiwulan bawandoro walyekko.
4.16: Adǝ nangaro nayia lowonjakki, misalni gaiwo.
4.17: Dalil adǝro Timoti tadani jauro raakkǝna ye, Kǝmanden amanna yedǝa juwangeyerakko. Tidǝ kǝndǝgaini duwon Almasiwulan dikke ndaran yaye, dawu jama Isaa gawu fiyen yaye yikkǝrakkidǝa nayiro isatannjagai.
4.18: Am laa nandoro isǝkkiwaworo tǝmajane rokurawuro waljana,
4.19: amma Kǝmande kasaccia, tussǝnnin nandoro isǝkke rokurawu aniye mananja gǝni, kǝnduwonja nokki,
4.20: awoa nodo bargaa Alayedǝ manan gǝni, kǝnduwon kǝrga.
4.21: Awi rawuw? Kaaa wa nandoro isǝkki, ra kǝrawoa fǝkka farakkan isǝkki?

5.1: Dawundon kǝnjǝna cadi cani fanniyena, koro kǝnjǝna duwon jiɍinju na kǝrdiyayeman tǝdiwawodǝ: Har kam laa kamu bawanjuyea maji.
5.2: Koro rokura diwi! Karwukutta diwe kam awo adǝa cǝdǝnadǝa dawundon tuluwwama ngǝla wo!
5.3: Wudǝ tiyilan nandon gǝni yaye, karwulan nayi-a rokko, koro kǝla kam awo adǝa cǝdǝnadǝyen wu mbeji gairo shara kammǝkkǝna,
5.4: sa cu Kǝmande Isayen captuwiya, ruhuni ye kǝnduwo Kǝmande Isayen kundenno mbeji duwon,
5.5: kam adǝa mukko Yiwulissero yakkowo, tiyinjua cejo, yim Kǝmandea ruhunju njǝkkawo cuwandoro.
5.6: Awulo bondodǝ ngǝla gǝni! Yis tǝngǝɍi rungo sammaa isafujiyiro nonuwwi wa?
5.7: Nayidǝ rungo yis bawoa gai, yis dinadǝa tuluwowo, rungo bǝɍinno wallowo, awoa ngǝlaro Layande Njǝkkayirambedǝ duwaada, tima Almasiwu wo.
5.8: Adǝ nangaro ngǝmǝridǝa diyo, yis dina, wotte yis nankǝladoye-a nandiwiye-alan gǝni, burodi yis bawoa, wotte nantayir-a jire-alan diyo.
5.9: Curo wotiyaniyen nayiro jawal kǝnjǝnawuyen luwoworo ruwunjagakkǝna,
5.10: amma awo wuldu raakkǝnadǝ kǝnjǝnama dunia adǝye gǝni, bi mangarduma, bi ndalduma, bi sǝnǝm gama, adǝ gǝnia, sai dunian luwuwiya.
5.11: A'a, awo ruwunjagakkǝnadǝ tima kam Isaa gama cǝni duwon kǝnjǝnama, bi mangarduma, bi sǝnǝm gama, bi raraduma, bi mbalma, bi ndaldumaa, bare tiro kǝldǝgǝwwi, bare kam adǝgai-a masǝnama diwwi.
5.12: Awi lamboni am deyayedǝa sharaduro? Am curoyedǝmaa sharanuwi, mare?
5.13: Am deyayedǝa Ala sharaji. «Kam diwidǝa dawundon tuluwowo!»

6.1: Kamndo laa sonju kǝla kamanjuyen cǝdanaa, ndayin na muminnayero gǝni, na kǝrdiyayero lenuwe shara njaddidǝ?
6.2: Ra, muminnadǝ duniaro shara caddiro nonuwwi wa? Koro nayima duniaro shara yidduwia, martawa lamar tǝngǝɍimaa sharaduye nagǝwwi wa?
6.3: Malaiyawaro shara yiddiyero nonuwwi wa? Balle lamarra dunia adǝye?
6.4: Adǝ nangaro lamarra ani gai shararo tawwaa, awiro am duwon na jama Isaa gawuyen awima gǝnidǝro sondo yaduwidǝ?
6.5: Nangunoworo wullǝkki. Ngaima rashidu dawundon rakce katte kǝramiyayen shara kamji falma bawo wa?
6.6: Kǝrami laa kǝrami kamanjua shararo cadi, koro adǝ fuwu ganambuwuyen!
6.7: Awiro walyeno yaye, shara kattendon diodǝ njurondo. Jirenambu nayiro njaddiyama ngalwo, gǝna? Kǝndando jawuiyama ngalwo, gǝna?
6.8: Amma nayi kǝlando jirenambu so, kǝnda bo so, har kǝramiyamaro yidduwi!
6.9: Ra, jirenambuwu nodo bargaa Alayen warasa cawandiwaworo nonuwwi wa? Bare jambaduwwi! Am diwi, bi sǝnǝm gawu, bi kǝnjǝnawu, bi kamukamu, bi luttuwu,
6.10: bi barwuwa, bi mangarduwu, bi mbalwu, bi raraduwu, bi jambawu fima nodo bargaa Alayea warasajaiwawo.
6.11: Calan laandoma ngai. Amma nayia kasalnjana, tayirro walluwwa, koro cu Kǝmande Isa Almasiwuye-a Ruhu Alande-ayen jirewuro walluwwa. Tiyindolan Alaro daraja yowo!
6.12: «Awo samma wuro amardǝgǝna,» nuwi, amma awo samma gǝni faidaa wo. «Awo samma wuro amardǝgǝna,» amma wu kollǝkke awima sunodiwawo.
6.13: «Kǝmbodǝ curoye, curo ye kǝmboye,» nuwi, koro Ala tayi yindisoa baworo cǝdi. Tiyidǝ awo kǝnjǝnaye gǝni, tidǝ Kǝmandeye, koro Kǝmande ye tiyiye.
6.14: Ala karmolan Kǝmadǝa cǝsangǝna, koro andi yea kǝnduwonjun sasangi.
6.15: Tiyindodǝ nasha Almasiwuyero nonuwwi wa? To, nasha Almasiwuye ngokke nasha jawarrero dikki wa? A'a, tǝmmaro ngai gǝni!
6.16: Ra, kam jawarro kǝldǝgǝnamadǝ ti-a rokko tiyi fallo waljanaro nonuwwi wa? Akko awo kitawu wuljǝnadǝ: «Tayi yindiso tiyi fallo waljai.»
6.17: Amma kam Kǝmandero kǝldǝgǝnamadǝ ti-a rokko ruhu fallo waljai.
6.18: Kǝnjǝnaro kadǝnowo! Biwu kam cǝdǝna samma deya tiyiyen kǝrga, amma kǝnjǝnama tiyinjumaro biwu cǝddi.
6.19: Ra, tiyindodǝ fado Ruhu Alaye, tidǝ nayin dǝgana, koro Alayen isiro nonuwwi wa? Nayidǝ kaando gǝni,
6.20: Ala nayia tamanlan njasuwuna. Adǝ nangaro tiyindolan Alaro daraja yowo!

7.1: Kǝla awowa wuro ruwusuwwadǝyen: «Kongwaye kamu ngodunambudǝma ngǝla wo.»
7.2: Amma kǝnjǝna wadaro, kongwa fi yaye kamu ngojo, koro kamu fi yaye kwa cǝdo.
7.3: Kwadǝ kamunjuro wajipnju co, koro kamudǝ ye kwanjuro ngai cǝddo.
7.4: Kamudǝ tiyinjulan kǝnduwonju bawo, kǝnduwodǝ mukko kwanjuyen kǝrga. Ngaima kwadǝ ye tiyinjulan kǝnduwonju bawo, kǝnduwodǝ mukko kamunjuyen kǝrga.
7.5: Bare wundundoma kamanjuro tiyinju dapcǝgǝnni, sai kasadduwe kawu ganaro kǝlando moduwa deworo faiduwiro kajia, daji kallo waldǝnowo, bare kǝlaɍiwonambundo nangaro Yiwulis nayia jaramnjanniro.
7.6: Adǝa wuldunidǝ, wada gǝni, jawal laa.
7.7: Am samma wu gairo waljaiya raakkǝna, amma kam fi yaye na Alayen kǝnjonju cǝmowona, laa ngai, laa ye ngai.
7.8: Am kamu cadanni-a kamuwa kwa faccaanaa-adǝro wulgǝkki, naptu wu gailan dasaanama tayiro ngalwo.
7.9: Amma rakcane kǝlanja caɍiwiwawoa, niya cado, jarawadǝroa niya diodǝma ngalwo.
7.10: Am niya cadǝnadǝro wada adǝa yikki, wu gǝni, amma Kǝmande: Bare kamudǝ kwanju-a faidanni.
7.11: Amma kwanju-a faidanaro walyenoa, niya bawoa napco, bi kwanju-a soloda. Koro kwadǝ ye bare kamunjua dǝpcǝnni.
7.12: Am gapcanadǝro wuma adǝa wulgǝkki, Kǝmande gǝni: Kǝrami laa kamu Isaa gama gǝni cǝdanaa, koro kamudǝ ti-a rokko naptu kasaccǝnaa, bare kamudǝa dǝpcǝnni.
7.13: Koro kamu laa kwa Isaa gama gǝni cǝdanaa, koro kwadǝ ti-a naptu kasaccǝnaa, bare kwadǝa wajǝnni.
7.14: Awoa kwa Isaa gama gǝnidǝ kamunjuyen tayirro waljǝna, koro kamu Isaa gama gǝnidǝ kwanjuyen tayirro waljǝna. Adǝ gǝnia, yallando tayir gǝni, amma ngainin tayidǝ tayir.
7.15: Amma ti Isaa gama gǝnidǝ faidu kirawoa, faida. Ngairo walyenoa, kǝrami kongwa bi kamudǝ tikkerǝnni, awoa nanlewan dǝgaro Ala nayia bowongera.
7.16: Ni kamu, ndayin gǝle kwanǝmba yikkagǝmiro nonǝmi? Koro ni kwa, ndayin gǝle kamunǝmba yikkagǝmiro nonǝmi? Wundu yaye naptunjun dǝga!
7.17: Biya wundu yaye, Ala tia bowojǝnadǝ gai, naptu duwon Kǝmande tiro amarjǝgǝnadǝlan dǝga. Adǝma wada jama Isaa gawu sammayero yikkidǝ wo.
7.18: Kam duwon sa tia bowojanalan kajanjuadǝ, bare kajadǝnniro waljǝnni. Ti jǝmbǝlǝmlan bowojanadǝ, bare kajadǝnni.
7.19: Kajadǝ awima gǝni, kajanambudǝ ye awima gǝni, wada Alaye ga faidaa wo.
7.20: Wundu yaye naptunju sa tia bowojanadǝyen dǝga.
7.21: Ni kaɍea duwon bowongeraa, bare suwoldǝmmi, amma dama nankam kǝlaye fandǝmia, faidadǝne.
7.22: Kam ti kaɍea duwon Kǝma tia bowojǝnadǝ, na Kǝmayen ti nankam kǝlaye cǝdana. Jiɍi adǝgainin kam duwon Kǝma tia nankam kǝlayea bowojǝnadǝ, ti kaɍea Almasiwuye.
7.23: Ala nayia tamanlan njasuwuna, bare kaɍea kambero walluwwi.
7.24: Kǝramiya, wundu yaye naptu duwon Ala tia bowojǝnadǝn na Alayen dǝga. Kǝla am kamu cadanni-a kamuwa kwa faccaanaa-ayen
7.25: Kǝla ferowa kwa nojanniyen wada Kǝmandeye takkǝni, amma kam duwon kanjimaɍi Kǝmandeyen amannadǝ gai, kuroni yikki.
7.26: Awo rukkidǝ tima suwol kǝrmayedǝro ngai naptudǝma kambo ngalwo.
7.27: Ni kamuaa, bare faidu manǝmmi. Kamu bawoaa, bare kamu ngonǝmmi.
7.28: Amma kamu ngonǝmiro walyenoa, biwu dimmi. Koro fero kwa nojǝnni kwa cǝdiro walyenoa, biwu cǝdǝnni. Adǝ yaye am ani gai dunia adǝn bone casai, amma wudǝ adǝro kanuwiya, raakko.
7.29: Kǝramiya, awo wullǝkkidǝ: Sa karǝnjǝna. Kua adǝn fuwun am kamu cadanadǝ kamu cadanni gairo walja,
7.30: am cesiridǝ ye cesiriwawo gairo walja, am karwukǝji cadidǝ ye karwukǝji cadiwawo gairo walja, am casuwidǝ ye awima cadanni gairo walja,
7.31: koro am dunia adǝn faidadaidǝ ye tiro duno cadǝnni gairo walja, alama dunia adǝye baworo tǝdi nangaro.
7.32: Nayi suwol bawoaro walluwiya, raakko. Kam kamu cǝdannidǝ awowa Kǝmayero suwolde jiɍi cǝde ardiyanju cuwandoro maji.
7.33: Amma kam kamuadǝ kǝla awowa dunia adǝyero suwolde jiɍi cǝde ardiya kamunjuye cuwandoro maji,
7.34: hangalnju yaktǝna. Koro kamu kwa bawoadǝ-a fero kwa nojǝnnidǝ-a kǝla awowa Kǝmandeyen suwoldai, tiyi yelan, ruhu yelan tayir napcaro. Amma kamu kwaadǝ kǝla awowa dunia adǝyero suwolde jiɍi cǝde ardiya kwanjuye cuwandoro maji.
7.35: Adǝa wuldunidǝ, katkun gǝnaduwuro gǝni, nayia banaduwuro, naptu jussǝna dewo, hangal yaktǝnnin Kǝmandea gaiworo.
7.36: Kam laa tǝmajinjuro awo jussǝnni cǝddiro tǝmajǝnaa, koro jauro mǝradunjua duwon lamardǝ ngai wajipcǝnaa, awo cǝraanadǝa cǝdo, niya cado, biwuro waljiwawo.
7.37: Amma kam curo karwunjuyen nia dunoa ngojǝna, tiro dolero waljǝnni, rawonju, koro tia tǝmajinju gai roduro karwunjun nia ngojǝnadǝ, awo ngǝla cǝdi.
7.38: Jiɍi adǝgainin kam tǝmajinju ngojǝnadǝ awo ngǝla cǝdi, koro kam ngojǝnnimadǝ adǝa kojǝna cǝdi.
7.39: Kamudǝ kwanju roaa tiro kǝllaada, amma kwadǝ bawoyenoa, rakce kam cǝraanaa niyaji, amma Kǝmaa gamaro waljo.
7.40: Amma wuyenna ngai naptudǝma tiro bargaa wo, koro kuronin wu yelan Ruhu Alayea.

8.1: Kǝla da sǝnǝmbo tinayen, andi samma ilmu taiyenaro noniyena. Ilmudǝ kamba fujiyi, amma kǝrawodǝ dunoaro cǝdi.
8.2: Kam duwon kǝlanjua awo laa nojǝnaro ngoyenoa, koroma jiɍi wajipcǝnadǝ gairo nojǝnni,
8.3: amma kam laa Alaa kirawoa, Ala tia nojǝna.
8.4: To, kǝla da sǝnǝmbo tinaa ngǝroyen, sǝnǝm dunialan awima gǝni ye, Ala tilodǝro kajia, gade bawo yero noniyena.
8.5: Awoa alawa laa same yen kal, cidiya yen kal mbeji cani yaye, alawa kada-a kǝmawa kada-a mbejidǝ gai,
8.6: adǝ yaye nanden Aladǝ tilo, ti Bawa, tilan awi yaye isi, ti nangaro kǝrgaiye, koro Kǝmande Isa Almasiwudǝ ye tilo, tiyen awi yaye isi, tiyen kǝrgaiye.
8.7: Amma am samma gǝni ilmu adǝa cada. Laanja gumkiyaa caɍinadǝro har kǝrmaro da jagariya, sǝnǝmbo tinadǝ gairo jagari, koro karwunja kibbajǝnnidǝ tayir gǝniro walji.
8.8: Kǝmbo gǝni sasakke Alaa karǝnniye. Bo waniyea, tǝgǝrdiyewawo. Buiyea, tǝrgaiyewawo.
8.9: Amma hangal gǝnanowo, bare nankam kǝlayendo adǝ am lawudǝa cakke taljanni.
8.10: Kam laa karwunju kibbajǝnni duwon ni ilmuadǝ fado sǝnǝmben masǝna dimi ngiroa, adǝ cakke da sǝnǝmbo tinaa jǝgǝriwawo wa?
8.11: Ngainin kǝla ilmunǝmben kǝrami lawu duwon ti nangaro Almasiwu nunadǝ facciyi.
8.12: Kǝramiyandoro biwu ngainin yidduwiya, koro karwunja kibbajǝnnidǝa lorunuwiya, Almasiwumaro biwu kidduw.
8.13: Adǝma nangaro da ngǝrodǝ cakke kǝramini taljiro walyenoa, gadero da ngǝrǝkkiwawo, bare kǝraminia yakkǝkke taljǝnniro.

9.1: Wu kambe, gǝna? Wu kǝngayam, gǝna? Isa Kǝmandea rukkǝni wa? Nayima gǝna kidani Kǝmandelan dikkǝnadǝ wo?
9.2: Am gade nankǝngayammidǝa kasaccaiwawo yaye, fagat nandon wu kǝngayam, Kǝmandelan nayima tawa nankǝngayammi tabbacciyidǝ wo.
9.3: Adǝma awo am ayau gǝnasagaidǝro kalangǝkkidǝ:
9.4: Kǝnduwo kǝmbo-a kǝnja-a fandoye taiyende wa?
9.5: Kǝnduwo kamunde Isaa gama-a rokko bǝlawuroduye kǝngayamba gade so, yaanawa Kǝmaye so, Kefas so cadidǝ gai taiyende wa?
9.6: Wu-a Barnabas-a runde wa kǝnduwo kida dionambuye taiyende wo?
9.7: Wundu ngalte yaye kida sojiye cǝdi duwon wuɍinjulan ambadidǝ? Wundu ya inabbe kokci duwon tadanju caiwawodǝ? Wundu lǝmanna cǝneyi duwon kiam lǝmannayedǝa caiwawodǝ?
9.8: Kǝla mana kamben wa awo ania wullǝkki? Attaura ye ngai wuljǝnni wa?
9.9: Akko awo Attaura Nawi Musayen ruwuwadadǝ: «Bare dalo wastu cǝdi duwon cinjuro cambu yakkǝmmi.» Ala daloro wa lambonjua wo?
9.10: Fagat andi nangaro adǝa wulji, mare? Aaa, andi nangaro awo adǝ ruwuwada: «Baremadǝ tǝmanjualan bare cǝdo, wastumadǝ ye nuwanju cuwandiro tǝmajo cǝdo.»
9.11: Awowa Ruhuye karwundolan nadiyenadǝ, awo duniaye nandon kaladundedǝ awo laa kura wa?
9.12: Am gade kǝnduwo nuwanja nandon mowoye cadanaa, andidǝ tayia kojǝnaro taiyena, gǝna? Adǝ yaye kǝnduwo adǝlan faidadiyende, curo jǝktu fiyen yaye mǝrniye, bare kawuɍi kǝji Almasiwuyedǝro takkal fima yakkiyendero.
9.13: Am kida Fado Alayen cadidǝ kǝmbo Fado Alayen jawui, koro am laya duwaduramnin kida cadidǝ nuwanja laya duwaduramdǝlan cawandiro nonuwwi wa?
9.14: Jiɍi adǝgai Kǝmande wada ce am kawuɍi kǝji mawodumaso kida kawuɍi kǝjiyen awo kǝndǝgainjaye cawando cǝnna.
9.15: Amma wudǝ kǝnduwo aniye falnjamalan faidadǝkkǝni, koro nuwani fandoro gǝni awo ania ruwunǝkki. Awulo boni cattuluwiro nukkǝnama ngalwo.
9.16: Kawuɍi kǝji wuldunidǝ dalil awulo boye gǝni, wuldunjudǝ wajimsǝgǝna. Kawuɍi kǝjidǝa wullǝkkiwaworo walyenoa, kuttuni!
9.17: Awo adǝa rawonin dikkia, alwasi fandǝkki, amma rawonin gǝnia, nanwakkil mukkoniro casakkǝna.
9.18: To, awi gǝle alwasini wo? Kawuɍi kǝji wullǝkkidǝa kǝnduwo duwon kawuɍi kǝji adǝ sinadǝn faidadǝkkǝnin dero kǝnjoro.
9.19: Na am sammayen wu kambe duwon, ngǝwunjaa mowokkoro kǝlania kaɍea tayi sammayero kalakkekko.
9.20: Na yaudiyayen, yaudiya njǝkkawo cawandoro, yaudi gairo walyekko. Na am fǝrdu wada Attaurayen dasaanayen, wu kǝlani fǝrdu wadayen dǝgakkǝni yaye, kam fǝrdu wadayen dǝgana gairo walyekko, am fǝrdu wadayen dasaana njǝkkawo cawandoro.
9.21: Am wada cadannidǝa mowokkoro, wu ye kam wada cǝdanni gairo walyekko, amma wudǝ kam wada Alaye cǝdanni gǝni, fǝrdu wada Almasiwuyen kǝrgakko.
9.22: Na am lawuyen lawuro walyekko, tayi lawudǝ njǝkkawo cawandoro. Adǝgaima na am sammayen awo sammaro wallǝkkǝna, jiɍi fin yaye laanjaa yikkagǝkkoro.
9.23: Kawuɍi kǝji nangaro ani sammaa dikki, tilan nuwani fandǝkkoro.
9.24: Curo ngǝrǝm siyen ngǝrǝmgu samma ngǝrǝmjai yaye, tilo lon ladadǝa cuwandiro nonuwwi wa? Jiɍi diwe fanduwiro ngǝrǝmmowo!
9.25: Am bikkelan ngǝnǝptaidǝ jawal samman kǝlanja caɍiwi. Tayidǝ aɍiawu kǝnnasarre dǝgaiwawo moworo adǝa cadi, amma andidǝ aɍiawu sawisoro dǝgai moworo diye.
9.26: Wudǝ kam na leduye bawo gairo gǝni ngǝrǝmmǝkki, koro dambenidǝ kam kasam bakci gairo gǝni bangǝkki,
9.27: amma bare ngawo kawuɍi am gadero wulgǝkkǝnayen wu kǝlani curonjan baworo wallǝkkǝniro tiyini jauro ngǝnǝmmǝkke kǝlani ɍiwukki.

10.1: Kǝramiya, adǝa nonuwiya, raakko: Kaariyande samma cidiya fofouyen dasaana, tayi samma bǝrǝm faljane kojana,
10.2: koro tayi sammaro curo fofoudǝ-a bǝrǝmdǝ-ayen kasala cadde Nawi Musaro kǝlyeyera.
10.4: koro tayi samma kǝnja Ruhuyedǝmaa kesa, awoa kau Ruhuye tayia jǝgaidǝyen casana, kau adǝ tima Almasiwu wo.
10.5: Adǝ yaye Ala ngǝwunjaye kǝjinja fanjǝnni, koro karaa dǝɍiro kaminnjaa tataryeyeno.
10.6: Lamarra ani andiro misallo walseyera, jiɍi awo diwi mangarjanadǝ gai, bare mangarniyendero.
10.7: Bare sǝnǝm gawu amnja laa gairo walluwwi, kitawulan ruwuwadadǝ gai: «Jamadǝ kǝmbo-a kǝnja-aro napkera, koro bikke randoro ciyera.»
10.8: Bare kǝnjǝna diyende, amnja laa cade yim falnin am dǝwu findin yakkun sanunadǝ gai.
10.9: Bare Almasiwua jarammiyende, amnja laa cade kadiya tayia ceyesǝnadǝ gai.
10.10: Bare karwukutta fǝlenuwwi, amnja laa cade siduwuma tayia sijǝgǝnadǝ gai.
10.11: Lamarra ani tayiro misallo wakkajaana, koro sǝmonde kasturo ruwuyera, andi duwon sa njeroramben dǝgaiyenadǝ.
10.12: Adǝ nangaro wundu duwon ti daadaro tǝmajǝnadǝ bare curǝnniro hangal gǝnajo!
10.13: Jaraptu am sammaa cuwandǝna gǝnia, jaraptu fima nayia njawandǝnni. Ala amanma, kolje dunondo kojǝnaro jaramnjaiwawo, amma jaraptu isiya, ranguwe nedduwiro jawal luwoye njadi. Kǝla sǝnǝm gayen
10.14: Adǝ nangaro, kǝrawowuni, sǝnǝm garo kadǝnowo!
10.15: Nayiro am hangalla gairo jandenjagakki. Nayi kǝlando awo wullǝkkidǝa sharanowo!
10.16: Kǝnjaram bargaa ti nangaro Alaa wuseniyedǝ, tilan gǝna bu Almasiwuyero kǝldiyiye? Koro burodi fǝsangiyedǝ, tilan gǝna tiyi Almasiwuyero kǝldiyiye?
10.17: Burodi fal dǝgadǝ, andi ngǝwu yaye, tiyinde falma, awoa andi samma burodi faldǝa ngǝriye.
10.18: Israyilawua tangowo: Tayi laya jagaridǝ laya duwaduramdǝro kǝldaana, gǝna?
10.19: To, awi wullǝkki? Da sǝnǝmbo tinadǝ-a sǝnǝmdǝma-a awo laa wo?
10.20: A'a, amma layanjadǝ Alaro gǝni, sedannaro duwajagai. Sedannaro kǝldǝgǝwiya, raakkǝni.
10.21: Ranguwe kǝnjaram Kǝmaye-a kǝnjaram sedannaye-ayen yawwawo. Ranguwe tewur Kǝmaye-a tewur sedannaye-alan masǝna diwwawo.
10.22: Ra, yakkiye Kǝmaa nandǝɍi cǝdai? Tia dunon koniyena wa? Awin yaye daraja Alaro tio!
10.23: «Awi yaye amardǝgǝna,» amma awo samma gǝni faidaa wo. «Awi yaye amardǝgǝna,» amma awo samma gǝni kamba dunoaji.
10.24: Wundu yaye awo ngǝla kǝlanjuro gǝni, am gadeyero majuwo!
10.25: Awo haumadin caladi sammaa buiwo, bare saɍiwu karwuye nangaro kǝlanjun kokoruwwi,
10.26: «Dunia-a awowa curonjun dasaana samma-a Kǝmandeye,» nangaro.
10.27: Kam laa Isaa gama gǝni nayia donjane kasadduwe lenuwiya, awo fuwundoro casakkǝna sammaa buiwo, bare saɍiwu karwuye nangaro kǝlanjun kokoruwwi.
10.28: Amma kam laa nayiro: «Adǝ sǝnǝmbo tina,» cǝnia, kam nayiro isanonjaanadǝ-a saɍiwu karwuye-a nangaro bare buwwi.
10.29: Karwu kaando gǝni, kaanju wullǝkki. Awiro gǝle saɍiwu karwu kam gadeye nankam kǝlayeni sharaji?
10.30: Alaa wusenǝkke bukkia, awiro gǝle kǝla awo duwon ti nangaro Alaa wusenǝkkǝnadǝyen wua sharasai?
10.31: Buwi yen kal, yawi yen kal, awo diwi samma yen kal, awi yayea daraja Alayero dewo.
10.32: Bare yaudiya-a yaudiya gǝni-a jama Alaye-aa yakkuwe taljanni,
10.33: wu ye jawal fin yaye ardiya am sammaye makkidǝ gai. Awoa wuro gǝni, am ngǝwuro awo faidaa makki, njǝkkawo cawandoro.

11.1: Halnia gaiwo, jiɍi wu ye hal Almasiwuyea gakkidǝ gai. Kǝla Alaro ambǝttuwu-a kǝla jakta-ayen
11.2: Awi yayen wua tansuwe alamdu jiɍi nayiro njaddǝkkǝnadǝa ngǝlaro gawi nangaro nayia wusenjakki.
11.3: Adǝ yaye awo adǝa nonuwiya, raakko: Fuwuma kongwa sammayedǝ tima Almasiwu wo, fuwuma kamuyedǝ tima kwanju wo, koro fuwuma Almasiwuyedǝ tima Ala wo.
11.4: Kongwa duwon moduwa bi nawinawi kǝla jakkadaa cǝdidǝ fuwumanjua nanguro cakki.
11.5: Amma kamu duwon moduwa bi nawinawi kǝla kaadaa cǝdidǝ fuwumanjua nanguro cakki, kǝlanju tǝlarǝna-a kal wo.
11.6: Awoa kamu kǝlanju jakciwawoa, gǝrǝpca. Kǝla gǝrǝptu bi larodǝ na kamuyen awo nanguyea, kǝlanju jakco.
11.7: Kongwaye kǝla jaktudǝ jussǝnni, ti camuno-a daraja-a Alaye nangaro, amma kamudǝ daraja kongwaye.
11.8: Awoa kongwa gǝni kamuyen culuwo, amma kamu kongwayen culuwo.
11.9: Koro kongwaa gǝni kamu nangaro alakca, amma kamudǝa kongwa nangaro alakca.
11.10: Dalil adǝro alama kǝnduwoye kǝlanjun gǝnadudǝ malaiyawa nangaro kamuro wajipcǝgǝna.
11.11: Adǝ yaye na Kǝmandeyen kamudǝ kongwa-a faiyada gǝni, kongwadǝ ye kamu-a faiyada gǝni.
11.12: Jiɍi kamudǝ kongwayen isǝnadǝ gai, kongwadǝ ye tambo kamuyen isi, adǝgaima awi yaye Alayen isi.
11.13: Nayi kǝlandoma sharanowo: Kamu kǝla jakcǝnnin Alaa cuworidǝ jussǝna wa?
11.14: Kǝla kǝndǝgai duniayen, kongwaye kanduɍinju kuruwua tiro awo nangua yaye,
11.15: kamuye kanduɍinju kuruwuro ɍijiya, tiro awo darajaye, gǝna? Awoa kanduɍinjudǝa jakturam gairo tiro cadǝna.
11.16: Kam laa kǝla adǝyen kambiwudu cǝraanaa, alamdu gade taiyende, jama Alaye gadegadeso ye cadanni. Cammonja ngǝla gǝni
11.17: Amma kǝla wada adǝyen nayia wusenjakkiwawo, serro gǝni, sernamburo captuwi nangaro.
11.18: Burwon cammo jama Alayero captuwiya, kattendon yaktuwwa cani fakkǝna, koro gana jirero ngokkǝna.
11.19: Ai, sai kattendon yaktuaro waljiya, ngainin am curondon ardiyadadǝ nowadaro waljai!
11.20: Ase, sa captuwiya, masǝna Kǝmaye gǝni buwi.
11.21: Sa masǝnadǝyen wundundo yaye namuje kǝmbonju ngoje juwui, ngainin kam laa kǝnaa, kam laa ye sagarandǝna.
11.22: A! Kǝmbo-a kǝnja-adǝro fanndo bawo wa? Ra, jama Alayero rudu gǝnagǝwe am awima cadannidǝa nanguro yakkuwi? To, awi gǝle nayiro wulnjagakki? Nayia wusenjakki? A'a, kǝla adǝyen nayia wusenjakkiwawo. Masǝna Kǝmaye
11.23: Awo Kǝmandeyen mowokkǝnadǝa nayi yero njaddǝkkǝna: Kǝmande Isa bune tia sǝrǝccaanadǝn burodi ngoje
11.24: Alaro ardiyenniya, fǝsakce: «Adǝ tiyini nayi nangaro tinadǝ. Wua takturo adǝa dewo!» cǝnna.
11.25: Jiɍi adǝgainin koro ngawo masǝnayen kǝnjaram ngoje: «Kǝnjaram adǝ aman bǝɍin bunilan ndǝpkada. Yimbi yaye tia yawiya, wua takturo dewo!» cǝnna.
11.26: Awoa yimbi yaye burodidǝa ngǝruwe kǝnjaramdǝyen yawiya, karmo Kǝmandeye mawonuwi, har kawu walde isiro.
11.27: To, kam jiɍi jussǝnnin burodidǝa jǝgǝri bi kǝnjaram Kǝmayen caidǝ tiyi-a bu-a Kǝmandeyero biwu cǝddo.
11.28: Wundu yaye kǝlanju jarapco duwon, ngainin burodidǝa jǝgǝro, kǝnjaramdǝ yen ca.
11.29: Awoa kam tiyi Kǝmayea asujǝnnin jǝgǝri bi caidǝ, bonju-a kǝnjanju-ayen wowom kǝlanjuro gǝrjiyi.
11.30: Adǝmaro curondon am ngǝwu duno bawoa ye, dondi ye, kada ye sanuna.
11.31: Jiremaro kǝlande jarammiyero walyenoa, andiro shara saddiwawo,
11.32: amma Kǝmadǝ andiro shara saddiya, andia jawallo sasakki, ngainin am duniaye-a rokko andiro wowom gǝnasagaiwawo.
11.33: To, kǝramiyani, masǝna dioro captuwiya, wundu yaye kamanjua gurejo.
11.34: Kam laa kǝnanjuaa, fadon juwo, ngainin captuwiya, nayiro shara njaddiwawo. Waldǝkke isǝkkiya, kǝla awo gapcǝnadǝyen gala yikki.

12.1: Kǝramiya, kǝla kǝnjowa Ruhu Alayen, curo nanjayillen dǝgawiya, raakkǝni.
12.2: Sa nayi kǝrdiyadǝn, kolluwe jawal sǝnǝmba mana cadiwawoyero tǝmbalnjaanaro nonuwwa.
12.3: Adǝmaro nayiro isanonjagakki, wundumaye Ruhu Alayen: «Isa baskuwada,» cǝniwawo, koro Ruhu Alayen gǝnia, wunduma rakce: «Isama Kǝma wo,» cǝniwawo.
12.4: Kǝnjo jiɍi jiɍi mbeji, amma Ruhudǝ falma,
12.5: kida jiɍi jiɍi ye mbeji, amma Kǝmadǝ falma,
12.6: koro kǝndo jiɍi jiɍi ye mbeji, amma Aladǝ falma, ti duwon tayi sammaa am sammalan kidajidǝ.
12.7: Faida jamaye nangaro Ruhu Alaye kam fi yayen kǝnjo laan fǝledi.
12.8: Kam laaro Ruhudǝyen mana nanrashiduye cadi, laa yero Ruhudǝyeman mana ilmuye cadi,
12.9: laa yero Ruhu faldǝyeman kambǝrse cadi, laa yero Ruhudǝyeman kǝnjowa amba ngaduye cadi,
12.10: laa yero awo ajabba ajabba dioye, laa yero nawinawi dioye, laa yero ruhuwaa gayirduye, laa yero tǝlam jiɍi jiɍi wulduye, laa yero tǝlamba fisarduye.
12.11: Ruhu faldǝma awo ani sammaa kidaje kam fi yayero kǝnjo kalkallo ci, jiɍi cǝraanadǝ gai. Tiyidǝ falma, nasha gadegade kada
12.12: Jiɍi tiyidǝ falma, nashawanju kada, koro nashawa tiyiye samma ngǝwu duwon, tiyidǝ falmadǝ gai, Almasiwudǝ ye ngai.
12.13: Yaudi yen kal, yaudi gǝni yen kal, kaɍea yen kal, kambe yen kal, Ruhu faldǝyen andi sammaro kasala sadde tiyi faldǝro kǝlseyera, koro andi sammaa sasakke Ruhu faldǝyeman kiaye.
12.14: Awoa tiyidǝ nasha fal gǝni, kada.
12.15: Siye: «Wu mukko gǝni nangaro, wu nasha tiyiye gǝni,» cǝnia, adǝ cakke nasha tiyiye gǝniro walji wa?
12.16: Koro sǝmoye: «Wu sim gǝni nangaro, wu nasha tiyiye gǝni,» cǝnia, adǝ cakke nasha tiyiye gǝniro walji wa?
12.17: Tiyidǝ samma simba, sǝmon fandudǝ ndaran? Samma sǝmoa, kinjan fandudǝ ndaran?
12.18: Amma Ala kǝla rawonjuyen nasha fi yayea tiyilan gǝnayeno.
12.19: Tayi samma nasha falla, tiyidǝ ndaran?
12.20: Awoa nashawadǝ kada, amma tiyidǝ falma.
12.21: Sim rakce mukkoro: «Nin mǝraduni bawo!» cǝniwawo, kǝla ye rakce siro: «Nin mǝraduni bawo!» cǝniwawo.
12.22: Ngai gǝni, amma nashawa tiyiye lawuro caruidǝ jauro faidaa.
12.23: Nashawa tiyiye duwon ruwadaro ngoniyenadǝro jauro daraja yiye, koro nashawande nanguadǝro ngǝlaro kissiyiye,
12.24: nashawande kuroro ngǝladǝro sai awo laa tǝddiya gǝni. Amma Ala tiyidǝa alakce nashawa daraja bawoadǝro jauro daraja kaino,
12.25: bare tiyilan yakta wakkajǝnni, amma nashawadǝ kattenjaro kissaa.
12.26: Nasha laa jau fanjiya, nasha samma ye rokko jau fanjai. Nasha laa daraja cuwandiya, nasha samma ye rokko kǝji fanjai.
12.27: Nayidǝ tiyi Almasiwuye, wundundo yaye tiyidǝye nashanju.
12.28: Koro Ala curo jamanjuyen burwon kǝngayamba galajǝna, kǝnyindiyen nawiya, kǝnyakkuyen malǝmba, ngawo adǝyen kǝnjo awo ajabba ajabba dioye, daji kǝnjowa amba ngaduye so, banaduwuye so, nodoye so, koro kǝnjowa tǝlam jiɍi jiɍi jandeduye so.
12.29: Tayi samma kǝngayamba wa? Samma nawiya wa? Samma malǝmba wa? Samma awo ajabba ajabba cadi wa?
12.30: Samma kǝnjo isangaduwuye cadana wa? Samma tǝlambalan jandejai wa? Samma fisarjai wa?
12.31: Amma kǝnjowa ngalwodǝa jauro rawowo! Koro nayiro jawal awi yayea kojǝnaa fǝlenjagakki.

13.1: Tǝlamba ambe-a malaiyawaye-alan jandenǝkki yaye, amma kǝrawo wulan baworo walyenoa, wudǝ nuktu suye kalala ngǝwua bas.
13.2: Koro nawinawi dikke asǝr-a ilmu-a sammaa asukke kambǝrse har kau kuruwu sǝnaktuye takkǝna yaye, amma kǝrawo wulan baworo walyenoa, wudǝ awima gǝni.
13.3: Koro kǝndani takkǝna sammaa sadaaro yikke tiyini ye warduro sǝrǝtkǝkki yaye, amma kǝrawo wulan baworo walyenoa, riwani bawo.
13.4: Kǝrawodǝ kanadia ye, serra ye. Kǝrawodǝ, nandǝɍi tia cǝdaiwawo, awulo juwuiwawo, rokura ye cǝdiwawo,
13.5: tidǝ awima candǝnni cǝdiwawo, kǝlanjuro majiwawo, duwan gǝrgajiwawo, awo diwi karwun rojiwawo,
13.6: tidǝ kǝla nandiwiyen karwukǝji fǝlejiwawo, amma kǝla awo jireyen karwukǝji fǝleji.
13.7: Kǝrawodǝ awo sammaa gawurji, awo sammaa mǝrsaji, awo samman tǝmaji, awo samman necci.
13.8: Kǝrawodǝ tǝmmaro ceriwawo. Nawinawi diodǝ, baworo walji. Tǝlamba gaden mana diodǝ, ceri. Ilmudǝ, baworo walji.
13.9: Awoa ilmundedǝ ye cinjua, koro nawinawindedǝ ye cinjua,
13.10: amma awo kalkaldǝ isiya, sadǝn awo cinjuadǝ baworo walji.
13.11: Gananilan jandenidǝ jande tadaanaye, hangalnidǝ ye hangal tadaanaye, koro tǝmanidǝ ye tadaanaye. Wurayekkǝniya, awowa tadaanayedǝa kolyekko.
13.12: Kǝrma misal kudǝramben gainin buji buji ruiye, amma sadǝn sim-a sim-alan ruiye. Kǝrma nodunidǝ cinjua, amma sadǝn Ala wua kalkallo nosǝnadǝ gai kalkallo nokki.
13.13: Kǝrma awo yakku ani dasayi: kambǝrse-a tǝma-a kǝrawo-a, amma tayi sammalan kǝrawodǝ tima kura wo.

14.1: Kǝrawo manowo, kǝnjowa Ruhu Alaye fando jauro rawowo, masammanno nawinawi dio.
14.2: Kam tǝlam gaden jandejimadǝ ambo gǝni, Alaro jandejiyi, awoa wunduma awo wuljidǝa asujiwawo, dalilnjudǝ Ruhu Alayen awowa asǝrre jandeji nangaro.
14.3: Amma kam nawinawi cǝdimadǝ ambo jandejiye tayia isadunoajiyi, karwunjaro duno ci, kǝrawolan ronja ye isabojiyi.
14.4: Kam tǝlam gaden jandejimadǝ kǝlanjuro duno ci, amma kam nawinawi cǝdimadǝ jama Isaa gawuro duno ci.
14.5: Nayi samma tǝlamba gaden jandenuwiya, raakko, amma adǝa kojǝnaro nawinawi diwiyama, raakko. Kam nawinawi cǝdimadǝ kam tǝlambalan jandejimadǝa kojǝna, kam laa fisarje jamadǝro duno ci gǝnia.
14.6: To, kǝramiya, nandoro isǝkke nayiro wahayi so, ilmu so, nawinawi so, alamdu solan gǝni, tǝlambalan jandengeyerakkoa, awi gǝle nayiro faidanju wo?
14.7: Awowa ro bawoa algaida bi kumbi gai kowonja kalkallo nukcaiwawoa, ndayin gǝle awo fujai bi jajaidǝ asudi?
14.8: Koro kangadi kalkallo fujaiwawoa, wundu gǝle kǝriwuro dabbardi?
14.9: Nayi ye ngai. Tǝlamndon mana kalkal gǝni diwia, ndayin gǝle awo wulluwidǝ asudi? Mana karaa dero yidduwi.
14.10: Dunian tǝlamba jiɍi jiɍi kada mbeji, koro tǝlam maananju bawoa falma bawo.
14.11: Adǝ nangaro tǝlambe maananju nokkǝniro walyenoa, kamdǝro kusottoro wallǝkkǝna, kamdǝ ye wuro kusottoro waljǝna.
14.12: Nayi ye ngai. Kǝnjowa Ruhuyedǝa fando jauro raawwa nangaro, awo jama Alayea isadunoajiyidǝa ngǝwuro manowo.
14.13: Adǝma nangaro kam tǝlam gaden jandejimadǝ kǝnjo fisarduye cuwandoro moduwa cǝdo.
14.14: Tǝlam gaden moduwa dikkia, ruhunidǝ moduwa cǝdǝna, amma hangalnidǝ awimaro faidajǝnni.
14.15: To, awi gǝle dikki? Ruhunin moduwa dikki, koro hangalni yen moduwa dikki. Ruhunin aiya njungoroye yekki, koro hangalni yen aiya njungoroye yekki.
14.16: Adǝ gǝnia, ruhunǝmlan Alaa wusenǝmiya, kam duwon awo ania nojǝnnidǝ awo wullǝmmadǝa asujiwawoa, ndayin gǝle wusedunǝmdǝro «Amin!» cǝni?
14.17: Ngǝlaro Alaa wusenǝmi yaye, kamanǝmdǝye karwunju dunoajiwawo.
14.18: Tǝlamba gaden jandedun nayi sammaa konjakkǝna nangaro Alaa wusenǝkki,
14.19: amma dawu jama Alayen kalma dǝwu mewu tǝlamlan wullǝkki yayero am gadea alammǝkkoro kalma uwuma hangalnilan wullǝkkiya, raakko.
14.20: Kǝramiya, kǝla hangallen bare yallaro walluwwi. Kǝla awo diwiyen yalla sananaro wallowo, amma kǝla hangaldǝyen rashiduwaro wallowo!
14.21: Akko awo Attauralan ruwuwadadǝ: «Kǝmandeye: “Jama adǝro am tǝlam gadeye-a ci kusottowaye-ayen jandegǝkki, amma adǝson wua kǝrǝnsaiwawo,” yeno.»
14.22: Ase, tǝlambadǝ naptu alamaye cadi, Isaa gawuro gǝni, ganambuwuro, nawinawidǝ ye ganambuwuro gǝni, Isaa gawuro.
14.23: Adǝ nangaro, jama Isaa gawu samma captane tǝlamba gaden jandejai duwon, am awo ania nojanni bi Isaa gawu gǝni isane nadǝro ngasayia, nayia joɍiyaro ngonjaiwawo wa?
14.24: Amma cammodǝn am samma nawinawi cadi duwon, kam Isaa gama gǝni bi awo ania nojǝnni laa nadǝro ngayia, tayi samma nangaro ti biwumaro tabbatto noji, tayi samma nangaro shara tia cǝdai,
14.25: asǝr karwunjuye kaadaro walje, fǝdǝryero tǝmde Alaro ambǝcciye: «Jiremaro Ala dawundon!» cǝni. Cammo jama Isaa gawuye sawiyada
14.26: To, kǝramiya, awi gai gǝle? Captuwiya, wundundo yaye aiya njungoroye bi alamdu, bi wahayi cuwudi, bi mana tǝlamlan cǝdi, bi fisarji. Awo samma jamadǝa isadunoajuworo tǝdo.
14.27: Am laa tǝlamlan jandejaia, bare yindi bi yakku kojǝnaro mana cadǝnni, fal fallen cado, koro kam laa fisarjo.
14.28: Fisarduma baworo walyenoa, wundunja yaye dawu cammodǝyen gǝm cǝdo, kǝlanju-a Ala-aro jandejuwo.
14.29: Nawiya yindi bi yakku mana cado, am gade ye manadǝa gayirja.
14.30: Wahayi laa kam gade nadǝn napkadaro bayindiyia, burwoye mana cǝdidǝ gǝm cǝdo.
14.31: Am samma caɍo, duno cawandoro, nayi samma ranguwe fal fallen nawinawi diwi.
14.33: awoa Aladǝ Ala hangalsangoye gǝni, Ala nanlewaye. Jama muminna sammayen tǝdidǝ gai,
14.34: kamuwadǝ curo cammoyen gǝm cado, awoa jandedu tayiro amardǝgǝnni, amma Attaura ye wuljǝnadǝ gai, kǝngaaro napca.
14.35: Awo laaa nodu caraanaa, kwawanjaa fadon caworo. Curo cammoyen kamuye mana diodǝ jauro nangua.
14.36: Mana Alayedǝ nayilaman wa badiyeno? Ra, nayi rundomaa nanjaa?
14.37: Kam laa ti nawi bi tilan kǝnjo Ruhuyearo tǝmayenoa, awo ruwunjagakkǝnadǝ wada Kǝmandeye woro asujo.
14.38: Kam laa adǝa kistuwuro wajia, tiro kissagaiwawo.
14.39: To, kǝramiyani, nawinawi dio jauro rawowo, bare tǝlamba gaden jandedu dapkǝwwi,
14.40: amma awi yaye jiɍi jussǝna-a sawiyada-alan tǝdiro waljo.

15.1: Kǝramiya, kawuɍi kǝji wulnjagakkǝnadǝa isatannjagakki, kawuɍi kǝji duwon mowuwwa ye, kǝlanjun danuwwa ye.
15.2: Kawuɍi nayiro wulnjagakkǝnadǝa ronuwia, tilan njǝkkawo fanduwi. Adǝ gǝnia, bowu fatto kasadduwwa.
15.3: Awison fuwunno kawuɍi wu ye mowokkǝnadǝa nayiro njaddǝkkǝna: Kitawulan ruwuwadadǝ gai, Almasiwu biwuwande nangaro kano,
15.4: tia sittǝrayera, daji yimbe yakkua karmolan ciyeno, kitawulan ruwuwadadǝ gai.
15.5: Kefasso fǝleyaada, koro tayi mewun yindindǝro,
15.6: daji kǝramiya yer uwumaa kojǝnaro na tilon fǝleyaada. Ngǝwunja har kuro mbeji, amma laanja ro carǝmbǝna.
15.7: Ngawo adǝyen Yakubaro fǝleyaada, koro kǝngayamba sammaro.
15.8: Daryerambo, kam sa cǝdǝnnin tambǝna gairo, wu yero fǝleyaada.
15.9: Kǝngayamba samman wuma gana wo, wu kǝngayamlan bowodu tikkǝni, jama Alayedǝa basarnǝkkǝna nangaro.
15.10: Amma awo wallǝkkǝnadǝ ser Alayen walyekko, koro serdǝa bowuro gǝni fǝlesuwo. Ai, kǝngayamba sammaa kojǝnaro ngǝnǝptǝkkǝna, amma wu gǝni, ser Alaye wulan dǝganadǝ.
15.11: Adǝ nangaro wuro bi tayiro walyeno yaye, akko awo mawoniye kasadduwwadǝ. Karmolan cidu am sanunaye
15.12: To, Almasiwu karmolan cijǝnaro mawojaidǝ, ndayin gǝle amndo laa karmolan cidu bawo cani?
15.13: Amma karmolan cidu bawoa, Almasiwu ye cijǝnni.
15.14: Koro Almasiwu cijǝnniro walyenoa, mawodundedǝ ye bowu, kambǝrsendodǝ ye bowu,
15.15: har Alaro shedawu kattuwuyero walliyena, dalilnjudǝ Ala Almasiwua karmolan cǝsangǝna niyena, amma am sanuna karmolan cijaiwaworo walyenoa, ase tia cǝsangǝnni.
15.16: Awoa am sanunadǝ karmolan cijaiwawoa, Almasiwu ye cijǝnni.
15.17: Koro Almasiwu karmolan cijǝnnia, kambǝrsendodǝ faida bawo, koro yaye nayi curo biwuwandoyen.
15.18: Adǝgaima am Almasiwuye ro carǝmbǝnadǝ ye faccaana.
15.19: Dunia adǝ runjumaro tǝmande Almasiwuro kekkiyea, dunia samman andima awo njunoduye wo.
15.20: Amma jiremaro Almasiwu karmolan cijǝna, koro tayi ro carǝmbǝna sammayen tima burwon cijo.
15.21: Karmodǝ kamben isǝna nangaro, karmolan cidudǝ ye kamben kadio.
15.22: Am samma Nawi Adamlan sanuidǝ gai, ngainin samma Almasiwulan ro cawandi,
15.23: amma kǝwu kǝwuro, burwon Almasiwu, daji kǝndenjun am Almasiwuye,
15.24: ngawo adǝyen sa njerorambe cǝdi. Sadǝn Almasiwu maiya samma-a kǝrmai so, kǝnduwo so samma-aa baworo cǝde kǝrmaidǝa Ala Bawadǝro ci.
15.25: Awoa Almasiwudǝ har kawu Ala kǝladowanju sammaa cidiya sinjuyero cakkiro, sai kǝrmai cunodiya.
15.26: Kǝlado daryeye baworo waljidǝ tima karmo wo,
15.27: awoa: «Ala awo sammaa cidiya sinjuyero cakkǝna.» Amma tiye: «Awo sammaa cidiyanjuro cakkǝna,» cǝnnadǝ, farakko ti duwon awo sammaa cidiyanjuro cakkǝnadǝ dawun bawo.
15.28: Koro sa awo samma cidiyanjunno waljiya, daji Tadadǝ kǝlanju cidiya ti awo sammaa cidiyanjuro cakkǝnadǝyero walji, ngainin Ala awo samman awi yayero walji.
15.29: Ngai duwon, am duwon cuju am sanunayero tayiro kasala caddǝnadǝ, awi gǝle maananju wo? Ca jiremaro am sanunadǝ karmolan cijaiwaworo walyenoa, awiro cujunjaro kasala caddi?
15.30: Andi ye, awiro sa fi yaye tajirwan dǝgaiyenadǝ?
15.31: Tabbat, kǝla nayi kǝramiyaniyen Kǝmande Isa Almasiwulan awulo bonidǝ jiredǝ gai, yimbi yaye roni karmoro salamgǝkkǝna.
15.32: Bǝrni Afisayelan bundiya-a mǝldǝkkǝnadǝ, awi kǝla kuro kamben wuro faidanju wo? Ca am sanunadǝ karmolan cijaiwaworo walyenoa, «Nda buiyo yaiyo, baɍi nuiye nangaro.»
15.33: Bare jambaduwwi: Am diwi-a dǝgadǝ hal ngǝla bannaji.
15.34: Hangalndoro waldǝnowo, biwu dio kollowo, nangunoworo wullǝkki: Laando Alaa nojanni. Karmolan cidu tiyiye
15.35: Amma kam laaye: «Ndayin am sanunadǝ karmolan cijai? Koro tiyi jiɍi fia caluwi?» cǝne cuwori.
15.36: Ni hangal bawoa! Awo nadǝmmadǝ ɍijiwawo, sai nuiya duwon.
15.37: Koro awo nadǝmidǝ, kajim fuwun ɍijidǝa gǝni nadǝmi, kasuni runju, bi algamaye, bi awo gadeye.
15.38: Daji Ala tiro tiyi jiɍi cǝraanaro ci, kasuni fi yayero jiɍi kaanju ci.
15.39: Da tiyiye samma tilo gǝni, kambe runju, lǝmanne runju, ngudoye runju, buniye runju.
15.40: Tiyiya sameye mbeji, cidiye ye mbeji, amma daraja tiyiya sameye-a cidiye-a gadegade.
15.41: Daraja kǝngalle gade, kumballe gade, sillowuwaye gade, koro sillowuwadǝ ye darajanja gadegade.
15.42: Cinowo am sanunayedǝ ye ngai. Karmolan tǝnadǝna, ro njǝpciwawolan ciji.
15.43: Daraja bawoalan tǝnadǝna, darajaalan ciji. Duno bawoalan tǝnadǝna, dunoalan ciji.
15.44: Tiyi adamgǝnayelan tǝnadǝna, ruhulan ciji. Tiyi adamgǝnaye mbejidǝ, tiyi ruhuye ye mbeji.
15.45: Kitawulan ngai ruwuwada: «Nawi Adam kam burwoyedǝ alau roaro waljǝna.» Adam daryeyedǝ ruhu ro njomaro waljo.
15.46: Amma awo ruhuyedǝ awo burwoye gǝni. Awo adamgǝnaye burwon isi, daji awo ruhuye.
15.47: Kam burwoye cidin tǝdǝnadǝ, ti cidiye. Kam kǝnyindiyedǝ, ti sameye.
15.48: Jiɍi kam cidiyedǝ gai, tayi cidiye ye ngai. Koro jiɍi kam sameyedǝ gai, tayi sameye ye ngai.
15.49: Jiɍi camuno kam cidiyedǝro walliyenadǝ gai, camuno kam sameyedǝ yero walliye.
15.50: Kǝramiya, awo wullǝkkidǝ tima tiyi-a bu-a nodo bargaa Alayea warasajaiwawo, awo nomadǝ ye ro njǝpciwawodǝa warasajiwawo.
15.51: Fannowo, asǝr laa wulnjagakki: Andi samma gǝni ro rǝmbiye, amma andi samma falladaro walliye,
15.52: sam falnin, kǝmǝt simben, nuktu daryeye kangadiyen. Awoa kangadidǝ nukci, am sanunadǝ karmolan cijane gadero njǝpcaiwawo, koro andi samma falladaro walliye.
15.53: Adǝgaima tiyi njǝpci adǝ gadero njǝpciwaworo waljo, koro tiyi noma adǝ gadero nuiwaworo waljo.
15.54: Sa duwon tiyi njǝpci adǝ gadero njǝpciwaworo walji, koro tiyi noma adǝ gadero nuiwaworo waljidǝn, daji awo kitawulan ruwuwadadǝ wakkaji: «Karmoa kǝnnasar cundǝna!»
15.56: Kǝniwu karmoyedǝ biwu, koro kǝnduwo biwuyedǝ wada.
15.57: Ala ti duwon andiro Kǝmande Isa Almasiwuyen kǝnnasar sadidǝa wuseniyo!
15.58: Adǝma nangaro, kǝramiyani njaraakkǝnaso, dunoaro danowo, bare awima nayia tǝmbalnjanni, sawi yaye curo kida Kǝmandeyen fuwu buiwo. Nonowo, Kǝmandero ngǝnǝptundodǝ bowuro waljiwawo.

16.1: Kǝla wuɍi muminnaro captuyen, wada jama Isaa gawu lardu Galatiyayero yikkǝnadǝ gairo, nayi ye dewo!
16.2: Mawuye yim burwoyea wundundo yaye kǝla riwanjuyen awo laa ajajo. Daji isǝkkiya, mǝradu awo laa captuye bawo.
16.3: Sa isǝkkiya, am mǝrsanuwwadǝa wotiya mukkonna juwagǝkke kǝnjondodǝa Jerujalembo caadi.
16.4: Ledunidǝ ye jussǝnaro walyenoa, daji tayi-a rokko leniye. Bulusse nanjaro leduro mada
16.5: Ngawo lardu Makidoniyayen kokkǝnayen, nandoro isǝkki, lardu Makidoniyayen kokki nangaro.
16.6: Waneye nandon kawu ganaro bi nangǝɍimaro nammǝkki, ngainin ndara lekki yaye banasuwe bǝlawuro dikki.
16.7: Awoa kǝrma kodu dikki runjun gǝni kurondo raakko, dalilnjudǝ, Kǝmande amarseyenoa, kawu ganaro nandon dǝgakkiro tǝmani mbeji.
16.8: Amma har ngǝmǝri Fentikossero bǝrni Afisayen nammǝkki,
16.9: cinna kida faidaaye wuro farakko fǝrǝmsǝgǝna nangaro, amma waduwu ngǝwua.
16.10: Timoti isiya, tiro kiskǝnowo ridu bawoaro dawundon napco, kida Kǝmandeye wu gai cǝdi nangaro.
16.11: Bare wunduma tia rujǝnni. Naniro isoro tia kǝlewan salammowo, kǝramiya-a rokko gurekki nangaro.
16.12: Kǝraminde Afolusdǝ, nandoro kǝramiya-a rokko lejaro jaumaro tia lowonǝkkǝna, amma kǝrma ledu sam cǝraanni. Dama cuwandiya, leji. GALA-A LEWA-A DARYEYE
16.13: Faadaro dǝgaiwo, kambǝrsendon dunoaro danowo, karwundo gerowo, dunoaro wallowo.
16.15: Istifanus-a am fannjuye-a burwon lardu Akayayen Isaa kasaccana ye, muminnaro kida njǝddoro duno cadǝna yero nonuwwa. Kǝramiya, nayia lowonjakkǝna,
16.16: am ani gai gaiwo, am ngǝnǝptane kida cadǝnadǝn kundenno.
16.17: Kǝnde Istifanus-a Fortunatus-a Akayikus-aye karwuni kǝjijǝna, dalilnjudǝ nayi bawo yaye, cujundoro waljana nangaro.
16.18: Awoa roni-a kaando-a jauro isabojaana. Am ani gairo bǝrsǝm yowo.
16.19: Jama Isaa gawu lardu Asiyayedǝ lewanjai. Akila-a Ya Bilkisu-a ye jaumaro Kǝmande nangaro lewanjai, koro jama fannjan captaidǝ ye lewanjai.
16.20: Kǝramiya samma lewanjai. Kattendon lewa kǝrawoyen lewadǝnowo.
16.21: Wuma Bulus lewa adǝa mukkonilan ruwuyekko.
16.22: Wundu duwon Kǝmandea cǝraannidǝ, baskuwadaro waljo! Kǝmande, are!
16.24: Kǝrawoni Isa Almasiwu nangaro nayi sammalan dǝga.

1.1: Wuma Bulus rawo Alayen kǝngayam Isa Almasiwuye-a kǝraminde Timoti-adǝ jama Alaye bǝrni Korintiyen dasaana-a muminna lardu Akayaye ngalan dasaana samma-aro:
1.2: Ala Bawande-a Kǝma Isa Almasiwu-a nayiro ser-a nanlewa-a njado! Ala ro boda sammayedǝa wusedu
1.3: Bargaa Ala Bawa Kǝmande Isa Almasiwuye, Bawa kanjimaɍiye, Ala ro boda fiye yaye,
1.4: ti duwon basarinde samman ronde isabojiyidǝ. Adǝa dionjudǝ, andi ye ro boda na Alayen fandiyenadǝlan rangiye am basari fin yaye dasaanadǝye ronja isabogǝiye.
1.5: Jiɍi bone Almasiwu canadǝa andi ye jaumaro yaiyedǝ gai, ngaima Almasiwulan ro boda ngǝwu fandiye.
1.6: Basari kiyaiyea, adǝ ro bodando-a njǝkkawo fandondo-a nangaro, koro ronde boyenoa, bone yaiyenadǝa nayi ye nedduwe yawwaa, rondo bodaro.
1.7: Koro tǝmande kanjindon dunoa, bonedǝn nuwando mbejidǝ gai, ro bodadǝ yen nuwando mbejiro noniyena.
