1.8: Kǝramiya, basari lardu Asiyayelan andia sawandǝnadǝa nonuwiya, rayiye. Tai daje dunonde koje, kutturo walsagane, har rondema fuddiyero tǝmaniyena.
1.9: Ai, andi kǝlandeman wowom karmoye gai fanniyena, ngaima tǝmande kǝlanden gǝni, Ala am sanunaa cǝsangidǝn kǝrga,
1.10: ti duwon karmo jiɍi adǝn samowona, fuwu yen samoyidǝ, timaro tǝmande njǝkkawoye kekkiye.
1.11: Nayi ye moduwalan banasanowo, ngainin moduwa am ngǝwuyen barga fandiye, kǝladǝn andi nangaro Alaa wusejai. JAAWU BULUSSE KƎLA WADUWUNJUYEN Kǝnsio Bulusse fuwuro gǝrduwu
1.12: Karwunde shedajǝnadǝ gai, andidǝ nanrashidu adamgǝnayen gǝni, ser Alayen, koro karwu tiloa-a nantayir Alaye-alan kǝndǝgai dunian diyena, masammanno nandon. Adǝma dǝlwu awulo bondeyedǝ wo.
1.13: Awo gade gǝni nayiro ruwunjagaiye, sai awo kǝranuwe asunuwi bas. Koro cotto asunuwiro tǝmakkǝna,
1.14: calan ganaro asunuwwadǝ gai. Awo ruwunjagaiyedǝ tima yim Kǝmande Isayen nayidǝ dǝlwunde awulo boyedǝ gai, andi ye dǝlwundo awulo boye.
1.15: Adǝa mǝrsanǝkkǝna nangaro, barga kawakyindi fandoworo nandoro burwon leduro raakko.
1.16: Ai, nandoyen lardu Makidoniyayero lekko, koro Makidoniyalan waldǝkke nandoro isǝkke cidi Yahudiyayero lekkoro banasǝgǝwiya, raakko.
1.17: Nia ngoduni adǝ, kǝskero dikkǝna wa? Ra, awo dikkidǝa kǝla hal kamben wa nianǝkke wuye: «Aaa,» nǝkke koro waldǝkke: «A'a,» nǝkki wa?
1.18: Ala amanmadǝ gai, kawuɍinde nandon mana jambaye gǝni.
1.19: Isa Almasiwu Tada Alaye ti duwon wu-a Silas-a Timoti-a nandon mawoniyenadǝ awo jireye-a kattuwuye-a gǝni, tilan kullum jirero waljǝna.
1.20: Ai, tilan waduwa Alaye samma jirero waljana, koro daraja Alayero tiyen andiye: «Amin!» niye.
1.21: Ala kǝlanjuma andi-a nayi-aa Almasiwulan kǝresane duno sade
1.22: tawanju gǝnasagane koro karwundero naptu rannero Ruhunju kekko.
1.23: Wu kǝla roniyeman, Aladǝma shedamani wo, bare hangalndo sangǝkkǝniro bǝrni Korintiyero waldǝkke kǝnde wayekko.
1.24: Kambǝrsendo raddiye gǝni, amma karwukǝjindoro sawawando kidayero walliyena, awoa kambǝrsendon dunoaro danuwwa.

2.1: Wu kǝlani gadero nangi rǝpta karwukutta kudoma njaddǝkkiwaworo nia ngoyekko.
2.2: Karwundoa yakkǝkke kuttajia, wundu gǝle cakke karwuni kǝjiji, kam yakkǝkke karwunju kuttajǝnadǝ gǝnia?
2.3: Dalil ngainin ruwunǝkkǝnadǝ, tima nandoro isǝkkiya, bare kǝla am tayiro karwunia isakǝjiduwu wajipcǝgǝnadǝyen karwukutta dikkǝni. Awoa kǝla nayi sammayen karwukǝji fakkidǝa nayi ye fannuwiro mǝrsanǝkkǝna.
2.4: Basari kada-a jǝktu karwuye-a simalo ngǝwua-an nayiro ruwungeyerakko, karwukutta fannoworo gǝni, nayia dama baworo njaraakkǝnaro nonoworo. Bulusse biwumaro gawurduwu
2.5: Kam laa karwukutta kiwudoa, bare lamardǝa na kojǝnaro wullǝkkǝniro wu runiro gǝni, jiɍi laan nayi sammaro ngekkudo.
2.6: Wowom jama mewu kam adǝgaidǝro gǝnajaanadǝ cǝdǝna,
2.7: kǝrma cuju adǝyero tia gawurnowo ronjua yakkowo bojo, bare na kojǝnaro karwukutta canniro.
2.8: Adǝ nangaro lowonjakki, kǝrawondo tiro fǝlegǝnowo,
2.9: awoa dalil ruwunjagakkǝnadǝ, tima jaramnjakko gando curo lamar sammayen rukkoro.
2.10: Wundu duwon gawurnuwwadǝa wu ye gawurnǝkkǝna. Koro awo duwon gawurnǝkkǝnadǝ, awo laa gawurnǝkkǝnaro walyenoa, nayi nangaro fuwu Almasiwuyen gawuryekko,
2.11: bare Yiwulis andia jambasanniro, awoa nanganju noniyena. Karwungai-a ro boda-a Bulusse
2.12: Bǝrni Taruwassero kawuɍi kǝji Almasiwuye mawoduro leyekkǝniya, Kǝmande wuro cinna kasǝgǝna yaye,
2.13: kǝramini Titussa nadǝn nagǝkkǝni nangaro roni bojǝnni, daji tayia alakǝlewakke lardu Makidoniyayero koyekko. JAAWU BULUSSE KƎLA KIDA AMAN BƎɌINNEN
2.14: Amma Alaa wuseniyo, ti duwon sawi yaye andia kǝnnasar Almasiwuyen fuwuro saadi ye, koro ndara yayero andiyen kala Almasiwua noduye tatarjiyi yedǝ!
2.15: Awoa na Alayen dawu am njǝkkawo cawandiye yen, koro dawu am faccagaiye yen andima kawudi Almasiwuye wo,
2.16: am laaro andi kala karmoye karmo kudoma, am laa gadero kala roye ro kudoma. Wundu gǝle martawa awo ania dioye najǝgǝna wo?
2.17: Nonowo, andidǝ am ngǝwu mana Alayen riwa majaidǝ gai gǝni, amma am na Alayen isana gai, fuwu Alayen koro Almasiwulan manadǝa curo tiloan mawoniye.

3.1: Koro yaye kǝlande jajaktu badiniye wa? Ra, am laa gai wotiyawa shedaye mukkondon ruwuwada bi nayiro ruwuwaadalan mǝradundea wa?
3.2: Nayima wotiyandedǝ wo, karwunden ruwuwada, na am sammayen nowada ye, kǝraada ye.
3.3: Nayidǝ farakko wotiya Almasiwuye kidandeyen isǝna, tadduwalan gǝni, Ruhu Ala Kǝndǝgaimayen ruwuwada, allowa kauyen gǝni, karwu kamben ruwuwada.
3.4: Fuwu Alayen kǝla Isa Almasiwuyen adǝma mǝrsadunde wo.
3.5: Andi kǝlande rangiye awo laa raktunden tǝdǝnaro wulliyewawo, raktundedǝ na Alayen isi,
3.6: ti duwon andiro raktu kida aman bǝɍin dioye sadǝnadǝ. Amandǝ arawuye gǝni, Ruhuye, awoa arawudǝ karmo cuwudi, amma Ruhudǝ ro cuwudi.
3.7: Wada karmo kudoma arawulan kǝla allo kauyen ruwuwadadǝ darajaaro walje har Israyilawu fǝkka Nawi Musaye yiyiljidǝa rakcane cappo caruiwaworo waljǝnadǝ, yiyildudǝ koji yaye,
3.8: ndayin gǝle kida Ruhu Alayedǝ tia kojǝnaro darajaaro waljiwawo?
3.9: Wada wowom gǝnadumadǝ darajaaro walyenoa, kida nanjire kudomadǝ tǝrgane tia darajalan jauro koji.
3.10: Adǝgaima kǝla daraja dama bawo adǝyen daraja calan yiyiljidǝ awima gǝni.
3.11: Awo kodumadǝ darajaaa, awo dǝgaidǝ tia darajalan koji.
3.12: Tǝma adǝ gai taiyenadǝ, ridu falma taiyende,
3.13: Nawi Musa gai gǝni, ti duwon bare Israyilawu njeroram awo kodumayedǝa carunniro fǝkkanju battalan jakcǝnadǝ.
3.14: Amma hangalnjadǝ kibbajǝna, har kuro sa aman caye kǝrajaiya, batta adǝma dǝga, kadiwawo, Almasiwu baslan baworo walji nangaro.
3.15: Aaa, har kuro Attaura Nawi Musayea kǝrajaiya, batta laa karwunja jakci.
3.16: Amma kam tǝmje Kǝmandero waldiyiya, battadǝ kadi.
3.17: Kǝmandedǝ tima Ruhudǝ wo, koro na Ruhu Kǝmandeye dǝganadǝn nankam kǝlaye kǝrga.
3.18: Andi samma fǝkka kaadaa kudǝram gai daraja Kǝmandeye fǝleniye, darajalan daraja tǝrgaiaro faldiye camunonjuro walliye. Kǝmande ti Ruhudǝ cakke awo adǝ tǝdi.

4.1: Adǝ nangaro, kanjimaɍi Alayen kida adǝa moyiyenadǝ, tǝma kolliyewawo.
4.2: Awowa gǝraada-a nangua-a waniyena, jamba dio yen dǝgaiyewawo, koro mana Alaye yea falliyewawo, amma jiredǝa federo fǝleniye, ngainin karwu am sammaye fuwu Alayen jirende shedajai.
4.3: Kawuɍinde jakkadaro walyenoa, na am faccagaidǝyen jakkada.
4.4: Yiwulis mai dunia adǝyedǝ hangal kasattunambuwuyea isakambujǝgǝna, bare nur kawuɍi kǝji daraja Almasiwuyedǝa carunniro, ti Almasiwudǝ camuno Alaye.
4.5: Andi kǝlandea gǝni, Isa Almasiwu tima Kǝma woro mawoniye, andi ye Isa nangaro kaɍeawando.
4.6: Ala duwon tiye: «Nur curo duwuyen yiyiljo!» cǝnnadǝ daraja Alaye fǝkka Almasiwuyen turuidǝ nodoro karwunden nurnju yiyiljǝna.
4.7: Arsiyi adǝa curo kalwowa tuloyen taiyena, ngainin kǝnduwo ci bawoadǝ nanden gǝni, na Alayen isiro fǝledi.
4.8: Kanji fin yaye andi curo jǝktuyen, amma gǝrnesanni, hangalnde cijǝna, amma tǝma kolliyende,
4.9: basarsai, amma Ala andia kolsanni, yapkaada, amma sidiyende.
4.10: Sawiso karmo Isaye tiyilan ngoniye, ro Isaye ye tiyinden fǝleduworo.
4.11: Awoa andi roadǝa sawiso Isa nangaro karmoro sǝrǝnsagai, ro Isaye ye tiyinde nomayen fǝleduworo.
4.12: Ngainin karmodǝ andilan kidanju cǝdi, amma rodǝ nayilan kidanju cǝdi.
4.13: Kitawulan ruwuwadadǝ gai: «Mǝrsanǝkkǝna nangaro manayekko.» Kǝladǝn, andi ye Ruhu kambǝrseye adǝmaa taiyenadǝ, andi ye mǝrsaniyena mananiye,
4.14: dalilnjudǝ ti duwon Kǝma Isaa karmolan cǝsangǝnadǝ andi yea Isa-a rokko sasange nayin kundenno fuwunjuro sawudiro noniyena.
4.15: Awo ani samma nayi nangaro, adǝgainin ser Alaye tǝrgane am kadaro tatarjiyiya, tayia cakke Alaa ngǝwuro wusejane tiro daraja cadi. Kambǝrselan ro fando
4.16: Adǝma nangaro tǝma kolliyewawo. Tiyinde siduwu cǝdi yaye, ruhunde kun baɍin bǝɍinno walji.
4.17: Awoa basarinde kǝske kǝrmayedǝ andiro daraja kura ye, sawisoye ye, cinjuma bawo yea dabbarsagai.
4.18: Simnde awo turuiro gǝni, awo turuiwaworo fiyiye. Ai, awo turuidǝ tussiwawo, amma awo turuiwawodǝ sawisoro dǝgai.

5.1: Noniyena, kǝndǝgairam dunia adǝye wotte tiyinde adǝ sidiyiya, samelan kǝndǝgairam sawisoye mukko kamben tǝdandǝna gǝni na Alayen taiyena.
5.2: Ai, kǝndǝgairamnde adǝlan njǝmmiye, kǝndǝgairam sameyelan jaktiyero mǝradundea,
5.4: Ai, jǝktunde nangaro kǝndǝgairam adǝlan njǝmmiye, ɍindiyoro gǝni, cayea kojǝnaro jaktiyoro rayiyena nangaro, awo karmoyedǝa rodǝ cundoro.
5.5: Aladǝma andia awo adǝro dabbarsaa, ti duwon Ruhunju ran gairo andiro sadǝnadǝ.
5.6: Adǝ nangaro sawiso karwunde geriye. Noniyena, tiyilan dǝgaiyeya, andi na Kǝmandeyen bawo,
5.8: Ai, karwunde tikkerǝna, tiyilan dǝgaiye yayero na Kǝmandeyen dǝgaiyeya, rayiye.
5.9: Amma andi tiyilan yen kal, tiyilan gǝni yen kal, niandedǝ tima Kǝmande kǝjinde fanjo,
5.10: awoa andi samma kadu baworo fuwu shararam Almasiwuyen daniye, ngainin wundunde yaye alwasi awo tiyilan cǝdǝnaye cuwandi, ngǝla yen kal, diwi yen kal. Kida soloye
5.11: Adǝ nangaro, maana Kǝmande ridaye noniyenadǝ, amba jawallo njakko maniye. Na Alayen andi federo nowada, koro karwundo yen ngairo tǝmakkǝna.
5.12: Koro yaye fuwundon kǝlande jajangiyewawo, amma nayiro dalil kǝla andiyen awulo boye njadiye. Ngainin am duwon kǝla awo karwuyen gǝni, kǝla awo sim curuiyen awulo jawuidǝro awo kalaktuwuye fanduwi.
5.13: Hangalnde baworo walyenoa, Aladǝma nangaro. Hangalnde kalkaljǝnaro walyenoa, nayi nangaro.
5.14: Awoa kǝrawo Almasiwuyedǝ andia simosai, adǝa tabbatto noniyena: Kam fal am samma nangaro nunadǝ, am samma sanuna,
5.15: koro am sammaro nonjudǝ, tayi roadǝ gadero kǝlanjaro gǝni, ti duwon tayi nangaro nune karmolan cijǝnadǝro kǝndǝgai cadoro.
5.16: Adǝgaima adǝn fuwun wundumaa kǝla kuro adamgǝnayen ruiyewawo. Almasiwua calan kǝla kuro adamgǝnayen ruiyena yaye, kǝrma gadero tia ngainin ruiyewawo.
5.17: Adǝ nangaro wundu duwon Almasiwulan dǝganamadǝ alaktu bǝɍin. Awowa dinadǝ kojana, akko bǝɍin isana.
5.18: Adǝ samma na Alayen isi, ti duwon Almasiwuyen kǝlanjuro solosagane kida soloye andiro sadǝnadǝ.
5.19: Aladǝma Almasiwuyen am duniayero biwuwanja gǝnajǝgǝnnin tayi-a kǝlanju-a soloje kawuɍi soloye mukkondero cakko.
5.20: Adǝ nangaro andi wakkilla Almasiwuye, Ala andiyen bowodu cǝdi gai. Almasiwu nangaro lowonjaiye, Ala-a solodǝnowo!
5.21: Ala kam duwon biwu cǝdǝnnidǝa andi nangaro biwuro kalakkeno, nanjire Alayedǝa tilan fandiyoro.

6.1: Andidǝ sawawa kida Alaye nangaro, nayia lowonjaiye, bare bowuro ser Alayedǝa mowuwwi.
6.2: Awoa tiye: «Sa kalkalnin nia kǝrǝnnjǝkkǝna, koro yim njǝkkawoyea bananjǝgǝkkǝna.» Akko kǝrmama sa kalkaldǝ wo, kǝrmama yim njǝkkawoye wo!
6.3: Kidande saɍiwu bawoaro napcoro, jawal wunduyemaro takkal fimaa yakkiyewawo,
6.4: amma jawal fin yaye andi kidawu Alaye jireyero fǝlediye, nettulan, basari njalan, curo jǝktu so, masiwa soyen,
6.5: kowodulan, kosolan, hangalsangolan, ngǝnǝptulan, faada dǝgalan, kǝmbo bonambulan,
6.6: nantayirren, ilmuyen, kanadi tayen, nandǝgallen, Ruhu Alayen, kǝrawo nanmǝnafǝk bawoayen,
6.7: mana jireyen, kǝnduwo Alayen, baɍimi nanjireye mukko kǝmboram-a waila-ayen,
6.8: curo daraja-a darajanambu-ayen, curo adǝlamdu-a njungoro-ayen. Jambawu gairo ngosana yaye, andi jirewu,
6.9: nosanni gai yaye, ngǝlamaro nosana, nuiyena gai yaye, akko rondea, wowomsai gai yaye, roro seyesǝnni,
6.10: karwu jaadaa gai yaye, sawi yaye karwu kǝjia, talaawa gai yaye, am kadaa gaɍiwuro diye, awima taiyende gai yaye, awiso kaande.
6.11: Nayi Korintiwu, federo mana njaddiyena, karwunde farakko kaada.
6.12: Andi gǝni nayia njasaraiyende wo, nayima karwundo kanuwe andia sasarawwi wo.
6.13: Tadawani gairo nayiro jandenjagakki, kalkallo kalansanowo, nayi ye karwundoa farakko kanowo. Fado Ala Kǝndǝgaimayedǝ
6.14: Bare kolluwe nayi-a ganambuwu-a lamarndo tilojǝnni. Nanngǝla, awi lambonju nandiwiro? Koro nurdǝ, awi lambonju duwuro?
6.15: Katte Almasiwu-a Yiwulis-ayen kǝlakǝl fi mbeji wo? Ra, awi Isaa gama-a ganambuma-a kǝlji?
6.16: Fado Alaye-a gumkiya-a ardiya fi cada? Andima Fado Ala Kǝndǝgaimayedǝ wo. Alaye wuljǝnadǝ gai: «Dawunjan dǝgakke dadanǝkki, Alanjaro wallǝkki, tayi ye jamaniro waljai.»
6.17: Adǝ nangaro Kǝmandeye: «Dawunjan luwowo, sǝgǝriro waldǝnowo, bare awima tayir gǝni lenuwwi, daji wu ye nayia ardinjakki.»
6.18: «Wu ye bawandoro wallǝkki, nayi ye tadawani-a ferowani-aro walluwi,» yeno Kǝmande Martawama.

7.1: Adǝ nangaro kǝrawowuni, wadu ania ngosaanadǝ, kadawu tiyiye-a ruhuye-a fi yayen kǝlande tulliyo, Ala ridalan tayir sǝrambo walliyo! Karwukǝji Bulusse kǝla tǝmdu jama Isaa gawuyen
7.2: Karwundo kasaganowo. Wundumaro jirenambu yiddiyende, wundumaro diwi yiddiyende, wundumaa jambaniyende.
7.3: Adǝa wuldunidǝ, nayiro wowom gǝnaduwuro gǝni, calan wullǝkkǝnadǝ gai, nayidǝ curo karwundeyen, karmo yen kal, roa yen kal, rokko dǝgaiye.
7.4: Aman njadǝkkǝnadǝ kura, awulo boni kǝlandon ye kura, karwuni dunoajǝna, basarinde samman tai dakke karwukǝji fakki. BULUS LARDU MAKIDONIYAYEN
7.5: Lardu Makidoniyayero kadiyendeya, tiyinde tustu cuwandǝnni, ndaran yaye basari yaiyena, deyan sai lawala, curon sai ridu.
7.6: Amma Ala ti duwon ro am karwunja duno bawoaye isabojiyimadǝ kǝnde Titussen ronde isaboyeyeno,
7.7: koro kǝndenju runjun gǝni, ro boda kǝlandon cuwandǝnadǝ yelan. Titusdǝ andiro mǝradundo wua kuroye-a sondo-a kǝla wuyen kowoɍindo-aa wulsaana. Adǝ nangaro cayea kojǝnaro karwukǝji dikkǝna.
7.8: Wotiyani yakkǝkke karwundo kuttajǝna yaye, nadimmǝkkǝni. Calan nadimmǝkkǝna, wotiyadǝ sam ganaro rondo kuttajǝnaro rukkǝna nangaro.
7.9: Amma kǝrma karwuni kǝjijǝna, karwundo kuttajǝnadǝro gǝni, amma karwukuttando cakke tǝmmuwwadǝro. Awoa rawo Alaye kǝlan kuttu fannuwwa, ngaima andi nangaro awima asarnuwwi.
7.10: Awoa karwukutta kǝla rawo Alayedǝ kamba cakke nadimjǝnnin tǝmje njǝkkawo cuwandi, amma karwukutta duniayedǝ karmo cuwudi.
7.11: Akko ruiwo, karwukuttando kǝla rawo Alayedǝ nayia njasakke kasadu-a kǝlando mowo-a diwwa! Koro njasakke gǝrganuwwa, rinuwwa! Ase, mǝradu-a kowoɍi-a shara rawo-a jauro fǝlenuwwa! Adǝgaima jiɍi fin yaye lamar adǝlan nayi biwu bawoaro kǝlando fǝlenuwwa.
7.12: To, wotiya ruwunjagakkǝna yaye, kam biwu cǝdǝnadǝ bi kam tiro biwu caddǝnadǝ gǝni nangaro ruwuyekko, amma fuwu Alayen kasadu andiro sadduwidǝa nonuwiro.
7.13: Adǝ nangaro ronde bojǝna. Ro bodande adǝ ngawon, kǝla karwukǝji Titussen andi ye karwukǝji cayemaa kojǝnaro diyena, nayi samma hangalnjua isabogǝwwa nangaro.
7.14: Wudǝ fuwunjun kǝlandon awulo bo gana dikkǝna yaye, nanguro sakkuwwi. Jiɍi awo nayiro wulnjagaiyena samma jiredǝ gai, ngaima awulo bo fuwu Titussen diyenadǝ ye jirero waljǝna.
7.15: Nayi sammaye gandodǝa takciya, jiɍi ridu-a lolodu-an tia kapkǝwwadǝ, kǝrawonju nayi nangaro tai daje tǝrgai.
7.16: Awin yaye nayia mǝrsanjakkǝnadǝro karwukǝji dikki.

8.1: Kǝramiya, ser Alaye jama Isaa gawu lardu Makidoniyayero cadǝnadǝa nayiro isanoduwu rayiye.
8.2: Curo rijaptu kada jau fitten karwukǝjinja ci bawo-a nantalaanja duno kojǝna-a tasargane har nankǝre tai dajane fǝleyera.
8.3: Awo cadǝnadǝ dunonjalan har dunonjamaa kojǝnaro cadoro tayia shedanǝkki, koro rawonjan
8.4: tayi ye bana muminnaro kudodǝro kangurno mukkonja njakkoye cawandoro jauro andia lowosera.
8.5: Awo tǝmaniyenamaa kojǝnaro burwon Kǝmandero, koro rawo Alaye kǝlan andi yero kǝlanja kedo.
8.6: Adǝ nangaro, Titus kida serre adǝa nandon badijǝnadǝ gai, tumojuworo tia lowoyeiye.
8.7: To, nayidǝ kambǝrse so, kawuɍi so, nodu so, kasadu so, kǝrawo nanden mowuwwa solan, wotte awo sammalan fuwunuwidǝ gai, ser adǝ yelan fuwunowo!
8.8: Wadaro gǝni wullǝkki, amma kasadu am gadeyen kǝrawondodǝ jireyero tabbatkǝkki,
8.9: awoa ser Kǝmande Isa Almasiwuye nonuwwa, ti gaɍiwu duwon, nayi nangaro ngudiro walyeno, nayi ye nanngudinjudǝyen gaɍiwuro walloworo.
8.10: Kǝla lamar adǝyen galani yikki, awoa nayiro faidaa, nayi duwon tǝn mǝnde awo adǝa dio runju gǝni, tia dio rawo badinuwwadǝ,
8.11: kǝrma ye dionju tumogǝnowo. Jiɍi karwundo samman raawwadǝ gai, ngainin kǝla awo tawwadǝyen tumogǝnowo.
8.12: Karwu samman njodǝ kǝla awo kam cǝdanniyen gǝni, kǝla awo cǝdanayen Ala ardiji.
8.13: Nayidǝ basari yawe am gade kasam cawandi gǝni, lamar nankalkalle.
8.14: Kǝrma lǝman ngǝwu ganduwwadǝ, awo tayia maujǝnadǝa yirgawi, yim laa ye ngǝwudu lǝmannjayen awo nayia maunjanadǝa casargai, adǝgainin lamardǝ kalkalji,
8.15: kitawulan ruwuwadadǝ gai: «Kam ngǝwu capcǝnadǝ tiro ngǝwujǝgǝnni, koro kam gana capcǝnadǝ ye tia maujǝnni.» Titus-a sawawanju kidaye-a
8.16: Alaa wuseniyo, ti duwon, kasadu nayiro njaddǝkkidǝ gai, karwu Titusse yero nia nayiro njǝddoye cakkǝnadǝ.
8.17: Awoa Titus lowondedǝa kasacce ti kǝlanju jauro kasaduadǝro rawonjuman nandoro leji.
8.18: Koro kǝrami duwon dawu jama Isaa gawu sammayen kidanju kawuɍi kǝjiye nangaro nowadadǝ ti-a rokko juwagǝiye.
8.19: Adǝa kojǝnaro, bana serre adǝa yadiyeya, jama Isaa gawudǝ andia sasadduworo tia galayera, bana serre duwon Kǝmandea njungororo ye, niande ngǝla fǝlejoro ye tiro kissiyiyedǝ.
8.20: Adǝa diondedǝ, bare wunduma kǝla kǝnjo nankǝreye adǝro kistuwundeyen saɍiwusanni,
8.21: awoa fuwu Kǝmandeye runjun gǝni, fuwu ambe yen awo ngǝla dioro rayiye.
8.22: Koro kǝraminde duwon gǝnagǝniro lamar kadan rijammiye kasaduaro tabbatkǝiyenadǝa tayi-a rokko juwaniye, koro kǝrma nayia jauro mǝrsanjana nangaro cayemaa kojǝnaro kasadunjua.
8.23: Titusdǝ, ti sawani kidaye, wu-a ti-a nayi nangaro kida adǝa diye. Kǝramiyandedǝ, tayi daraja Almasiwuyero kadunowu jama Isaa gawuye.
8.24: Adǝ nangaro fuwu jama Isaa gawudǝyen am aniro sheda kǝrawondoye so, dalil kǝla nayiyen awulo bondeye soa fǝlegǝnowo.

9.1: Kǝla bana muminnaro kudodǝyen, wotiya nayiro ruwunjagakkoro mǝradundo bawo,
9.2: awoa kasadundodǝa nokkǝna. Kǝladǝn nayi nangaro fuwu Makidoniyawuyen awulo bukke tayiro nayi Akayawudǝ tǝn mǝnde dabbarduwwa nǝkkǝna, koro kasadundodǝ ngǝwunjaro duno cina.
9.3: Amma kǝramiyadǝa juwagǝkki, bare lamar adǝlan awulo bonde kǝlandon bowuyero waljǝnniro, koro wullǝkkǝnadǝ gai, nayi dabbargadaro walloworo.
9.4: Am Makidoniyaye wu-a rokko isiye nayia dabbarduwwi nanjayiyea, kǝla mǝrsadunde adǝyen nangu fanniye, balle nayi.
9.5: Adǝ nangaro kǝramiyadǝ wua burwosa nandoro leja kǝnjo serre duwon yiwi wulluwwadǝa dabbarjaro tayia lowoduro ngǝlaro rukkǝna. Ngainin dabbargadaro walji, koro awo doleye gǝni, serre.
9.6: Adǝa nonowo: Kam gana cǝnadidǝ gana kalaji, koro kam ngǝwu cǝnadidǝ ngǝwu kalaji.
9.7: Wundu yaye karwunjun niajǝnadǝ gairo co, karwukuttaalan bi jǝktulan gǝni, awoa Ala kam karwu kǝjiaro cidǝa cǝraana.
9.8: Na Alayen kǝnduwo nayiro barga serre sammaa dǝptuwuye mbeji, kida ngǝla samma na kojǝnaro deworo, sawi yaye, jiɍi fin yaye mǝradundo sammaa galji.
9.9: Kitawulan ruwuwadadǝ gai: «Nanjaijanjun talaawaro cina, nanjirenju sawisoro dǝgai.»
9.10: Ti duwon nadomaro kasuni ci, burodi ye kǝmboro cidǝ nayi yero kasuni njade kawakce cakke nema nanjirendoye ngǝwuji.
9.11: Jaijaro walloworo, dǝlwu fin yaye gaɍiwuro njadi, koro adǝ cakke muminnadǝ andiyen Alaa jauro wusejai,
9.12: dalilnjudǝ kida bana kudoye adǝ mǝradu muminnaye runju gǝni galji, koro adǝ cakke Alaa wusedu jauro ngǝwuji nangaro.
9.13: Kawuɍi kǝji Almasiwuye yasarawe gawwadǝro, koro nanjaija tayi-a am samma-aro yidduwidǝro, kǝla bana kudo adǝyen daraja Alaro cadi.
9.14: Ser ci bawoa Ala karwundoro cakkǝnadǝro, nayi curo karwunjayen nangaro moduwa njaddi.

10.1: Wu Bulus kǝlani, wu duwon fuwundon nayiro rokura bawoa, nayin kuruwunna nayiro jau canidǝ, rokuranambu-a nanngǝla-a Almasiwuye nangaro lowonjakki,
10.2: marnowo, isǝkkiya, bare sakkuwwe tayi duwon andi kǝla hal tiyiyen dǝgaiye canidǝro nanjau fǝleduwu tǝmakkǝnadǝa fǝlegǝkkǝni.
10.3: Tiyilan dǝgaiye yaye, kǝla hal tiyiyen gǝni kǝriwu yikkadiye,
10.4: awoa baɍiminde kǝriwuyedǝ tiyiye gǝni, amma nanjan kǝnduwo Alaye bǝrni gargadaa wurduye mbeji. Manawa rokurayea baworo diye,
10.5: angǝsa samma Alaa nodu dapciyidǝn kundenno. Nia fi yaye Almasiwua jǝgaro, tia kosoma gairo taiye,
10.6: koro gandodǝ tabbattiyiya, ganambu sammaro wowom gǝnaduwuro dabbardiyena.
10.7: Awo fuwundoyedǝa ruiwo! Kam laa kǝlanjua Almasiwuyero ngojia, adǝa takco: Ti Almasiwuyedǝ gai, andi ye ngai.
10.8: Wudǝ kǝla kǝnduwonde duwon Kǝmande nayia wurduro gǝni, duno njoro sadǝnadǝyen ngǝwuro awulo bukki yaye, nangukkiwawo.
10.9: Bare wotiyawanin nayia riduro njakko raakkǝnaro tǝmanuwwi,
10.10: awoa tayiye: «Wotiyawanju kurwowu ye, dunoa ye, amma ti dawundenna kamboi, mananju ye awima gǝni,» cani.
10.11: Kam jiɍi adǝ nojo, jiɍi andi dawundon bawo wotiyawayen mananiyedǝ gairo, isiyeya, ngaima diye.
10.12: Am duwon kǝlanja jajakcaidǝro kǝlande kalkalliyewawo bi rattalgǝiyewawo. Amma ngalduram kǝlanjayen ngaldane kattenjan rattaldaiya, hangalnja asujiwawo.
10.13: Andidǝ na kojǝnaro awulo buiyewawo, sai curo kidaram Ala andiro kamsaanadǝyen, kidaram duwon har nayi yea nanjagaidǝ.
10.14: Kidaram kamsaanadǝa koniyewawo, nandoro isiyende gairo, awoa andidǝ kawuɍi kǝji Almasiwuyea har nandoro isiyena.
10.15: Na kojǝnaro wotte kǝla kida am gadeyen awulo buiyewawo, amma tǝmandedǝ tima kambǝrsendo fuwu juwuiya, kidaramnde dawundon jauro tǝrgai,
10.16: ngainin kawuɍi kǝji har cidiya nayin fuwunnin dasaanaro mawoniye, koro kǝla kida am gade kidaramnjan cadǝnayen awulo buiyewawo.
10.17: Amma kitawulan ruwuwadadǝ gai: «Kam awulo juwuimadǝ kǝla Kǝmandeyen awulo juwo,»
10.18: awoa kam kǝlanju jajakcima gǝni, kam Kǝmandeye jajakcimadǝ ardiyada wo.

11.1: A! Hangalnambu gana laa nandon dio raakko, kanadi taiwo!
11.2: Kǝlandon nandǝɍi kǝrawoye dikki, nandǝɍi kura adǝye Alayen isidǝ, nayia kwa fallo niyaduwuro wadu ngokkǝna, nayia fero kǝlayakku tayir kwa nojǝnni gai Almasiwuro njoro.
11.3: Amma kadidǝ nanganjulan Auwaa jambajǝnadǝ gai, hangalndo ye Almasiwua karwu tiloa-a tayir-alan ga kolje jawal gade jǝgairo rikkǝna,
11.4: dalilnjudǝ kam laa ise Isa mawoniyende laaa mawojia, bi Ruhu mowuwwadǝ-a gade bi kawuɍi kǝji kasadduwwadǝ-a gade mowuwia, mukko yindin tawi nangaro.
11.5: Adǝ yaye, kǝngayamba kura ani wua awiman kosanniro tǝmakkǝna.
11.6: Manalan goni gǝniro walyekko yaye, nodulan ngai gǝni. Ai, jawal fin yaye, jiɍi fin yaye adǝa nayiro fǝlenjagaiyena.
11.7: Ra, nayia sapturo kǝlania awimaro ngokkǝni kawuɍi kǝji dero wulnjagakkǝnadǝ, biwu wa dikko?
11.8: Kida nayiro njaddǝkkoro jama Isaa gawu gade bǝtǝrǝmmǝkke alwasi kasaddǝkkǝna.
11.9: Sa wu dawundon curo lambiyen dǝgakkǝnadǝn, wundumaro kurwowuro wallǝkkǝni, kǝramiya lardu Makidoniyayen isane mǝradunidǝa galjana nangaro. Awo samman nayiro kurwowuro walduwuro kǝlania kanǝkkǝna, fuwu yen kanǝkki.
11.10: Jire Almasiwuye wulan dǝganadǝ nangaro, lardu Akayayen awulo boni adǝa wunduma damsiyiwawo.
11.11: Awiro adǝa wulyekko? Nayia njaraakkǝniro wa? A'a, nayia njaraakkǝnaro Aladǝma nojǝna.
11.12: Awo dikkidǝa koroma dikki, ngainin am duwon awulo bonjan dama andi-a kalkallo walduye majaidǝro dama fando dapkǝkki.
11.13: Awoa am ani gai kǝngayamba kattuwuye, kidawu jambawu, kǝlanjaa kǝngayamba Almasiwuyero kalakcai.
11.14: Koro adǝ awo ajabbe gǝni, Yiwulisdǝma kǝlanjua malaiya nurrero kalakci nangaro.
11.15: Kidawunju ye kǝlanjaa kidawu nanjireye gairo kalakcaiya, awima gǝni. Njeroramnja kǝndonja-a kalkallo walji. Bone nankǝngayam Bulusse
11.16: Koro waldǝkke wullǝkki, bare wunduma wua hangalnambumaro ngosǝnni. Adǝ gǝnia, hangalnambuma gairo kasansǝnowo, ngainin wu ye gana laaro awulo bukki.
11.17: Awo kǝla lamar awulo bo adǝyen wullǝkkidǝ, Kǝmande gairo gǝni, hangalnambuma gairo wullǝkki.
11.18: Am kada kǝla hal tiyiyen awulo jawuidǝro, wu ye awulo bukki.
11.19: Nayi rashiduwa duwon, karwu kǝjiaro hangalnambuwua kasadduwi,
11.20: awoa kam laa nayia kaɍearo kalannjaia, bi kǝndando juwuia, bi nayilan faidadia, bi kǝlanju jajakcia, bi nayia maɍin bakcia, ase kasadduwi.
11.21: Wuldunidǝ nangua yaye, andidǝ dunonde ngai dioye bawo. Awo duwon kam laa gade tilan ridu bawoaro awulo juwuidǝ, hangalnambuma gairo wullǝkki, wu ye ridu bawoaro tilan awulo bukki.
11.22: Tayidǝ yaudiya wa? Wu ye ngai. Tayidǝ Israyilawu wa? Wu ye ngai. Tayidǝ kaduwu Nawi Ibrahimbe wa? Wu ye ngai.
11.23: Tayidǝ kidawu Almasiwuye wa? Joɍi gai wullǝkki! Wu ye tayia kokkǝnaro ngǝnǝptu so, koso so, kowodu so yakkǝna, koro ngǝwuro tajirwa karmoyen kadǝkkǝna.
11.24: Gadegade uwuro baktu fidewuro fal bawo mukko Yaudiyayen yakkǝna,
11.25: yakkuro kalan bansana, fallo dongur kauye gǝgǝmsaana, yakkuro lǝptu maaraye yakkǝna, bune fal-a dabdu fal-a curo tekuyen dikkǝna.
11.26: Silan bǝlawuro ngǝwu dikkǝna, akko masiwa bǝrǝmbe-a jawalkorjimasoye-a mbeji, masiwa dawu kǝramiyani jiɍinde tiloa-a kǝrdiya-ayen, masiwa curo bǝrni-a karaa-ayen, masiwa kǝla tekuyen, masiwa dawu kǝramiya kattuwuyen.
11.27: Njǝmbaro-a ngǝnǝwu-a, ngǝwuro faada dǝga-a, kǝna-a ngudu-a, ngǝwuro kǝmbo bonambu-a, kaku-a kajǝmunambu-a,
11.28: awowa gapcana gade dawun bawo, wadu nguson kurwowu jama Isaa gawu sammaro kistuwuye kǝlanin mbeji.
11.29: Wundu lawujo, wu ye lawunǝkkǝni wo? Wundua casakke taljo, wudǝ jaunju fakkǝni wo?
11.30: Dole awulo bukkiro walyenoa, kǝla nanlawuniyen awulo bukki.
11.31: Ala Bawa Kǝmande Isaye sawisoro bargaadǝ kattuwu gǝni kammǝkkiro nojǝna.
11.32: Bǝrni Damassen Mai Aretas gomnanjudǝ cakke wua taro bǝrni Damaswuyedǝa gureyera,
11.33: amma taka laa garuyen curo jowoyen talarsane mukkonjun fǝrǝskekko.

12.1: Awulo bodǝ dole. Faidanju bawo yaye, fuwu bukke kǝla kuro-a wahayi-a Kǝmandeyen mana dikki.
12.2: Kam laa Almasiwulan kǝrga nokkǝna, ku kǝrwu mewu deri tia har same kǝnyakkuyero kesado. Tiyilan bi tiyilan gǝni nokkǝni, Ala nojo.
12.3: Koro kam adǝ, tiyilan bi tiyilan gǝni nokkǝni, Ala nojo,
12.4: tia jannaro caade mana bayinduro yojiwawo wuldunja kambo daptǝgǝna fangeno.
12.5: Kǝla kam adǝ gaiyen awulo bukki, amma nanlawuniro kajia, kǝlanin awulo bukkiwawo.
12.6: A! Ca awulo bo raakkǝnaa, jire wullǝkkidǝro, hangalnambumaro wallǝkkiwawo. Amma kollǝkkǝna, bare awo nilan turui bi wulan fandi kojǝnaro wua awo laaro ngosanni.
12.7: Bare kǝla wahayi jauro ajabbadǝyen kǝlani na kojǝnaro jajangǝkkǝniro, kaɍiyi laa tiyiniro casakkǝna, wotte kadunoma Yiwulisse wua babaktuma, bare kǝlani na kojǝnaro jajangǝkkǝniro.
12.8: Kǝla adǝyen wun tia cuttuluworo yakkuro Kǝmandea lowoyekko,
12.9: amma tiye wuro: «Serni njǝdǝna, curo nanlawuyen kǝnduwoni kalkallo fǝledi,» yeno. Adǝ nangaro karwu kǝjialan cayemaa kojǝnaro kǝla nanlawuniyen awulo bukki, ngainin kǝnduwo Almasiwuye wulan dǝgai.
12.10: To, Almasiwu nangaro nanlawu so, manakuttu so, masiwa so, basari so, kuttu so karwu kǝjialan kasaddǝkkǝna, awoa sa wu lawudǝ, sadǝn wu dunoa. Kistuwu Bulusse jama Isaa gawu bǝrni Korintiyero
12.11: Hangalnambumaro wallǝkkǝna, nayima wua sakkuw! Ca wua jajansuwwama wajipco, awoa wudǝ awima gǝni yaye, kǝngayamba kura ani wua awiman kosanni.
12.12: Kanadilan shedawa kǝngayambe alama so, awo ajabba so, kǝnduwo so dawundon tǝdǝna.
12.13: Jiɍi fin gǝle nayia kojǝnaro jama Isaa gawu gadedǝa ngurnoyekko, nayiro kurwowuro walnjagakkǝni gǝnia? Jirenambu adǝa gawursǝgǝnowo!
12.14: Akko nandoro kǝndeni kǝnyakkuyero dabbardǝkkǝna, nayiro kurwowuro wallǝkkiwawo. Kǝndando gǝni, nayimaa makki, awoa yalla gǝni yanja-a bawanja-aye kurwowu ngojai, amma ya-a bawa-a kurwowu yallaye ngojai.
12.15: Wudǝ, rondo nangaro jauro karwu kǝjiaro kǝndani-a kǝlani-a yikki. Nayia rawonidǝ tǝrgaia, wua rawondo fuludi wa?
12.16: Ngairo walyeno yaye, nayiro kurwowuro walnjagakkǝni, amma wu burwoadǝ, nangalan nayia ngedakko cani.
12.18: Titussa nandoro lejoro lowokke kǝramidǝa ti-a rokko juwangeyerakko. Titus nayilan faidadǝna wa? Wu-a ti-a hal tilon dǝgaiyende wa? Jawalnde tilojǝnni wa?
12.19: Tussǝna andi fuwundon kǝlande moyiye tǝmanuwwa. To, kǝrawowunde, fuwu Alayen Almasiwulan mananiye, awo diye samma nayia isadunoaduwuro diye.
12.20: Isǝkkiya, waneye nayia jiɍi raakkǝnadǝ gairo gǝni njawandǝkki, nayi ye wua jiɍi raawwadǝ gairo gǝni suwanduwiro rikkǝna. Waneye lawala-a nandǝɍi-a gǝrgadu-a kǝla rawo-a yarsǝm-a tarwa-a rokura-a hangalsango-a mbeji.
12.21: Ai, waldǝkke isǝkkiya, Alani fuwundon nanguro sakke amndo kada duwon calan biwu cadǝna, koro tǝmjane tayirnambu so, kǝnjǝna so, nanjane so koljannidǝ nangaro karwuni kuttajiro rikkǝna.

13.1: To, adǝ kǝnyakkuyero nandoro isǝkkidǝ. «Mana fi yaye ci sheda yindi bi yakkuyen tabbattiyi.»
13.2: Caman kǝndeni kǝnyindiyen wullǝkkǝnadǝ gai, kǝrma wu bawodǝn am calan biwu cadǝna-a am gade samma-aro caye baworo wulgǝkki: Waldǝkke isǝkkiya, tayia kollǝkkiwawo,
13.3: Almasiwu wulan manajidǝye shedanju manuwidǝ. Tidǝ dawundon lawu gǝni, kǝnduwoa.
13.4: Curo nanlawuyen tia kǝska karmoyero jajaana, adǝ yaye kǝnduwo Alayen roa dǝgai. Andi ye tilan lawu, amma kǝndo nayiro njaddiyelan kǝnduwo Alayen ti-a rokko roa dǝgaiyero ruwi.
13.5: Kǝlandoa rijammowo, kambǝrselan dǝgawiro kǝlando ruiwo! Isa Almasiwu nayilan dǝgairo asunuwwi wa? Ra, nayidǝ ardiyada gǝni?
13.7: Bare awo diwi diwwiro Alaa koriye. Niandedǝ kǝlande ardiyadaro bayindu gǝni, amma amso andia ardidǝnniro saruiro walyeno yaye, awo ngǝla deworo.
13.8: Rangiye jiredǝa angǝrniyewawo, amma kǝla jiredǝyen daniye.
13.9: Sa andi ye lawu, nayi ye dunoadǝ, karwunde kǝjijǝna. Koro kǝndǝgaindo kalkaljoro moduwa diye.
13.10: Dalil wu nandon bawolan awo ania ruwunǝkkidǝ, tima isǝkkiya, bare kǝnduwo duwon Kǝmande wurduro gǝni, duno njoro sinadǝn nanjaunin faidadǝkkǝniro.
13.11: Daryerambo, kǝramiya, karwundo kǝjijo! Kǝndǝgaindolan jawallo waldǝnowo, karwundon dunoadǝnowo, hangalndo tilojo, nanlewan dǝgaiwo. Adǝgaima Ala kǝrawo-a nanlewa-aye dawundon dǝgai.
13.14: Ser Kǝmande Isa Almasiwuye-a kǝrawo Alaye-a naptu nanyaana Ruhu Alaye-a nayi sammalan dǝga!

1.1: Wuma Bulus kǝngayam ambe gǝni, bi adamgǝna laayen gǝni, wudǝ Isa Almasiwu-a Ala Bawa tia karmolan cǝsangǝna-ayen kǝngayambo walyekko.
1.2: Wu-a kǝramiya samma wu-a rokkodǝ-a jama Isaa gawu lardu Galatiyayesoro:
1.3: Ala Bawande-a Kǝma Isa Almasiwu-a nayiro ser-a nanlewa-a njado!
1.4: Almasiwudǝ biwuwande nangaro jaman diwi adǝro andia sakkaworo kǝlanju kaino, jiɍi Ala Bawande cǝraanadǝ gai.
1.5: Aladǝmaro har abada abadinno daraja tio! Amin. Kawuɍi kǝji gade bawo
1.6: Jiɍi duwaman ti duwon nayia ser Almasiwuyen bowonjanadǝa kolluwe kawuɍi kǝji gadea ga manuwidǝa ajammǝkkǝna.
1.7: Ai, kawuɍi kǝji gade bawo, amma am laa hangalndo casange kawuɍi kǝji Almasiwuyedǝa faldu caraana mbeji.
1.8: Amma wundu duwon kawuɍi kǝji wulnjagaiyenadǝ-a gade wulnjagaidǝ, andi bi malaiya sameyero walyeno yaye, baskuwadaro waljo!
1.9: Caman wulliyenadǝ gai, koro kǝrma ye waldǝkke wullǝkki: Kam laa nayiro kawuɍi kǝji mowuwwadǝ-a gade wulduwu cǝdia, baskuwadaro waljo!
1.10: Kǝrma ardiya kambe ra Alaye makki? Ra, kǝrawo ambe makki? Ca kǝrawo ambe kua yaye makkia, wolodi Almasiwuyero wallǝkkiwawo. Bulussa kǝngayambo kǝredu
1.11: Kǝramiyani, nayiro isanonjagakki, kawuɍi kǝji wullǝkkǝnadǝ kamben gǝni kadio.
1.12: Kamben gǝni tia kiwandǝkko bi kiɍǝkko, amma Isa Almasiwu wahayilan bayinsuwo.
1.13: Naptuni caye curo adin yaudiyayen, jiɍi jama Alayea basardun basarnǝkke siduwuro makkidǝa fannuwwa.
1.14: Ada kaariyaniye jaumaro raakke roni yikkǝnadǝro, curo jamandeyen am ngǝwu kawunde tiloaa adin yaudiyayenin kokkǝna.
1.15: Amma Ala tǝn curo yaniyen wua kǝrese sernjun bowosǝna. Ai, sa duwon ardije
1.16: Tadanjua kǝrdiyaro mawogǝkkoro tia wuro bayinsǝgǝnadǝn, gannǝkke amsoa sawarnǝkkǝni,
1.17: bi Jerujalembo na tayi wun burwonno kǝngayambaro waljanadǝro lekkǝni, amma cidi Arabiyayero lekke daji waldǝkke bǝrni Damassero nangadembo kǝrgaakko.
1.18: Koro ngawo saa yakkuyen Jerujalembo Kefassa noduro lekke ti-a rokko kawu wuriro napkeiye.
1.19: Yakuba yaana Kǝmayero kajia, kǝngayam gade fimaa rukkǝni.
1.20: Awo ruwunjagakki adǝ kattuwu gǝni, fuwu Alayen tabbatkǝkki.
1.22: Jama Isa Almasiwua gawu cidi Yahudiyayedǝ sadǝn wua nosanni,
1.23: adǝ runjumaa wuljai fanja: «Kam calan andia basarsanadǝ kǝrma kambǝrse duwon tia siduwuro majidǝa ambo wuljiyi.»

2.1: Daji ngawo saa mewu deriyen waldǝkke Jerujalembo Barnabas-a rokko leyekko, koro Titus yea ngokke yadǝkkǝna.
2.2: Awo Ala wahayilan fǝlesǝgǝna nangaro leyekko, koro tayiro kawuɍi kǝji kǝrdiyaro wulgǝkkidǝa bayingeyekko, amma am duwon jama tayia fuwuwuro ngojanadǝ runjaro, bare kida dikkǝna-a fuwun dikki-a bowuro waljǝnniro.
2.3: Amma Titus wu-a rokkodǝ, ti kam lardu Gǝresse yaye, tia casakke kajadǝnni.
2.4: Lamar adǝ kǝramiya kattuwuye asǝrlan cawudǝna nangaro ciyeno. Kǝnsionjadǝ, nankam kǝlaye na Isa Almasiwuyen fandiyenadǝa sǝɍi cado andia kaɍearo sadoro.
2.5: Amma am aniro sa ganamaro dama yiyende, jire kawuɍi kǝjiyedǝ nayi nangaro dǝgaro.
2.6: Koro fuwuwudǝ, naptunjaro lamboni bawo, Ala amba gayirjiwawo, awima kawuɍiniro casarganni.
2.7: Ai, jiɍi Ala kida am kajaadaro kawuɍi kǝjidǝa wulduwuye mukko Biturussero cakkǝnadǝ gai, mukkoni yero kida jǝmbǝlǝmbaro wulduwuye cakkǝnadǝa kero.
2.8: Awoa ti duwon Biturusso kǝnduwo kida kǝngayambe na am kajaadayen dioye cinadǝ wu yero na jǝmbǝlǝmbayen kǝnduwo adǝa sina.
2.9: Yakuba-a Kefas-a Yahaya-a tayi duwon fuwuwu jama Isaa gawuyelan nowadadǝ ser Ala sǝddǝnadǝa asuyeranniya, wu-a Barnabas-aa mukko yindin samoye, andi na kǝrdiyayero leniyoro, tayi ye na am kajaadayero lejaro kasatkera.
2.10: Awo fallo andia seworo: Talaawaa tangiyo, adǝma awo jauro dio raakkǝnadǝ. Bulusse Biturusso njǝkkado
2.11: Amma Kefas bǝrni Antakiyayero kadinniya, jirenju bawo nangaro federo tiro kikkadǝkko.
2.12: Kawu am laa na Yakubayen isaidǝro, kǝramiya fǝrdunja kǝrdi-a rokko jawui. Amma kadiranniya, ngaworo walde tayi-a firdu badiyeno, kǝwu am kajaadayedǝa rijǝna nangaro.
2.13: Kǝramiya yaudiya gapcanadǝ curo nanmǝnafǝknjuyen tiro kǝllaadara, har nanmǝnafǝknjadǝ Barnabas kǝlanjumaa leyeno.
2.14: Amma kǝndonja kǝla jire kawuɍi kǝjiyedǝyen cadiwaworo kirukkǝniya, wuye fuwu tayi sammayen Kefasso: «Ni yaudi duwon kǝndǝgai yaudiyaye gǝni kǝrdiyaye dimia, ndayin gǝle kǝrdiyaa yakkǝme kǝndǝgai yaudiyaye cadi?» yekko. Kambǝrselan jiremaro waldu
2.15: Andi yaudiya katambiye, biwuwu kǝrdiya gǝni.
2.16: Adǝ yaye kam wada Attauraye galan gǝni, Isa Almasiwua mǝrsadulan jiremaro waljidǝa noniyena. Andidǝ wada galan gǝni, Almasiwua mǝrsadulan jirewuro walliyoro tia mǝrsaniyena. Awoa wada galan wunduma jiremaro waljiwawo.
2.17: Adǝgaima Almasiwuyen jirewuro walduro maniyelan andi ye biwuwuro asuseraa, Almasiwudǝ kidama biwuyero walji wa? A'a, tǝmmaro ngai gǝni!
2.18: Awo wurnǝkkǝnadǝa waldǝkke tandǝkkia, wu wadaa ganambumaro fǝledǝgǝkki, diye.
2.19: Awoa kǝla wadadǝyen wadadǝro kanukko, Alaro dǝgakkoro. Wu-a Almasiwudǝ-a rokko kǝskaro jasaane kanukko,
2.20: adǝn fuwun wu gǝni dǝgakki, Almasiwu wulan dǝgai. Kǝrma tiyilan dǝgakkidǝ, Tada Alaye ti duwon wua sǝraye wu nangaro kǝlanju cinadǝa mǝrsakke dǝgakki.
2.21: Ser Alayedǝa bowuro kalangǝkkiwawo. Ca kam wada galan jiremaro waljia, Almasiwudǝ bowuro nuna.

3.1: Nayi Galatiyawu hangal bawoaso, wundu nayia jawallan njattuluwo? Isa Almasiwua kǝskaro jajagane nunadǝro federo fuwundon fǝlenjaana, gǝna?
3.2: Kolsǝnowo nayia awo fallo njaworǝkko: Wada Attauraye galan ra kawuɍi kǝjidǝa fannǝme mǝrsadulan Ruhu Alayea kiwanduw?
3.3: Nayi jaumaro hangal bawoa wa? Ngawo Ruhu Alayen badinuwwayen, kowoɍi kǝlandoyen wa tumogǝwi?
3.4: Bowu fatto wa bone ngaa kiaw? Jiremaro bowuro waljiwawo!
3.5: To, ti duwon Ruhunju njade dawundon awo ajabba ajabba cǝdidǝ awo ania wada gawwa nangaro wa cǝdi, ra kawuɍi kǝjidǝa fannuwe mǝrsanuwwa nangaro cǝdi?
3.6: Jiɍi Nawi Ibrahim Alaa mǝrsaje Ala ye tia jiremaro ngojǝnadǝ gai,
3.7: nonowo, ngaima am kambǝrseadǝ tayima kaduwu Nawi Ibrahimbe wo.
3.8: Ala fuwun kǝrdiyaa kambǝrseyen jirewuro cǝdidǝa caman kitawulan ruwuwada, kawudǝro kawuɍi kǝji adǝa Nawi Ibrahimbo wuljǝgǝna: «Jama duniaye samma niyen barga cawandi.»
3.9: Adǝgaima am kambǝrseadǝ Nawi Ibrahim kambǝrsemadǝ-a rokko barga cawandi.
3.10: Am kida Attaurayero duno cadi samma baskuwada, dalilnjudǝ kitawulan ruwuwada: «Wundu duwon awo curo kitawu Attaurayen ruwuwada sammaa jǝgaiwawodǝ baskuwada.»
3.11: Kam fima wada galan fuwu Alayen jiremaro waljiwawodǝ fede, adǝ kitawulan ruwuwadadǝro: «Kam jiremadǝ kambǝrseyen roa dǝgai.»
3.12: Ti wadadǝ awo kambǝrseye gǝni, adǝ ye kitawulan ruwuwada: «Kam awo ania cǝdimadǝ tayiyen roa dǝgai.»
3.13: Almasiwu kǝlanjuma cujundero baskuwadaro walje andia baskudu Attaurayen merusera, adǝ kitawulan ruwuwadadǝro: «Wundu duwon tia kǝskaro rojaanadǝ baskuwada.»
3.14: Adǝa dionjudǝ, barga Nawi Ibrahimbedǝ Isa Almasiwuyen kǝrdiya yero jǝpcuwo, andi samma Ruhu Alaye duwon Ala wadu ngoje andiro sadi cǝnnadǝa kambǝrseyen fandiyoro. Wada Attauraye-a wadu Alaye-a
3.15: Kǝramiya, kǝla misal kamben jandenǝkki: Aman ndǝpcane tabbaccagaiya, aman kambe yaye, wunduma baworo cǝdiwawo bi cǝrgaiwawo.
3.16: To, Ala Nawi Ibrahim-a kaduwunju-aro waduwadǝa ngoyeyeno. Kitawuye kǝla am ngǝwuyen “kaduwuwaro” gǝni, “kaduwunǝmbo” kǝla kam fallen cǝnna, kamdǝ Almasiwudǝma.
3.17: Akko awo wullǝkkidǝ: Aman duwon Ala kuren tabbaccǝgǝnadǝ, Attaura saa yer dewun fiakkun ngawon isǝna tia baworo cǝdiwawo ye, wadu Alayedǝa cinjiwawo ye.
3.18: Warasadǝ wada Attaurayen isia, daji waduyen isiwawo, amma Ala wadu ngoje sernjun tia Nawi Ibrahimbo kaino.
3.19: Adǝgaia, awiro gǝle wadadǝ? Biwuwa federo caluworo tǝrgana, har kaduwu duwon tiro wadudǝa ngojaanadǝ isiro, koro wadadǝa malaiyawa mukko soloma laayero kesakko.
3.20: Solomadǝ kam falle gǝni, amma Aladǝ falma.
3.21: Attaura-a wadu Alaye-a duwundai wa? A'a, tǝmmaro ngai gǝni! Ca wada laa rakce ro cidǝ tinaa, daji jiremaro waldudǝ wada gayen tabbatto isǝna.
3.22: Amma kitawudǝ cakke dunia nga kosowu biwuyero walyera, ngainin Isa Almasiwua mǝrsadulan am kambǝrseadǝ wadudǝa cawandi.
3.23: Kawu jaman kambǝrseyedǝro, wada Attaurayedǝ andia kosowu gai sadane rosana, har kambǝrse isidǝ ambo bayindiyiro.
3.24: Ngaima har kǝnsio Almasiwuyero Attauradǝ sǝɍiwomande, kambǝrselan jirewuro walliyoro.
3.25: Amma kǝrma kambǝrse isǝnadǝ, andi gadero mukko sǝɍiwomayen gǝni. Kaɍeawa-a tadawa-a
3.26: Nayi samma Isa Almasiwua mǝrsaduyen tadawa Alayero walluwwa,
3.27: dalilnjudǝ wundundo yayero kasala njadde Almasiwuro kǝlnjaanadǝ hal Almasiwuye lujǝna.
3.28: Yaudi bi yaudi gǝni bawo, kaɍea bi kambe bawo, kongwa bi kamu bawo, na Isa Almasiwuyen nayi samma tilo nangaro.
3.29: Koro nayidǝ Almasiwuyea, daji nayi kaduwu Nawi Ibrahimbe, kǝla wadudǝyen warasawu.

4.1: Awo wullǝkkidǝ: Warasamadǝ tada wurajǝnni duwon, tidǝ kǝma sammaye yaye, awima ti-a kaɍea-a gayirjiwawo,
4.2: fǝrdu wakkilla-a cuwuramgu-ayen har sa bawanju kamjǝnadǝ isiro.
4.3: Ngaima sa andi tadawadǝ, andi ye kaɍea fǝrdu kǝnduwowa dunia adǝa canodiyen.
4.4: Amma sadǝ kalkallo kidǝnniya, Ala Tadanju ti duwon kamuyen tambǝna ye, fǝrdu kǝnduwo Attaurayen tambǝna yedǝa juwayeno,
4.5: am fǝrdu Attaurayen napcanadǝa merujoro, ngainin andia tadawa Alayero damsai.
4.6: Nayi tadawa nangaro Ala Ruhu Tadanjuye karwundero juwajiye ngaye: «Abba, Bawa!» cǝni.
4.7: Adǝgainin ni gadero kaɍea gǝni, tada. Ni tada nangaro, na Alayen warasama ye. Hangal cidu Bulusse kǝla Galatiyawuyen
4.8: Calan sa Alaa nonuwwidǝn, nayi kaɍeawa Alaye gǝni, alawa kattuwuye.
4.9: Amma kǝrma Alaa nonuwwadǝ, ra adǝa kojǝnaro Ala nayia nonjanadǝ, ndayin gǝle walduwe kǝnduwowa lawu-a faida bawo-a dunia adǝyedǝa gawe caye baworo kaɍeanjaro waldu manuwidǝ?
4.10: Yim so, kǝndawu so, jaman so, saa soa hangallayen gawi,
4.11: har kida nandon dikkǝnadǝ bowuro waljiro nayi nangaro rikkǝna.
4.12: Kǝramiya, lowonjakki, wu gairo wallowo, wu ye nayi gairo wallǝkkǝnadǝro. Awima diwi wuro sǝdduwwi,
4.13: kasuwa laa tiyiye nangaro nayiro burwo sallammin mana kawuɍi kǝjiye ngeddǝkkoro nonuwwa.
4.14: Kasuwani nayiro kurwowu yaye, wasuwe njusuwwi, wua malaiya Alaye gairo, Isa Almasiwu kǝlanju gairo semowuw.
4.15: Nda gǝle karwukǝjindodǝ? Ca yojia, simndo kulainuwe siwiro shedanjakki.
4.16: Nayiro jire wulnjagakkǝnadǝro kǝladondoro wa walyekko?
4.17: Kǝwu am kajaadayedǝ nayi nangaro ronja cadiya jauro caraana, amma nianjadǝ ngǝla gǝni. Andi-a nayi-a faidu majai, ngainin nayi ye tayi nangaro rondo yiwiya jauro raawwa.
4.18: Niadǝ ngǝlaa, ro njo rawodǝ sawi yaye jauro ngǝla, sa dawundon dǝgakkǝna runjun gǝni.
4.19: Tadawani, bone kǝnjambiye nayi nangaro koro yaye waldǝkke yakki, har hal Almasiwuye karwundon napciro.
4.20: Waiyo! Wu kǝrma dawundon dǝgakke jande jiɍi gade njaddǝkkiya, raakko, kǝlandon hangalni cijǝnadǝro. Aman yindi
4.21: Wulsǝgǝnowo, nayi wada Attauraye ga raawwadǝ, Attauradǝa asunuwwawo wa?
4.22: Awoa Nawi Ibrahim tada kongwa yindia, faldǝ kirnjuyen, faldǝ ye kamunjuyen cuwandǝnadǝa kitawulan ruwuwada.
4.23: Tada kirredǝ nia kamben katambo, amma ti tada kamunjuyedǝ waduyen katambo.
4.24: Adǝ misal: Kamuwa ani naptu aman yindiye cadi. Faldǝ kau kuruwu Sinaiye, kaɍea njamboma. Tima Hajaratu wo.
4.25: Hajaratudǝ naptu kau kuruwu Sinaiye cidi Arabiyayen dǝganaye cǝdi. Tidǝ Jerujalem kǝrmaye, tadawanju-a rokko nankaɍealan napcai.
4.26: Amma Jerujalem sameyedǝ kaɍea gǝni, tima yande wo.
4.27: Awoa kitawulan ruwuwada: «Ni kamu yambǝmbawo, kǝji fanne! Ni ngaltema bone kǝnjambiye fannǝmmi, wulwuɍi yakke karwukǝjinǝm fǝlene! Dalilnjudǝ tadawa kamu kwaa yayero kamu kolladayema ngǝwu wo.»
4.28: Kǝramiya, nayi ye Isaku gai tadawa waduye.
4.29: Kuren kam nia kamben tambǝnadǝ ti Ruhuyen tambǝnadǝa basarjǝnadǝ gai, kuma ye ngai.
4.30: Amma awi kitawuye wuljo? «Kirdǝ-a tadanju-a dune, tada kirredǝ tada kamu kir gǝniyedǝ-a rokko warasa cuwandiwawodǝro.»
4.31: Awo ani nangaro, kǝramiya, andi tadawa kirdǝye gǝni, tadawa kamu kir gǝnidǝye.

5.1: Kambero walliyoro Almasiwu nankam kǝlaye sedo. Adǝ nangaro dunoaro danowo, bare koro yaye dui nankaɍeaye ngonuwwi!
5.2: To, fannowo! Wu Bulus nayiro wulnjagakki, kolluwe kajanjaia, Almasiwu awimaro faidanjagaiwawo.
5.3: Kam kolje kajajana fi yayero caye baworo wulgǝkki, dolenjuro wada Attauraye sammaa garo kǝlaro ngojǝna.
5.4: Nayi wada galan jirewuro waldu manuwidǝ, nayi-a Almasiwu-a faiduwwa, ser Alaye fandoye jawal kolluwwa.
5.5: Andidǝ, Ruhu Alaye sasakke kambǝrselan tǝma jirewuro walduye warniyena.
5.6: Awoa na Isa Almasiwuyen kaja bi kajanambu awima gǝni, kambǝrse kǝrawon fǝledi bas faidaa wo.
5.7: Ngǝlaro fuwu buwi duwon, wundu nayiro jire ga damnjaa?
5.8: Jamba adǝ ti nayia bowonjanadǝyen gǝni kadio.
5.10: Nayidǝ, Kǝmande nangaro raayi gade gawwaworo mǝrsanjakkǝna. Amma kam hangalndo cǝsangidǝ wunduro walyeno yaye ajawu cai.
5.11: Kǝramiya, wudǝ koro yaye kaja dio mawonǝkkia, awiro gǝle koro yaye wua basarsaidǝ? Adǝgaia, takkal kǝska karmoyedǝ baworo waljǝna.
5.12: Ca am hangalndo casangidǝ tayi kǝlanja adimbo cado! Mangar tiyiye-a hal Ruhu Alaye-a
5.13: Kǝramiyani, nayia nankam kǝlaye fandoro bowongera. Adǝ yaye, bare nankam kǝlaye adǝlan faidaduwe niadiwi diwwi, amma wundu yaye kǝrawo fǝlejiyialan kamanjuro nanwolodi cǝddo.
5.14: Akko maana Attaura sammaye curo mana fallen: «Kǝmaskinǝm yea kǝlanǝm gairo raye!»
5.15: Amma kattendo calluwe njanjanguwia, hangal gǝnanowo, bare nayi kǝlando kǝlandoa sigǝwwi.
5.16: Awo wullǝkkidǝ tima kollowo Ruhu Alaye simonja, daji mangar tiyiyedǝa galluwwawo.
5.17: Mangar tiyiye-a Ruhu-a tadiwawo, koro Ruhu-a mangar tiyiye-a tadiwawo. Tayidǝ kattenjan duwunna, adǝ nangaro ranguwe awo raawwadǝa diwwawo.
5.18: Amma Ruhudǝ nayia simonjaia, nayi fǝrdu wada Attaurayen bawo.
5.19: Kǝndo tiyiyedǝ farak, tayima kǝnjǝna so, tayirnambu so, nanjane so,
5.20: sǝnǝm ga so, kǝmbafi so, nankemi so, lawala so, nandǝɍi so, gǝrgadu so, kǝla rawo so, taawanambu so, yaktu so,
5.21: mandǝna so, sagarandu so, kǝlaɍiwonambu so, awo gade tayi-a camunna. Burwon wullǝkkǝnadǝ gai, koro yaye wulnjagakki, am awo ania cadidǝ nodo bargaa Alayedǝa warasajaiwawo.
5.22: Amma hal Ruhu Alayelan tuwandidǝ tayima kǝrawo so, karwukǝji so, nanlewa so, kanadi so, nanjaija so, nanngǝla so, aman roda so,
5.23: rokuranambu so, kǝlaɍiwo so. Kǝla awo aniyen wada bawo.
5.24: Am Isa Almasiwuyedǝ mangar so, niadiwi so tiyiyedǝa kǝskaro jajagane roro keyeso.
5.25: Ruhu Alaye ro sadǝnadǝ, kolliyo Ruhu Alayedǝma andia simosa!
5.26: Bare rokurawuro walliyende, koro bare kattendero hangalsango so, mandǝna so ngasaanni.

6.1: Kǝramiya, kam laa biwu cǝdi ruwia, nayi Ruhu Alayeadǝ rokura bawoalan tia kǝla jawallero yakkowo. Amma bare nayi ye jaraptuwwiro hangal gǝnanowo.
6.2: Kurwowu kamandoye kǝlaro ngonowo, ngainin wada Almasiwuye gawi.
6.3: Kam laa ti awima gǝni duwon kǝlanju awo laaro ngoyenoa, kǝlanju jambajǝna.
6.4: Amma wundu yaye kǝndo kǝlanjuye curo. Daji kam gaden gǝni, kǝlanjuman dalil awulo boye cuwandi,
6.5: wundu yaye katkunnju kǝlaro ngoji nangaro.
6.6: Kam tiro manadǝa alamjagaidǝ awo ngǝla sammaa kam tia alamjidǝ-a rokko dagarjo.
6.7: Bare jambaduwwi, wunduma rakce Alaro rudu gǝnajiyiwawo. Awoa awo kam cǝnadǝnadǝmaa kalaji.
6.8: Kam mangar tiyinjuyelan cǝnadimadǝ tiyiyen karmo kalaji, amma kam Ruhu Alayelan cǝnadimadǝ Ruhu Alayelan ro sawisoye kalaji.
6.9: Bare ngǝla dioro yimbariyende, tǝma kolliyendea, sa tǝraanan kala diye.
6.10: Adǝ nangaro dama fandiyeya, wundu yayero ngǝla yiddiyo, masammanno kǝramiyande Isaa gawudǝro. Sǝmo kasta-a lewa-a daryeye
6.11: Arawu kura kura ania ruiwo, wuma mukkonin ruwungeyerakko!
6.12: Am mangar tiyiyen tayia ngǝlawuro ngojaidǝ nayia dolero njasakke kajaduwi, amma bare kǝska karmoye Almasiwuye nangaro tayia basarjanni basso adǝa cadi.
6.13: Am kajaadadǝma wada Attauraye jagaiwawo, amma kǝla kajandoyen awulo jaworo kajaduwiya, carawo.
6.14: Amma wudǝ kǝla kǝska karmoye Kǝmande Isa Almasiwuyen gǝnia, bare tǝmmaro awulo bukkǝni. Kǝska adǝn dunia ye wuro kano, wu ye duniaro kanukko.
6.15: Kaja bi kajanambu awima gǝni, sai alaktu bǝɍinno waldu.
6.16: Am wada adǝa jagai, wotte jama Israyila Alayedǝ, nanlewa-a kanjimaɍi-a cawando!
6.17: Kua adǝn fuwun bare wunduma suwolsǝnni, wudǝ tiyinin balowa wu Isayero fǝlejaidǝ mbeji nangaro.
6.18: Kǝramiya, ser Kǝmande Isa Almasiwuye nayilan dǝga! Amin.

1.1: Wuma Bulus rawo Alayen kǝngayam Isa Almasiwuyedǝ muminna amanna Isa Almasiwuye bǝrni Afisayen dasaanadǝro:
1.2: Ala Bawande-a Kǝma Isa Almasiwu-a nayiro ser-a nanlewa-a njado! Barga Ruhu Alaye jiɍi jiɍi Almasiwulan
1.3: Bargaa Ala Bawa Kǝmande Isa Almasiwuye, ti duwon barga sameye jiɍi fi yayea Almasiwu nangaro andiro sadǝnadǝ.
1.4: Kawu dunia alaktiman tayir-a awo waada bawoa-alan fuwunjun dǝgaiyero Almasiwulan andia kǝresera. Curo kǝrawoyen
1.5: kǝla ardiya rawonjuyen Ala Isa Almasiwuyen andia tadawanju daptuyero walliyoro kadarsera.
1.6: Ala Tadanju cǝraanadǝyen andiro sernju darajaa sadǝnadǝro tia yungoriyo!
1.7: Bunjuyen, kǝla sernju dama bawoyen, merusane biwuwande gawuryeno, ser duwon
1.8: Ala andiro nanrashidunju-a hangalkǝjinju-a samman ci bawoaro saddǝnadǝ.
1.9: Ala asǝr rawonjuye kǝla karwukǝjinju Almasiwulan niajǝnadǝyen andiro isanosaana,
1.10: wotte fasal awowa same-a cidi-aye sammaa sanju cǝdiya Almasiwulan kǝllǝme captuyedǝ.
1.11: Koro Almasiwulan warasa fandiyena, Ala ti duwon nia rawonjuyelan awo sammaa cǝdidǝ caman kǝla fasalnjuyen andia kadarsana nangaro,
1.12: andi ye burwo sallammin tǝmandea Almasiwuro yakkiyenadǝ darajanjua yungoriyoro!
1.13: Sa mana jireye wotte kawuɍi kǝji njǝkkawondoyea fannuwe Almasiwua kasadduwwadǝn, Ala nayi yero tilan Ruhunju njadi cǝnnayen tawanju gǝnangeyera.
1.14: Ruhu Alayedǝ naptu ran warasandeye cǝdi, har kawu nuwande merujiro, darajanjua yungoriyo! Alaa wusedu
1.15: Adǝma nangaro wu ye tǝn mana kǝla Kǝmande Isaa mǝrsadundo-a muminna sammaa kǝrawondo-ayen fakkǝnadǝn,
1.16: curo moduwaniyen nayia tannjakkiya, ngaltema nayi nangaro Alaa wusedu kollǝkkǝni.
1.17: Ala Kǝmande Isa Almasiwuye, ti duwon Bawa Martawamadǝ, tia ngǝlaro nonoworo hal nanrashiduye-a kǝlafǝrǝmbe-a nayiro njado,
1.18: koro sim karwundoyea jawal nurnjuyero kajuwo, tǝma duwon tiro bowonjanadǝ ye, arsiyi warasanju darajaa muminnaye ye,
1.19: nankura kǝnduwonjuye kanji andi tia mǝrsaniyenaye yedǝa nonoworo. Kǝnduwo adǝ tima duno duwon
1.20: Almasiwulan sa tia karmolan cǝsange kǝmboramnjun samelan napcǝnayen fǝlejǝnadǝ wo.
1.21: Nadǝn Almasiwu jaman adǝ runjun gǝni, fuwuye yen kǝrmai so, kǝnduwo so, duno so, raktu so samma-a cu tina samma-ayen same kuruwun napci.
1.22: Ala awi yayea cidiya si Almasiwuyero cakke tia fuwuma awo sammayero galaje jamanjuro kaino,
1.23: jama duwon naptu tiyinjuye cǝdi, koro curo tiyi adǝyeman Almasiwu dǝgai, ti duwon awi yayea jiɍi fin yaye cǝmbǝɍidǝ.

2.1: Nayidǝ ayauwando-a biwuwando-a nangaro nuwwa,
2.2: koro calan tayilan dǝgawe jawal dunia adǝye ye, mai kǝnduwo karuwaye, wotte Yiwulis ti ganambuwua simoji kǝrgadǝ yea gawwa.
2.3: Andi samma ye calan dawunjan mangar tiyindeyen dǝgaiye awo tiyinde-a hangalnde-a caraanaa diye, koro ngainin andi am gade gai tadawa gǝrgadu Alayero walliyena.
2.4: Amma Ala jauro kanjimaɍimadǝ, kǝrawo kuran andia saraana nangaro,
2.5: curo ayaundeyen nuiyena yaye, andia Almasiwu-a rokko roaro kalanseno. Serlaman njǝkkawo kiwanduw!
2.6: Koro andia Almasiwun kundenno karmolan sasange na sameyelan Isa Almasiwu nangaro sasakke ti-a rokko nammiyena,
2.7: ngainin jamanna fuwuyen Ala nanngǝlanju andiro saddǝnadǝyen sernju ci bawoa Isa Almasiwulan fǝleji.
2.8: Awoa serlaman kambǝrseyen njǝkkawo kiwanduw, koro adǝ nayiyen gǝni isi, tidǝ kǝnjo Alaye,
2.9: kidandoyen gǝni, bare wunduma awulo juwunniro.
2.10: Andidǝ tando Alaye, kǝndo ngǝla Ala caman dabbarjǝnadǝa diyoro Isa Almasiwulan alansera. Kam bǝɍin fallo waldu
2.11: Adǝma nangaro, nayi tamboyen kǝrdiyadǝ, am kǝlanjaro kajaada canidǝ kuren jǝmbǝlǝmlan bowonjai, tayi duwon kajanja tiyiye mukko kamben tǝdǝnadǝ. Tangowo, sadǝn
2.12: nayi Almasiwu bawolan dǝgawwa, nuwando jama Israyilayen bawo, nayi aman wadu Alayero kusotto, koro dunian tǝma ye tawwi, Ala yea nonuwwi.
2.13: Amma kǝrma Isa Almasiwu nangaro, nayi calan Alan kuruwun dǝgawwadǝa bu Almasiwuyen karǝnnjuro njawudǝna.
2.14: Ti kǝlanjuma nanlewande wo, tima jama yindidǝa fallo cǝde tiyinjun garu duwunnedǝa wurjo.
2.15: Shara so, wada so Attaurayedǝa baworo kido, cuju jama yindi aniyero kǝlanjun kam bǝɍin fal alakkeno. Ngainin kattenjaro nanlewa cuwude
2.16: tiyi falnin kǝska karmoyedǝyen yindidǝa Ala-a soloje duwundǝa baworo kido.
2.17: Sa Almasiwu isǝnadǝn, nayi Alan kuruwun dǝgawwadǝro kawuɍi kǝji nanlewaye ngeddo, koro am karǝnnedǝ yero ngai kiddo.
2.18: Tiyeman andi yindi samma Ruhu faldǝyen na Bawadǝyero ngawo kiwandiye.
2.19: Adǝ nangaro nayi gadero kusottowa bi sikudowa gǝni, nayi muminna-a rokko jama Alaye, am fannjuye,
2.20: fado duwon kǝla fǝrdu kǝngayambadǝye-a nawiyadǝye-ayen tǝdandǝnadǝ, koro Isa Almasiwu kǝlanjuma kau masammannedǝ wo.
2.21: Tilan fadodǝ nga ngǝlaro kǝlde fado tayir Alayero walji,
2.22: koro tilaman nayi ye fado Alayero walluwi, na duwon Ruhunjulan dǝgaidǝ.

3.1: Adǝma nangaro wu Bulusdǝ nayi kǝrdiya nangaro kosoma Isa Almasiwuyero wallǝkkǝna.
3.2: Tabbatto lawar kǝla kida serre Ala wuro nayi nangaro sinadǝyen fannuwwa,
3.3: Ala asǝr fasalnjuye wahayi laan isanosǝgǝna, kalmawa ganan wotiya adǝn ruwunǝkkǝnadǝ gai.
3.4: Kǝranuwiya, noduni asǝr Almasiwuyedǝa asunuwi,
3.5: asǝr duwon jaman kureyen adamgǝnaro isanodǝgǝnni, amma kǝrma Ruhu Alaye kǝngayambanju mumin-a nawiyanju-aro fǝlejǝgǝnadǝ.
3.6: Asǝrdǝ tima kawuɍi kǝji nangaro kǝrdiya yaudiya-a rokko warasawu, am tiyi tiloyedǝro waljana, koro wadu Isa Almasiwuyelan nuwanja cawandǝna wo.
3.7: Kǝla kǝnjo sernjuye Ala wuro kǝnduwoaro sinadǝyen kidama kawuɍi kǝji adǝyero walyekko.
3.8: Muminna sammalan wuma gana wo yaye, Ala wuro ser adǝa sǝddo, kǝrdiyaro kawuɍi kǝji arsiyi ci bawoa Almasiwuyedǝa wulgǝkkoro,
3.9: koro am sammaro jiɍi Ala awiso Alaktumadǝ asǝr fasalnjuye tǝn kuren gǝraadadǝa isanogǝkkoro.
3.10: Ngainin kǝrma jama Isaa gawudǝyen nanrashidu tǝrǝm Alayedǝ fuwuwu so, kǝnduwowu so sameyero isanodiyi.
3.11: Adǝma nianju sawisoye Isa Almasiwu Kǝmandeyen cǝdǝnadǝ wo.
3.12: Almasiwulan koro tia mǝrsaduyen ridu bawoaro na Alayero ngawo fandiye.
3.13: Adǝ nangaro nayia lowonjakki, bare kǝla bone nayi nangaro yakkiyen tǝmando kolluwwi, awo animan daraja fanduwi. Kǝrawo Almasiwuyea nodu
3.14: Adǝma nangaro fuwu Bawadǝyen tungurummǝkki,
3.15: ti duwon jiɍiya same-a cidi-aye sammaro cu cinadǝ.
3.16: Kǝla arsiyi darajanjuyen karwundoa cakko Ruhunjuyen kǝnduwoaro dunoajoro Alaa korǝkki,
3.17: koro kambǝrseyen Almasiwu karwundon dǝga, kibburo koktǝnowo curo kǝrawoyen nammoworo Alaa korǝkki,
3.18: har muminna samma-a rokko ranguwe nanfarak so, nankuruwu so, nankura so, dadu so kǝrawo Almasiwuyedǝa asunuwi,
3.19: koro kǝrawo duwon nodu sammaa kojǝna adǝa nonuwi, ngainin hal Alayen kek tǝmbǝɍoworo tia korǝkki.
3.20: Ala duwon kǝla kǝnduwonju andin dǝganadǝyen awo koriye bi tǝmaniyea kojǝnaro cǝdidǝ,
3.21: tiro curo jama Isaa gawu-a Isa Almasiwu kǝlanju-ayen jaman fin yaye har abada abadinno daraja tio! Amin.

4.1: Adǝma nangaro wu Kǝmandero kosomadǝ, nayia lowonjakki, bowodunju mowuwwadǝro kǝndǝgai jussǝna dewo!
4.2: Rokura bawoa ye, nanlewaa ye, kanadia yero wallowo, kǝrawoalan kamandoa neddowo,
4.3: kowoɍi dewo, kǝlakǝl Ruhu Alaye kǝljǝnadǝa nanlewayen dunoaro taiwo.
4.4: Tiyi falma dǝga, koro Ruhu Alaye falma dǝga, Ala nayia tǝma falmaro bowonjanadǝ gai.
4.5: Kǝmande ye falma, kambǝrse ye falma, kasala ye falma,
4.6: koro Ala ye falma, Bawa am sammaye, awisoro kura wo, awison faidaduma, dawu awisoyen dǝganadǝ.
4.7: Amma wundunde yaye ser kǝla kǝnjo Almasiwu ngalje cinayen cuwandǝna.
4.8: Akko awo kitawu wuljǝnadǝ: «Samero leyenniya, kosowu kada cuwude ambo kǝnjo jiɍi jiɍi kaino.»
4.9: To, samero lejǝnadǝ, awi maananju wo, kǝryeya kuruwu cidiya cidiye yero jǝpcǝna gǝnia?
4.10: Ti jǝpcǝnadǝ tima same kuruwu yero awo sammaa cǝmbǝɍoro lejǝnadǝ.
4.11: Tima kǝnjowa ambo cǝdde: laanjaa kǝngayambaro, laa nawiyaro, laa kawuɍi kǝji mawoduwuro, laa sǝniya jama Alaye-a malǝmba-aro kido.
4.12: Ngainin tiyi Almasiwuye dunoajoro, muminnadǝa dabbarjane kidanja cadi,
4.13: har andi samma kǝlakǝl kambǝrseye-a Tada Alaye noduye-a so, nanrashidu so, hal tǝrǝm Almasiwuye so nagǝiye.
4.14: Daji andi gadero tadawa gairo walliyewawo, tadawa duwon tǝmbaɍiso ye cambaljai, buaso alamdu jiɍi jiɍiye ye cijane jauro fujai, nangaso ye tayia jambajaidǝ.
4.15: Cuju adǝyero jire kǝrawon wulliyo, jawal fin yaye wuraniyo camuno fuwumande Almasiwuyero walliyo!
4.16: Almasiwuyen tiyi sǝram kalkallo kǝldi. Nasha fi yaye jiɍi jussǝnan kidajiya, nasha gadea cakke wurajai. Ngainin tiyi sǝramdǝ nanlewaaro walje wuraje kǝrawon fuwu juwui. Kǝndǝgai caye
4.17: Adǝ nangaro ngai wullǝkke cu Kǝmandeyen jauro lowonjakki, bare gadero kǝrdiya hangalnja faida bawoalan dasayidǝ gairo dǝgawwi!
4.18: Hangalnja duwuro waljǝna, nanjayilnja-a kǝlakibbunja-a nangaro ro Alayen nuwanja falma bawo.
4.19: Karwunja gayirjiwaworo walje awo diwi diwi mangarre ye cadǝna, koro caye kojǝnaro awo tayir gǝni jiɍi jiɍiro kǝlanja casakkǝna.
4.20: Amma nayidǝ, awo kǝla Almasiwuyen njasakkǝranadǝ ngai gǝni!
4.21: Tabbatto kǝlanjuyen fannuwwa, koro jire Isalan dǝganadǝ gai, tiyen njasakkǝrana.
4.22: Daji kǝndǝgaindo cayedǝa kollowo, naptundo caye mǝradu jambayea siduwuro cadidǝa wanowo,
4.24: naptu bǝɍin nanjire-a nantayir-alan Ala-a camunno alaktǝnadǝa lunowo. Kǝndǝgai bǝɍin
4.25: Adǝma nangaro kattuwu kamdu wanowo, kamandoro jire wulgǝnowo, wundunde yaye nasha kamanjuye nangaro.
4.26: Gǝrganuwia, bare biwu diwwi. Koro gǝrgadundodǝ kawu kǝngal cukkuriro fasso.
4.28: Barwu adǝn fuwun nambarwu dio koljo, cuju adǝyero mukkonjun ngǝlaro ngǝnǝpto, awo laa kam mǝradunjuaro njoye cǝdaro.
4.29: Bare manakuttu fima cindon culuwunni, sai awo mǝraduro faidaa ambo duno cakkidǝ, tayi fanjaidǝro ser cǝddoro.
4.30: Bare Ruhu Alayedǝa karwu kuttuaro diwwi, tima yim meruduyero nayiro tawa gǝnanjaa.
4.31: Awo kuttu-a hangalsango-a gǝrgadu-a kowo sango-a radu-a samma niadiwi nga-a rokko nayin kuruwunno waljo.
4.32: Kattendon am ngǝla ye, kanjimaɍiwu yero wallowo, kamandoa gawurnowo, Ala Almasiwu nangaro nayia gawurnjanadǝ gai.

5.1: Adǝ nangaro nayi tadawa tǝraanadǝ, hal Alayea ngonowo.
5.2: Kǝndǝgai kǝrawoye dewo, jiɍi Almasiwu andia saraye sadaa-a bu fida-a na Alayen kawudi kala kǝjiaro walje andi nangaro kǝlanju cinadǝ gai.
5.3: Amma bare kǝnjǝna, bi tayirnambu fi yaye, bi mangar diwi curondon wuldǝnni, muminnaro jussǝnni.
5.4: Koro mana kuttu, bi mana hangalnambuye, bi batti wuldu nayiro jussǝnni, cuju adǝyero Alaa wusenowo.
5.5: Adǝa ngǝlaro nonowo: Kǝnjǝnama-a tayirnambuma-a mangarduma wotte sǝnǝm gamadǝ-a samma nodo bargaa Almasiwu-a Ala-ayen warasa fima cawandiwawo.
5.6: Bare wunduma mana bowuyen jambanjanni, awo ani nangaro gǝrgadu Alaye ganambuwua cuwandi.
5.8: Calan nayi curo duwuyen, amma kǝrma Kǝmandedǝro nayi curo nurren. Tadawa nurre gairo dǝgaiwo,
5.9: awoa nema nurredǝ awo ngǝla-a kalkal-a jire-a sammalan kǝrga.
5.11: Bare kida faida bawoa duwuyero mukko yakkuwwi, cuju adǝyero fisaddowo!
5.13: Amma awo fi yayea nur fǝlejǝgǝnadǝ federo culuwi,
5.14: koro awo fi yaye federo culuwunadǝ nurro walji. Adǝma nangaro ngai wuldi: «Ni kǝnǝm dimimadǝ, fanne, karmolan cine, Almasiwu nia wasnji.»
5.15: Jiɍi dǝgawiro hangal gǝnanowo, am hangal bawoa gǝni, rashidu gairo wallowo.
5.16: Dama fanduwwa fin yaye awo ngǝla dewo, jaman diwin dǝgaiyena nangaro.
5.17: Bare hangal kuttuaro walluwwi, amma rawo Kǝmandeyedǝa asunowo.
5.18: Bare diben yawe sagaranduwwi, halkuttaro cadi, amma Ruhu Alayen tǝmbǝɍuwwaro wallowo.
5.19: Kattendon jawura so, aiya so, njungoro Ruhuye so dewo, Kǝmande yero aiya njungoroye karwundo samman yegǝnowo.
5.20: Ala Bawaa sawi yaye awin yaye cu Kǝmande Isa Almasiwuyen wusenowo. Kwawa-a kamuwa-a
5.21: Wundu yaye kamanjua ridu Almasiwuye nangaro jǝga.
5.22: Kamuwa, kwawandoa gaiwo, Kǝmandea gawwadǝ gai.
5.23: Kwadǝ tima fuwuma kamunjuye wo, Almasiwu ye fuwuma jama Alayedǝ gai, jamadǝ tiyinju, koro tima Njǝkkayimanju wo.
5.24: Jama Alaye Almasiwua jagaidǝ gai, kamuwa ye awin yaye kwawanjaa jaa.
5.25: Kwawa, kamuwandoa rawowo, Almasiwu jama Alayea cǝraye tayi nangaro kǝlanju cinadǝ gai,
5.26: ngainin jamadǝro mana Alayen kasala cǝdde tayirro walyera.
5.27: Adǝa dionjudǝ, jamadǝ balo so, murjoktu so, awo aniye camunonju soa gǝni, nantayir-a awo waada bawoa-aro waljo, tia darajaalan kǝlanjuro saduwuro.
5.28: Jiɍi adǝgainin kwaso kamuwanjaa carawo, tiyinjaa caraanadǝ gai. Kam kamunjua cǝraanamadǝ kǝlanjua cǝrawo.
5.29: Awoa wunduma ngalte tiyinju wajǝnni, amma tia ambaje kissiyi, Almasiwu jama Alayero cǝddidǝ gai,
5.31: «Dalil adǝyero kwa bawanju-a yanju-aa kolje kamunjuro kǝrdiye tayi yindiso tiyi fallo waljai.»
5.32: Tabbatto adǝ asǝr kura, mana adǝ kǝla Almasiwu-a jamanju-ayen cǝdiro wullǝkki.
5.33: Adǝ yaye wundundo yaye kamunjua kǝlanju gairo cǝrawo, koro kamudǝ ye kwanjuro daraja co.

6.1: Yalla, Kǝmande nangaro mana bawando-a yando-aye gaiwo, adǝma kalkal wo.
6.2: «Bawanǝm-a yanǝm-aro daraja ye,» tima wada burwoye waduadǝ wo:
6.4: Bawawa, bare hangal tadawandoye sanguwe gǝrgajanni, tayia alamdu-a sǝmo kasta-a Kǝmandeyelan isawuragǝnowo! Kaɍeawa-a kǝmawanja-a
6.5: Kaɍeawa, ridu-a lolodu-an karwu tiloan kǝmawando dunia adǝyea gaiwo, Almasiwua gawidǝ gai.
6.6: Bare sa njarui runjun nayia njarawo nangaro ngai diwwi, amma kaɍeawa Almasiwuye gai rawo Alayea karwundo samman dewo.
6.7: Ambo gǝni, Kǝmande gairo karwu ngǝlan kida yiddowo.
6.8: Nonowo, kam duwon awo ngǝla cǝdǝnadǝ, kaɍea yen kal, kambe yen kal, mukko Kǝmandeyen mukowa cuwandi.
6.9: Kǝmawa, nayi ye ngai kaɍeawandoro yiddowo, bare tayia wusanuwwi. Nonowo, ti duwon Kǝmanja-a kaando-adǝ samelan dǝgai, koro amba gayirjiwawo. Baɍimiya Alaye
6.10: Daryerambo, Kǝmande-a kǝrmainju kura-alan duno fandowo!
6.11: Kǝla nanga Yiwulissen danoworo baɍimi Alaye sammaa ngonowo.
6.12: Adamgǝnaro gǝni, fuwuwu so, kǝnduwowa so, wurawa dunia duwua adǝye soro mǝldiye, koro sedanna diwi diwi sameye yero mǝldiye.
6.13: Adǝ nangaro baɍimi Alaye sammaa ngonowo. Ngainin yim diwidǝ ise awo sammaa diwe tumogǝwiya, ranguwe dunoaro danuwi.
6.14: Dunoaro danowo, jire Alayedǝa bel gai canjandoro yikkerowo, nanjiredǝlan sulwe gai jaktǝnowo,
6.15: dabbardǝnowo kawuɍi kǝji nanlewayedǝa sindoro suno gai yakkowo,
6.16: awiso yayen kambǝrsedǝa ngawa gai ngonowo, tilan ranguwe kǝniwuwa kannua Kǝladodǝye sammaa kalluwi,
6.17: njǝkkawodǝa jawa suye gai yakkowo, koro kashagar Ruhuyedǝa taiwo, tima mana Alayedǝ wo.
6.18: Sawi yaye curo moduwando-a lowondo-ayen Alaa Ruhulan korowo, faadaro dǝgaiwo, nettulan muminna sammaro moduwa yiddowo.
6.19: Wu yero moduwa sǝddowo, Ala wuro kalmawa sio, ridu bawoaro mana asǝr kawuɍi kǝjiyedǝa wullǝkkoro,
6.20: wu duwon wakkil kawuɍi kǝjiye saɍgalan sakkerǝnadǝ. Kawuɍidǝa ridu bawoaro jiɍi wajimsǝgǝnadǝ gairo wullǝkkoro Alaa korowo. Lewa daryeye
6.21: Nayi ye lawar wua wusǝna-a awo dikki-aa nonoworo, Tikikus kǝraminde tǝraana ye, kidama amanna Kǝmandeye ye awo sammaa nayiro wulnjagai.
6.22: Nayiro naptunde wulnjaa, karwundoro duno coro tia juwanjagakkǝna.
6.23: Ala Bawa-a Kǝmande Isa Almasiwu-adǝ kǝramiya sammaro nanlewa-a kǝrawo-a kambǝrse-a cado.
6.24: Ser Alaye am Kǝmande Isa Almasiwua kǝrawo ceriwawon caraana sammalan dǝga!

1.1: Andima Bulus-a Timoti-a wolodiya Isa Almasiwuyedǝ muminna Isa Almasiwuye bǝrni Filibiyen dasaana samma fuwuwu-a banawu-an kundenno:
1.2: Ala Bawande-a Kǝma Isa Almasiwu-a nayiro ser-a nanlewa-a njado! Alaa wusedu
1.3: Sawi yaye nayia tannjakkiya, Alania wusenǝkki.
1.4: Koro sawi yaye moduwa nayi sammaro njaddǝkkiya, karwu kǝjiaro dikki,
1.5: dalilnjudǝ yim burwoyen tai har kǝrmaro kudero curo kida kawuɍi kǝjidǝyen wu-a rokko mukkondo yakkuwwa nangaro.
1.6: Tabbatto ti duwon nandon kǝndo ngǝla ngǝssǝnadǝ har yim Isa Almasiwuyero tumojiyiro nokkǝna.
1.7: Nayi sammaa ngai taktudǝ wuro jussǝna, nayi karwunilan nangaro. Awoa kosolan kǝrgakko yen kal, kawuɍi kǝjidǝa sǝɍiwonǝkke tabbatkǝkki yen kal, curo ser Alayen nayi samma wu-a rokko mukkondo yakkuwwa.
1.8: Kǝrawo Isa Almasiwuyen nayi sammaa njaraakkǝnaro Ala shedamani.
1.9: Nodu-a asudu samma-an kǝrawondo ngǝwuro tǝrgaro moduwa dikki,
1.10: ngainin awo ngǝladǝa gayirnuwe tayir-a biwu bawo-alan har yim Almasiwuyero dǝgawe,
1.11: Ala ye daraja-a njungoro-a cuwandoro nema nanjireye duwon Isa Almasiwuyen isidǝ dama baworo karwundon napci. Fuwumbui kawuɍi kǝjiye
1.12: Kǝramiya, adǝa nonuwiya, raakko, awo wua suwandǝnadǝ cakke kawuɍi kǝji fuwu juwuna,
1.13: har sojidi gomnaye ngan koro am gapcana samman wu Almasiwu nangaro kosolandǝa nojana.
1.14: Koro wua kosoro sasakkǝna nangaro, kǝramiyaye ngǝwunja Kǝmalan duno cawande ridu bawoaro mana Alaye wuljai.
1.15: Laanja mana Almasiwuyea nandǝɍi-a niadiwi-alan cadi, amma laa ye nia ngǝlaan cadi.
1.16: Tayi ani kǝrawoyen mana cadi, wu na adǝn kawuɍi kǝjidǝa sǝɍiwonǝkkiro nojanadǝro.
1.17: Amma tayi toni kuttuni kosoye casargai cane nia ngǝlaan gǝni, niadiwin mana Almasiwuyea cadi.
1.18: Awi gǝle? Jiɍi fin yaye nia ngǝlaa yen kal, niadiwi yen kal, Almasiwuye mana cadi. Adǝye kǝjinju fakkena, koro kǝjinju fakkin dǝgakki.
1.19: Moduwando-a bana Ruhu Isa Almasiwuye-a nangaro kǝlani fandǝkkiro nokkǝna.
1.20: Kǝla tabbattuwu tǝmaniyen awimaa nangukkiwawo, amma kǝrma, sawi yaye gai, roni yen kal, karmoni yen kal, federo tiyinin Almasiwuro daraja yikki.
1.21: Wudǝ, ronia dǝgadǝ Almasiwu, karmonidǝ ye fandi.
1.22: Roa tiyilan dǝgakkiro walyenoa, kidani faidaaro walji, amma finjaa kǝrenǝkkimaro nokkǝni.
1.23: Wu katte awo yindiyen kimitkada. Saptǝme na Almasiwuyen naptulan mǝradunia, tima ngalwo,
1.24: amma roa tiyilan dǝgakkǝnama nayi nangaro faidaa wo.
1.25: Adǝa tabbatto mǝrsanǝkkǝna nangaro, kambǝrsedǝlan fuwu buiwo karwundo ye kǝjijoro nammǝkke nayi samma-a rokko dǝgaiyero nokkǝna.
1.26: Ngaiman sa nandoro waldǝkkiya, wu nangaro dalil kǝla Isa Almasiwuyen awulo boye caye baworo fanduwi. Kawuɍi kǝji nangaro dunoaro danowo!
1.27: Awo sammasoro ngalwodǝ, kǝndǝgai kawuɍi kǝji Almasiwuyero jussǝna dewo, daji isǝkke nayia njarukki yen kal, isǝkkiwawo yen kal, nia tiloan dunoaro danuwi ye, karwu tiloan kallo kambǝrse kawuɍi kǝjiyero ngǝnǝptuwi yero fakki.
1.28: Bare awiman kolluwe waduwundo karwundo kamjanni. Adǝma tayiro sheda siduwunjaye ye, njǝkkawondoye yero walji, sheda duwon na Alayen isidǝ.
1.29: Almasiwu nangaro ser tia kasattuye runju gǝni, ti nangaro bone nja ye nayiro njadǝna.
1.30: Nayi ye curo mǝlduyen dǝgawi, jiɍi mǝldǝkki ruwwadǝ gai, koro kǝrma mǝldǝkki fannuwidǝ.

2.1: Adǝ nangaro, Almasiwulan karwundoro duno njo laa mennaa, kǝrawolan ro boda laa mennaa, Ruhulan naptu nanyaanaye laa mennaa, kanjimaɍi so, njunodu so laa mennaa,
2.2: daji yakkowo karwuni tai dajo kǝjijo: Hangalndo ye tilojo, kǝrawondo ye tilojo, halndo ye tilojo, niando ye tilojo.
2.3: Bare awima kǝla rawon bi rokuran diwwi, amma rokura bawoalan nayiro ngalworo am gadea ngonowo.
2.4: Wundundo yaye awo kǝlanjuye runjuro gǝni, am gadeye yero kissuwo.
2.5: Hal duwon Isa Almasiwulan dǝganadǝa nayi ye ngonowo:
2.6: Ti naptu Alaye duwon, Alaa kalkaldunjudǝa awo dunon tayero ngojǝnni,
2.7: amma kǝlanjua awima gǝniro kalakce alama wolodiye ngoje kam-a camunno walyeno.
2.8: Camuno kambe ngoyenniya, kǝlanjua waje har karmoro Alaa giya, karmo duwon kǝskaro tia jajagane nunadǝ.
2.9: Adǝma nangaro Ala tia na jaumaro darajaaro cade tiro cu duwon cu sammaa kojǝnadǝa kaino,
2.10: cu Isaye nangaro ngurumngurum fi yaye same-a cidi-a curo cidiyaye-alan fido,
2.11: daraja Ala Bawadǝyero tǝlam fi yaye ye Isa Almasiwudǝ tima Kǝmadǝ woro wuljo! Sillowu gai dunialan yiyildu
2.12: Adǝ nangaro, kǝrawowuni, sawi yaye manani gawwadǝ gai, wu dawundon runju gǝni, kǝrma ye wu bawoman caye baworo kida njǝkkawondoyedǝa Ala rida-a lolodu-an dewo,
2.13: Aladǝma njasakke awo cǝraanadǝa kasadduwe diwidǝ wo.
2.14: Awi diwi yaye bare suwollan bi kambiwulan diwwi.
2.15: Ngainin nayidǝ tadawa Alaye taldu bawoa-a biwu bawoa-a awo waada bawoa-aro dawu jaman diwi-a karwu yeskada-ayen walluwe dawunjan sillowu gai dunialan yiyilluwi.
2.16: Mana royedǝa dunoaro taiwo, daji wu ye yim Almasiwuyen awulo bukki, kida-a ngǝnǝptu-a bowuro dikkǝnidǝro.
2.17: Wua kǝla sadaa-a ibada-a kambǝrsendoyero bu fida gairo fisagai yaye, nayi nangaro karwuni jaumaro kǝjiji.
2.18: Jiɍi adǝgainin nayi ye karwundo kǝjijo, jiɍi kakke kǝjijidǝ gai. Timoti-a Abaratus-a
2.19: Kǝma Isalan tǝmanǝkke Timotia tussiwawo nandoro juwanjagakki, wu ye lawarndo fakkiya, karwuni duno cuwandi.
2.20: Ti gǝnia, kam laa gade karwunju tilo ti gai takkǝni, kam duwon naptundo jiremaro karwulan rojidǝ,
2.21: dalilnjudǝ tayi samma awowa Isa Almasiwuye gǝni, kaanjaa majai nangaro.
2.22: Amma hal Timotiye nonuwwa, tada bawanju-a rokko gai, kallo kida kawuɍi kǝjiyedǝa diyena.
2.23: Adǝma nangaro, awo wua suwandidǝa rukkiyama, tia nayiro juwanjagakkiro tǝmakkǝna.
2.24: Wu ye Kǝmalan tǝmakkǝna tussǝnnin nandoro waldǝkke isǝkki.
2.25: Amma Abaratus kǝramini, ti duwon sawani kidaye ye, mǝlduye ye, koro kǝngayamndo curo mǝraduniyen bana kudomadǝa nayiro kalaktuwuro ngǝlaro kirukko.
2.26: Nayia jaumaro kuroro cǝraana, ti dondi fannuwwadǝro hangalnju caa cijǝna.
2.27: Ngaima jaumaro dondijǝna, har nui gairo. Amma Ala tia njunoyeno, ti runjuma gǝni, wun kundenno, bare karwukuttaniro kuttu tǝrganniro.
2.28: Daji jǝktǝgǝkke tia nayiro kalanngeyerakko, kuronjuro karwundo jauro kǝjijo, wu ye bare karwukutta ngǝwu dikkǝniro.
2.29: Adǝma nangaro Kǝmalan tia karwu kǝjiaro mowowo, am ti gairo daraja yowo,
2.30: kida Almasiwuye nangaro karmo karǝnjǝna, koro bana nayi wuro ranguwe sukkuduwwidǝa sukkudoro ronju kilado.

3.1: Daryerambo, kǝramiyani, Kǝma nangaro karwundo kǝjijo! Awo calan nayiro ruwunjagakkǝnadǝa waldǝme ruwuduwudǝ wuro kurwowu gǝni, koro nayi yero faidaa.
3.2: Kǝriyasoro hangal gǝnanowo, tayi kidawu diwiso ye, tiyi kamdawuso yedǝro hangal gǝnanowo!
3.3: Andima am kajaada jireyedǝ wo, andi duwon Alaa Ruhunjuyen yungoriye ye, Isa Almasiwulan awulo buiye ye, koro hal tiyiyero njutkǝiyewawo yedǝ.
3.4: Adǝ yaye wu ye dalilni hal tiyiyero njuttuwuye mbeji. Kam laa dalilnjuaa, wu tia kokkǝna:
3.5: Tambǝkkǝnaye kawu wuskua wua kajasera, wu Israyilama jiɍi Biliyaminuye yaudi kaduwu yaudiyaye, kanji Attaurayen Farisa,
3.6: kanji kowoɍiyen jama Isaa gawua basarduma, kanji jireyen shara Alaye taldu bawoaro gama.
3.7: Amma awo wuro burwon fandidǝ, kǝrma awo ania Almasiwu nangaro asarro ngokkǝna.
3.8: Aaa, Kǝmani Isa Almasiwua noduye darajanjudǝ awi yayea kojǝna nangaro, awo sammaa asarro ngokkǝna. Ai, ti nangaro awi yayea fuddǝkke tayia bowu fatto ngokkǝna, wu ye Almasiwua fandǝkkoro,
3.9: ti ye wua suwandoro. Wudǝ wada Attauraye galan gǝni, Almasiwua mersadulan jiremaro walyekko, nanjire duwon kambǝrseyen na Alayen isidǝ.
3.10: Almasiwu-a kǝnduwo karmolan cidunjuye-aa nodu raakko, koro curo bonenju njayen tiro kǝldǝgǝkkiya, raakko, karmonjulan ti gairo wallǝkko,
3.11: jiɍi fin yaye wu ye karmolan cidudǝa fandǝkkoro. Fuwuro ga
3.12: Adǝa har fandǝkkǝna bi kalkal diomaro wallǝkkǝna gǝni wullǝkki, amma Isa Almasiwu wua tai daje sǝdana nangaro, wu ye awodǝa taro kowoɍi dikki.
3.13: Kǝramiya, tia har takkǝnaro tǝmakkǝni, amma awo fal dikki, awo ngawoyedǝa cǝpkǝkke awo fuwuyedǝa ngǝnǝptǝkke makki.
3.14: Ngainin lada duwon Ala Isa Almasiwuyen samelan fandoro bowosanadǝa fandǝkkoro mǝldǝkki.
3.15: Adǝ nangaro, andi samma kambǝrseyen rashiduwadǝ, kuronde tilojo. Kǝla awo laayen kuro gade tawwaa, Ala awo adǝ yea nayiro fǝlenjagai.
3.16: Ai, awo nayiyenadǝn fuwuro gaiyo!
3.17: Kǝramiya, misalni gawuro wallowo, koro am duwon ngai dasayidǝa ruiwo, jiɍi misal fǝlenjagaiyenadǝ gai.
3.18: Calan ngǝwuro nayiro wulnjagakkǝnadǝ gai, kǝrma ye simmin simaloaro wulnjagakki, am kada kǝlado kǝska karmoye Almasiwuyero waljana mbeji.
3.19: Njeroramnja siduwu, alanja ye curonja, darajanja ye curo nangubawonjayen, koro hangalnja ye kǝla awo duniayen kǝrga.
3.20: Amma andidǝ am sameye, gangadaaro nadǝn kǝnde Njǝkkayimayea gureniye, tima Kǝma Isa Almasiwudǝ wo.
3.21: Kǝla kǝnduwo duwon tilan awi yayea fǝrdunjuro cakkidǝyeman tiyinde lawudǝa alama tiyinju darajaa-a camunno cǝdi.

4.1: To, kǝramiyani njaraakkǝna koro kurondo raakkǝnaso, nayima karwukǝjini ye, darajani ye wo. Kǝrawowuni, Kǝmalan dunoaro danowo! Gala daryeye
4.2: Ya Afodiya-a Ya Sinti-aa lowonǝkkǝna, Kǝma nangaro hangalnja tilojo.
4.3: Aaa, sawani kidaye jireye, ni yea njuworǝkki, kamu yindi aniro banagǝne. Tayidǝ wu-a Kǝlemana-a sawawani kidaye gapcana cunja curo kitawu royen ruwuwadadǝ-a kallo kida kawuɍi kǝjiyelan ngǝnǝptana.
4.4: Sawi yaye Kǝmanden karwundo kǝjijo! Koro wallǝkke wulnjagakki, karwundo kǝjijo!
4.5: Wundu yayero halngǝlando fǝleduwo, Kǝmadǝye kǝndenju karǝnjǝna.
4.6: Bare kǝla awiyeman hangalndo cijǝnni, amma curo awo fiyen yaye moduwa-a lowo-alan wusedun kundenno Alaro korondo isanogǝnowo!
4.7: Daji nanlewa Alaye nodu fi yayea kojǝnadǝ karwundo-a hangalndo-aa Isa Almasiwulan roji.
4.8: Daryerambo, kǝramiya, awo jire so, awo darajaa so, awo kalkal so, awo tayir so, awo kǝrawoye so, awo kasatturo candǝna so, awo laa ngǝla bi njungoroye mennaa, awo ania tangowo!
4.9: Awo wulan ɍiwwa ye, fanduwwa ye, fannuwwa ye, ruwwa ye sammaa dewo, daji Ala nanlewaye dawundon dǝgai. Bulusse Filibiwua wusedu
4.10: Koro walduwe kǝrawondo wuro fǝlesuwwadǝro Kǝmalan jauro karwuni kǝjijǝna. Ai, niadǝa caman tawwa, amma dama tia fǝleduye fanduwwi.
4.11: Mǝraduni gǝni nangaro adǝa wullǝkki, awoa lamar curon dǝgakkǝna fi yayen kǝlan dadu ɍikkǝna.
4.12: Curo lambiyen dǝga ye nokkǝna, curo larasuyen dǝga ye nokkǝna. Lamar fi yayen kǝlan dadu ɍikkǝna, curo kǝnayen bi kulduyen, curo larasuyen bi lambiyen,
4.13: Almasiwu duno sidǝyen awo sammaa rangǝkke dikki.
4.14: Adǝ yaye, jǝktuniro mukko yakkuwwadǝ, awo ngǝla diwwa.
4.15: Nayi Filibiwuso, nonuwwadǝ gai, kawuɍi kǝji fannuwwadǝye badiduramnjun, sa duwon lardu Makidoniyayea kollǝkkǝnadǝ, nayi rundo gǝnia, jama Isaa gawuye falma wuro kǝldǝgǝne lamar njo-a mowo-ayero mukko cakkǝnni.
4.16: Bǝrni Tasalonikayelan dǝgakkǝnaman, falla kojǝnaro awo mǝraduni galduye juwasuwwa.
4.17: Kǝnjo nandon mowokkoro gǝni, riwa awo diwwadǝyen fandoworo makki.
4.18: Ai, awo sammaa fandǝkkǝna, har adǝmaa kojǝnaro tǝn kullǝkkǝna. Kǝnjo mukko Abaratussen siwwadǝa mowokkǝna. Tayidǝ kawudi kala kǝjia, sadaa duwon Ala kasacci ye, ardiji yedǝ.
4.19: Koro Alani mǝradundo nga yea kǝla arsiyinju darajaa Isa Almasiwuyen galji.
4.20: Ala Bawandero har abada abadinno daraja tio! Amin. Lewa daryeye
4.21: Muminna Isa Almasiwuye sammaa lewanowo! Kǝramiya wu-a rokkodǝ lewanjai.
4.22: Muminna samma lewanjai, masammanno tayi fado Kaisarren dasaanadǝ.
4.23: Ser Kǝma Isa Almasiwuye nayilan dǝga!

1.1: Wuma Bulus rawo Alayen kǝngayam Isa Almasiwuye-a Timoti kǝraminde-adǝ
1.2: kǝramiya mumin-a amanna-a Almasiwulan bǝrni Kolosiyen dasaanasodǝro: Ala Bawande nayiro ser-a nanlewa-a njado! Alaa wusedu
1.3: Nayiro moduwa njaddiyeya, sawi yaye Ala Bawa Kǝmande Isa Almasiwuyedǝa wuseniye,
1.4: tǝn mana kǝla Isa Almasiwulan mǝrsadundo-a muminna sammaa kǝrawondo-ayen fanniyenadǝn,
1.5: tǝma samelan nayi nangaro gǝnaadadǝro. Tǝma adǝye lawarnju curo mana jireye kawuɍi kǝjidǝyen fangew,
1.6: kawuɍi duwon nayiro isǝnadǝ. Adǝgainin kawuɍi kǝjidǝ ɍije nema cakke dunia ngaro tatardiyi, nando yen gai tǝn yim fannuwe jiremaro ser Alayedǝa asunuwwadǝn.
1.7: Abafaras sawande kidaye rayiyenadǝman adǝa kiɍiw, tidǝ curondon kidama amanna Almasiwuye,
1.8: koro andiro kǝla kǝrawondo Ruhulan isǝnayen wulseyera. Kaala-a kida-a Almasiwuye
1.9: Adǝma nangaro, andi ye tǝn yim fanniyenadǝn, ngaltema nayiro moduwa njǝddo kolliyende. Ala nayiro nanrashidu-a nodu-a Ruhunjuye sammalan rawonju jauro isanonjaaro koriye,
1.10: ngainin kǝndǝgai fuwu Kǝmandeyen jussǝna ye, ardijǝna ye diwi, koro kǝndo ngǝla samman nema yakkuwe Alaa nodulan fuwu buwi.
1.11: Ala kǝla kǝnduwonju darajaayen duno njado, kanadi-a nettu dama bawo-aa fandoworo. Karwu kǝjialan
1.12: Bawadǝa wusenowo, tima nayiro muminna-a rokko nuwando warasaye curo kǝrmainju nurrayen njadǝnadǝ wo.
1.13: Andia kǝnduwo duwuyen samoye curo kǝrmai Tadanju jauro cǝraanayero sasakko,
1.14: Tadanjudǝyen merusane biwuwande gawuryeno.
1.15: Almasiwudǝ Ala turuiwawomaye camunonju kalkal, tada karuye, awo alaktǝna samman tima fuwuma wo.
1.16: Tilan Ala awo sammaa alakkeno, awo sameye-a cidiye-a, awo turui-a turuiwawo-a, kuris kǝrmaiye so, raktu so, fuwuwu so, kǝnduwowu so, Ala awo sammaa tiyen koro ti nangaro alakkeno.
1.17: Awi yayero burwonno ti mbeji, koro tilaman awi yaye dǝga.
1.18: Tidǝ kǝla tiyidǝye, wotte jama Alaye. Tima badiduramdǝ, tada karuye, burwoye karmolan cijǝnadǝ wo, ngainin awin yaye tima fuwuma wo.
1.19: Awoa Ala halnju tilan kek cǝmbǝɍoro karwunju kǝjije
1.20: koro tiyen awo sammaa kǝlanjuro solojuworo karwunju kǝjijǝna, awowa cidiye yen kal, sameye yen kal, bunju kǝskalan fidǝnadǝyen nanlewa awi yayero kikkudo.
1.21: Nayidǝ kuren Alan kuruwun, koro karwundon kǝladonju, kǝndo diwi diowu nangaro,
1.22: amma kǝrma tiyilan nayia karmonjuyen kǝlanjuro soloyeyeno, nayia tayir ye, awo waada bawoa ye, koro saɍiwu bawoa yelan fuwunjun saduwuro.
1.23: Adǝ yaye kambǝrsendo ronowo, dunoaro tilan danowo, bare tǝma kawuɍi kǝji fannuwwadǝyedǝa kolluwwi. Kawuɍi kǝji adǝ dunia ngaro wuldǝgǝna, koro tiyeman wu Bulus kidamaro walyekko. Bulus kidama jama Isaa gawuye
1.24: Kǝla bone nayi nangaro yakkidǝyen karwuni kǝjijǝna, koro tiyi Almasiwuye, wotte jama tia gawudǝ nangaro awo curo basari Almasiwuyen maujǝnadǝa tiyinilan tumogǝkki.
1.25: Kǝla wada Ala wuro sinadǝyen kidama jama Almasiwua gawudǝyero walyekko, mana Alaye nayiro cotto isanonjagakkoro,
1.26: wotte asǝr tǝn kuren adamgǝnaro gǝraaada duwon, kǝrma muminnanjuro fǝledǝgǝnadǝ.
1.27: Tayiro Ala dawu kǝrdiyayen arsiyi darajaa asǝr adǝyea isanoduwu cǝraana, tima Almasiwu karwundon, tǝma darajayedǝ wo.
1.28: Timaa mawoniye, wundu yayea hal tǝrǝm Almasiwuyealan saduwuro tayiro sǝmo kasta-a alamdu-a curo nanrashidu sammayen yiddiye.
1.29: Adǝa dioro, kǝla kǝnduwonju wulan dunoajidǝyen mǝldǝkke ngǝnǝptǝkki.

2.1: Jiɍi jauro nayi-a am bǝrni Lawudikiyaye-a am ngaltema turuiyende-aro mǝldǝkkidǝro nonuwiya, raakko.
2.2: Mǝldunidǝ karwunja duno cuwando, kǝlanja ye curo kǝrawoyen kǝlja, koro arsiyi tǝrǝm nodu tabbatte yea najaaro, ngainin asǝr Alaye asujai, wotte Almasiwu,
2.3: tilan arsiyi nanrashiduye-a nodu Alaye-a samma gǝraadadǝ.
2.4: Adǝa wuldunidǝ bare wunduma nayia mana kǝjin jambanjanniro.
2.5: Wudǝ tiyilan nandon gǝni yaye, karwulan nayi-a rokko, naptundo sawiyada ye, Almasiwua gandon ngǝlaro danuwwa yedǝa rukke karwuni kǝjijǝna. Kǝndǝgai bǝɍin Almasiwulan
2.6: Adǝ nangaro, Kǝmande Isa Almasiwua kasadduwwadǝ, tilan dǝgaiwo,
2.7: nayiro alamnjaanadǝ gai, tilan fǝrdundo gǝnanowo dunoadǝnowo, karwundo curo kambǝrseyen kibbajo, koro jauro Alaa wusenowo.
2.8: Hangal gǝnanowo, bare wunduma kǝla ada ambe so, kǝnduwowa dunia adǝye soyen nayia nanrashidu adamgǝnaye-a mana bowuye-alan jambanjanni, koro adǝ kǝla Almasiwuyen gǝni.
2.9: Awoa naptu Alaye nga tiyi Almasiwuyen kǝrga,
2.10: koro ti Almasiwudǝ nayia cappo njasambǝɍǝna, tima fuwuma kǝla kǝrmai so, kǝnduwo so sammayedǝ wo.
2.11: Tilan nayi yea kajanjana, kaja mukko kamben gǝni, kaja Almasiwuyen halnde biwuyea cuttuluwilan tǝdǝna.
2.12: Kasalalan ti-a rokko nayia sittǝrangera, koro ti-a rokko roaro ciyew, kǝnduwo Alaye tia karmolan cǝsangǝnadǝa mǝrsanuwwa nangaro.
2.13: Nayi biwuwa-a kajanambu tiyindoye-a nangaro nuwwadǝ, Ala nayia ti-a rokko roaro kalannjane biwuwande sammaa gawuryeno.
2.14: Kakkadu kasuye wadawanju-a kallo andia wasanadǝa cinje kǝska karmoyero jajiye baworo kido.
2.15: Ngainin fuwuwudǝ-a kǝnduwowadǝ-aa ɍinje nangu fanjane kǝskadǝlan kǝlanjan kǝnnasar kiwando.
2.16: Adǝ nangaro bare wunduma nayia kǝla awo buwi so, yawi so, bi lamar ngǝmǝriye, bi kǝndawu bǝɍinmi, bi yim tustuyen sharanjanni.
2.17: Awo ani kaudi awowa fuwun isaidǝye bas, amma jiredǝ tima Almasiwudǝ wo.
2.18: Bare am duwon rokuranambu kattuwuye jagaima so, malaiyawaro ambǝccagaima so, kuronja wuwuljaima so, hangalnja adamgǝnaye faida bawoa carayima sodǝ mukowando cattuluwunni.
2.19: Tayidǝ Almasiwu fuwuma tiyiyedǝro kǝldagane dasaanni. Tilan tiyi sǝramdǝ jarnju-a kuwunju-ayen ngǝlaro kǝldi, koro Ala tia cakke wuraji.
2.20: Almasiwu-a rokko kǝnduwowa dunia adǝyero nuwwadǝ, awiro gǝle dunia adǝn dǝgawi gairo wadanju gawidǝ?
2.22: Wada ani samma awowa faidadane faccagaidǝa wuja, tayidǝ wada-a alamdu-a kambe.
2.23: Jiremaro wada ani adin kambe so, rokuranambu so, tiyiro jaulan kistuwu solan alamanja nanrashiduyea, amma faidanja mǝradu tiyiye daptuwuye sulat bawo.

3.1: Adǝ nangaro, Almasiwu-a rokko cinuwwadǝ, awowa sameye na Almasiwu kǝmboram Alayen napcǝnadǝa manowo!
3.2: Awowa dunia adǝyero gǝni, awowa sameyero karwu yakkowo.
3.3: Awoa nuwwa, koro rondo ye Almasiwu-a rokko na Alayen gǝraada.
3.4: Sa Almasiwu tima rondo jireyedǝ fǝlediyiya, daji nayi ye darajaalan ti-a rokko fǝleduwi.
3.5: Adǝ nangaro hal dunia adǝye nayin dǝgana sammaa yejowo: kǝnjǝna so, tayirnambu so, mangar diwi so, niadiwi so, arsiyi luwaptu, wotte sǝnǝm ga so.
3.6: Awo ani nangaro gǝrgadu Alaye ganambuwua cuwandi,
3.7: koro nayi ye kǝndǝgai jiɍi adǝgai calan sa curonjan dǝgawwadǝn kiduw.
3.8: Amma kǝrma nayi gǝrgadu so, hangalsango so, awo diwi so, radu so, manakuttu cindoye so sammaa wanowo.
3.9: Bare kamandoro kattuwu kamgǝwwi, dalilnjudǝ kǝndǝgaindo cayedǝa kǝndonjun kundenno wanuwe
3.10: kǝndǝgai bǝɍindǝa lunuwwa, naptu duwon nodulan kǝla camuno Alaktumanjuyen bǝɍinno waljidǝ.
3.11: Almasiwulan yaudi bi yaudi gǝni bawo, kajaada bi jǝmbǝlǝm bawo, sikudo so, kam kǝla kadǝnni so, kaɍea so, kambe so bawo, amma Almasiwudǝ tima awi yaye, koro awin yaye wo.
3.12: Adǝ nangaro, nayi duwon am mumin-a njaraana-a Ala kǝrenjanadǝ, kanjimaɍi so, nanngǝla so, rokuranambu so, nanlewa so, kanadi so lunowo.
3.13: Wundundo yaye kamanjuro necco. Kam laa sonju kǝla kamanjuyen cǝdanaa, gawurjo. Kǝmande nayia gawurnjanadǝ gai, nayi ye ngai dewo.
3.14: Kǝla awo ani sammayen kǝrawo lunowo, tima tayi sammaa kalkallo kǝljo.
3.15: Ala nayi yea tiyi falnin nanlewaro bowonjanadǝ gai, nanlewa Almasiwuye karwundoa cunodo. Koro sawi yaye Alaa wusenowo.
3.16: Mana Almasiwuye curo karwundoyen ngǝwuro dǝga. Wundu yaye nanrashidu samman kamanjua alamjo, sǝmonju kasso. Jawura so, aiya so, njungoro Ruhuye so karwundon serraro Alaro yegǝnowo.
3.17: Awi diwi yaye, manan bi kǝndon, awo sammaa cu Kǝmande Isayen dewo, tiyen Ala Bawadǝa wusenowo. Kǝndǝgai bǝɍin muminnaye
3.18: Kamuwa, kwawandoa gaiwo, fuwu Kǝmandeyen jussǝnadǝ gai.
3.19: Kwawa, kamuwandoa rawowo, bare tayiro nanjau fǝlegǝwwi.
3.20: Yalla, awin yaye mana bawando-a yando-aa gaiwo, adǝma awo Kǝmande ardijǝnadǝ wo.
3.21: Bawawa, bare hangal tadawandoye sanguwwi, bare karwunja bannadǝnniro.
3.22: Kaɍeawa, awo samman kǝmawando dunia adǝyea gaiwo, sa njarui runjun nayia njarawo nangaro gǝni, amma karwu tiloan Kǝmandea riduaro dewo.
3.23: Kida fi diwi yaye, ambo gǝni, Kǝmande gairo karwu ngǝlan dewo.
3.24: Nonowo, mukko Kǝmandeyen warasadǝa mukowaro fanduwi, Almasiwu Kǝmadǝmaro kida yidduwi nangaro.
3.25: Awoa kam diwi cǝdimadǝ, tiro nandiwinjudǝa kalakciyi, koro Ala amba gayirjiwawo.

4.1: Kǝmawa, kaɍeawandoa jawal kalkal jireyen taiwo, nayi ye Kǝma samelan tawwadǝa tangowo. Gala daryeye
4.2: Moduwalan neddowo, tilan Alaa wusenuwiaro faadaro dǝgaiwo.
