4.3: Koro andi yero moduwa saddowo, Ala kawuɍinju nangaro andiro cinna kasaa, asǝr Almasiwuye wulliyo, asǝr duwon ti nangaro koson dǝgakkǝnadǝ,
4.4: jiɍi wajimsǝgǝnadǝ gairo tia isanogǝkkoro.
4.5: Dawu am Isaa gawu gǝniyen kǝndǝgai nanrashiduye dewo, dama fanduwwa fin yaye faidadǝnowo.
4.6: Manando sawi yaye serraro waljo, alama kǝmbo mandanjua gai, jaawu jussǝna kam fi yayero njoro nonoworo. Lewa daryeye
4.7: Tikikus, kǝraminde jauro rayiyena ye, kidama Kǝmandeye amanna ye, sawande kidaye yedǝ lawar wua wusǝna sammaa nayiro njadi.
4.8: Adǝma nangaro nayiro naptunde wulnjaa, karwundoro duno coro tia juwanjagakkǝna.
4.9: Koro Onesim, kǝraminde amanna ye, jauro rayiyena ye, amndoye faldǝ ye tia cadduwi. Awo na adǝn wakkaji sammaa wulnjagai.
4.10: Aristarkus sawani kosoyedǝ nayia lewanjai. Markus awanrawagǝna Barnabassedǝ ye lewanjai, kam caman kǝlanjun nayiro mananjaanadǝ, nandoro isia, tia ngǝlaro kapkǝnowo.
4.11: Isa kam tiro Justus canidǝ ye lewanjai. Curo yaudiya Isaa gawuro waljanayen tayi runjama sawawani kida nodo bargaa Alaye wo, koro roni isabojaana.
4.12: Abafaras, kamndo fal, kidama Isa Almasiwuyedǝ, lewanjai. Sawi yaye moduwanjun nayi nangaro mǝldi, rawo Alaye samman dunoaro kalkallo danoworo.
4.13: Awoa nayi-a am bǝrni Lawudikiyaye-a Hirafolisse-a nangaro ngǝnǝptiro tia shedanǝkki.
4.14: Luka lowotor rayiyenadǝ lewanjai, Dimas ye ngai.
4.15: Kǝramiya Lawudikiyalan dasaanadǝa lewanowo, Ya Nimfa-a jama Isaa gawu fannjun captaidǝ-aa lewanowo.
4.16: Wotiya adǝa dawundon kǝrajaiya, yakkowo dawu jama Isaa gawu Lawudikiyaye yen kǝraja, koro nayi ye wotiya Lawudikiyayedǝa dawundon kǝranowo.
4.17: Akifus yero: «Kida Kǝmande njinadǝro hangal gǝnane tumogǝne!» wulgǝnowo.
4.18: Wuma Bulus lewa adǝa mukkonilan ruwuyekko. Wu koson dǝgakkǝnadǝa tansowo. Ser Alaye nayilan dǝga!

1.1: Andima Bulus-a Silas-a Timoti-adǝ jama Ala Bawadǝ-a Kǝma Isa Almasiwudǝ-aye bǝrni Tasalonikayen dasaanasodǝro: Ser-a nanlewa-a nayilan dǝga! Alaa wusedu
1.2: Sawi yaye nayi samma nangaro Alaa wuseniye, koro curo moduwandeyen kǝla nayiyen Alaa koriye.
1.3: Adǝgaima dadu baworo fuwu Ala Bawandeyen kidando kambǝrseye-a ngǝnǝptundo kǝrawoye-a Kǝmande Isa Almasiwulan tǝmando dama bawoa-a tangiye.
1.4: Kǝramiya Ala jauro njaraanaso, tima nayia kǝrenjaro noniyena,
1.5: dalilnjudǝ kawuɍinde kǝji mana ciye runjun gǝni, kǝnduwo-a Ruhu Alaye-a tartip-an nandoro isǝna nangaro, jiɍi kǝndǝgai dawundon nayi nangaro diyenadǝa nonuwwadǝ gai.
1.6: Nayi ye halnde-a hal Kǝmaye-aa gawuro walyew, bone kada jauro yawwa yaye, karwukǝji Ruhu Alayen tuwandǝnadǝn kawuɍidǝa mukko yindin kimowuw.
1.7: Adǝ nangaro jama Isaa gawu lardu Makidoniya-a Akaya-ayen dasaana sammaro misallo walyew.
1.8: Adǝgaima mana Kǝmaye nandoyen tatardǝna, lardu Makidoniya-a Akaya-aye runjaro gǝni, ndaran yaye Alalan kambǝrsendo nowadaro walje, har mǝradunde awo laa wulduye baworo walyeno.
1.9: Tayi kǝlanja lawar kǝlanden jiɍi nandon samowuwwadǝa wuljai, jiɍi nayi gumkiya ga kolluwe jawal Alayero ngawuwe wolodiya Ala Kǝndǝgaima-a Jirema-ayero walluwwa,
1.10: koro Tadanju Isaye kǝndenju samelan gurenuwidǝa wuljai, ti duwon Ala tia karmolan cǝsangǝna andia ajawu Alaye isidǝro samoyidǝ.

2.1: Kǝramiya, nayi kǝlando kǝndende nandoro bowuro waljǝnniro nonuwwa.
2.2: Calan bǝrni Filibiyen bone yaiye jauro kuttu andiro fǝlesaana yaye, nonuwwadǝ gai, Ala banasagane ridu bawoaro tagaɍiɍi ngǝwu sasakkǝnason kawuɍinju kǝji nayiro wulngeyeraiye.
2.3: Awoa galgaldandedǝ awo laa yeskada, bi tayirnambu, bi jambayen isǝnni,
2.4: amma Ala mǝrsasane mukkondero kida kawuɍi kǝji wulduye cakkǝnadǝ gai, ardiya kambe gǝni, ardiya Alaye madaro wulliye, ti duwon karwunde jarapcidǝ.
2.5: Nonuwwadǝ gai, ngaltema mana jajaktuyen bi awo mangarduyen nandoro isiyende, Aladǝ tima sheda wo.
2.6: Daraja na amben maniyende, bi nandon, bi na am gadeyen.
2.7: Andi kǝngayamba Almasiwuyedǝ, kǝnduwo adǝ nanden mbeji, amma cuju adǝyero dawundon rokura bawoaro walliyena. Jiɍi ya tadawanju cǝɍiwidǝ gai,
2.8: nayiro kisngeyeraiye. Aaa, nayia jaumaro njarayiyena nangaro, nayiro kawuɍi kǝji Alaye runju gǝni, har rondema njadiyeya, rayiyena.
2.9: Kǝramiya, kidande-a ngǝnǝptunde-aa labudda tanguwi: Kawuɍi kǝji Alaye nayiro wulnjagaiye duwon, bune-a kausu-aro kida kidiye bare wundundomaro kurwowu gǝnagǝiyendero.
2.10: Nayidǝ shedawu, Ala ye ngai, nantayir-a jire-a taldu bawo-aro dawu nayi Isaa gawuyen kǝndǝgai diyena.
2.11: Nonuwwadǝ gai, jiɍi bawa tadawanjuro kissiyidǝ gai,
2.12: andi ye wundundo yayea lowoniye karwundoro duno yiye, koro ɍindaniye kǝndǝgai fuwu Alayen jussǝna dewo yeiye, ti duwon nayia nodonju bargaa-a darajanju-aro ngaworo bowonjanadǝ. Mana Alaye mowo-a wadu-a
2.13: Adǝma nangaro dadu baworo Alaa wuseniye, sa mana Alaye wulnjagaiyenadǝa mowuwwadǝn, tia mana kambe gai gǝni, mana Alaye gai kimowuw: Tima jiremaro mana Alayedǝ wo, koro curo karwu nayi Isaa gawuyen kidanju cǝdi.
2.14: Nayidǝ, kǝramiya, jama Alaye Isa Almasiwua gawu cidi Yahudiyayen dasaanadǝ gairo walyew, dalilnjudǝ kuttu duwon tayi na yaudiyayen casanadǝa nayi ye mukko amndoyen yawwa.
2.15: Tayi yaudiya Kǝma Isa-a nawiya-aa ceyesǝnadǝ andi yea jauro basarsera. Awo Ala cǝraanaa cadiwawo, kǝladowa am sammaye.
2.16: Kǝrdiyaro njǝkkawo cawandoro mana yiddiyedǝa andiro damsagai. Adǝ nangaro, biwuwanja dama baworo na kojǝnaro cadi duwon, daryerambo Ala tayiro ajawunju fǝleyeyeno. Bulus jama bǝrni Tasalonikayea kuroro mǝradunjua
2.17: Andidǝ, kǝramiya, kawu ganaro karwulan gǝni, tiyilan nayi-a faidiyena. Turuiyewawo yaye, mǝradu jaumaro sadane sim-a sim-alan nayia kuroro kirayiye.
2.18: Nandoro kǝnsioro kirayiye, wu Bulusdǝ falla kojǝnaro kǝnsioro ciyekko, amma Yiwulis andiro damseyera.
2.19: Yim Kǝma Isa walde isiya, awi gǝle fuwunjun tǝmande-a karwukǝjinde-a awonde awulo boye-a wo? Nayima, gǝna?
2.20: Aaa, nayima darajande ye, karwukǝjinde ye wo!

3.1: Adǝma nangaro, kanadiniyewaworo walyenniya, runde bǝrni Atinayen napturo ngǝlaro ruiye
3.2: nayiro kambǝrsendon duno-a kowoɍi-a njoro Timoti ti duwon kǝraminde ye, kidama Alaye andi-a rokko kawuɍi kǝji Almasiwuye wulji yedǝa nandoro juwagǝiye,
3.3: bare wundundoma basari ani nangaro hangalnju cijǝnniro. Ai, nayi kǝlando Ala andia awo aniro kadarsaanaro nonuwwa.
3.4: Andi nayi-a rokko duwon, nayiro burwoman bone ani andia sawandidǝa wulngeyeraiye. Ngaima wakkayeno, nonuwwadǝ gai.
3.5: Adǝma nangaro, kanadinǝkkiwaworo walyenniya, Timotia nandoro lawar kǝla kambǝrsendoyen fanduro juwayeyekko, bare Jaraptumadǝ nanga laan nayia jaramnjane ngǝnǝptundedǝ bowuro waljǝnniro. Timotiye Bulusso lawar kudo
3.6: Amma Timoti nandon kǝrma nandero ise lawar kǝji kǝla kambǝrsendo-a kǝrawondo-ayen kiwudo. Koro andiro sawiso karwu kǝjiaro tansawe andia kuroro raawwa yeno, andi ye nayia kuroro rayiyenadǝ gai.
3.7: Adǝma nangaro, kǝramiya, curo kuttunde-a basarinde-ayen kambǝrsendodǝ cakke karwunde duno kiwando.
3.8: Kǝrma nangadembo dǝgaiye, Kǝmalan dunoaro danuwi nangaro.
3.9: Karwukǝjinde dama bawo fuwu Alayen kǝlandon fanniyedǝ, ndayin gǝle Alaa wuseniye?
3.10: Bune-a kausu-aro dama baworo moduwa diye, nayia sim-a sim-alan njaruiyo awo kambǝrsendon maujǝnadǝa yirgaiyoro.
3.11: Ala Bawande kǝlanju-a Kǝmande Isa-a jawal nandoro kǝnsioye andiro fǝlesaa!
3.12: Kǝmande cakko kǝrawondo kattendo yen, am samma yero ngǝwuro tǝrga, jiɍi kǝrawonde ye nayi nangaro ngǝwuro tǝrgaanadǝ gai.
3.13: Karwundo yea cakko yim Kǝma Isa muminnanju samma-a rokko walde isiya, fuwu Ala Bawandeyen tayir-a biwu bawo-aro waljo! Amin.

4.1: Daryerambo, kǝramiya, nayiro jiɍi ardiya Alaye madaro kǝndǝgai diwidǝa alamngeyeraiye, koro ngai diwi. Kǝrma nayia njaworiye, Kǝma Isa nangaro lowonjaiye, cayemaa kojǝnaro dewo!
4.2: Awoa wada nayiro Kǝma Isayen njadiyenadǝa nonuwwa.
4.3: Awo Ala cǝraanadǝ, tima tayirro waldundo wo. Adǝ nangaro kǝnjǝna dio kollowo.
4.4: Wundundo yaye nantayir-a daraja-alan tiyinju ɍiwo nojo,
4.5: mangar diwilan gǝni, kǝrdiya duwon Alaa nojannidǝ gai.
4.6: Bare wunduma kǝraminjua kǝla awo adǝyen jambajǝnni bi amannju juwunni, dalilnjudǝ Kǝmadǝ am jiɍi ania cadimaro ajawu gǝnajiyi nangaro, nayiro burwoman wulnjagaiye sǝmondo kassiyenadǝ gai.
4.7: Awoa Ala tayirnambun gǝni, nantayirnin dǝgaro andia bowosera.
4.8: Adǝma nangaro wundu duwon alamdu adǝa wajimadǝ kamba gǝni, Alaa waji, ti duwon Ruhunju nayiro njadǝnadǝ.
4.9: Kǝla kǝramiyaa rawoyen mǝradundo awo laa nayiro ruwuduwuye bawo, dalilnjudǝ Ala kǝlanju nayia kamandoa raworo alamnjana nangaro.
4.10: Kǝramiya samma lardu Makidoniya ngayea raawwa, diye! Amma kǝramiya, nayia lowonjaiye, cayemaa kojǝnaro dewo!
4.11: Nia ngonowo naptu nanlewaye manowo, awowa kaandoro kiskǝnowo, mukkondon kida dewo, nayiro wada njadiyenadǝ gai.
4.12: Ngainin fuwu am Isaa gawu gǝniyen kǝndǝgai darajaa diwi, koro wundumaro njuttǝgǝwwawo. Kǝnde Kǝma Isaye
4.13: Kǝramiya, kǝla am ro carǝmbǝnayen nonuwiya, rayiye, bare am gade tǝmanja bawodǝ gai karwundo kuttajǝnniro.
4.14: Isa nune karmolan cijǝnaro kasatkeiyea, ngainin walde isiya, Ala tayi Isaa gawu ro carǝmbǝnadǝa ti-a rokko cuwudidǝ yea kasaddiyena.
4.15: Mana Kǝmayen adǝa wulnjagaiye, andi duwon roa har kǝnde Kǝmayero dǝgaiyedǝ tayi ro carǝmbǝnadǝa burwoniyewawo.
4.16: Awoa Kǝma kǝlanju bowodu kǝnduwoye-a kowo malaiya kuraye-a nuktu kangadi Alaye-alan samelan jǝpce tayi Almasiwua gawu sanunadǝ burwon cijai,
4.17: daji andi roa dǝgaiyedǝa tayi-a rokko curo fofouyen sadane Kǝmadǝa samelan kapkǝiye. Adǝgaima sawisoro Kǝma-a rokko dǝgaiye.
4.18: Adǝ nangaro mana anin karwu kamandoyero duno yowo!

5.1: Kǝramiya, kǝla sanju-a jamannju-ayen mǝradundo awo laa nayiro ruwuduwuye bawo,
5.2: dalilnjudǝ nayi kǝlando yim Kǝmayedǝ alama barwu curo buneyen isi gai wakkajiro dam nonuwwa.
5.3: Sa amsoye: «Nanlewa-a sǝɍiwo-alan dǝgaiye!» cani duwon, daji sadǝman, alama bone kǝnjambiye kamu curoa lejidǝ gai, siduwu laa tayia cuwandi, jawal kǝlanja mowoye bawo.
5.4: Amma nayidǝ, kǝramiya, nayi curo duwuyen gǝni duwon yim adǝ barwu gai yekkinndo bawolan isidǝ,
5.5: nayi samma tadawa nurre ye, kausuye ye. Andi buneye ye gǝni, duwuye ye gǝni.
5.6: Adǝ nangaro bare kǝnǝm diyende, am gadeso cadidǝ gai, amma faadaro dǝgaiyo, dabbargadaro nammiyo!
5.7: Awoa am kǝnǝm cadisodǝ bune kǝnǝm cadi, koro am casane sagarandaisodǝ ye bune casane sagarandai.
5.8: Amma andi kausuyedǝ, dabbargadaro nammiyo, kambǝrse-a kǝrawo-aa sulwe gairo yakkiyo, tǝma njǝkkawoyea jawa suye gairo yakkiyo!
5.9: Awoa Ala andia ajawuro kadarsaganni, amma Kǝmande Isa Almasiwuyen njǝkkawo fandiyoro kadarsaana.
5.10: Tima andi nangaro no. Ngaima walde isiya, faadaro dǝgaiye yen kal, kǝnǝm diye yen kal, sawisoro ti-a rokko dǝgaiye.
5.11: Adǝma nangaro wundundo yaye karwu kamanjuyero duno co tayia dunoaro cǝdo, jiɍi diwidǝ gai. Gala daryeye
5.12: Kǝramiya, nayia njaworiye, am duwon kida dawundon cadi ye, kǝla Kǝmayen nayia njanodi ye, gala njadi yedǝro daraja yowo!
5.13: Kidanja nangaro kǝrawolan tayiro jaumaro bǝrsǝm yowo. Curondon nanlewan dǝgaiwo.
5.14: Kǝramiya, nayia lowonjaiye, sǝmo am lusur kida wajanasoyea kassowo, karwu am sakkadayero duno yowo, am duno ganaaro banagǝnowo, wundu yayero kanadiaro wallowo.
5.15: Hangal gǝnanowo bare wunduma kuttua kuttun cǝrǝmbǝnni, amma sawiso kamando-a kam gade-asoro awo ngǝladǝmaa njǝddoro manowo.
5.18: awiso yayen Alaa wusenowo, adǝma awo Ala nayiro kǝla Isa Almasiwuyen cǝraanadǝ wo nangaro.
5.21: amma awi yayea rijammowo, awo ngǝladǝa mukko yindin taiwo,
5.22: koro awo diwi fi yayea wanowo.
5.23: Ala nanlewaye kǝlanju nayia tayir sǝrambo njado, koro har kǝnde Kǝma Isa Almasiwuyero ruhundo-a rondo-a tiyindo-a samma biwu bawoaro rojo!
5.24: Ti nayia bowonjanadǝ amanna, koro adǝa cǝdi. Lewa daryeye
5.27: Fuwu Kǝmandeyen nayiro wulnjagakki, wotiya adǝa kǝramiya ngaro kǝragǝnowo.
5.28: Ser Kǝmande Isa Almasiwuye nayilan dǝga!

1.1: Andima Bulus-a Silas-a Timoti-adǝ jama Ala Bawande-a Kǝma Isa Almasiwudǝ-aye bǝrni Tasalonikayen dasaanasodǝro:
1.2: Ala Bawande-a Kǝma Isa Almasiwudǝ-a nayiro ser-a nanlewa-a njado! Alaa wusedu
1.3: Kǝramiya, sawi yaye nayi nangaro Alaa wuseduro andiro wajimsaana, jiɍi jussǝnadǝ gai, dalilnjudǝ kambǝrsendo cayemaa kojǝnaro fuwu juwui, koro kǝrawo duwon wundundo yaye kamanjuro fǝlejiyidǝ ye tǝrgai nangaro.
1.4: Adǝma nangaro andi kǝlande na jama Isaa gawu gadegadesoyen nayi nangaro kǝla nettundo-a kambǝrsendo-a curo basari so, bone so yawi sammayen awulo buiye.
1.5: Awo adǝ ye shara Alayea jirero fǝleji, ngainin kǝla awo aniyen Ala nayia martawaaro njade nodonju bargaaro ngawuwi. Jiremaro nayi ye nodonju bargaa nangaro bone yawwa.
1.6: Aladǝ jire: Am duwon nayiro kuttu fǝlenjaanadǝro kuttu fǝlejiyi,
1.7: koro nayi kuttu yawwadǝro tustu njadi, andi yero ngai. Sa Kǝma Isa samelan malaiyawanju kǝnduwoa-a rokko ise duniaro fǝlediyiya, adǝ wakkaji.
1.8: Dawu kannu cambiyen ise am Alaa nojanni-a am kawuɍi kǝji Kǝmande Isayea jaanni-aro wowom gǝnajiyi,
1.9: wowom duwon tǝmmaro ceriwawo, na Kǝmandeye-a dunonju darajaaye-an kuruwun.
1.10: Yim adǝn isiya, muminnanju tiro daraja cadi ye, dawu am kasaccanama sammayen tiro ambǝccagai ye, sheda kǝlanjun wulnjagaiyenadǝa kasadduwwa nangaro.
1.11: Adǝma nangaro sawi yaye Alandeye bowodunju mowo nayia martawaaro njadoro moduwa njaddiye, koro kǝnduwonjuyen mǝradundo galjo nayia njasakko awowa ngǝla so, kida kambǝrseye so sammaa deworo tia koriye.
1.12: Adǝgainin cu Kǝmande Isayedǝ nayilan daraja cuwandi, nayi ye tilan fanduwi, kǝla ser Alande-a Kǝma Isa Almasiwudǝ-ayen.

2.1: Kǝramiya, kǝla kǝnde Kǝmande Isa Almasiwuye-a nanjun captunde-ayen nayia njaworiye,
2.2: bare kǝla ruhu, bi mana, bi wotiya laa nanden gairo ise yim Kǝmandeyedǝ cǝdǝna canidǝyen hangalndo cijǝnni, bare karwundo ye kamdǝnni.
2.3: Bare wunduma jawal fiman nayia jambanjanni. Yimdǝ isiwawo, sai tuɍu daryeyedǝ ise Mai Tuɍuma siduwu kudomadǝ ye duniaro fǝlediyiya duwon.
2.4: Tidǝ awi duwon am tiro Ala cani bi sujada caddidǝa waje tayi sammaa kojǝnaro kǝlanju jajakci, har curo Fado Alayen napce ti kǝlanjuma Aladǝ wo cǝni.
2.5: Sa wu nayi-a rokko awo ania wulnjagakkǝnadǝa ngessuwwa wa?
2.6: To, awo kǝrma tia rojǝnadǝa nonuwwa. Sai sanju kadardǝna cǝdiya duwon, duniaro fǝlediyi.
2.7: Kǝnduwo asǝr tuɍuye adǝ kǝrma kidanju cǝdi, amma ti kǝrma tia rojǝnadǝ roji ngai duwon, har sai tia sǝnakcaiya.
2.8: Daji Mai Tuɍumadǝ duniaro fǝlediyi, ti duwon Kǝma Isa fudu cinjuyen tia sijiye daraja kǝndenjuyen tia baworo cǝdidǝ.
2.9: Mai Tuɍuma kǝla jiɍi Yiwulis kida cǝdiyen duniaro ise kǝnduwo so, alama so, awo ajabba kattuwuye so
2.10: jamba diwi jiɍi jiɍi so samma dawu am no cadisoyen faidadi, dalilnjudǝ tayi jire duwon njǝkkawo cuwudidǝa rawo wajana nangaro.
2.11: Adǝma nangaro Ala tayiro jamba kǝnduwoa laa juwajiye kattuwudǝa kasaccai,
2.12: ngainin am duwon jiredǝa kasatturo wajane awo jire gǝnidǝa jaanamaso sammaro wowom gǝnajiyi. Kambǝrsendon dunoaro danowo!
2.13: Kǝramiya Kǝma jauro njaraanaso, sawi yaye nayi nangaro Alaa wuseduro andiro wajimsaana, dalilnjudǝ Ala nayia tǝn badiduramnin njǝkkawo fandoro kǝrenjana, njǝkkawo duwon kida Ruhunju isatayirduwuye-a jire kasattuye-ayen tuwandidǝ.
2.14: Koro awo aniro daraja Kǝmande Isa Almasiwuye fandoro Ala nayia kawuɍinde kǝjiyen bowongera.
2.15: Adǝ nangaro, kǝramiya, dunoaro danowo, awo nayiro alamnjagaiyenadǝa mana ciye yen kal, wotiyandeye yen kal, ngǝlaro ronowo!
2.16: Kǝmande Isa Almasiwu kǝlanju-a Ala Bawande ti duwon sernjuyen andia saraye karwundero har abadaro duno so, tǝma ngǝla so cadǝnadǝ-a
2.17: karwundo yero duno cado kǝndo ngǝla-a mana ngǝla-a ngason nayia dunoaro njado!

3.1: Daryerambo, kǝramiya, andiro Alaa sakkorowo, mana Kǝmadǝye ndararo yaye tatarduwo daraja cuwando, jiɍi dawundo yen wakkajǝnadǝ gai,
3.2: koro Ala andia mukko kǝlado-a kam diwi-asoyen samowo, am samma gǝni kambǝrsenjaa wo nangaro.
3.3: Amma Kǝmadǝ amanna, nayiro duno njade nayia Kǝladodǝn njaɍiwi.
3.4: Wada nayiro njadiyenadǝa kǝrma ye, fuwun ye gawiro Kǝma nangaro mǝrsaniyena.
3.5: Kǝmadǝ kǝrawo Alaye-a nettu Almasiwuye-aro karwundoa simojuwo! Sǝmo kasta kǝla nanlusurren
3.6: Kǝramiya, cu Kǝmande Isa Almasiwuyen wada njadiye, kǝrami duwon lusurro walje alamdu andilan fanduwwadǝa ga wajimadǝ, jawalnjun luwowo!
3.7: Nayi kǝlando jiɍi misalnde ga wajimnjaanadǝa nonuwwa, dalilnjudǝ sa dawundon dǝgaiyenadǝn, lusurro walliyende,
3.8: bi kǝmbo wundumaye dero buiyende, amma bune-a kausu-aro ngǝnǝptiye kida diyena, bare wundundomaro kurwowuro walliyendero.
3.9: Kǝnduwo adǝa taiyende nangaro gǝni, amma nayiro misal gaye njoro awo ania kidiye.
3.10: Sa dawundon dǝgaiyenadǝman, wada adǝa nayiro ngeiye: «Kam kida wajǝnamadǝ bare kǝmbo juwunni!»
3.11: Adǝ yaye dawundon am laa lusur kida cadiwawo, amma awowa bowuye jur cadi mbeji cani fanniyena.
3.12: Am jiɍi aniro cu Kǝma Isa Almasiwuyen wada yiye, naptu nanlewayen kida cado kǝmbo kǝlanjaye jawo!
3.13: Nayidǝ, kǝramiya, bare ngǝla dioro yimbaruwwi.
3.14: Kam laa awo wotiya adǝn wulliyenadǝa jǝgaiwawoa, tiro hangaldǝnowo, nangu fanjoro jawalnjun luwowo!
3.15: Amma bare tia wadumandoro ngonuwwi, kǝramindo gai sǝmonju kassowo. Lewa daryeye
3.16: Kǝma Nanlewama kǝlanjudǝ nayiro sawi yaye jiɍi fin yaye nanlewa njado! Kǝmadǝ nayi samma-a rokko dǝga!
3.17: Wuma Bulus lewa adǝa mukkonilan ruwuyekko. Curo wotiyawani sammayen adǝma ruwuni wo, ngaiman ruwunǝkki.
3.18: Ser Kǝmande Isa Almasiwuye nayi sammalan dǝga!

1.1: Wuma Bulus kam duwon wada Ala Njǝkkayimande-a Isa Almasiwu tǝmande-ayen kǝngayambo wallǝkkǝnadǝ
1.2: Timoti curo kambǝrseyen tadani jireyedǝro: Ala Bawa-a Kǝmande Isa Almasiwu-adǝ niro ser-a kanjimaɍi-a nanlewa-a njado! Sǝmo kasta kǝla alamdu kattuwuyen
1.3: Sa lardu Makidoniyayero lekkidǝn nia njuworǝkkǝnadǝ gai, bǝrni Afisayelan namme am laaro wada ye, bare alamdu gade cadǝnni,
1.4: bi nyari bowuye so, taye kaan kaarinne dadu bawo so jaanniro. Awo ani kida Alaye kambǝrselan isidǝ yayero kambiwu bowuye cawudi.
1.5: Wada adǝye leduwuramnjudǝ tima kǝrawo duwon karwu tayir-a saɍiwu bawoa-a kambǝrse nanmǝnafǝk bawoa-alan isidǝ wo.
1.6: Am laa jawal adǝa koljane mana bowuyero ngasaana.
1.7: Malǝmba Attaurayero waldu majaison, awo manajai ye, tabbaccagai yedǝmaa nojanni.
1.8: Kam wadawa Attaurayelan ngǝlaro faidadiya, Attauradǝ awo ngǝlaro noniyena.
1.9: Adǝgaima wadadǝa jirewuro gǝni kedo, amma am diwi diowu so, tuɍuwu so, Alaa ga waduwu so, biwuwu so, tayirnambuwu so, luwaptuwu so, am bawanja-a yanja-aa njejowu so, kamceji so,
1.10: kǝnjǝnawu so, luttuwu so, kaɍeaa sawurwu so, kattuwu so, aman bowu so, am gade alamdu jireye waduwu so sammaro kedoro noniyena.
1.11: Alamdu jireye adǝ curo kawuɍi kǝji darajaa Ala bargaayen kǝrga, kawuɍi kǝji duwon Ala mukkoniro cakkǝnadǝ wo. Isaye biwuwua njǝkkawo
1.12: Kǝmande Isa Almasiwu ti duwon karwuniro duno cakkǝnadǝa wusenǝkki, dalilnjudǝ wua amannaro ngose kidamanjuro galasǝna nangaro.
1.13: Wu calan Isaa bastuma ye, gawunjua basarduma ye, koro kam jau yaye, nodunambu-a kambǝrsenambu-alan ngai dikkǝna nangaro kanjimaɍi Alaye fandǝkke,
1.14: Kǝmande sernju tǝrǝm wuro fǝlesiye, kambǝrse-a kǝrawo-a Isa Almasiwulan dasaanadǝ yea kiwandǝkko.
1.15: Mana adǝ awo mǝrsaduye ye, kibburo kasattuye ye: Isa Almasiwu duniaro biwuwua njǝkkaworo kadio, koro curonjan wuma kuradǝ wo.
1.16: Akko dalil kanjimaɍinju wuro fǝlesǝgǝnadǝ: Isa Almasiwu wu biwuma kuradǝlan kanadinju ci bawodǝa misal gairo am duwon tia fuwun kasaccane ro sawisoye cawandidǝro fǝlejiyi.
1.17: Mai Sawisoma, tǝmmaro nuiwawo ye, turuiwawo yedǝ, ti duwon Ala tilodǝro bǝrsǝm-a daraja-a har abada abadinno tio! Amin.
1.18: Timoti tadani, kǝla mana nawinawiye calan kǝlanǝmlan wuljanadǝyen wada adǝa mukkonǝmbo yakkǝkkǝna, manadǝlan mǝldu ngǝlan mǝldǝne,
1.19: karwunǝmdǝa kambǝrse-a saɍiwu bawoa-alan rone. Am laa awo ania wajane har kambǝrsenja sulat faida baworo walyeno.
1.20: Curonjan Himenayus-a Aleksanda-a mbeji. Caɍo bare gadero Alaa bassanniro tayia mukko Yiwulissero kekko.

2.1: Burwo sallammin jama samma nangaro Alaa caworo, moduwa cado, lowoja, wusejaro tayia lowokki,
2.2: koro maiya-a am kǝnduwoa samma-a nangaro Alaa caworo, naptu nanlewaye fandiyo, nanmumin-a bǝrsǝm-a sammalan dǝgaiyoro.
2.3: Adǝ ngǝla ye, fuwu Ala Njǝkkayimandeyen awo ardiduye ye,
2.4: ti duwon am samma njǝkkawo cawando, jire ye nojaro cǝraanadǝ.
2.5: Awoa Aladǝ fal, katte Ala-a am-ayen solomadǝ ye fal, kamdǝ tima Isa Almasiwudǝ wo,
2.6: ti duwon am sammaa merujoro kǝlanju cinadǝ. Adǝma sheda sanju kalkallan isǝnadǝ wo,
2.7: koro adǝma nangaro Ala wua mawoduma ye, kǝngayam yero galaseno, kattuwu gǝni, jire wullǝkki, koro kǝla kambǝrse-a jire-ayen malǝm kǝrdiyaye yero galaseno.
2.8: Adǝ nangaro ndaran yaye kongwawa mukko tayir sapkadaa gǝrgadu bi kambiwu bawoaro moduwa cadiya, raakko.
2.9: Jiɍi adǝgainin kamuwa ye kajǝmu candǝna bǝrsǝmgadaa kǝlanja caɍiwiaro luja, jawu so, kare dinarre so, mursam so, kajǝmu jauro tamanna solan gǝni,
2.10: amma kǝndo ngǝlalan, kamuwa tayi Ala ridawuro bayindanadǝ gai.
2.11: Kamudǝ curo kǝnga sammayen kǝdǝk napco alamdu kǝrǝnjo.
2.12: Kamudǝro alamdu bi kongwaa nodo amargǝkkǝni, biya gǝm napco.
2.13: Awoa Ala burwon Adamba alakkeno, daji Auwa yea alakkeno.
2.14: Koro Adamba gǝni, kamudǝmaa Yiwulis jambaje biwumaro walyeno.
2.15: Amma kambǝrse-a kǝrawo-a nantayir-alan kǝlanju cǝɍiwiaro fuwu juwuia, kǝnjambiyen njǝkkawo cuwandi.

3.1: Mana adǝ jauro kibbu: Kam laa fuwuma jama Isaa gawuyero walduro mayenoa, kida ngǝla cǝraana.
3.2: Adǝ nangaro fuwumadǝ dole tilan awo waada baworo waljo, kwa kamu falle, kǝla ɍiwoma, kam hangalla, kǝlanjuro kistuwuma, kusotto sosaduma, koro kam rakce amba alamjiro waljo.
3.3: Kǝnjama bi mukko kamboia gǝni, kam rokura bawoaro waljo, nanlewan dǝga. Bare kunguna rawomaro waljǝnni,
3.4: amma kam fannju ngǝlaro cunodi ye, yallanju mananju fanjai ye, koro tiro daraja cadi yero waljo.
3.5: Kam fannjua nodo nojǝnnidǝ, jiɍi fin gǝle jama Alayedǝro kissiyi?
3.6: Bare kamdǝ Isaa gama bǝɍinno waljǝnni. Adǝ gǝnia, rokura tia cǝdane wowom Yiwulissero ngayi.
3.7: Koro dole am Isaa gawu gǝnisoye ngǝlanju wuljairo waljo, bare diwinju wuljane kel Yiwulissero cukkurǝnni. Banama jama Isaa gawuyero walda
3.8: Jiɍi adǝgainin banawudǝ ye dole darajaaro walja, bare mana yindiaro waljanni, bi kǝnjama, bi riwa cukkowona bomaro waljanni.
3.9: Adǝgaima asǝr kambǝrseyedǝa karwu saɍiwu bawoalan roja.
3.10: Amma burwon tayia rijapca, awima waada tayilan bawoa, daji kidanja banawuye cado.
3.11: Jiɍi adǝgainin kamuwadǝ ye darajaaro walja, bare diwi am gadeye wuljanni, amma kǝlanja caɍiwo, koro awi yayen amannaro walja.
3.12: Ti banamadǝ kam kamu fallaro waljo, koro yallanju-a fannju-a ngǝlaro cunodiro waljo.
3.13: Adǝgaima tayi duwon kidanja banawuye ngǝlaro cadidǝ daraja ye cawandi, koro kambǝrsenja Isa Almasiwuyen jauro duno ye cuwandi. Asǝr nanmuminne
3.14: Tǝmani nanǝmbo tussǝnnin kǝndeye mbeji, amma awo ania niro ruwunjǝgǝkkidǝ,
3.15: duwan isǝkkǝniro walyenoa, jiɍi dole naptu am Alaye fannjuyen cadiyedǝa nonǝmi. Alaye fannjudǝ, tima jama Ala Kǝndǝgaimaye, wajila jireyedǝ wo.
3.16: Tabbat asǝr nanmuminnedǝ jauro kibbu: Ti Almasiwudǝ tiyilan bayindǝna, Ruhu Alaye ye ti jiremaro wuljǝna, malaiyawa ye tia caruna, dawu jama kǝrdiyayen tia saccana ye, dunia ngan tia kasaccana ye, koro darajaalan tia samero camowona ye.

4.1: Ruhu Alaye farakko wuljǝna, dunia daryejiya, am laa jawal kambǝrseyedǝa koljane karuwa jambamaso-a alamdu sedannasoye-a jagai.
4.2: Tayidǝ mǝnafǝkka ye, kattuwu kamdawu ye, koro karwunja dangǝrlan balodǝna gai.
4.3: Niya dio-a kǝmbo laa bo-a ambo dapcagai, kǝmbo duwon Ala kambǝrsewu jire nojanama wusejaiaro camoworo alakcǝnadǝ.
4.4: Adǝgaima awo Ala alakcǝna samma ngǝla, koro awima waduye bawo, kam Alaa wusejialan cǝmoyia,
4.5: mana Alaye-a moduwa-ayen awo samma tayirro walji nangaro. Kidama ngǝla Isa Almasiwuye
4.6: Awo ania kǝramiyadǝro isanogǝmiya, kidama ngǝla Isa Almasiwuyero wallǝmi, kidama duwon mana kambǝrseye-a alamdu jireye jǝgana-aa ngǝlaro kǝrǝnjǝnadǝ.
4.7: Nyari bowuye faida bawoa wane, kǝlanǝmba nanmuminnin alamme!
4.8: Tiyi sangodǝ faidanju ganama, amma nanmumindǝ awi yayen jauro faidaa, dalilnjudǝ kǝrmama yen kal, ro sawisoye yen kal, tabbat riwanju fandǝmi nangaro.
4.9: Mana adǝ awo mǝrsaduye ye, kibburo kasattuye ye:
4.10: Dalil ngǝnǝptundeye ye, mǝldundeye yedǝ, tima Ala Kǝndǝgaimalan tǝmandea, ti duwon Njǝkkayima am sammaye, masammanno am tia kasaccanamadǝ.
4.11: Awo aniye kǝlan wada ye, alamme!
4.12: Bare wunduma nanjaironǝm nangaro rudu fǝlenjǝgǝnni, amma am Isaa kasattuwudǝro manalan, hallan, kǝrawolan, kambǝrselan, nantayirlan misallo walle.
4.13: Kawu waldǝkke isǝkkiro, jamaro kitawu Alaye kǝraduwu-a kowoɍi njo-a alamdu-aro ngǝlaro kiskǝne.
4.14: Bare kǝnjo serre karwunǝmlan dǝganadǝa ngessǝmmi, kǝnjo duwon amwurawa nawinawi cade mukkonja kǝlanǝmbo gǝnajagane mowommadǝ.
4.15: Awo ania jauro de ngǝnǝptǝne, ngainin am samma fuwu bonǝmdǝa federo carui.
4.16: Kǝlanǝm-a alamdunǝm-aro hangal gǝnane, bare tayia kollǝmmi. Awo ania dimiya, kǝlanǝm-a am nia kǝrǝnnjaiso-aa yikkagǝmi.

5.1: Bare kiariro yikkadǝmmi, bawanǝm gai karwunjuro duno yakke, jairowa yea yanǝmgǝnaso gairo tai,
5.2: kǝmurjowa yea yanǝm gairo tai, ferowa yea nantayir sammalan yanǝmgǝnaso gairo tai.
5.4: Amma kamu kwa faccǝgǝnaa laa tadawa bi diwuwa cǝdanaa, burwo sallammin kǝla am fannjayen Ala rida caɍo tayiro kissaa, adǝ fuwu Alayen awo ardiduye.
5.5: Kamu kwa faccǝgǝnaa jiremaro banama cǝdannidǝ tǝmanju Alaro cakkǝna, koro bune-a kausu-a dadu baworo tia moduwa-a lowo-alan cuwori.
5.6: Amma kamu kwa faccǝgǝnaa duwon naptunjun kǝji fanda kǝlanjuye majimadǝ, tidǝ ronjua yaye, nuna.
5.7: Awo aniye kǝlan tayiro wada ye, bare awo waada tayilan tuwandǝnniro.
5.8: Kam laa amnjuro masammanno am fannjuyero kissiyiwawoa, kambǝrsedǝa angǝrje kam Alaa kasaccǝnnimaa nandiwin kojǝna.
5.9: Kǝla kakkadu kamuwa kwa faccaanaayedǝn cu kamu hal adǝ gaiye runju ruwune: Ti kamu kǝrwunju firakku najǝgǝna ye, kwanju roalan amannju juwunni ye,
5.10: koro amso ngǝlanju wuljai, maananjudǝ yallanjua ngǝlaro isawurajǝgǝna ye, kusottowaa sosajǝna ye, si muminnayedǝa tuljǝna ye, amsoro curo jǝktunjayen banajǝgǝna ye, koro kǝndo ngǝla jiɍi fi yayea dioro kǝlanju cakkǝna.
5.11: Amma bare kǝla kakkadu kamuwa kwa faccaanaayedǝn cu kamuwa dawu dunonjayen dasaanayedǝa ruwunǝmmi, dalilnjudǝ mangarnja diwi cijiya, Almasiwua koljane niya dio majane
5.12: amannja burwon ndǝpcanadǝa kamjana nangaro wowom Alaye tayia cǝdai.
5.13: Sa adǝ yen lawuro waljai ye, fado fadoro lejai ye. Adǝmaa kojǝnaro kalala bowuye cade awo tayia casakkǝnniro ngasayi, koro awo tayiro wulduro candǝnnidǝa wuljai.
5.14: Adǝma nangaro kamuwa duwon kwa faccaanaa dawu dunonjayen dasaanadǝ niya cade yalla casambe fannjaro ngǝlaro kissagaiya, raakko. Ngainin Kǝladodǝ dama awo laa diwi wulduye cuwandiwawo.
5.15: Curonjan laa jawallan caluwe kǝrma Yiwulissa gawuro waljana mbeji.
5.16: Kamu Isaa gama laa curo kǝramiyanjuyen kamuwa kwa faccaanaa cǝdanaa, tayia banajuwo. Bare kurwowudǝa jama Isaa gawuro koljǝgǝnni, amma jama Isaa gawudǝ kamuwa kwa faccaanaa jiremaro banama cadannidǝa banajaa. Kǝla amwurawa jama Isaa gawuyen
5.17: Amwurawa jamadǝa ngǝlaro canodidǝro daraja kawakyindi tio, masammanno tayi duwon jauro kida mawodu-a alamdu-ayero ngǝnǝptaidǝ.
5.18: Awoa kitawuye ngai wulje: «Bare dalo wastu cǝdi duwon cinjuro cambu yakkǝmmi,» koro: «Kidamaro ngǝnǝwuramnju wajipcǝgǝna,» cǝnna.
5.19: Shedawu yindi bi yakku awo fal wuljaiyen gǝnia, bare ngadar kǝla amwurawayen kasaddǝmmi.
5.20: Tayi duwon biwu cadimasodǝro fuwu jama sammayen yikkade, tayi gapcanadǝ rijaro.
5.21: Fuwu Ala-a Isa Almasiwu-a malaiyawa kǝrejǝnadǝ-ayen niro wada njikki, gayirdu baworo awo ania gai, bare awima curo kangurnoyen dimmi.
5.22: Bare gannǝme mukko kǝla ambero gǝnagǝme tayia amwurawaro galanǝmmi, bare ambo kǝldǝgǝme biwu dimmi, kǝlanǝmba nantayirnin rone.
5.23: Bare gadero ingi runju yammi, diben ye gana yai, curonǝm-a moɍimoɍinǝm-a nangaro.
5.24: Am laasoye biwunja federo fǝledane tayia na sharayero leduro burwojai, amma am laasoye biwunja ngawonja jagai.
5.25: Jiɍi adǝgainin kǝndo ngǝla ngǝla federo fǝledai, koro tayi kǝrma fǝledaiwawodǝma ye rakcane tussǝnaro gǝradaiwawo.

6.1: Kaɍeawa samma kǝmawanjaa darajaaro ngoja, bare am cu Alaye-a alamdundedǝ-a bassanniro.
6.2: Kaɍeawa duwon kǝmawanja Isaa gawudǝ bare tayi kǝramiya nangaro tayiro daraja njo koljanni, cuju adǝyero tayiro kida jauro ngǝlaro caddo, dalilnjudǝ am kidanjan riwa cawandidǝ kǝramiya kǝrawowu nangaro. Awo ania alamme, jamadǝye karwunjaro duno ye! Kǝla alamdu kattuwuye-a arsiyi jireye-ayen
6.3: Kam mana jireye Kǝmande Isa Almasiwuye-a alamdu nanmuminne-a waje alamdu gade cǝdimadǝ,
6.4: tidǝ rokurama awima asujiwawo. Mangar diwi gasiptu-a kambiwu kǝla kalmawayen dio-aye tilan kǝrga. Awo ani ye nandǝɍi so, lawala so, lanna so, saɍiwu nankǝladoye so,
6.5: koro kambiwu ceriwawo dawu jirenambuwu hangal yeskadaayero cuwudi. Am ani Alaa gadǝa jawal arsiyi dioyero ngojana.
6.6: Amma Alaa ga-a mangar bawoan naptu-adǝ, tima arsiyi kura wo.
6.7: Awoa awima duniaro kudiyende, koro awima ngoniye tuluwiyewawo.
6.8: Adǝ yaye kǝmbo-a kajǝmu-a taiyenaa, adǝma andia sadǝna.
6.9: Amma am gaɍiwuro waldu majaimasodǝ jarapta kel gai-a mangar diwi kǝla bawoa gade kada-aro casukkuri. Daji awo ani ye tayia cadane tǝgǝmbo faccagai.
6.10: Adǝgaima kunguna rawodǝ tima fǝrdu awo diwi diwi jiɍi fiye yaye wo. Am laaso mangar adǝlan jawal kambǝrseyedǝa koljane karwunjaa kuttu kadan jayera. Gala daryeye
6.11: Amma nidǝ, kam Alaye, awo ania wane, jire-a nanmumin-a kambǝrse-a kǝrawo-a nettu-a rokuranambu-a mane!
6.12: Mǝldu ngǝla kambǝrseyedǝlan mǝldǝne, ro sawisoye duwon Ala tiro bowonjǝna ye, ti nangaro fuwu shedawu ngǝwuyen sheda ngǝla dimma yedǝa ngǝlaro tai.
6.13: Fuwu Ala awi yayero ro njoma-a Isa Almasiwu Buntus Bilatusso ngǝlaro sheda cǝddǝna-ayen wada njikki,
6.14: awima waada bawo bi saɍiwu bawoaro har yim Kǝmande Isa Almasiwu fǝlediyidǝro awo adǝa rone.
6.15: Fǝleduwunjudǝ, Ala cakke sanju kalkallan wakkaji. Aladǝ ti runju tok Mai Kura bargaa wo, Mai maiyaye, koro Kǝma kǝmawaye.
6.16: Ti tilonjuma nuiwawo, curo nur laa kam fima rakce karǝnjiwawoyen kǝrga, wunduma ngalte tia curunni, koro rakce tia curuiwawo. Daraja-a kǝnduwo sawisoye-a kaanju! Amin.
6.17: Gaɍiwuwa dunia adǝyero wada ye, bare rokura cadǝnni bi arsiyi duniaye tabbat bawoaro tǝma casakkǝnni, amma Alaro tǝmanja casakko, ti duwon kǝji kǝlandeyero awisoa andiro sadimadǝ.
6.18: Wada ye, awo ngǝla cado, kǝndo ngǝlan arsiyiwuro walja, koro jaija-a kǝre-aro walja.
6.19: Adǝgainin ro jireyedǝa cawandoro arsiyi ngǝla kǝlanjaro ajaram kibbu dunia fuwuyero capcagai.
6.20: Timoti, awo Ala mukkonǝmbo cakkǝnadǝa rone, bare mana faida bawoa so, kambiwu kattuwuye tiro ilmu cani so dimmi,
6.21: ilmu kattuwuye duwon am laaso jaane jawal kambǝrseyea koljanadǝ. Ser Alaye nayilan dǝga!

1.1: Wuma Bulus rawo Alayen kǝla wadu roye Isa Almasiwulan dǝganayen kǝngayam Isa Almasiwuyero wallǝkkǝnadǝ
1.2: Timoti tadani jauro raakkǝnadǝro: Ala Bawa-a Kǝmande Isa Almasiwu-adǝ niro ser-a kanjimaɍi-a nanlewa-a njado! Alaa wusedu
1.3: Bune-a kausu-a dadu baworo curo moduwaniyen nia tannjǝkki duwon, Alaa wusenǝkki, Ala duwon kida karwunin saɍiwu bawoalan tiro yiddǝkkidǝ, jiɍi amwurawani ye cadǝnadǝ gai.
1.4: Simalonǝmba tangǝkkiya, karwuni jauro kǝjijoro nia kuroro jaumaro raakkǝna.
1.5: Kambǝrsenǝm nanmǝnafǝk bawoa tangǝkki, kambǝrse duwon kakanǝm Ya Luwusi-a yanǝm Afiniki-alan burwon dǝgana, koro kǝrma ni yen tabbatto dǝganadǝ.
1.6: Adǝma nangaro niro isatannjǝgǝkki, kǝnjo Alaye sa kǝlanǝmbo mukko gǝnanjǝgǝkkǝnadǝn njinadǝa ngǝlaro dunoane!
1.7: Awoa Ruhu duwon Ala andiro sadǝnadǝ andia sasakke koiwuro gǝni, kǝnduwo-a kǝrawo-a kǝlaɍiwo-aaro walliye.
1.8: Adǝ nangaro bare kǝla sheda Kǝmandeye bi wu kosomanjuyen nangunǝmmi, amma wuro kǝldǝgǝne kǝnduwo Alayen kawuɍi kǝji nangaro bone yai.
1.9: Awoa Ala kǝndonde nangaro gǝni, nianju-a sernju-a nangaro andia sakkaye naptu nantayirren dǝgaiyoro bowosana. Sernjudǝa Isa Almasiwuyen kawu dunia alaktǝnaman andiro sedo,
1.10: amma kǝrma kǝnde Njǝkkayimande Isa Almasiwuyen fǝlejǝna. Tima karmodǝa baworo kalakce ro sawisoye ceriwawoa kawuɍi kǝjidǝyen bayinjo.
1.11: Kawuɍi kǝji adǝmaro Ala wua mawoduma ye, kǝngayam ye, malǝm yero galaseno.
1.12: Adǝma nangaro, wu ye kǝrma bone adǝa yakkidǝ, amma nangukkǝni, dalilnjudǝ ti kasaddǝkkǝnadǝa nokkǝna, koro kawuɍi kǝji mukkoniro cakkǝnadǝa har yimdǝro rojiro jaumaro nokkǝna nangaro.
1.13: Misal mana jireye wun fannǝmmadǝa ngǝlaro tai, kambǝrse-a kǝrawo-a duwon Isa Almasiwuyen dasayidǝn.
1.14: Bana Ruhu Alaye andilan dǝganadǝyen awo ngǝla mukkonǝmbo cakkǝnadǝa rone.
1.15: Nonǝmma, tayi cidi Asiyayen dasaana samma wua kolsana, curonjan Fibolus-a Hermajiya-a ye mbeji.
1.16: Kǝmande kanjimaɍinju am fado Onesifarussero fǝlejuwo, karwuni ngǝwuro isabojǝgǝna, koro wu koson dǝgakkǝnaro nangusǝnni.
1.17: Bǝrni Rombero kadinniya, wua tai daje mase siwando.
1.18: Kǝmande tia cakko yim adǝn kanjimaɍinju cuwando! Jiɍi bana ngǝwu bǝrni Afisayen sukkudǝnadǝa ni kǝlanǝm dam nonǝmma.

2.1: Nidǝ, tadani, ser Isa Almasiwulan dǝganadǝlan duno fande!
2.2: Awo fuwu shedawu kadayen wullǝkke fannǝmmadǝa mukko am amannaye rakcane am gade yero alamjagairo yakke.
2.3: Wuro kǝldǝgǝne soji ngǝla Isa Almasiwuye gai bone yai.
2.4: Soji fima kǝriwu cǝdi duwon hangalnju awowa dunia adǝyero cakkiwawo, dalilnjudǝ ardiya kajallanjuye maji nangaro.
2.5: Curo ngǝrǝm siyen kam wadawa bikkeyedǝa jǝgaiwawoa, aɍiawu kǝnnasarre cuwandiwawo.
2.6: Koro barema ngǝnǝptumadǝ dole tima burwon nemalan nuwanju cuwandidǝ wo.
2.7: Kǝla awo wullǝkkǝnadǝyen ngǝlaro kǝlanǝm kore, Kǝmadǝ niro nodu awo sammayea nji.
2.8: Isa Almasiwua tange, ti karmolan cijǝna ye, kaduwu Mai Daudaye ye, curo kawuɍi kǝjidǝyen wullǝkkǝnadǝ gai.
2.9: Koro kawuɍi kǝji adǝma nangaro bone yakki, har wu kosoma gai saɍgalan sasakkerǝna, amma mana Alayedǝ tikkeriwawo.
2.10: Adǝ nangaro curo awo sammayen kǝla am Ala kǝrejǝnasodǝyen mǝrnǝkki, ngainin tayi ye njǝkkawo Isa Almasiwulan dǝganadǝ-a daraja sawisoye-a cawandi.
2.11: Mana adǝ jauro kibbu: Isa-a rokko kanuiyea, andi ti-a rokko dǝgaiye.
2.12: Mǝrniyea, andi ti-a rokko kǝrmai diye. Tia angǝrniyea, ti ye andia angǝrsai.
2.13: Amma aman bawoaro walliyea, ti amanna dǝgai, awoa ti rakce kǝlanjua angǝrjiwawo. Kidama ngǝla Alaye
2.14: Jamadǝro awo ania isatakkǝne, fuwu Alayen sǝmonja kasse, bare kǝla kalmawayen kambiwu cadǝnniro. Kambiwudǝ awimaro faida bawo, koro am tia kǝrǝnjanasodǝ faccagai.
2.15: Kowoɍi de kam kida ngǝla cǝdǝna gai fuwu Alayen fǝledǝne, kidama duwon nangu ye tia cǝdaiwawo, mana jireye ye kalkallo alamjidǝ.
2.16: Amma mana bowuye faida bawoaro kane, am duwon manawa aniro kǝlanja casakkǝnasodǝ tayi-a Ala-aye kattenja kuruwuji,
2.17: koro mananjasodǝ tuno kura gai ndara yayero tatardiyi. Curonjan Himenayus-a Filitus-a mbeji,
2.18: tayidǝ jawal jireyedǝa koljana, cinowo duniaye wakkajǝna cane amsoye kambǝrsenja sǝbbaljai.
2.19: Adǝson fǝrdu dunoa Ala gǝnajǝnadǝ cǝk daada, tawa adǝ tiro bakkaada: «Kǝmande am kaanjudǝa nojǝna,» koro: «Kam duwon cu Kǝmandeye bowojǝnamadǝ jawal diwilan culuwo!»
2.20: Curo fado kurayen tasa dinarre-a ɍiwullaye-a bas gǝni, kǝskaye-a tuloye-a ye mbeji. Laanja darajaa, laa ye daraja bawoa.
2.21: Kam laa awo diwi ani samman kǝlanju tuljiya, tasa darajaa gai tayirro walji, koro kǝmanjuro faidaa ye, kǝndo ngǝla sammaro dabbargada ye.
2.22: Mangar diwi diwi nanjairoyedǝro kadǝne, am duwon Kǝmandea karwu tayirnin bowojaimasodǝ-a rokko jawal jireye-a kambǝrseye-a kǝrawoye-a nanlewaye-adǝa ngǝlaro gai.
2.23: Amma kambiwu bowuye hangalnambuyedǝa wane, lawala cuwudiro nonǝmma nangaro.
2.24: Wolodi Alayedǝ bare lawala cǝdǝnni, dole wundu yayero rokura bawoa-a kanadia-aro waljo, koro kam rakce alamji ye,
2.25: rokura bawoalan waduwunjua jawallo cakki yero waljo. Waneye Ala tayiro dama tǝmduye ce nodu jiredǝyea cawandi.
2.26: Adǝgaima hangalnja cawande kel Yiwulissen caluwi, awoa Yiwulisdǝ awo cǝraana cadoro tayia cǝdana.

3.1: Amma adǝa none, dunia daryejiya, jaman jau fit mbeji.
3.2: Amso kǝlanja-a kunguna-a rawowuro waljai, koro kǝla fǝleduwu ye, rokurawu yero waljai. Alaa rajai, yanja-a bawanja-aye mana ngojaiwawo, koro sernambuwu ye, tayirnambuwu yero waljai.
3.3: Kǝrawo bawoa, karwu cǝlǝmba, ngadarwu, kǝlaɍiwonambuwu, kǝladowa, awo ngǝlaye kemiya,
3.4: aman bowu, karwu yeskadaa, rokura ngowadaa, koro awo karwunjayea Alaa kojǝnaro rawowuro waljai.
3.5: Alama nanmuminne fǝlejai, amma kǝnduwonju angǝrjai. Am anin kuruwunno lene!
3.6: Curonjan laa fado fadoro ngasaye kamuwa kǝske biwulan lapkada jarawa fi yayero kǝlanja casakkǝnadǝa jambajai.
3.7: Kamuwa ani sawiso caɍi duwon, tǝmmaro rakcane jiredǝa asujaiwawo.
3.8: Jiɍi Janes-a Jambara-a Nawi Musaa ga wajanadǝ gai, am ani ye jiredǝa ga wajai, am duwon hangalnja ye yeskada, kambǝrsenja ye faida bawoadǝ.
3.9: Amma fuwu jawuiwawo, jiɍi am yindi aniro wakkajǝgǝnadǝ gai, wundu yaye hangalnambunjadǝa federo asuji. Gala daryeye
3.10: Nidǝ, alamduni-a kǝndǝgaini-a niani-a kambǝrseni-a kanadini-a kǝrawoni-a nettuni dama bawo-a sammaa gamma.
3.11: Koro basari-a bone-a bǝrni Antakiya-a Ikoniya-a Listǝra-ayen yakkǝnadǝa nonǝmma, amma Kǝmandema tayi sammalan wua sǝkkawo!
3.12: Labudda wundu duwon Isa Almasiwua galan naptu nanmuminne dio cǝraanamadǝ basari cai,
3.13: koro am diwi-a jambawu-a nandiwin tasargai: Am gadea jambajai, koro tayi kǝlanjamaa jambajai.
3.14: Amma nidǝ, curo awo ɍime kasaddǝmmadǝyen dǝgai. Am tia njasakkǝranadǝa nonǝmma,
3.15: koro tǝn gananǝmlan kitawu Alayedǝa nonǝmma, kitawu duwon rakce ilmu njade kambǝrse Isa Almasiwuyen njǝkkawo fandǝmidǝ.
3.16: Awo kitawulan ruwuwada samma sindu Alayen kadio, koro alamdu-a njǝkkado-a simodu-a curo jireyen njaɍgaɍo-a faidanjua,
3.17: ngainin kam Alaye kǝndo ngǝla fi yayea dioro cotto dabbargadaro walji.

4.1: Fuwu Ala-a Isa Almasiwu ti duwon am roa-a sanuna-aro shara cǝddimadǝ-ayen, koro kǝndenju-a kǝrmainju-a nangaro nia jauro lowonjǝkki,
4.2: mana Alayedǝa mawone, sanju ngǝla yen kal, sanju ngǝla gǝni yen kal dabbardǝne, amba simone, tayiro yikkade, curo kanadi-a alamdu-ayen karwunjaro duno yakke.
4.3: Sanju cǝdiya, amso alamdu jireyedǝa ngojaiwawo, amma kǝɍiɍim sǝmonjaye nangaro kǝlanjaro malǝmba mangarnjaa galdawu capcagai,
4.4: koro suwordane jiredǝa kǝrǝnduro wajane nyari kattuwuye jagai.
4.5: Amma nidǝ, curo awi yayen kǝlanǝm ɍiwe, bone njalan nedde, kida kawuɍi kǝji mawodumayedǝa de, kida Ala njina sammaa kalkallo tumogǝne!
4.6: Wudǝ, roni bu fida gairo kǝrma fijai, wotte sani dunia adǝa kolduye del karǝnjǝna.
4.7: Mǝldu ngǝlan mǝldǝkkǝna, ngǝrǝmmi ye tumogǝkkǝna, koro kambǝrsedǝ yea rokkǝna.
4.8: Daryerambo aɍiawu kǝnnasarre nanjireye, aɍiawu duwon Kǝma ti sharama jireye yim adǝn wuro sidǝ gǝnaada mbeji, koro wu runiro gǝni, am duwon kǝndenju karwu kǝjiaro gurejai samma yero ci. Mana Timotiro
4.9: Kowoɍine duwan naniro are,
4.10: Dimas dunia adǝa cǝraanadǝro wua kolse bǝrni Tasalonikayero lejǝna, Karisha ye lardu Galatiyayero lejǝna, koro Titus ye lardu Dalmatiyayero lejǝna nangaro.
4.11: Luka runju nanin dǝga. Markussa ngone naniro arowo, curo kidaniyen ti faidaa nangaro.
4.13: Isǝmiya, barmusni fado Karpussen bǝrni Taruwassen kollǝkkǝnadǝa sukkude. Kitawuwadǝ yea sukkude, masammanno kitawuwa karawiyedǝa.
4.14: Aleksanda kagǝlmadǝ wuro kuttu ngǝwu fǝlesǝgǝna, amma Kǝmadǝ kǝla kǝndonjuyen ti yero fǝlejiyi.
4.15: Ni ye tiro hangal gǝnane, kawuɍindero tai daje takkal cakkǝna nangaro.
4.16: Sa burwon kǝlani moworo shararamnin dakkǝnadǝn, wunduma ise wuro banasǝgǝnni, tayi samma wua kolsera. Bare Ala kǝla adǝyen tayia cuworǝnni!
4.17: Amma Kǝmadǝ wu-a rokko daje kawuɍinjudǝa kǝrdiya sammaro wulgǝkke fanjaro wuro duno seno. Adǝgaima wua ci ngamben sǝmowo.
4.18: Kǝmadǝ wua kǝndo diwi samman sǝmoyi, koro kǝlewa salai nodonju bargaa sameyero wua sadi. Tiro har abada abadinno daraja tio! Amin. Lewa daryeye
4.19: Wuro Ya Bilkisu-a Akila-a am fado Onesifarusse-aa lewane.
4.20: Erastus bǝrni Korintiyen napkeno, koro Tarofimus dondidǝro tia bǝrni Militussen kolyekko.
4.21: Kowoɍine kawu sa kakuye isidǝro are. Ebulus-a Pudens-a Linus-a Ya Kolodiya-a kǝramiya samma-a nia lewanjai.
4.22: Kǝmadǝ ni-a rokko dǝga, sernju ye nayi sammalan dǝga!

1.1: Wuma Bulus wolodi Alaye ye, kǝngayam Isa Almasiwuye ye, am Ala kǝrejǝnaye kambǝrsenja-a nodunja jireye nanmumin cuwudidǝ-aa dunoaduwuro wua sinodo.
1.2: Ngainin ro sawisoyen tǝmanjaa, ro duwon Ala ti kattuwu kamjiwawo kawu dunia alaktǝnaman ci cǝne wadu ngojǝnadǝ.
1.3: Adǝgaima sanju kalkal kidǝnniya, mawoduyen kawuɍinju fǝleyeno. Ala Njǝkkayimande wadanjun kida mawoduye adǝa mukkoniro kekko.
1.4: Titus tadani jireye kambǝrsende tiloadǝro: Ala Bawa-a Isa Almasiwu Njǝkkayimande-adǝ niro ser-a nanlewa-a njado! Fuwuma jama Alayero walda
1.5: Dalil nia cuku Kǝrettelan kolnjǝkkǝnadǝ tima awo dioro gapcǝnadǝa sawinǝme bǝla fin yaye amba amwurawaro galanǝmi nangaro, wada niro njikkǝnadǝ gai.
1.6: Ti fuwumadǝ tilan awo waada baworo waljo, kwa kamu falle, koro yallanju ye kambǝrsearo walja, amso ye tayia halkutta-a nan'ansi-aro ngadarjaiwawo.
1.7: Ti wolodi Alaye nangaro, dole awo waada tilan baworo waljo, bare rokurama, bi karwu jaua, bi kǝnjama, bi mukko kamboia, bi riwa cukkowona bomaro waljǝnni.
1.8: Amma tidǝ kusotto sosaduma, awo ngǝla rawoma, kam hangalla, jirema, mumin, koro kǝla ɍiwoma yero waljo.
1.9: Mana kambǝrseye tiro alamjaanadǝa ngǝlaro cǝda. Ngainin rakce alamdu jireyen karwu am gadeyero duno ci, koro am alamdudǝa wajana yero cǝkkadi. Alamduwu kattuwuye
1.10: Am tuɍuwu ngǝwu mbeji, mana bowumaso ye, jambawu ye, masammanno tayi kǝwu am kajaadadǝyen.
1.11: Cinja jange, dalilnjudǝ am fado kadaye hangalnja casange wuɍi jawal diwin madaro awo jussǝnni alamjai.
1.12: Curo am cuku Kǝretten nawinja laaye: «Kǝretwusodǝ tayi sawiso kattuwumaso, bundi diwi gai, lusurra curocurowu,» cǝnna.
1.13: Sheda adǝ jire. Adǝ nangaro kambǝrsenjan dunoaro waljaro tayiro tai dane yikkade,
1.14: bare nyari yaudiyaye-a wada am jiredǝa wajanasoye-a jaanniro.
1.15: Am tayirsodǝro awo samma tayir, amma am tayir gǝni kambǝrsenambuwusodǝro awima tayir gǝni. Hangalnja ye, karwunja ye samma tayir gǝni.
1.16: Alaa nojana cani duwon, kǝndonjayen tia angǝrjai. Tayidǝ haramgada, ganambuwu, faidanja kǝndo ngǝla fima dioye bawo.

2.1: Amma nidǝ, awo kǝla alamdu jireyen kalkaldǝa alamme!
2.2: Kiariyaso kǝla ɍiwowu-a darajaa-a kǝlanjaro kistuwuwu-aro walja, koro kambǝrse-a kǝrawo-a nettu-alan dunoaro walja.
2.3: Jiɍi adǝgainin kǝmurjowaso ye naptu darajaa jiɍi Ala cǝraanadǝa cado, bare diwi ambe wuljanni bi kaɍea diben ngǝwuyero waljanni. Awo ngǝladǝa alamja,
2.4: ngainin amidawasoro kwawanja-a yallanja-a rawo casakkarai.
2.5: Tayidǝ ye kǝla ɍiwowu, tayir, fadoro kistuwuwu, ngǝla, kwawanjaa gawuro walja, bare amso mana Alayero rudu gǝnajaganniro.
2.6: Jiɍi adǝgainin jairowaso ye karwunjaro duno yakke kǝla ɍiwowuro walja.
2.7: Ni kǝlanǝm awo samman misal kǝndo ngǝla dioyero walle, koro alamdunǝm ye jireye-a darajaa-aro waljo,
2.8: alamdu jireye duwon rakcane tiro cakkadiwawodǝ. Daji wadumadǝ nangu tia cǝdane, kǝlanden rakce diwi fimaa wuljiwawo.
2.9: Kaɍeawaso ye awin yaye kǝmawanjaa jaa, awo karwunjaye cǝraanaa caddo, bare mananjaa kambiwujanni,
2.10: bare ndaljanni, amma amannaro walja, awin yaye alamdu Ala Njǝkkayimandeyedǝro daraja cado.
2.11: Awoa ser Alaye am sammaro njǝkkawo cukkudidǝ bayindǝna,
2.12: ser duwon awo nanmuminne gǝni-a mangar dunia adǝye-aa kolliyo jaman adǝn kǝlaɍiwo-a nanjire-a nanmumin-alan dǝgaiyoro andia alamsagaidǝ.
2.13: Ngainin tǝma bargaa ye, fǝleduwu darajaa Alande Mai Kura-a Njǝkkayimande-adǝ Isa Almasiwuye yea gureniye.
2.14: Tidǝ andia diwi fin yaye merusa jama kaanjuro sado jama duwon kǝndo ngǝla dio rawowudǝa tayirro kalakcoro andi nangaro kǝlanjua kaino.
2.15: Awo ania alamme, karwu ambero duno ye, kǝnduwoaro tayiro yikkade. Bare kollǝme wunduma nia runjǝnni.

3.1: Ammǝmbo isatakkǝne maiya-a fuwuwu-aro dau koljaa mananja ngoja, koro kǝndo ngǝla fi yayea dioro dabbargadaro walja.
3.2: Bare kǝla wundumayen diwi wuljanni, nanlewan dasaa, am rokura bawoaro walja, koro wundu yayero sawiso hal ngǝla fǝlejaa.
3.3: Awoa andi kǝlande calan hangal bawoa, mana Alaye ngoniyende, fattiyiyena, kaɍeawa mangar diwi so, duniaaram soye, nankǝlado-a mandǝna-alan kǝrgaiye, har am andia wasana, andi ye tayia waniyena.
3.4: Amma Ala Njǝkkayimande sernju-a kǝrawonju-a adamgǝnaro fǝleyeyenniya,
3.5: andia sakkawo, kǝndo laa nanjireye diyenaro gǝni, kanjimaɍinju nangaro. Kǝnduwo Ruhunjuyen andia tulsane tambo bǝɍin-a kǝndǝgai bǝɍin-aa andiro sedo.
3.6: Ruhu adǝmaa Isa Almasiwu Njǝkkayimandeyen andiro tai daje fiseyera.
3.7: Adǝa dionjudǝ, sernjuyen andia jirewuro sadǝna duwon, kǝla tǝma ro sawisoyen warasawuro walliyoro.
3.8: Mana adǝ jauro kibbu, koro awo ania tabbatkǝmiya, raakko, am Alaa mǝrsajanamadǝ kǝndo ngǝla dioro kǝlanja cadoro. Awo ani jaumaro ngǝla ye, amsoro faidaa ye.
3.9: Amma kambiwu bowuye so, taye kaan kaarinne so, gasiptu so, lawala kǝla wadawa Attaurayen soro kadǝne, awo ani bowu fat faida bawo nangaro.
3.10: Kam am gadea firjimadǝ, tiro sǝmo kasta har yindiro yidde, daji ti-a faidunowo.
3.11: None, kam jiɍi adǝgaidǝ jawal Alayen culuwuna ye, koro biwuwanjun wowom Alayedǝa kǝlanjuro cuwudǝna ye. Lewa daryeye
3.12: Sa Artimassa bi Tikikussa nanǝmbo nodǝkkiya, kowoɍine nagatto naniro bǝrni Nikafolissero are, nia sa kakuyea nadǝn naptuye ngokkǝna nangaro.
3.13: Kowoɍine Jinas goni Attauraye-a Afolus-aa banagǝne, awima tayia maujǝnnin bǝlawuro cado.
3.14: Amnde ye kǝndo ngǝla dio caɍo, ngainin rakcane mǝradu jǝkkada fi yayea galjai, koro kǝndǝgainjadǝ dunian faida baworo waljiwawo.
3.15: Am wu-a rokko samma lewanjai. Ni ye am duwon kambǝrsenja nangaro andia saraanadǝa lewane. Ser Alaye nayi sammalan dǝga!

1.1: Wuma Bulus Isa Almasiwu nangaro kosoma-a Timoti kǝraminde-adǝ Filimon sawande kidaye rayiyenadǝ ye,
1.2: Ya Afiya kǝraminde ye, Akifus sawande mǝlduye ye, koro jama Isaa gawu curo fannǝmben captaisodǝro:
1.3: Ala Bawande-a Kǝma Isa Almasiwu-adǝ nayiro ser-a nanlewa-a njado! Filimonne kambǝrsenju-a kǝrawonju-a
1.4: Curo moduwaniyen nia tannjǝkkiya, sawi yaye Alania wusenǝkki,
1.5: dalilnjudǝ Kǝma Isa yea mǝrsanǝmma, muminna yea raamma fakkǝna nangaro.
1.6: Koro andi-a rokko mukkonǝm njakko curo kambǝrsedǝyen faidaaro waljo, ngainin awo ngǝla fi yaye Almasiwulan taiyenadǝa asunero Alaa korǝkki.
1.7: Kǝramini, kǝrawonǝm cakke karwuni ye jauro kǝjijǝna, roni ye duno cuwandǝna, niyen karwu muminnaye bojǝna nangaro. Lowo Bulusse Onesim nangaro
1.8: Adǝma nangaro, Almasiwulan niro wada awo jussǝna dioye njoro rikkǝni yaye,
1.9: kǝla kǝrawoyen nia lowonjǝkki. Wu Bulus kiari ye, kǝrma Isa Almasiwu nangaro kosoma yedǝ,
1.10: tadani Onesim nangaro nia lowonjǝkki, ti duwon saɍgan tikkerǝkkǝnalan bawanjuro wallǝkkǝnadǝ.
1.11: Calan niro faidanjǝgǝnni, amma kǝrma wu-a ni-a sammaro faidaa.
1.12: Tia niro kalannjǝgǝkki, ti duwon karwuni tia ngojǝnadǝ.
1.13: Tia nanin rodu raakkǝna, wu kawuɍi kǝji nangaro kosolan duwon, cujunǝmbo wuro faidasuworo.
1.14: Adǝ yaye rawonǝm bawoalan awima dio raakkǝni, nanngǝlanǝmdǝ dolero gǝni, rawonǝmbero waljo.
1.15: Waneye dalil ni-a ti-a kawu ganaro faiduwwadǝ, kǝrma tia sawisoro fandero,
1.16: gadero kaɍea gai gǝni, kaɍeamaa kojǝnaro kǝrami tǝraana gai, masammanno nanin, ballema nanǝmlan, naptunju adamgǝnaye yen kal, naptunju Kǝmaa mǝrsadumaye yen kal.
1.17: Wua sawanǝm kidayero ngosǝmmaa, ti yea wu gairo mukko yindin moye!
1.18: Koro niro awo laa kuttu ngiddoa, bi awo laaro tia gamia, kǝlaniro gǝnagǝne!
1.19: Wuma Bulus, mukkonin adǝa ruwunǝkki, rǝmbǝkki yekko! Kǝla jiɍi ni kǝlanǝm ro sawisoye wuyen fandǝmmadǝyen awima wulnjǝgǝkkiwawo.
1.20: Aaa, kǝramini, niyen Kǝma nangaro ser adǝa fandǝkko, Almasiwulan karwuni isabogǝne!
1.21: Manani gamiro mǝrsanǝkkǝna nangaro niro ruwunjǝgǝkki, koro awo wulnjǝgǝkkǝnadǝmaa kojǝnaa dimiro nokkǝna.
1.22: Koro jǝpturam wuro dabbarsǝgǝne, moduwandoyen wua mukkondoro sasakkiro tǝmani mbeji. Lewa daryeye
1.23: Abafaras sawani kosoye Isa Almasiwu nangaro nia lewanji,
1.24: koro Markus-a Aristarkus-a Dimas-a Luka-a sawawani kidaye ye lewanjai.
1.25: Ser Kǝma Isa Almasiwuye nayilan dǝga!

1.1: Kuren Ala gǝnagǝniro jiɍi gadegaden ci nawiyayen kaariyandero mana cǝddǝna,
1.2: amma jaman daryeye adǝn andiro Tadanjuyen mana seddo. Tia warasama awo sammayero kido, koro tiyen duniaa alakkeno.
1.3: Ti Tadadǝ yiyildu daraja Alaye, tima camuno kalkal naptunjuyedǝ wo, koro dunia ngasoa kǝnduwo mananjuyen roji. Ngawo adamgǝnaa biwuwalan tayirro kalakcǝnayen, samen kǝmboram Martawamayen napkeno. Tadadǝ malaiyawaro kura wo
1.4: Kaalanju nantadaye warasajǝnadǝ cu malaiyawayero ngalwodǝ gai, tima tayiro kura wo.
1.5: Malaiyawaye finja gǝle Alaye ngalte tiro: «Ni Tadani, ku Bawanǝmbo wallǝkkǝna,» cǝne wuljuwo, bi kǝlanjun: «Wudǝ Bawanjuro wallǝkki, ti ye Tadaniro walji,» cǝne wuljo?
1.6: Koro walde sa karunju duniaro cuwudidǝn tiye: «Malaiyawa samma tiro ambǝccaa!»
1.7: Koro kǝla malaiyawadǝyen tiye: «Malaiyawanjua ruhuwaro cǝdi, kidawunju yea tǝlam kannuyero cǝdi,»
1.8: amma kǝla Tadadǝyen tiye: «Ala, kurisnǝm kǝrmaiye sawisoro dǝgai, koro kanǝm kǝrmaiyedǝ tima nanjire wo.
1.9: Nanjire raamma, jirenambu wanǝmma. Adǝma nangaro Ala Alanǝmdǝ nia kǝndawu karwukǝjiyen amanǝmbea kojǝnaro samngeno.»
1.10: Koro tiye: «Nidǝ, Kǝmande, badiduramnin fǝrdu duniaye gǝnayem, koro samedǝ ye kida mukkonǝmbe.
1.11: Tayidǝ sidagai, amma nidǝ dǝgami. Tayi samma kajǝmu gai dinjai,
1.12: barmus gai tayia kǝɍinǝmi, gǝmaje gai faldai, amma nidǝ faldǝmbaworo dǝgami, koro kawunǝm ye dajiwawo.»
1.13: Koro malaiyawaye finja gǝle Alaye ngalte tiro: «Namme kǝmborammilan duwon, kǝladowanǝmba si gǝnadurammǝmbo dikki!» cǝne wuljuwo?
1.14: Tayi samma wolodiya ruhuye am duwon njǝkkawo warasajaidǝro kida njǝddoro juwaada, gǝna?

2.1: Adǝ nangaro awo fanniyenaro ngǝlaro hangal gǝnaniyo, bare sǝrniyendero.
2.2: To, mana malaiyawayen wuldǝnadǝ kibbu yedǝ, koro biwu so, ganambu so samma wowomnja jussǝnadǝa kǝlanjaro gǝrjaana yedǝ,
2.3: andi njǝkkawo kuradǝa waniyea, ndayin gǝle kadiye? Njǝkkawo adǝ, Kǝmadǝ burwon tia mawojǝna, am fanjanadǝ ye andiro tabbansaana,
2.4: koro Ala kǝlanju ye alama so, awo ajabba so, kǝnduwo jiɍi jiɍi so, kǝnjowa Ruhunjuye rawonjun dagardǝna soyen tia shedajǝna. Fuwuma njǝkkawo kura adǝye
2.5: Leira kǝlanjun mananiyedǝ, cidiya si malaiyawayero gǝni Ala tia kekko,
2.6: amma kam laaye na laan shedaje: «Awi kam duwon tia tangǝmidǝ bi tada kambe tiro kiskǝmidǝ?
2.7: Tia sa ganaro cidiya malaiyawayero kisagǝm, tiro aɍiawu daraja-a martawa-ayea yakkǝme
2.8: awo sammaa cidiya sinjuyero kekkǝm.» Awo sammaa cidiyanjuro njakkodǝ, Ala awo cidiyanjuro cakkǝna falmaa koljǝnni. Kǝrmadǝ awo sammaa cidiyanjun koro yaye ruiyewawo,
2.9: amma Isaa ruiye, kam duwon sa ganaro cidiya malaiyawayero cǝsaanadǝ. Bone karmoye cana nangaro Ala tiro aɍiawu daraja-a martawa-ayea cakkǝna. Ngainin karmonjudǝ, ser Alayen am samma nangaro nuna.
2.10: Ala duwon awo samma ti nangaro ye, tiyen ye dǝganadǝ, tadawa kadaa darajaro kudoro, fuwuma njǝkkawonjayedǝa bone njalan kalkallo dionjudǝ jussǝna.
2.11: Awoa ti tayirro kalakcidǝ-a tayi tayirro waljaidǝ-a samma Bawanja tilo. Adǝma nangaro tayia kǝramiyalan bowoduro nangujǝnni,
2.12: tiye: «Cunǝm kǝramiyaniro wulgǝkki, dawu jamayen nia njungorǝkki,»
2.13: koro: «Tiro tǝmani yakkǝkki,» koro walde: «Akkoni tadawa Ala sina-a rokko,» yeno.
2.14: Tadawadǝ tiyi-a bu-aadǝ, Isa ye awo anilan nuwanjua. Ngainin karmonjuyen ti duwon kǝnduwo karmoye cǝdana wotte Yiwulisdǝ yea baworo cǝde
2.15: am duwon ridu karmoye nangaro kǝndǝgainja samman nankaɍean dasaanadǝ yero nankam kǝlaye cina.
2.16: Awoa tabbatto malaiyawaa gǝni, kaduwu Nawi Ibrahimbea banajiyi.
2.17: Adǝma nangaro dole jiɍi fin yaye kǝramiyanjudǝ-a camunno walji, curo kida Alayen ɍiman kura kanjimaɍima ye, amanna yero waljo, biwuwa jamadǝye cinjoro.
2.18: Ti kǝlanju jaraptǝne bone canadǝ, nanjun kǝnduwo tayi jaraptaidǝa banaduwuye mbeji.

3.1: Adǝ nangaro, kǝramiya muminna, nayi bowodu sameyen nuwandoadǝ, Isaa wunowo, tima kǝngayam-a ɍiman kura-a njasaraindeyedǝ wo.
3.2: Nawi Musa curo jama Alaye sammayen amannadǝ gai, Isa ye ti duwon tia galajǝnadǝro amanna.
3.3: Fado tandoma fadodǝa darajan kojǝnadǝ gai, Isa ye Nawi Musaa darajan koduye martawanjua.
3.4: Awoa fado fi yayea kam cǝdandǝna mbeji, amma ti awo sammaa cǝdandǝnamadǝ, tima Ala wo.
3.5: To, Nawi Musadǝ Alaye wolodi, curo jamanju sammayen amannaro walje naptu shedama awo fuwun wuldidǝye kido,
3.6: amma Almasiwudǝ Alaye Tada, kǝla jamanjuyen amanna, koro karwukibbande-a fǝrdu tǝmandeye-aa roniyea, andima jamanjudǝ wo. Tustu laa jama Alaye
3.7: Adǝ nangaro, Ruhu Alaye wuljǝnadǝ gai: «Ku kowonju fannuwia,
3.8: bare karwundo janguwwi, jiɍi tuɍudǝn yim jaraptuyea karaan cadǝnadǝ gai,
3.9: na duwon kaariyando saa fidewuro kǝndoni carunason wua rijamsane jaramsanadǝ.
3.10: Adǝ nangaro am jaman tiloa todǝro gǝrgagǝkke wuye: “Kullum karwunjan faccagai, jawalnidǝa nojanni.”
3.11: Daji gǝrgadunin kansi bukke: “Tustunidǝro ngasayiwawo!” yekko.»
3.12: Kǝramiya, hangal gǝnanowo bare kamndo laa karwu diwi-a kambǝrsenambu-aaro walje Ala Kǝndǝgaimaa koljǝnni.
3.13: Yim tiro ku canison kattendon dunoadǝnowo, bare jamba biwuye wundundomaa cakke karwunju jakcǝnniro.
3.14: Tǝmande burwoyedǝa har njerorambo ngǝlaro roniyenaa, na Almasiwuyen nuwandea.
3.15: Wuldǝnadǝ gai: «Ku kowonju fannuwia, bare karwundo janguwwi, jiɍi tuɍudǝn cadǝnadǝ gai.»
3.16: Wunduso kowonju fanjanason tuɍu kedo? Tayi mukko Nawi Musayen Masarlan caluwuna samma, gǝna?
3.17: Wundusoro Ala saa fidewuro gǝrgajǝgǝnadǝ? Tayi biwu cade kaminnja karaan casurǝnadǝ, gǝna?
3.18: Koro tayi ganambu cadǝna gǝnia, wundusoro Ala tayi tustunjuro ngasayiwaworo kansi jǝbbunadǝ?

4.1: Adǝ nangaro, kua yaye wadu tustunjuro ngawoye mbejidǝ, hangal gǝnaniyo bare kamndo laa tia fuccǝnniro.
4.2: Awoa kawuɍi kǝjidǝa tayiro wuljaanadǝ gai, andi yero wulsaana, amma mana kawuɍidǝye tayiro faidajǝgǝnni, tayidǝ kambǝrselan am fanjanadǝro kǝldaganni nangaro.
4.3: Andi kasaddiyenadǝ tustudǝro ngayiye, kǝlanjun wuljǝnadǝ gai: «Gǝrgadunin kansi bukke: “Tustunidǝro ngasayiwawo!” yekko.» Adǝson, kidawanju kawu dunia alaktǝnaman ceserǝna.
4.4: Kitawuye na laan kǝla kawu tulurdǝyen ngai wuljǝna: «Kawu tulurredǝn Ala kidanju samman tuskeno.»
4.5: Koro walde na adǝ yen: «Tustunidǝro ngasayiwawo!» cǝnna.
4.6: Adǝ nangaro, am laaye tustudǝro ngawo gapcǝnadǝ, koro am burwon tayiro kawuɍi kǝji wuljaanadǝ ganambu nangaro tustudǝro ngasaannidǝ,
4.7: jauro tussǝnaye ngawon Ala koro walde kawu laa tiro ku cani dabbarje ci Nawi Daudayen tiye: «Ku kowonju fannuwia, bare karwundo janguwwi,» cǝnna, calan wulliyenadǝ gai.
4.8: Ca Yoshuwa tayiro tustu cinaa, ngawon Ala mana kǝla kawu gadeyen cǝdǝnni.
4.9: Adǝ nangaro jama Alayero yim tustuye gapcǝna mbeji.
4.10: Kam tustudǝro ngaanadǝ, Ala kidanjun tussǝnadǝ gai, ti ye kidanjun tussǝna.
4.11: Adǝ nangaro tustu adǝro ngaworo kowoɍi diyo, bare wunduma ganambu kaanja-a camun nangaro yessǝnni.
4.12: Nonowo, mana Alayedǝ roa ye, faidaa ye, kashagar tǝlam yindia fi yayero timia wo, tidǝ ro-a ruhu-a koro ndǝwu-a buɍi-a yaktama, koro tǝma-a nia-a karwuye sharama.
4.13: Alau fima fuwu Alayen gǝraada bawo, amma awiso farakko kaada curui, ti duwon andia kǝndonde sammaro saworidǝ. ISAMA ɌIMAN KURA MARTAWAA WO
4.14: Adǝ nangaro, ɍiman kura martawaa sameyen reje kojǝnaa taiyenadǝ, wotte Isa Tada Alayedǝ, njasaraindedǝa roniyo!
4.15: Awoa ɍiman kura nanlawunden rakce andia njunosaiwawo gǝni taiye, ai, jiɍi fin yaye andi gai jaraptǝna, amma biwu cǝdǝnni.
4.16: To, kuris Ala Sermayedǝa ridu bawoaro karǝnniyo, kanjimaɍi ye fandiyo, ser sa jǝktuyen bana kudoma ye moyiyo.

5.1: Ɍiman kura fi yaye dawu amben kǝreyadadǝ jama nangaro kǝla awowa Alayen galaada, sadaa so, bu fida biwuwa nangaro so cǝdi.
5.2: Koro rakce nodunambuwu-a am jawallan caluwuna-aro kissiyi, ti kǝlanju nanlawun dǝganadǝro.
5.3: Adǝ nangaro, biwuwa jamayero bu fida cǝdidǝ gai, kaanju yero dio tiro wajipcǝgǝna.
5.4: Wunduma kǝlanjuro daraja adǝa ngojiyiwawo, sai Ala tia bowojiya, Nawi Harunaa bowojǝnadǝ gai.
5.5: Jiɍi adǝgainin Almasiwudǝ daraja ɍiman kuraro walduye kǝlanjuro ngojǝgǝnni, amma ti duwon tiro: «Ni Tadani, ku Bawanǝmbo wallǝkkǝna,» cǝnnadǝ
5.6: na gaden tiro: «Ni ɍiman har abadaro, kaala Malkisadakayen,» wuljǝna.
5.7: Naptunju duniayen Isa kowo dunoa-a simalo-aa moduwalan ti duwon nanjun kǝnduwo tia karmolan njǝkkawoyeadǝa lowoji, koro nanmuminnjudǝro Ala tia fangeno.
5.8: Ti Tada Alaye yaye, bone njanjuyen ga kiɍo.
5.9: Naptu kalkaldǝa nayeyenniya, am tia jaana sammaro fǝrdu njǝkkawo sawisoyero walyeno,
5.10: koro Ala tia ɍiman kuraro kaala Malkisadakayen galayeno. Sǝmo kasta kǝla jawal kolduyen
5.11: Kǝla adǝyen awo wulduye ngǝwu taiyena, amma bayindunjudǝ jau, nayidǝ fanduro lusurro walluwwadǝro.
5.12: Tussǝna malǝmbaro waldu nayiro wajimnjaanason, nayiro alamdu budu mana Alayedǝa nangadembo njikkǝralan mǝradundoa. Kǝmbo kibbulan gǝni, kiamlan mǝradundoa.
5.13: Wundu duwon kiamlan dǝganadǝ mana nanjireye asujiwawo, ti tadaana nangaro.
5.14: Amma kǝmbo kibbudǝ am wurajanaye, tayi duwon hangalnjan kullum faidadane halnja awo ngǝla-a diwi-a gayirduro alamgadadǝ.

6.1: Adǝ nangaro, alamdu burwoye Almasiwuyedǝa kolliyo, kǝla awo kalkaldǝyen fuwuro leniyo. Bare koro yaye fǝrdu gǝnaniye kida karmo kudomaa wanǝme tǝmdu so, Alaa mǝrsadu so,
6.2: alamdu kǝla kasala-a mukko gǝnaduwu-a karmolan cidu-a wowom sawisoye-ayen kǝlan mana diyende.
6.4: Awoa am kǝlanja fǝrǝmde kǝnjo sameye casambe Ruhu Alayen nuwa cawande
6.5: mana Alaye so, kǝnduwo dunia fuwuye soa kǝjiro casambǝna duwon
6.6: jawallan caluwunadǝ, waldǝme tayia tǝmduro kalaktuwudǝ yojiwawo, dalilnjudǝ koro yaye Tada Alayedǝa kǝskaro jajagane farakko tia nanguro casakki nangaro.
6.7: Awoa cidi duwon ingi ngǝwuro tilan cudure cane nema barewunjudǝro faidaa cakkidǝ barga Alaye cuwandi,
6.8: amma kaɍiyi so, kajai so cakkia, faidanju bawo, baskuduro dabbargada, koro daryeramnin kannu cattai.
6.9: Kǝrawowunde, ngai wulliye yaye, kǝlandon awowa ngalwo mbejiro mǝrsaniyena, wotte awowa njǝkkawoye.
6.10: Ala jirenambuma gǝni, kǝndondo so, kida muminnaro yidduwe kǝrawo cunjun fǝlenuwwa ye, kua yaye fǝlenuwi ye soa ngessiwawo.
6.11: Koro tǝmando har njerorambo tabbacciyiro wundundo yaye kowoɍi adǝmaa cǝdiya, rayiye.
6.12: Bare lawuro walluwwi, amma tayi duwon kambǝrse-a kanadi-ayen wadu Alaye warasajaidǝa gaiwo. Wadu tabbat Alaye
6.13: Sa Ala Nawi Ibrahimbo wadu ngojǝgǝnadǝn, wunduma tia kojǝna kǝlanjun kansi boye bawodǝro, kǝlanjun kansi jǝbbuwe:
6.15: Adǝgaima Nawi Ibrahim kanadin gurejǝnaye ngawon, awo Ala tiro waduro ngojǝgǝnadǝa kiwando.
6.16: Awoa amso kǝla awo tayia kojǝnayen kansi jawui, koro kansi tabbatdǝ kambiwunja sammaa baworo cǝdi.
6.17: To, Ala nanfaldunambu nianjuyedǝa warasawu wadudǝyero cayemaa kojǝnaro fǝleduwu kiraanniya, kansilan tia tabbatkeyeno.
6.18: Ngainin kǝla awo yindi faldaiwawoyen, koro kǝlanjan Ala tǝmmaro kattuwu kamjiwawodǝ, andi duwon gǝraduramdǝro kasiye ngayiyenadǝ duno kura fandiye tǝma fuwundero cakkǝnadǝa taiye!
6.19: Tǝma adǝa sunu roye gai taiyena. Tidǝ tabbat ye, dunoa ye, koro ngawo juwadǝyero ngayi.
6.20: Isa ye, ti duwon ɍiman kura sawisoyero kaala Malkisadakayen waljǝnadǝ, fuwunden leje andi nangaro nadǝro ngaana.

7.1: Malkisadaka adǝ, ti mai bǝrni Salambe ye, ɍiman Ala Mai Samemaye ye, ti duwon Nawi Ibrahim maiyadǝa kǝriwun juwe waldidǝn tia kapciye tiro barga dǝpciye,
7.2: koro Nawi Ibrahim tiro jakka awisoyea cinadǝ, burwon, maana cunjuye mai nanjireye, koro ti mai Salambe, maananju mai nanlewaye.
7.3: Tidǝ bawa, bi ya, bi kaariya cǝdanni, badiduram kawuye bi njeroram roye cǝdanni, amma Tada Alaye-a camunno waljǝna, koro sawisoro ɍiman dǝgai.
7.4: To, nankura kam adǝyedǝa ruiwo, ti duwon kaarinde Nawi Ibrahim tiro jakka ganimadǝye cinadǝ.
7.5: Kǝla Attaurayen tayi kaduwu Lewiye kaala nanɍimanne cawandǝnadǝ wada mukko jamayen jakka mowoye cadana. Jamadǝ Nawi Ibrahimben tasambǝna, wotte kǝramiyanja yaye, mukkonjan jakka camoyi.
7.6: Amma Malkisadaka ti duwon fǝrdunju tayilan bawodǝ mukko Nawi Ibrahimben jakka cǝmoye ti waduwadǝa cǝmowonadǝro barga dǝpkeyeno.
7.7: Shekkuma bawo gana kurayen barga cuwandi.
7.8: Kuro laayen am nowu jakka camoyi, amma kuro gadeyen ti roaro shedajanadǝ jakka cǝmoyi.
7.9: Koro ngai wulduro, Lewi jakka mowomadǝ Nawi Ibrahimben jakka biyajǝna,
7.10: awoa sa Malkisadaka Nawi Ibrahimba kapcǝgǝnayen, tidǝ koro yaye curo tiyi kaarinjuyen.
7.11: To, jamadǝ kaala nanɍiman Lewiyen Attauraa camowona, amma kalkallo waldu tilan isǝnni. Adǝ nangaro ɍiman gade kaala Nawi Harunayen gǝni, kaala Malkisadakayen culuwilan mǝradua.
7.12: Nanɍimandǝ faldiya, dole wadadǝ ye faldi.
7.13: Awoa ti kǝlanjun awo ani wuldǝnadǝ jiɍi Lewiye gǝni, jiɍi gadeye, jiɍi duwon wundunjuma kida laya duwadurambe cǝdǝnnidǝ.
7.14: Tabbat Kǝmande jiɍi Yahudayen kiluwo, koro Nawi Musa kǝla ɍimanna jiɍi adǝyen awima wuljǝnni.
7.15: Adǝ koro cayemaa kojǝnaro federo walji, ɍiman gade Malkisadaka-a camun fǝlediyiya,
7.16: ɍiman duwon kǝla ada kaan kaarinnen gǝni, kǝla kǝnduwo ro ceriwawoyen ɍimanno waljǝnadǝ.
7.17: Awoa sheda adǝa kǝlanjun cadi: «Ni ɍiman har abadaro, kaala Malkisadakayen.»
7.18: Wada cayedǝ dunonambunju-a faidanambunju-a nangaro baworo waljǝna,
7.19: awoa wadadǝ awimaa kalkallo kalakcǝnni, amma cujunjuro tǝma ngalwo mbeji, tiyen Alaa karǝnniye.
7.20: Koro awo adǝ kansi bawoalan gǝni tǝdo. Awoa calan amso kansi bawoalan ɍimannaro waljana,
7.21: amma Isadǝ, Alaye tiro: «Kǝmande kansi juwuna, koro tǝmdiwawo: “Ni ɍiman har abadaro,”» cǝne kansialan tia ɍimanno kido.
7.22: Kǝla adǝyen Isa aman ngalwodǝa tabbacciyi.
7.23: Koro am ngǝwu ɍimanno waljana, karmoye tayia kidanjan kolje dasayiwawo nangaro,
7.24: amma ti sawisoro dǝgai nangaro, nanɍiman tǝmmaro faldiwawo cǝdana.
7.25: Adǝmaro kǝnduwo am duwon tiyen Alaa karǝnjaidǝa sawisoro njǝkkawoye cǝdana, dalilnjudǝ ti sawi yaye tayiro moduwa njǝddoro dǝgai nangaro.
7.26: Ɍiman kura jiɍi adǝ gai taiyeya, jussǝna: mumin, biwubawoma, tayir, biwuwu-a faidana, samemaro kuruwunno sapcana.
7.27: Ɍimanna kura gade gai bu fida yimbi yaye diolan mǝradunju bawo, burwon biwuwa kǝlanjuyero, daji biwuwa jamanjuyero. Adǝa sa kǝlanju bu fidaro cinadǝn tilo lonno kido.
7.28: Awoa wadadǝ am duno bawoa ɍiman kuraro galaji, amma wadu kansiye ngawo wadadǝyen isǝnadǝ Tada har abadaro kalkallo waljǝnadǝa galaji.

8.1: Awo wulliye sammaye asuduram manandeyedǝ: Ɍiman kura adǝ gai samen kǝmboram kuris kǝrmaiye Martawamayen napkadaa taiye,
8.2: wotte kidama na tayir leima jireye kam gǝni, Kǝmande kokcǝnadǝye.
8.3: Awoa ɍiman kura fi yayea sadaa-a bu fida-a coro galajai, adǝ nangaro ti yero awo njoye fandodǝ wajipcǝgǝna.
8.4: Ca ti dunian kǝrgaa, tǝmmaro ɍimanno waljiwawo, ɍimanna kǝla Attaurayen sadaa njowu mbeji nangaro.
8.5: Tayidǝ kidawu kaudi awowa samen dasaanaye. Ala sa Nawi Musa leimadǝa cǝdandidǝn sǝmonju kassǝnadǝ gai: «Hangal gǝnane, awisoa kǝla fasalnju kau kuruwun fǝlenjǝgǝkkǝnadǝyen tande!»
8.6: Amma kǝrma Isa soloma aman ngalwoye waduwa ngalwoyen tabbaccǝgǝnadǝyero waljǝnadǝ gai, kida tiro tinadǝ ye ngalwo.
8.7: Awoa ca aman burwoye awima tilan maujǝna baworo walyenoa, dalil aman kǝnyindiye laaa maduye bawo.
8.8: Amma Ala jamanjuro ayau gǝnajiye: «Akko sa cǝde, jama Israyilaye-a jama Yahudaye-a aman bǝɍin ndǝmmiye,» yeno Kǝmandeye,
8.9: «aman duwon kaariyanja-a yim tayia mukkoyen takke lardu Masarren tuluwukkǝnalan ndǝmmiyenadǝ-a camun gǝni. Kǝla amanniyen dasaanni nangaro, wu ye tayiro kiskǝkkǝni,» yeno Kǝmandeye.
8.10: «Akko aman ngawo yim aniyen jama Israyilaye-a ndǝmmiyedǝ,» yeno Kǝmandeye, «wadawani hangalnjaro yakkǝkki, karwunja yen ruwunǝkki. Alanjaro wallǝkki, tayi ye jamaniro waljai.
8.11: Wunduma kamanjuro bi kǝraminjuro “Kǝmandea none!” cǝne alamjiwawo, gananjan tamiya kuraro kudero tayi samma wua nosai nangaro.
8.12: Jirenambunja njunonǝkki, biwuwanja ye gadero tangǝkkiwawo,» yeno.
8.13: Aman bǝɍin wuldunjudǝ, burwoyedǝa dinaro kalakcǝna. Koro awo duwon dina ye, sanju kojǝna yedǝ, baworo waldunju karǝnjǝna.

9.1: Aman burwoyedǝn wadawa Alaro ambǝttuwuye-a na darajaa cidiye-a mbeji.
9.2: Awoa leima ketando, curo ngimnju burwoye tiro na darajaa canidǝyen fatǝladǝ-a tewurdǝ-a burodi sadaayedǝ-a mbeji.
9.3: Ngawo juwa kǝnyindiyedǝn ngim kǝnyindiye tiro na jauro darajaa cani mbeji,
9.4: nadǝn kaaji njakkoram dinarredǝ-a sanduwu amanne tiyinju samma dinarlan jakkadadǝ-a mbeji. Curo sanduwudǝyen kalwo dinarre curon kǝmbo tiro man canidǝa-a ka Nawi Harunaye fǝɍe cakkǝnadǝ-a allowa amandǝyedǝ-a mbeji,
9.5: samenju yen malaiyawa daraja Alaye na gǝrgadunju fastuyedǝa kaudi fefedonjayen jakcai mbeji. Kǝrmadǝro dama mana ani sammaa fal fallo bayinduye bawo.
9.6: Awo ani ngai dabbargadadǝ, ɍimanna nasha burwoyedǝro kullum ngasaye kidanja cadi,
9.7: amma nasha kǝnyindiyedǝro ɍiman kura runju saan fallo ngayi, koro bu bawoa ngayiwawo, bu duwon kǝlanju-a biwuwa jamaye nodunambunjan cadǝna-a nangaro cuwudidǝ.
9.8: Ruhu Alaye ngainin sa leima burwoye kua yaye mbejidǝ, jawal na jauro darajaayedǝ koro yaye isanodǝnniro farakko fǝleyeno.
9.9: Adǝ misal jaman kuyero, awoa sadaa-a bu fida-aa ɍimanna cadidǝ rakcane karwu ambǝttuwumayedǝa kalkallo kalakcaiwawo.
9.10: Tayidǝ wadawa tiyiye, kǝmbo-a kǝnja-a kasala jiɍi jiɍi-aa wujana, har awo samma bǝɍinno waljiro gǝnaada.
9.11: Amma Almasiwu fǝledǝgǝna, wotte ɍiman kura awo ngǝla ngǝla isanaye. Curo leima duwon mukkon gǝni tǝdandǝna, maananju alaktu adǝye gǝni, leima burwoyedǝro kura-a tayir-a wodǝyero koje
9.12: tilo lonno na jauro darajaadǝro ngaye bu dal so, kǝnna soyen gǝni, bunjuyen merudu sawisoye kimowo.
9.13: Ai, bu dal so, dalo soye-a buwu kǝnna karwudi wargadaye kǝla tayirnambuwuyen jǝjǝrgadaa-a tiyi kambe tayir gǝnidǝa tayirro kalakcairo walyenoa,
9.14: balle bu Almasiwuye, ti duwon Ruhu sawisoyen awima waada bawoan Alaro kǝlanju cinadǝ, karwundea kida karmo kudoman tulji, ngainin andi ye Ala Kǝndǝgaimaro kida yiddiye.
9.15: Adǝ nangaro Almasiwudǝma soloma aman bǝɍinne wo. Am bowowadadǝ wadu warasa sawisoyea cawandi, dalilnjudǝ karmonju tayia biwuwa duwon kǝla aman burwoyen cadǝnadǝlan merujǝna nangaro.
9.16: Lamar aman warasayedǝ, sai aman diomadǝ bawojǝnaro tabbattiyiya duwon,
9.17: aman warasayedǝ karmo bawoa, kǝnduwonju bawo, dalilnjudǝ aman diomadǝ ronjuamaa aman warasayedǝ dunonju bawo nangaro.
9.18: Adǝ nangaro aman burwoyedǝma bu bawoan ndǝptǝnni.
9.19: Nawi Musa, ngawo wada Attauraye fi yayea jama sammaro wuljǝgǝnayen, bu kǝnna so, dal soye ingi-a wulu kime-a kǝska tǝngǝɍi isop cani-an kundenno ngoje kitawu kǝlanju-a jama samma-aro jǝjǝrjiye
9.20: tayiro: «Bu adǝ aman duwon Ala nayiro ronoworo wulnjaanadǝa tabbacciyi,» yeno.
9.21: Jiɍi adǝgainin leimadǝ-a kalwowa ambǝttuwuye samma-aro budǝa jǝjǝryeyeno.
9.22: Kǝla Attaurayen awo ngǝwua bulan tayirro kalakcai, koro bu fida bawoa, gawara bawo. Bu fida Almasiwuye
9.23: Adǝ nangaro, kaudi awowa samen dasaanayedǝa bu fida anilan tayirro kalaktu wajipcǝnadǝ, dole awowa sameye kǝlanjadǝ bu fida ania kojanalan tayirro waljai.
9.24: Awoa Almasiwu na darajaa mukko kamben tǝdǝna, wotte kaudi awo jireyero gǝni, amma samedǝmaro kǝrgawo, kǝrma fuwu Alayen andi nangaro fǝleduworo.
9.25: Koro samero ngawonjudǝ, kǝlanjua ngǝwuro bu fidaro njoro gǝni kǝrgawo, jiɍi ɍiman kura saa fi yaye bu kaanju gǝnian na darajaaro ngayidǝ gai.
9.26: Adǝgairo walyenoa, dole tǝn alaktu duniayen sai ngǝwuro bone caiya, amma akko tilo lonno njeroram jamannen kǝlanjua laya dionjulan biwudǝa baworo dioro fǝledǝgǝna.
9.27: Jiɍi kam fallo nuiro kadargada, koro ngawo adǝyen sai sharadǝ gai,
9.28: ngainin Almasiwu ye kǝlanjua biwu am ngǝwuye ngoduro fallo cina, koro fuwun walde kǝnyindiyero biwu nangaro gǝni, am tia gangadaaro gurejaidǝro njǝkkawo kudoro fǝlediyi.

10.1: Attauradǝ awo ngǝla ngǝla fuwun isaidǝye camuno jireye gǝni, kaudinja bas nangaro, tǝmmaro rakce bu fidanju kullum saa fi yaye cadidǝyen am ambǝttuwuro karǝnjaidǝa kalkallo kalakciwawo.
10.2: Adǝ gǝnia, ca ambǝttuwuwudǝ tilo lonnin tayirro walyeraa, biwuwanja gadero takcannidǝ, bu fida ania dio koldǝna, gǝna?
10.3: Amma bu fida anin saa fi yaye taktu biwuwaye mbeji.
10.4: Awoa bu dalowa-a dalla-ayen biwuwa cindudǝ tǝmmaro yojiwawo.
10.5: Adǝ nangaro duniaro kǝndenjun Almasiwuye Alaro: «Bu fida so, sadaa so raammi, amma wuro tiyi dabbarseyem.
10.6: Laya rǝmǝsso wargada bi bu fida biwu nangaro karwunǝm cǝraanni.
10.7: Daji wuye: “Alani, akko rawonǝm dioro kadikko, kitawulan kǝlanin ruwuwadadǝ gai,” yekko.»
10.8: Tiye: «Bu fida so, sadaa so, laya wargada so, bu fida biwu nangaro so raammi bi ardinǝmmi,» wuljǝnaye ngawon, wotte awo kǝla Attaurayen tǝdidǝ,
10.9: koro walde: «Akko rawonǝm dioro kadikko,» cǝnna. Awo kǝnyindiyedǝa kokturo burwoyedǝa cinji.
10.10: Koro rawo Alayen andi sadaa tiyi Isa Almasiwuyen tilo lonno tayirro walliyena.
10.11: Ɍiman fi yaye yim nguson daada kidanju bu fida tǝmmaro rakcane biwuwa cinjaiwawodǝa cǝdiya cǝdi,
10.12: amma Almasiwudǝ, ngawo bu fida biwuwa nangaro tilo lonno har abadaro cǝdǝnayen, kǝmboram Alayen napkeno,
10.13: koro kua adǝn fuwun kǝladowanjua si gǝnaduramnjuro cadiro gureji.
10.14: Awoa sadaa falnin am tayirro waljaidǝa sawisoro kalkallo cǝdǝna.
10.15: Ruhu Alayedǝ ye andiro kǝla adǝyen sheda saddi. Tiye:
10.16: «Akko aman ngawo yim aniyen tayi-a ndǝmmiyedǝ, yeno Kǝmandeye, wadawani karwunjaro yakkǝkki, hangalnja yen ruwunǝkki,» wuljǝnaye ngawon,
10.18: Gawara aniye tǝdǝnadǝ, sadaa biwu nangaro gadero tǝdiwawo. SƎMO KASTA-A KARWURO DUNO NJO-A
10.19: To, kǝramiya, bu Isayen jawal duwon ridu bawoaro na jauro darajaaro ngawoyedǝa fandiyena,
10.20: wotte jawal bǝɍin ro fandoye juwayen maananju tiyinjuyen andiro fǝrǝmsaana,
10.21: koro ɍiman kura fuwuma jama Alaye yea taiyena.
10.22: Adǝ nangaro karwu tiloan, kambǝrse tartippan, karwu ye bulan jǝjǝrjane hal diwin tayirdǝnalan, tiyi ye ingi tayir tuljǝnalan karǝnniyo!
10.23: Ti wadu ngojǝnadǝ amannadǝro, njasarai tǝmandeyedǝa dunoaro taiyo,
10.24: koro kattendero kissiyiyo, kǝrawo-a kida ngǝla ngǝla-a dioro kowoɍiniyo!
10.25: Bare ada am laaye gairo captundedǝa kolliyende, amma kattendero duno yiyo, masammanno yimdǝ karǝndu cǝdi ruwidǝro.
10.26: Awoa nodu jiredǝyea fandiyena ngawon rawonden biwu diyea, bu fida biwuwa nangaro gadero bawo,
10.27: sai wowom jauro riduye ye, kannu jau kǝladowa Alayea juwui ye guredu.
10.28: Kam Attaura Nawi Musayea wajǝnamadǝ kǝla mana shedama yindi bi yakkuyen kanjimaɍi cuwandǝnnin nui.
10.29: To, kam Tada Alayea ruje bu amanne tiyen tayirro waljǝnadǝa tayir gǝniro ngoje Ruhu serredǝa rajǝnamadǝ, wowom jiɍi fi todǝa nandiwin kojǝna tiro gǝnajagaiya jussǝnaro tǝmanuw?
10.30: Awoa ti duwon: «Wowom gǝnaduwudǝ kakke, wuma rǝmbǝkki,» koro: «Kǝmande jamanjua sharaji,» cǝnnadǝa noniyena.
10.31: Mukko Ala Kǝndǝgaimayero ngawodǝ awo jauro riduye.
10.32: Jaman caye, sa duwon ngawo karwundo wassǝnayen bone yawe lawala kuralan nedduwwadǝa tangowo,
10.33: sa laan fuwu jamayen curo rudu-a basari-ayen dǝgawwa, sa laan koro am tayiro adǝgai caddǝnaro kǝldǝgǝwwa.
10.34: Awoa kosowua njunonuwwa, kǝndando mowo ye karwukǝjialan kasadduwwa, nayi kǝlando kǝnda tia kojǝna ye, sawisoro tussi ye tawwadǝa nonuwwa nangaro.
10.35: To, adǝ nangaro bare tabbattuwundodǝa kolluwwi, tin mukowa jauro fanduwi.
10.36: Nettulan mǝradundoa, ngainin, awo Ala cǝraanadǝa diwwaye ngawon, awo waduro ngojǝnadǝa fanduwi.
10.37: «Gana jǝm cǝdiya, ti fuwun isimadǝ tussiwawo isi.
10.38: Koro jiremanidǝ kambǝrseyen roa dǝgai, amma ngaworo waldia, roni kǝjinju fanjiwawo.»
10.39: Andidǝ tayi ngaworo waldane faccagaidǝye gǝni, tayi kambǝrselan njǝkkawo cawandidǝye.

11.1: Kambǝrsedǝ, tima awo tǝmadǝnadǝa tabbatto ngodu, awowa taruiwawodǝa tartippo kasattu.
11.2: Tilan kaariyande sheda ngǝla Alayen cawandǝna.
11.3: Kambǝrselan andi ye dunia mana Alayen alaktǝna, wotte awo turuidǝ awo turuiwawolan tǝdǝnaro asuyeiye.
11.4: Kambǝrselan Nawi Haabila sadaa duwon Kaabilayedǝa kojǝnaa Alaro kikkudo. Kambǝrsenju nangaro tia jiremaro ngojane sheda ngǝla kiwando, Ala kǝnjonjudǝa ardijǝnadǝro. Koro ti nunama, kambǝrsenju nangaro koro yaye mana cǝdi.
11.5: Kambǝrsenju nangaro Nawi Idǝrisa bare karmo curunniro tia samero sapkera, daji tuwandǝnni, Ala tia sapcǝna nangaro. Awoa kawu saptunjudǝro, Ala tia ardijǝnaro shedajana.
11.6: Kambǝrse bawoan ardidu Alayea fandodǝ yojiwawo, awoa kam Alaa karǝnjidǝ dole Ala mbeji ye, maduwunjuro mukowa ci yedǝa kasacco.
11.7: Kambǝrselan Nawi Nuhu sa Ala tiro kǝla awowa kua yaye taruiwawoyen gala cinadǝn Ala ridalan am fannjuyea njǝkkaworo maara dabbaryeno. Ngainin duniaro wowom gǝnajiye warasama nanjire duwon kambǝrselan tuwandidǝyero walyeno.
11.8: Kambǝrselan Nawi Ibrahim, sa Ala tia na warasajidǝro leduro bowojǝnadǝn, Alaa giya, koro na lejimaa nojǝnni yaye, leyeno.
11.9: Kambǝrselan cidi wadudǝyelan sikudo gai napkeno, koro curo leimawayen Isaku-a Yakuba-a rokko warasawu wadu faldǝyeman kasarga,
11.10: awoa bǝrni fǝrdua duwon kurdumanju-a tandomanju-a Ala wodǝa karwunju gureji.
11.11: Kambǝrselan Saratu kǝlanju, ti duwon cambiwawo ye, jauro kǝmurjojǝna yedǝ, kaduwu cuwandiro walyeno, dalilnjudǝ ti wadu ngojǝnadǝa amannaro ngojǝna nangaro.
11.12: Adǝ nangaro kam fallen, ti koro nuna gai, kaduwu sillowuwa sameye ngǝwu gai, koro sim cidi kesa ci tekuyen komdiwawo gai kesambo.
11.13: Am ani samma awo wadudǝye cawandǝnnin kambǝrsenjaa sanuna, amma awodǝa kuruwuyen carune kǝji fanjana ye, tayi kǝlanja dunian kusotto-a sikudo-aro kasaccana ye.
11.14: Awoa am ngai manajaidǝ lardu gade kaanja majairo fǝlejai.
11.15: Lardu koljanadǝa takcairo walyenoa, ca dama walduye cawandǝna,
11.16: amma cuju adǝyero lardu ngalwo, wotte sameyero karwunja casakkǝna. Adǝ nangaro Aladǝ tia Alanjalan bowojaidǝa nangujiwawo, awoa tayiro bǝrni laa dabbarjǝgǝna.
11.17: Kambǝrselan Nawi Ibrahim, sa Ala tia jarapcǝnadǝn, Isakua bu fidaro kaino. Ti wadudǝa cuwandǝnadǝ tadanju tok tilodǝa cina,
11.18: ti duwon kǝlanjun Alaye: «Am Isakuyen tasambidǝmaa kaduwunǝmlan bowojai,» cǝnnadǝ.
11.19: Ibrahimdǝ na Alayen kǝnduwo am karmolaman sangoye mbejiro tǝmayeno, koro misal gainin tadanjudǝa ngainin kiwando.
11.20: Kambǝrselan Isaku Yakuba-a Yesawu-aro kǝla awowa fuwun isaiyen barga dǝpkeyeno.
11.21: Kambǝrselan Yakuba sa no cǝdidǝn ci kanjuyero njutkadaan Alaro ambǝcciye tada Isuwuye fi yayero barga dǝpkeyeno.
11.22: Kambǝrselan Isuwu kawunju njero cǝdidǝn kǝla luwo Israyilawuyen jandeje wada kǝla sillawanjuyen kaino.
11.23: Kambǝrselan, sa Nawi Musa tambǝnadǝn, yanju-a bawanju-a tia shawaro carune wada maiyedǝa rijannin kǝndawu yakkuro tia gǝrayera.
11.24: Kambǝrselan Nawi Musa sa wurajǝnadǝn tia tada fero Fira'aunayelan bowojaidǝa waje
11.25: kǝji fanda biwuye tussiwawo yayero jama Alaye-a rokko bone nja kǝreyeno.
11.26: Simnju mukowadǝro fijǝgǝna nangaro, rudu duwon kǝla Almasiwuyen canadǝa arsiyi Masarrero tamanna woro ngoyeno.
11.27: Kambǝrselan gǝrgadu maiye rijǝnnin Masarnin kiluwo, koro ti turuiwawodǝa curuna gairo dunoaro dayeno.
11.28: Kambǝrselan sala Burodi Yis bawoadǝ-a bu jǝjǝrdadǝ-a kido, bare siduwuma tadawa karunjadǝa lejǝnniro.
11.29: Kambǝrselan jamadǝ Bǝrǝm Maliyayedǝa cidi ngamdu gai rejane koyera, amma Masarwu ngai dio mayeranniya, tayia ingi giwo.
11.30: Kambǝrse nangaro jamadǝ kawu tulurro bǝrni Jerikoyea dirijanaye ngawon, garu Jerikoyedǝ wurgada.
11.31: Kambǝrselan Rahab jawardǝ sisiduwudǝa kǝlewan kapcǝgǝna, ganambuwu-a rokko sidǝgǝnni.
11.32: To, awi koro wullǝkki? Ca mana kǝla Gidiyon, Barak, Samson, Japta, Mai Dauda, Samaila, nawiya soyen dikkǝnaa, dama fandǝkkiwawo.
11.33: Kambǝrselan tayidǝ larduwaa kǝriwun gewo, shara kamgera, waduwaa kewando, ci ngambayea jakkera,
11.34: kǝnduwo kannuyea samgeyera, timi kashagarrero kayera, dunonambunjan dunoaro walyera, kǝriwun nankwa kedo, kǝwuwa kǝriwuye larduwa gadeyea duyera.
11.35: Kamuwa amnja sanuna karmolan roaro cijanadǝa tayiro kalakkera. Am laa ajawu kura kesa, karmolan cija ro ngalwo cawandoro afu fando wayera.
11.36: Laa yero rudu fǝlejagane kirwon jajaryera, koro tayia saɍgalan tujane kosoro kesakko.
11.37: Tayiro dongur kauye gǝgǝpkeyera, tayia yindiro kamgera, kashagarlan roro keyeso, karawi dimiye-a kaniye-a luwadaa fofomgera, lambi-a jǝktu-an kasarga, tayia basaryera.
11.38: Duniadǝma tayia roduro tinni, kalangasa so, kau kuruwu so, kul kauye so, bǝlaa cidiye solan bambaramgera.
11.39: Tayi ani samma kambǝrsenjayen sheda ngǝla cawandǝna, amma awo Ala tayiro waduro ngojǝgǝnadǝa cawandǝnni,
11.40: Ala andiro awo laa ngalwo dabbarsaana nangaro, ngainin andi bawolan naptu kalkaldǝa najagaiwawo.

12.1: Adǝ nangaro, shedawu kada kadami andia dirisane kǝlsanadǝ, andi ye takkal samma-a biwu budulan andia sadai-a waniyo, nettulan ngǝrǝm andiro gǝnasaanadǝa diyo,
12.2: simnde Isa tima kambǝrsendeye fǝrdunju ye, kalkaldumanju yedǝro figǝiyo, ti duwon karwukǝji fuwunjun gǝnaada nangaro kǝska karmoyedǝa necce nangunjudǝa awimaro ngojǝnnin kǝmboram kuris kǝrmaiye Alayen napcǝnadǝ. Bare tǝma kolluwwi!
12.3: Bare yimbaruwe tǝma kolluwwiro, ti duwon mukko biwuwuyen nankǝlado canadǝa tangowo.
12.4: Mǝldundo kǝla biwuyen koro yaye har bundo fiduro cadǝnni.
12.5: Koro mana duno njoma nayiro tadawa gairo njaddǝnadǝa ngessuwwa: «Tadani, bare njaɍgaɍo Kǝmandeye kǝskero ngonǝmmi, koro niro njǝkkadiya, bare tǝma kollǝmmi.
12.6: Awoa Kǝmande kam cǝraanadǝa caɍgaɍi, koro kam fi yaye tadanjuro cǝmoyidǝa kowoji.»
12.7: Njaɍgaɍodǝa neddowo, Ala tadawanju gairo njadai. Tada fi gǝle bawanju tia caɍgaɍiwawodǝ?
12.8: Njaɍgaɍo duwon wundu yaye tilan nuwanjuadǝ nandon bawoa, nayidǝ tadawa gǝni, ngǝriwuwa.
12.9: Koro bawawande sasambǝnaye andia caɍgaɍsane tayia bǝrsǝmmiyenadǝ, balle Bawa ruhuwayedǝro daunde kolgǝiye ro fandiye, gǝna?
12.10: Tayidǝ andia kawu ganaro jiɍi ngǝlaro caruna gainin caɍgaɍsana, amma Ala faidandero caɍgaɍsai, nuwande nantayirnjun fandiyoro.
12.11: Njaɍgaɍo samma sanjun kǝji gǝni, kutturo turui, amma ngawo adǝyen tayi tilan alamgadadǝye nuwanjadǝ nanlewa so, nanjire so.
12.12: Adǝ nangaro mukkondo cǝmbarǝna-a ngurumngurumndo duno bawoa-a dunoaro dewo.
12.13: Koro sindoro jawal cǝkko yiddowo, ngainin ngurdiyidǝ jau fanjiwawo, cujunjuro ngaji. Bare ser Alayea wanuwwi!
12.14: Am samma-a naptu nanlewaye dio-a nantayir-a manowo, awoa nantayirdǝ bawoa, wunduma Kǝmandea curuiwawo.
12.15: Hangal gǝnanowo, bare wundumaro ser Alaye fando tiyerǝnni, bare karwukutta fima cije suwolje tilan am kada tayir gǝniro waljanni,
12.16: bare wunduma kǝnjǝnama bi tayirnambuma Yesawu gairo waljǝnni, ti duwon masǝna tiloro warasanju nankaruye cǝladǝnadǝ.
12.17: Nonuwwadǝ gai, darye, sa bargadǝa warasaduro mayenniya, tia wayera. Simaloan majima, dama tǝmduye cuwandǝnni.
12.18: Nayidǝ awo rakce lediro gǝni kadiw, bi kannu jau fit so, duwu cǝlǝm pǝt so, nurnambu so, keyera kura so,
12.19: nuktu kangadiye so, kowo manaye so, kowo duwon am fanjane bare tayiro mana tǝrganniro lowojanadǝ.
12.20: Ai, wowom adǝa rakcane mǝrjanni: «Lǝmanma kau kuruwudǝa lejia, dongur kauye gǝgǝptalan roro ceyesi,»
12.21: koro awo fǝledǝnadǝ jaumaro riduye, har Nawi Musaye: «Karwukam sǝdane lolokki,» yeno.
12.22: Amma nayidǝ kau kuruwu Siyonnero, wotte bǝrni Ala Kǝndǝgaimaye, Jerujalem sameyero isuwwa, koro malaiyawa kada kadami-a ngǝmǝri-a
12.23: cammo jama karuye cunja samelan ruwuwadadǝ-a Ala alkali am sammaye-a ruhuwa am jirewuye kalkallo kalaktana-a
12.24: na Isa soloma aman bǝɍinne-a bu jǝjǝrgada duwon bu Haabilayea faidan kojǝnadǝ-aro isuwwa.
12.25: Hangal gǝnanowo, ti mana cǝdidǝa bare wanuwwi. Tayi duwon ti dunian sǝmonja kassǝnamaa wajanadǝ kajanni adǝ, ti samelan sǝmonde kassǝnamadǝa waniyea, ndayin gǝle kaniye?
12.26: Sadǝn kowonju cididǝa jǝjǝkkeno, amma kǝrma wadu ngoje: «Fallo koro cidi runjumaa gǝni, same yea jǝjǝngǝkki,» cǝnna.
12.27: Mana adǝ: «Fallo koro,» maananjudǝ awowa jǝjǝkkadadǝa baworo dio, wotte awowa alakkada, ngainin awowa jǝjǝktaiwawodǝ dasayi.
12.28: Adǝ nangaro, kǝrmai jǝjǝktiwawo fandiyenadǝ, Alaa wuseniyo, jiɍi ardijidǝn jauro darajaa-a ridua-alan tiro ambǝtkǝiyo,

13.2: Bare kusottowaa sosadu kolluwwi, adǝa diolan am laa nojannin malaiyawaa fannjan casaana.
13.3: Am kosolan dasaanadǝa tangowo, nayi ye tayi-a rokko kosolan dǝgawwa gairo, koro am basardanadǝ yea tangowo, nayi ye basari yawwa gairo.
13.4: Larusadǝro wundu yaye daraja co, koro bare wunduma aman larusaye juwunni, Ala janewu-a kǝnjǝnawu-aro shara cǝddi nangaro.
13.5: Hal kunguna rawoyero kadǝnowo, kǝla awo tawwayen danowo, awoa Ala kǝlanjuye: «Tǝmmaro nia kolnjǝkkiwawo, tǝmmaro nia wanjǝkkiwawo,» yeno.
13.6: Adǝ nangaro ridu bawoaro andiye: «Kǝmandedǝ tima banamani wo, awima rikkiwawo. Kamdǝ awi wuro sǝddi?» niye.
13.7: Fuwuwundo nayiro mana Alaye wulnjaanadǝa tangowo. Njeroram naptunjayea wunowo, kambǝrsenja gaiwo.
13.8: Isa Almasiwudǝ bikka ye, ku ye, har abadaro faldiwawo.
