13.9: Bare kolluwe alamdu gade jiɍi jiɍi nayia jawallan njattuluwunni. Karwudǝ kǝmbo bosolan gǝni, serlan dunoajima ngǝla wo. Ai, ada kǝmbosoyedǝ am duwon tayia jagaimasodǝro faidajagaiwawo.
13.10: Andidǝ laya duwaduram taiyena, tayi duwon leima Ala-a tadoramnin kida cadidǝ amari tia boye cadanni.
13.11: Lǝmanna duwon ɍiman kura bunja fije na jauro darajaadǝro biwu nangaro cuwudidǝ, danja ngawo bǝlayen kannun warjai.
13.12: Adǝ nangaro Isa ye jamadǝa bunju kǝlanjuyen tayirro kalakturo ngawo bǝlayen bone kiano.
13.13: To, luwiyo tia ngawo bǝlayen nagǝiyo, rudu canadǝa yaiyo.
13.14: Awoa dunia adǝn bǝrni har sawisoro dǝgai taiyende, amma bǝrni fuwun isidǝa maniye.
13.15: Adǝ nangaro tiyen Alaro sadaa njungoroye sawisoro yiddiyo, wotte cinden cunju kasaddiyo, tiro daraja yiyo.
13.16: Bare nanngǝla-a nankǝre-a dio kolluwwi, sadaa jiɍi aniye Ala kǝjinja fanji.
13.17: Fuwuwundoro dau kolgǝnowo, tayia gaiwo, am tayia cawori gairo rondo caɍiwi. Karwu kǝjia cado, njǝmjaialan gǝni, adǝ nayiro faidanjagaiwawo nangaro.
13.18: Andiro moduwa saddowo. Karwunden saɍiwu bawoa noniyena, naptunde samman kalkal dio rayiye.
13.19: Nayia lowonjakki, duwan nandoro waldǝkke isǝkkiro moduwa dewo. LEWA DARYEYE
13.20: Ala nanlewaye, ti duwon bu aman sawisoyen Kǝmande Isa Sǝni Kura dimiyayedǝa karmolan cǝsangǝnadǝ,
13.21: rawonju deworo nayia awo ngǝla sammalan dabbarnja, koro andilan awo tiro ardiduye Isa Almasiwuyen cǝddo. Tiro har abadaro daraja tio! Amin.
13.22: Kǝramiya, nayia lowonjakki, mana karwuro duno njoye adǝa kasaddowo, nayiro kalma ganan ruwunjagakkǝna nangaro.
13.23: Nonowo, kǝraminde Timotia kosolan koljana. Tussǝnnin isia, ti-a rokko nayia njaruiye.
13.24: Fuwuwundo samma-a muminna samma-aa lewanowo. Kǝramiyande lardu Italiyayedǝ nayia lewanjai.

1.1: Wuma Yakuba wolodi Alaye-a Kǝma Isa Almasiwuye-adǝ jiɍiya mewun yindin duniaro tatargaadadǝro: Salam! Kambǝrse-a nanrashidu-a
1.2: Kǝramiyani, bone jiɍi jiɍi nayia njawandiya, awo jauro karwukǝjiyero ngonowo,
1.3: awoa rijaptu kambǝrsendoyedǝ njasakke nedduwiro nonuwwa.
1.4: Amma nettudǝ kidanju cotto cǝdo, ngainin awima maunjannin wuranuwe kalkallo walluwi.
1.5: To, kamndo laa nanrashidu tia maujǝnaro walyenoa, Ala duwon jǝkkadǝnnin am sammaro nanjaijaalan cimadǝa cuworo, koro tiro ci.
1.6: Amma kambǝrselan shekku cakkǝnnin cuworo, awoa shekkumadǝ tǝmbaɍi tekuye karuwaye kanji kanjiro tǝmbaljiyi-a camun.
1.7: Kam adǝ bare na Kǝmandeyen awo laa cuwandiro tǝmajǝnni,
1.8: ti kam hangal yindia, awo cǝdi samman na tilon dǝganni. Talaa-a gaɍiwu-a
1.9: Kǝrami talaadǝ darajanjudǝro awulo juwo,
1.10: ti gaɍiwudǝ ye nangunjudǝro awulo juwo, fǝɍe kajimbe gai baworo walji nangaro.
1.11: Awoa kǝngal kannunjua jau fit culuwe kajim ngamji, fǝɍenju ye ɍimje fidi, nanshawanju ye baworo walji. Jiɍi adǝgainin gaɍiwudǝ ye dawu kǝndonjuyen baworo walji. Rijaptu-a jaraptu-a
1.12: Barganju kam curo jaraptuyen neccidǝ, awoa tia jarapcane nasardiya, aɍiawu roye cuwandi, aɍiawu duwon Ala am tia caraanaro ci cǝne wadu ngojǝnadǝ.
1.13: Bare wunduma sa jarawaye tia ngojiya, «Ala wua jaramso,» wuljǝnni, awoa Ala awo diwilan jaraptiwawo, koro ti kǝlanju wundumaa jarapciwawo.
1.14: Amma kam fi yaye mangarnju tia cǝdane jambajiya, jarapti.
1.15: Daji mangardǝ curo ngojiya, biwu cambi, koro biwudǝ ye wurajiya, karmo cuwudi.
1.16: Kǝramiyani njaraakkǝnaso, bare wunduma nayia jambanjanni!
1.17: Kǝnjo ngǝla so, kalkal so samma samen na Ala Bawa nur alaktumayen jǝpci, ti duwon faldiwawo ye, nanjun kaudi suworduma bawo yedǝ.
1.18: Rawonjuman Ala andi nema burwoye alaktunju sammaye gairo walliyoro, andia mana jireyen sesambo. Mana Alaye fandu-a ga-a
1.19: Kǝramiyani njaraakkǝnaso, adǝa asunowo: Wundu yaye fanduro doiro waljo, bare duwan manajǝnni ye, gǝrgajǝnni ye,
1.20: awoa gǝrgadu kambedǝ nanjire Alayea cuwudiwawo.
1.21: Adǝ nangaro awo waada so, diwi so sammaa wanowo, mana Ala karwundoro cakkǝnadǝa rokura bawoalan mowowo, nanjun kǝnduwo nayia njǝkkawoyea.
1.22: Bare kǝlando jambanuwe mana Alayea kǝrǝnduwu basso walluwwi, tia gawuro wallowo!
1.23: Awoa kam laa manadǝa kǝrǝnji duwon jǝgaiwawoa, ti kam fǝkkanju kudǝramlan curuna-a camun.
1.24: Fǝkkanju cure saptiyama, alama fǝkkanjuyedǝa ngessi.
1.25: Amma kam duwon wada kalkal nankam kǝlaye fandoyedǝa kǝla hangallayen cure tilan dǝgai, koro awo fanjǝnaa ngessiwawo amma kǝndo ngǝla cǝdidǝ, tima kam awo cǝdi samman bargaaro waljidǝ wo.
1.26: Kam laa ti adinma cǝni duwon cinju rojiwawoa, karwunju jambajǝna, koro adinnju ye de sul.
1.27: Adin jireye-a awo waada bawoa-a Ala Bawande ardijǝnadǝ: ngǝniya-a kamuwa kwa faccaanaa-aro jǝktunjan kistuwu ye, jarawa duniayero kadu ye.

2.1: Kǝramiyani, Kǝmande Isa Almasiwu darajamaa mǝrsanuwwadǝ, bare amba gayirnuwwi!
2.2: Misallo kam laa kulum dinarre-a kajǝmu shawa-aa cammondoro ngayi, koro kam laa talaa ye kajǝmu dina kadawua ngayiro walyenoa,
2.3: kam kajǝmu jauro shawaadǝa ruwe tiro: «Are na adǝn ngǝlaro namme!» nuwi, amma ti talaadǝro: «Na todǝn dane!» bi «Cidin namme!» nuwia,
2.4: kattendon gayirnuwe sharawu niadiwiaro walluwwa, gǝna?
2.5: Kǝramiyani njaraakkǝnaso, fannowo, Ala am dunialan talaawadǝa kambǝrselan gaɍiwuro waljaro, koro nodonju bargaa am tia caraanaro ci cǝnnadǝa warasajaro kǝrejǝna, gǝna?
2.6: Amma nayidǝ talaadǝa runuwwa. Gaɍiwuwama gǝna basarnjane shararambo njasadidǝ wo?
2.7: Koro tayima cu darajaa tilan bowonjaidǝa bassaidǝ wo, mare?
2.8: Wada nodo bargaa Alaye kitawulan ruwuwada: «Kǝmaskinǝmba kǝlanǝm gairo raye,» cǝnnadǝa gawia, jauro ngǝla!
2.9: Amma amba gayirnuwia, biwu diwi, koro wadadǝ nayia ganambuwuro wowomnjai.
2.10: Wundu duwon wada Alaye sammaa jǝgane falnin taljǝnadǝ sammaa jǝganni-a kal wo.
2.11: Awoa ti duwon «Bare kǝnjǝna dimmi,» cǝnnadǝ koro walde: «Bare wundumaa yejǝmmi,» yeno. To, kǝnjǝna dimbawo yaye, amma kam yejǝmmaa, wada ganambumaro wallǝmma.
2.12: Adǝ nangaro manando-a kidando-aa am duwon tayia wada nankam kǝlaye fandoyelan sharajaidǝ gairo dewo!
2.13: Awoa kanjimaɍi bawoalan kam njunojiwawomadǝa sharajai, amma kanjimaɍidǝma wowombo kura wo. Kambǝrse-a kǝndo ngǝla-a
2.14: Kǝramiyani, kam laa kambǝrsenjua cǝni duwon kǝndonjun fǝlejiwawoa, awi faidanju wo? Kambǝrsenju tia cǝkkayi wa?
2.15: Misallo kǝrami laa kongwa bi kamu jakturam ye bawoa, kǝmbo kun baɍinne ye bawoaro walyenoa,
2.16: koro kamndo laaye tiro: «Kǝlewan lene! Ala jakturam-a kǝmbo-a njo!» cǝni duwon mǝradu tiyinjuye galjiwawoa, awi faidanju wo?
2.17: Jiɍi adǝgainin kambǝrse kǝndonju bawoadǝ nuna.
2.18: Waneye kam laaye: «Ni kambǝrsenǝmba, wu ye kǝndonia,» cǝni. Kambǝrsenǝm kǝndo bawoa wuro fǝlesǝgǝne, wu ye kambǝrseni kǝndonin fǝlenjǝgǝkki.
2.19: Ala tiloro kasaddǝmmadǝ, ngǝla dimma. Sedannama kasaccane riduro lolojai.
2.20: Ni hangal bawoa, kambǝrse kǝndonju bawoadǝ faida baworo isanonjagaiya, raam?
2.21: Nawi Ibrahim kaarindedǝ, sa tadanju Isakua kǝla laya duwaduramben sadaaro cinadǝn, kǝndonjun gǝna Ala tia jiremaro ngoyeno?
2.22: Rui, kambǝrse kǝndonju-a rokko kidajana, koro kǝndolan kambǝrsedǝ kalkallo waljǝna.
2.23: Ngaima awo kitawulan ruwuwadadǝ wakkajǝna: «Nawi Ibrahim Alaa mǝrsajǝna nangaro, Ala tia jiremaro ngoyeno,» koro tia amanma Alayelan bowoyera.
2.24: Nonowo, kambǝrse runjun gǝni, kǝndolan Ala kamba jiremaro ngoji.
2.25: Jiɍi adǝgainin Rahab jawardǝ ye, sa kadunowudǝa cǝsaye jawal gadeyen salamje lejanadǝn, kǝndonjun gǝna Ala tia jiremaro ngoyeno?
2.26: Awoa tiyi sindu bawoa nunadǝ gai, kambǝrse kǝndo bawoadǝ ye nuna.

3.1: Kǝramiyani, bare ngǝwundo malǝmbaro waljanni, andi malǝmbadǝa nanjau kojǝnalan sharasairo nonuwwa.
3.2: Awoa andi samma fudu kadan talliye. Kam laa mananjun tǝmmaro taljiwawoa, ti kalkallo waljǝna, koro rakce tiyinju samma yea roji.
3.3: Fǝrra awo rayiyena cadoro cinjaro ɍijam yakkiyeya, tiyinja samma yea yakkiye kanji rayiyenadǝro lejai.
3.4: Koro maarawa ingiye ye ruiwo. Tayidǝ jauro kura duwon, karuwa dunoa tayia tǝmbalji yaye, maaramadǝ kǝriduram tǝngǝɍiman na cǝraanaro kǝriji.
3.5: Jiɍi adǝgainin tǝlamdǝ ye awo jauro tǝngǝɍi, amma awulonju jauro kura! Koro jiɍi kannu tǝngǝɍi dǝr kuraro kannu cǝttaidǝa ruiwo.
3.6: Tǝlamdǝ kannu! Dawu nashawa tiyindeyen tima fǝrdu jirenambu jiɍi fiye yaye wo. Tiyi sammaa bannaji, ro sammaro kannu cǝttai, koro fǝrdunjulan kannu jaanamaye kǝrga.
3.7: Awoa adamgǝna bundi so, ngudo so, lǝman nganjin gǝrdama so, alau ingiye so jiɍi fi yayea rakce roji, har tayia rojǝna,
3.8: amma wunduma rakce tǝlamba rojiwawo! Tidǝ awo diwi tǝmmaro gǝm napciwawo, sum karmoyen cap cǝmbǝɍǝna.
3.9: Tilan Kǝmande Bawadǝa yungoriye, koro tilan am camuno Alayen alakkadaa baskuniye.
3.10: Ci tilodǝman njungoro-a baskudu-adǝ caluwi. Kǝramiyani, adǝ wajipcǝnni.
3.11: Sim ingiye bǝlaa falnin ingi kǝji-a cǝm-a fiji wa?
3.12: Kǝramiyani, ya tarmuye rakce jaitun cakki wa? Ra, ya inabbe tarmu cakki wa? Sim ingi mandamanda ye rakce ingi kǝji fijiwawo. Nanrashidu Alaye
3.13: Wundundo nanrashidu-a hangal-aa wo? Kǝndǝgai ngǝlalan kǝndonju rokura bawo nanrashidulan isidǝa fǝlejo!
3.14: Amma karwundon nandǝɍi jau-a kǝla rawo-a mennaa, bare awulo buwin jiredǝa wanuwe kattuwu kammuwwi.
3.15: Adǝ nanrashidu samelan jǝpcǝna gǝni, tidǝ duniaye, hal adamgǝnaye, Kǝladodǝye.
3.16: Na duwon nandǝɍi-a kǝla rawo-a dasaanadǝ, hangalsango-a kǝndo diwi jiɍi jiɍi-a ye mbeji.
3.17: Amma nanrashidu sameyedǝ burwon tayir, daji nanlewa kudoma, rokura bawoa, solo rawoma, jauro kanjimaɍima ye, serma ye, gayirdu bawoa, nanmǝnafǝk bawoa.
3.18: Nonowo, am nanlewa cawude nanlewan canadimadǝ nema nanjireye kalajai.

4.1: Awi lawala so, kambiwu so kattendoro cuwudi? Mǝradundo diwiso karwundolan mǝldaidǝman gǝna isai?
4.2: Awo laa raawwa duwon fanduwwawoa, kam yejuwi. Koro awo laa mangarnuwwa duwon ranguwe fanduwwawoa, kattendon kambiwu diwi ye, mǝlduwi ye. Alaa koruwwi nangaro fanduwwawo.
4.3: Koruwi duwon fanduwwawo, mǝradundo diwiso galduro niadiwin koruwi nangaro.
4.4: Nayi kǝnjǝnamaso, nansawa duniayedǝ nankǝlado Alayero nonuwwi wa? Adǝ nangaro wundu duwon sawa duniayero waldu cǝraanamadǝ kǝlanjua kǝlado Alayero kalakci.
4.5: Ra, dalil bawoalan kitawuye: «Ruhunju karwundero cakkǝnadǝro kemi kasacciwawo,» cǝnna gǝna tǝmanuw?
4.6: Amma Ala na kojǝnaro ser ci. Adǝmaro kitawuye: «Aladǝ rokurawua wajǝna, amma rokuranambuwuro sernju fǝlejiyi,» cǝnna.
4.7: Adǝ nangaro Alaro dau kolgǝnowo, Yiwulissa wanowo, nayin kuruwunno cǝgase leji.
4.8: Alaa karǝnnowo, ti ye nayia karǝnnjai. Nayi biwumaso, mukkondo kida biwuyen tullowo. Nayi curo yindiaso, karwundo tayirro kalangowo.
4.9: Karwukutta dewo, jajenowo, yirowo. Kasusundoa solan fallowo, karwukǝjindoa karwukuttaro kalangowo.
4.10: Fuwu Kǝmandeyen rokura bawoaro wallowo, ti ye nayia jajannjai. Kǝlandoa sharawu am gadeyero ngodu
4.11: Kǝramiya, bare kattendon adǝlamduwwi! Kam duwon kǝraminjua adǝlamji bi sharajidǝ wadadǝmaa adǝlamje sharaji. Koro wadadǝa sharanǝmia, ni wada gama gǝni, sharamanjuro wallǝmi.
4.12: Ala wada njoma ye, sharama yedǝ tilo, ti duwon nanjun kǝnduwo njǝkkawoye-a siduwuye-a mbeji. Amma nidǝ, ni wundu duwon kamanǝmba sharanǝmidǝ? Awulo bo
4.13: To, fannowo nayi duwon: «Ku bi baɍi bǝrni laaro leniye saa fallo nadǝn nammiye sawur diye riwa fandiye,» nuwidǝ.
4.14: Awo baɍi wakkajima nonuwwi. Rondodǝ awi? Nayidǝ bandǝgǝne fǝledǝne jǝm cǝdiya, baworo waljidǝ gai.
4.15: Cujudǝro: «Kǝmande kasaccia, dǝgaiye adǝ-a todǝ-aa diye,» wuldudǝ nayiro wajimnjaana.
4.16: Amma akko kǝla rokurandoyen awulo buwi, awulo bo jiɍi adǝgai samma jauro diwi.
4.17: Nonowo, kam ngǝla dio nojǝna duwon cǝdǝnnimadǝ biwu cǝdǝna.

5.1: Nayi gaɍiwuso, fannowo, bone nayia njawandi nangaro yirowo, burwu yakkowo!
5.2: Arsiyindo ye bannadǝna, kajǝmundo ye kanambe juwuna,
5.3: karendo dinarre-a ɍiwullaye-a yero diwuram cijǝgǝna, koro diwuramnja naptu shedaye njadde kannu gai tiyindo juwui. Jaman daryeye adǝman arsiyi cammuwwa!
5.4: Akko ngǝnǝwuram duwon kidawu kulondo kalajanaro njo wanuwwadǝ kǝlandon so cǝdi, koro so kalawuyedǝ sǝmo Kǝmande Martawamayedǝro ngaana.
5.5: Dunialan curo larasu-a kǝji fanda-ayen dǝgawwa. Yim duwayero karwundoa kaisuaro diwwa.
5.6: Jiremaa sharanuwe yejuwwa. Kambiwunjaiwawo. Kanadi ta
5.7: Adǝ nangaro, kǝramiya, har kǝnde Kǝmayero kanadi taiwo! Akko baremadǝ nema tamanna kanadilan gureji, har dǝlawu burwoye-a daryeye-a cuwandiro.
5.8: Nayi ye kanadi taiwo, karwundoro duno yakkowo, kǝnde Kǝmayedǝ del karǝnjǝna nangaro.
5.9: Kǝramiya, bare kǝla kamandoyen so diwwi. Adǝ gǝnia, Ala nayia sharanjai. Akko sharamadǝ cinnalan daada!
5.10: Kǝramiya, nawiya cu Kǝmandeyen manajanadǝa misal bone nja-a kanadi ta-ayero ngonowo.
5.11: Akko am curo boneyen neccanadǝa bargaaro ngoniye. Kanadi Nawi Ayubayedǝ yea fannuwwa, koro awo Kǝmande tiro daryeramnin cǝddǝnadǝ yea ruwwa. Awoa Kǝmandedǝ njunoduma ye, kanjimaɍima ye.
5.12: Awi yayero burwonno, kǝramiyani, bare kansi buwwi, cu sameyen kal, bi cidiyen kal, bi awo gadeyen kal. Ngǝlanjudǝ «Aaa,» bi «A'a,» wullowo. Adǝ gǝnia, shara njadai. Alaa koro
5.13: Kamndo laa bone cai wa? Alaa cuworo. Laa ye kǝji fanji wa? Aiya njungoroye yejo.
5.14: Kamndo laa dondi wa? Amwurawa jama Alayea bowojo isa cu Kǝmayen kǝlanjuro kǝndawu jaitunne fijagaiaro tiro moduwa caddo.
5.15: Moduwa kambǝrseyedǝ kam dondidǝa isangajiye Kǝma tia cǝsangi. Koro biwu cǝdǝnaro walyenoa, gawara cuwandi.
5.16: Adǝ nangaro biwundo amandoro wulgǝnowo, moduwa amandoro yiddowo, ngainin nganuwi. Moduwa kam jiremayedǝ jauro kǝnduwoa.
5.17: Nawi Iliyadǝ kam andi gai, koro bare ingi cudurǝnniro Alaa tai daje lowoyenniya, cididǝlan saa yakku kǝndawu arakkuaro ingi cudurǝnni.
5.18: Koro walde Alaa lowoyenniya, samelan ingi cudure cidi ye nemanju kekko.
5.19: Kǝramiyani, kamndo laa jawal jireye kolje kamanju tia jawallo kalakce cakkiya,
5.20: adǝa nonowo: Kam duwon biwumaa jawallo kalakce cakkǝnamadǝ ronju karmolan cǝkkaana, koro biwu kada jakcǝna.

1.1: Wuma Biturus kǝngayam Isa Almasiwuyedǝ sikudowa kǝreyada lardu Fantusse-a Galatiyaye-a Kafadokiyaye-a Asiyaye-a Bitiniyaye-aro tatargaadaro,
1.2: wotte nayi duwon Ala Bawadǝ caman nayia nonjana ye, Ruhunjuyen nayia jirewuro njadǝna ye, Isa Almasiwua gaiwo jǝjǝrduwu bunjuyelan tayirro walloworo kǝrenjana yedǝro: Ser-a nanlewa-a nayin ngǝwuja! Tǝma roa
1.3: Bargaa Ala Bawa Kǝmande Isa Almasiwuye! Kanjimaɍinju kuradǝro karmolan cidu Isa Almasiwuyen andia sasakke bǝɍinno tǝma roa laaro tambiyena.
1.4: Tǝma roadǝ tima warasa njǝpciwawo ye, tayir gǝniro waljiwawo ye, koro ɍimjiwawo ye, nayi nangaro samelan gǝnaada wo,
1.5: nayi duwon kǝnduwo Alaye kambǝrseyen nayia njaɍiwe nayiro njǝkkawo jaman daryeyen fǝlediyiro dabbargaadaa njaddidǝ.
1.6: Kǝla awo aniyen, kǝrma kawu ganaro jarapta jiɍi jiɍiro karwukutta fannuwi yaye, karwundo tai daje kǝjijǝna.
1.7: Dalil jarapta aniyedǝ, tima kambǝrsendo tabbatto culuworo. Dinardǝ awo sidiyi yaye, tia kannun jarapcai, amma kambǝrsendodǝ dinarra tamanlan kojǝna, koro yim fǝleduwu Isa Almasiwuyen njungoro-a daraja-a bǝrsǝm-a cuwudi.
1.8: Tia ruwwi yaye, raawwa, kǝrma tia ruwwawo yaye, mǝrsanuwwa, koro karwukǝji dama bawo wuldumaro yojiwawo ye fannuwi,
1.9: awoa leduwuram kambǝrsendoye, wotte njǝkkawo rondoyedǝa fanduwi.
1.10: Njǝkkawo adǝ, nawiya duwon kǝla ser kaandoro waljidǝyen manajanadǝ kǝla tiyen majane hangallayen kekeworo.
1.11: Ruhu Almasiwuye tayilan dǝganadǝ kuren kǝla bone Almasiwuye-a daraja ngawonjun jǝgaidǝ-ayen manajǝna, daji nawiyadǝ kǝla wundu-a jaman jiɍi fi-ayen manajǝnadǝa cacaworǝna.
1.12: Ase, tayi kǝlanjaro gǝni, nayiro kida njaddǝnaro asuyera. Kǝrma Ruhu Alaye samen juwajanadǝyen kawuɍi kǝji adǝa nayi yero wulnjaana, kawuɍi duwon malaiyawa tia noduro majaidǝ. Kǝndǝgai tayir
1.13: Adǝ nangaro hangaldǝnowo, kǝlando ɍiwowo ser duwon yim Isa Almasiwu fǝlediyiya njadidǝro tǝmando tǝgǝmbo yakkowo.
1.14: Tadawa kǝngaimaso gai, mangar diwi caye sa nodunambuyen dǝgawwadǝa wanowo,
1.15: amma ti nayia bowonjanadǝ tayirdǝ gai, nayi ye kǝndǝgaindo samman tayirro wallowo,
1.16: dalilnjudǝ kitawulan ruwuwada: «Wu tayir nangaro, tayirro wallowo!»
1.17: Ti duwon gayirjiwawolan kida wunduye yayea sharajidǝa Bawalan bowonuwia, Ala ridalan kǝndǝgaindo nansikudoyedǝa dewo.
1.18: Nonuwwa, naptundo bowu kaariyandon warasanuwwadǝlan merungera, amma ɍiwulla so, dinar so njǝpcaiyen gǝni,
1.19: bu Almasiwuyen, wotte bu darajaa tama balo so, awo waada so bawoaye gaiyen.
1.20: Kawu dunia alaktiro Ala tia kadarjǝna, amma jaman daryeye adǝn nayi nangaro fǝledǝgǝna.
1.21: Tiyen nayidǝ Ala duwon tia karmolan cǝsange tiro daraja cinadǝa kasadduwwa. Ngainin kambǝrsendo-a tǝmando-a Alalan kǝrga.
1.22: Jiredǝa gawe amandoa nanmǝnafǝk bawoalan raworo kǝlando tayirnuwwadǝ, kattendon karwu tiloan jauro tǝrawowo,
1.23: bǝɍinno tambuwwa nangaro. Tambondodǝ, kasuni njǝpcimalan gǝni, njǝpciwawolan, wotte mana Alaye roa sawisoro dǝgaidǝyelan.
1.24: Awoa: «Adamgǝna samma kajim gai, darajanju samma ye fǝɍe kajimbe-a camun. Kajimdǝ ngamji, fǝɍedǝ ye curi,
1.25: amma mana Alaye sawisoro dǝgai.» Mana adǝ tima kawuɍi kǝji nayiro wulnjaanadǝ wo.

2.1: Adǝ nangaro niadiwi samma-a jirenambu samma-a nanmǝnafǝk-a nandǝɍi-a yarsǝm samma-a kollowo,
2.2: timal tambo bǝɍinna gai kiam jireye jalla wotte mana Alaye jauro rawowo, ngainin njǝkkawondon wuranuwi,
2.3: ser Kǝmayedǝa ngǝlaro tambuwwaro walyenoa.
2.4: Na Kǝmayero arowo, ti duwon kau roa ambe wajana, amma na Alayen kǝreyada-a bǝrsǝmgada-adǝ.
2.5: Nayi kǝlandoma kauwa roa gai tayilan fado Ruhuye cadandi, ɍimanna tayirro wallowo sadaa Ruhuye duwon Ala Isa Almasiwuyen ardijidǝa yiddoworo.
2.6: Awoa kitawulan tabbatkaada: «Akko Siyonnin kau masammanne kǝreyada bǝrsǝmba gǝnanǝkki, kam tia mǝrsajǝnamadǝ, nangu tia cǝdaiwawo.»
2.7: Nayi kambǝrsendoadǝ, nandon kau adǝ bǝrsǝmba, amma na kambǝrsenambuwudǝyen: «Kau duwon fado tandomaso wajanamadǝ, tima kau tandoye sammaro faidaaro waljǝnadǝ wo,»
2.8: koro: «Kau talduye ye, takkalduma yedǝ.» Manadǝa jaanni nangaro tayiro kadargaadadǝ gai taljana.
2.9: Amma nayidǝ kabila kǝreyada, kǝwu ɍimanna Mai Kuraye, jiɍi tayir, jama Alayero walluwwa. Ngainin kǝndo kǝnduwoa ti duwon nayia duwulan luwowo nurnju ajabbaro ngawoworo bowonjanadǝyedǝa wulluwi.
2.10: Calan nayidǝ jama tilo gǝni, amma kǝrma jama Alaye, calan njunonjanni, amma kǝrma njunonjana. Kǝnduwowuro dau kolduwu
2.11: Kǝrawowuni, nayi kusottowa-a sikudowa-adǝ, nayia lowonjakki, mangar tiyiye nayiro kǝriwu njakkadidǝa wanowo!
2.12: Dawu kǝrdiyayen kǝndǝgai ngǝla dewo, ngainin nayia diwi diowu gai adǝlamnjaison, kǝndondo ngǝladǝa carune yim Kǝma walde isiya, Alaro daraja cadi.
2.13: Kǝma nangaro kǝnduwoma adamgǝnaye fi yayero dau kolgǝnowo, mai yen kal, ti fuwumadǝro,
2.14: gomnawaso yen kal, maidǝ tayia diwi diowuro wowom gǝnaduwuro, koro ngǝla diowu yea jajakturo cunodǝnadǝro.
2.15: Rawo Alayedǝ tima ngǝla diolan hangalnambuwuro mananja nanjayilledǝa dapkǝwi.
2.16: Kambe gairo dǝgaiwo, amma kaɍeawa Alaye gai bare nankam kǝlayendodǝn faidaduwe nankǝlado gǝranuwwi.
2.17: Am sammaro daraja yowo, jama kǝramiyayedǝa rawowo, Alaa rinowo, mairo daraja yowo! Misal bone nja Almasiwuye
2.18: Wolodiya, Ala rida samman bando ngimbaro dau kolgǝnowo, tayi ngǝla-a rokura bawoa-a runjaro gǝni, tayi diwi yero.
2.19: Hal Alaye nangaro, bone jussǝnni yame nettudǝ na Alayen ardiyada.
2.20: Biwu diwe nayia bannjane nedduwiya, awi jajaktuye diw? Amma ngǝla diwe bone yawe nedduwiya, adǝ na Alayen ardiyada.
2.21: Almasiwu nayi nangaro bone canadǝro, nayi yea adǝmaro bowongera. Awoa nayiro misal kolnjaana, nayi ye sinjua gaiworo,
2.22: ti duwon biwu ye cǝdǝnni, jirenambu ye cinjun tuwandǝnnidǝ.
2.23: Tia rarayeranniya, radu kalakcǝnni, bone kianniya, wusajǝnni, shara jire kamdumadǝro kǝlanju kaino.
2.24: Ti kǝlanju biwuwande tiyinjun kǝla kǝskadǝyen ngoyeno, andi biwuro nuiyenadǝ nanjirero dǝgaiyoro. Lorunjuman ngayew.
2.25: Calan nayidǝ dimiya gai fattǝgǝwwa, amma kǝrma na ti Sǝnindo ye, rondoro Kistuwuma yedǝyero walduwwa.

3.1: Jiɍi adǝgainin kamuwa, kwawandoro dau kolgǝnowo, laanja manadǝa jagaiwaworo walyenoa, mana bawoalan kǝndǝgai kamuwanjayen jawallo ngasayi,
3.2: kǝndǝgaindo bǝrsǝmba-a tayir-adǝa carui nangaro.
3.3: Bare kawarando kǝla japta so, kare dinarre-a kajǝmu shawa-a njakko so deyan turuiro waljǝnni,
3.4: amma hal gǝraada karwuye so, nanshawa dinjiwawo wotte ruhu rokura bawoa ye, hangal bowadaa ye soro waljo, adǝ na Alayen jauro tamanna.
3.5: Ngainin kure kamuwa tayir tǝmanja Alaro casakkǝnadǝ kawara cade kwawanjaro dau kolyeyera,
3.6: jiɍi Saratu Nawi Ibrahimba jǝgane tia kǝmanjulan bowojǝnadǝ gai. Awo ngǝla diwia, koro ridu fima kolluwe nayia njadannia, nayi ye ferowanjuro walluwi.
3.7: Kwawa, jiɍi adǝgainin naptundo nanrokkoyedǝa nanrashidun dewo, kamuwandoye dunonja kaandoa najǝgǝnnidǝro, tayiro daraja yowo, kǝnjo serra ro sawisoyedǝa kallo warasanuwi nangaro. Ngainin moduwa diondo daptuwuro kanuwi. Kǝla nanjireyen bone nja
3.8: Daryerambo, nayi samma hangal tiloa-a njunodua-a kǝrawo nanyaanayea-a kanjimaɍia-a rokura bawoa-aro wallowo,
3.9: bare diwia diwilan bi radua radulan rǝmbuwwi, cuju adǝyero barga warasanoworo barga dǝpkǝnowo, adǝa dioro nayia bowonjanadǝro.
3.10: Awoa: «Kam naptu kǝji mada so, kawu ngǝla kuro so cǝraanamadǝ, tǝlamnjua diwiro kajo, cinju ye bare jirenambu wuljǝnniro rojo,
3.11: diwilan tǝmjo ngǝla cǝdo, nanlewa majo tia kadujo,
3.12: Kǝmandeye simnjudǝ jirewua curui, sǝmonju ye moduwanja kǝrǝnji, amma fǝkka Kǝmandeyedǝ diwi diowua wajǝna.»
3.13: To, kasaduaro ngǝla dio rawowuro walluwia, wundu gǝle nayia basarnjai?
3.14: Amma kǝla nanjireyen bone yawiro walyenoa, bargando. Bare tayia rinuwwi bi karwundo kuttajǝnni,
3.15: amma karwundon Almasiwua Kǝmandero bǝrsǝmmowo. Dalil tǝma nayin dǝganadǝye njaworiya, jaawu njoro kullum dabbargadaro wallowo,
3.16: adǝ yaye rokuranambu-a daraja-alan dewo, karwundo ye nayia saɍiwunjaiwawolan dǝga, ngainin am kǝla kǝndǝgaindo ngǝla Almasiwulan diwidǝyen adǝlamnjaiya, yarsǝmnjadǝro nangu tayia cǝdai.
3.17: Rawo Alayero walyenoa, diwi diolan yayero ngǝla diolan bone njadǝ ngalwo.
3.18: Biwuwa nangaro Almasiwu ti jiremadǝ jirenambuwuro tilo lonno bone kiano, na Alayero andia sawudoro. Kanji tiyiyen tia roro ceyesǝna, amma kanji Ruhuyen roaro casangǝna,
3.19: Ruhudǝlan leje ruhuwa jakkadadǝro kawuɍi wulyeyeno,
3.20: tayi calan ganambuwudǝ. Sadǝn, jaman Nawi Nuhuyen maaradǝa cadandi duwon, Ala kanadialan gurejǝna. Maaradǝlan am gana, wotte am wusku ingiyen njǝkkawo kewando.
3.21: Ingi adǝ alama kasalaye, wotte tiyilan kadawu tuluwo gǝni, karwu saɍiwu bawoalan Alaro jaawu njo. Kasala adǝ karmolan cidu Isa Almasiwuyen kǝrma nayia njakkayi.
3.22: Almasiwudǝ samero leje kǝmboram Alayen kǝrga, koro malaiyawa so, kǝnduwowa so, kǝrmai so cidiyanjuro casakkǝna.

4.1: Adǝ nangaro, Almasiwu tiyilan bone canadǝ, nayi ye halnjudǝa ngonowo, dalilnjudǝ kam tiyilan bone canadǝ biwu-a faidana,
4.2: ngainin kǝndǝgainju dunialan gapcǝnadǝ mangar tiyiyero gǝni, rawo Alayero dǝgai.
4.3: Rawo kǝrdiyaye calan diwe nanjane so, mangar so, sagarandu so, kǝlaɍiwonambu so, nancurocuroma so, sǝnǝm ga waada solan dǝgawwadǝ cǝdǝna.
4.4: Koro nayidǝ gannuwe halkutta ci bawo adǝlan tayiro kǝldǝgǝwwidǝa ajapcane nayia raranjai,
4.5: amma ti duwon am roa-a sanuna-aa sharaduro dabbardǝnadǝ kǝla adǝyen tayia cuwori.
4.6: Dalil adǝyeman kawuɍi kǝjidǝ am sanuna yero wuldǝgǝna, kǝla adamgǝnayen tayia tiyilan sharajai yaye, kǝla Alayen Ruhulan roa dasayi.
4.7: Njeroram awo sammaye karǝnjǝna, adǝ nangaro moduwa dioro am hangal kǝjia-a kǝla ɍiwowu-aro wallowo.
4.8: Awi yayero burwonno kattendon kasaduaro kǝrawo fǝledǝnowo, awoa kǝrawodǝ biwu kada jakci.
4.9: Mana kuttu diwwin amandoa sosanowo,
4.10: wundundo yaye kǝnjo laa cuwandǝnadǝ, kistuwuwu ngǝla kǝnjo jiɍi jiɍi ser Alaye gai tilan faidaduwialan amandoro nanwolodi yiddowo.
4.11: Kam laa mana cǝdia, kawuɍi Alaye wulduma gairo cǝdo, kam laa nanwolodi cǝdia, duno Ala cilan cǝdo. Ngainin awo samman Isa Almasiwuyen Alaa congori. Tiro daraja-a kǝnduwo-a har abada abadinno tio! Amin. Bone nja Isaa gawuye
4.12: Kǝrawowuni, bare bone jau nayia rijapturo njawandǝnadǝa ajammuwwi, awo ajabba laa wakkanjaanadǝ gai,
4.13: amma Almasiwuro kǝldǝgǝwe bonenju yawidǝro kǝji fannowo, sa darajanju fǝlediyiya, kǝji dama bawo fannoworo.
4.14: Cu Almasiwuye nangaro nayia raranjaia, bargando, Ruhu Alaye darajaadǝ nayin napcidǝro.
4.15: Bare wundundoma kamceji, bi barwu, bi diwi dioma, bi awo tia casakkǝnniro ngawoma gairo bone canni.
4.16: Amma kam laa ti kǝrista nangaro bone caia, bare nangu fanjǝnni, amma cu adǝ nangaro Alaro daraja co.
4.17: Sa jama Alayero burwon shara njǝddoyedǝ cǝdǝna, koro nanden badijia, awi gǝle njeroram am kawuɍi kǝji Alaye jaannidǝye wo?
4.18: Koro: «Jiremadǝ kiaddin njǝkkawo cuwandia, awi gǝle ganambuma-a biwuma-aa cuwandi?»
4.19: Adǝ nangaro am rawo Alaye kǝlan bone casaidǝ ngǝla cado ronjaa mukko Alaktuma amannayero casakko.

5.1: Wu amwurawaye kamanja ye, bone nja Almasiwuye shedama ye, daraja fuwun fǝledilan nuwania yedǝ, amwurawa curondon dasaanadǝro duno yikki:
5.2: Bǝri Alaye nandon dǝganadǝa newowo, amma dole gairo gǝni, rawondon Ala cǝraanadǝ gairo tayiro kiskǝnowo, koro riwa cukkowona boro gǝni, kasadualan.
5.3: Bare tayi mukkondoro casakkǝnadǝa radduwwi, amma bǝridǝro misallo wallowo,
5.4: daji Sǝni Kuradǝ fǝlediyiya, aɍiawu darajaye dinjiwawo fanduwi.
5.5: Jiɍi adǝgainin nayi jairowadǝ amwurawadǝro dau kolgǝnowo. Nayi samma kattendon wolodi gai rokuranambu lunowo, awoa: «Aladǝ rokurawua wajǝna, amma rokuranambuwuro sernju fǝlejiyi.»
5.6: Adǝ nangaro, sa jussǝnan nayia njasangoro, cidiya mukko dunoa Alayen rokura bawoaro wallowo,
5.7: suwolndo sammaa tiro yakkowo, nayiro kisnjagai nangaro.
5.8: Kǝlando ɍiwowo, faadaro dǝgaiwo! Yiwulis kǝladondodǝ ngam nukci gai dadaji, kam njundoye maji.
5.9: Kambǝrselan dunoaro danowo, bare tiro dama kolgǝwwi. Nonowo, kǝramiyando dunialan bone animaa casai.
5.10: Ala serma kǝlanju, ti duwon Almasiwulan nayia darajanju sawisoyen dǝgaiworo bowonjanadǝ, bone kawu ganaro yawwaye ngawon, nayia kalkallo njadi ye, tabbannjagai ye, isadunoanjagai ye, koro kolnjane yuruwwawo ye.
5.11: Tiro har abadaro kǝnduwo tio! Amin. Lewa daryeye
5.12: Mukko Silas kǝrami amannaro ngokkǝnadǝyen kalmawa ganan ruwunjagakke kowoɍi njadǝkke mana adǝ ser Alaye jireyero tabbanjagakkǝna. Serdǝlan dunoaro danowo!
5.13: Jama Isaa gawu kǝreyada bǝrni Babilayen dasaanadǝ tadani Markusnin kundenno lewanjai.
5.14: Kattendon lewa kǝrawoyen lewadǝnowo. Nanlewa nayi Almasiwulan dǝgawwa sammalan dǝga.

1.1: Wuma Siman Biturus wolodi-a kǝngayam-a Isa Almasiwuyedǝ am duwon nanjire Isa Almasiwu Alande-a Njǝkkayimande-ayen kambǝrse kaande gai bǝrsǝmba cawandǝnadǝro:
1.2: Nodu Alaye-a Isa Kǝmandeye-ayen ser-a nanlewa-a nayin ngǝwuja! Isaa gawuye bowodunja-a kǝredunja-a
1.3: Barga nodu ti duwon andia darajanju-a nanngǝlanju-ayen bowosanadǝyen, Ala kǝnduwonjun awo duwon ro-a nanmumin-aro wajipcǝgǝna sammaa sadǝna.
1.4: Koro darajanju-a nanngǝlanju-adǝn andiro waduwa bǝrsǝmba-a jauro kura-a ngosaana. Waduwadǝ nayia njasakke njǝptu duwon mangar diwi duniaro cuwudǝnadǝro kanuwe hal Alayen nuwando fanduwi.
1.5: Adǝma nangaro kowoɍi ngǝlaro dewo kambǝrsendoro nanngǝla yirgaiwo, nanngǝladǝro ilmu,
1.6: ilmudǝro kǝlaɍiwo, kǝlaɍiwodǝro nettu, nettudǝro nanmumin,
1.7: nanmumindǝro naptu nanyaanaye, naptu nanyaanayedǝro kǝrawo yirgaiwo.
1.8: Awoa awo ani nandon mbeji tasargaia, nayia njasakke nodu Kǝmande Isa Almasiwuyen naptu bowuye dio-a faida bawoaro waldu-aro kanuwi.
1.9: Amma kam duwon awo ani tia maujanadǝ kambu, kuruwu curuiwawo, biwuwanju cayelan tayirro waljǝnadǝa ngessǝna.
1.10: Adǝ nangaro, kǝramiya, kowoɍinowo bowodundo-a kǝredundo-aa tabbatkǝnowo, awo ania diwiya, tǝmmaro talluwwawo.
1.11: Ngainin Isa Almasiwu Kǝmande ye, Njǝkkayimande yedǝye nodonju bargaa sawisoyedǝro amari farakko ngawoye fanduwi.
1.12: Adǝ nangaro, awo ania nonuwwa ye, jire mowuwwadǝn tabbatkǝwwa yaye, kullum nayiro isataktuwuro nia ngokkǝna.
1.13: Naptuni samma kǝndǝgairam adǝn nayia isatannjagakkiya, kuronin jussǝna.
1.14: Ai, Kǝmande Isa Almasiwu isanosǝgǝnadǝ gai, kǝndǝgairammi adǝa tussiwawo kollǝkki.
1.15: Koro kowoɍi dikke ranguwe ngawo dunia adǝa kollǝkkǝnayen sawi yaye awo ania tanguwi. Daraja Almasiwuye-a mana nawinawi-a
1.16: Sa kǝnduwo-a kǝnde-a Kǝmande Isa Almasiwuye isanonjagaiyenadǝn, nyari nangan tǝdǝnaso gǝni giyaiye, amma simndeman martawanjudǝa kiruiye.
1.17: Sa Isa bǝrsǝm-a daraja-aa Ala Bawadǝyen cuwandǝnadǝn, kowo laa Daraja Martawaadǝyen ise: «Adǝma Tadani wo, tia jauro raakkǝna. Tima karwuni jauro kǝjijuwo,» yeno.
1.18: Kowo samen isǝnadǝa andi kǝlande Isa-a rokko kǝla kau kuruwu tayirdǝyen fanniyena.
1.19: Adǝa kojǝnaro mana nawinawidǝa tabbatto taiyena. Har kawu dunia waje sillowu fajarre karwundolan culuwiro, manadǝa fatǝla na duwua wassi gai hangallayen gawiya, jauro ngǝla.
1.20: Burwo sallammin adǝa nonowo, mana nawinawi kitawulan ruwuwada fima fisardu raayi kambero waljiwawo,
1.21: mana nawinawi fima ngalte rawo kamben isǝnni nangaro, amma Ruhu Alaye amba simojiye cu Alayen mana kedo.

2.1: Kuren dawu jama Israyilayedǝyen nawiya kattuwuye ye caluwuna, malǝmba kattuwuye dawundon caluwidǝ gai. Malǝmba ani asǝrlan alamdu siduwu kudoma cawudi, har Kǝma tayia merujǝnadǝa angǝrjane duwan kǝlanjaro siduwu gǝrjagai.
2.2: Am ngǝwu nanjanenjaa jaane tayi nangaro jawal jireyedǝa bassai.
2.3: Mangarnjan mana kǝjin jambanjai. Tǝn kuren wowomnja lawu gǝni, siduwunja ye tussiwawo.
2.4: To, Ala malaiyawa biwu cadǝnaa koljǝnni, tayia kannu jaanamayero gǝpciye kawu yim sharayero saɍgalan tuje duwuro kekko.
2.5: Koro dunia kureye yea koljǝnni, sa ingi tufanaye jaman ganambuwuyedǝro cuwudǝnadǝn Nawi Nuhu nanjire mawodumadǝ-a kam tulur-a rokko kiɍiwo.
2.6: Koro bǝrni Sodombe-a Gomorre-adǝ yea buwuro kalakce shara siduwuye cǝdde awo ganambuwuro fuwun wakkajiyidǝa misallo kiddo,
2.7: amma Nawi Lutu jirema duwon kǝla kǝndǝgai nanjane tuɍumasoyen karwunju bannadǝnadǝa kikkawo.
2.8: Ai, jirema adǝ dawunjan dǝgane yim nguson kǝla kǝndonja diwi curuna ye, fanjǝna yedǝyen karwunju jiremadǝa basarji kǝrga.
2.9: To, ngairo walyenoa, Kǝmande muminnaa curo jaraptayen njǝkkawo ye nojǝna, am diwia yim kiyamaa sharaduro rodu ye nojǝna,
2.10: masammanno am mǝradunja kadawualan curo kǝnjǝnayen dasaana ye, kǝnduwowuro rudu gǝnajagai ye. Rokurawu kǝla kibbua ani ridu bawoalan darajamasoa bassai,
2.11: amma malaiyawadǝ, tayia duno-a kǝnduwo-alan kojana yaye, fuwu Kǝmandeyen wowom bastuye tayiro gǝnajagaiwawo.
2.12: Amma am ani lǝmanna hangal bawoa tame siduwuro tasambǝna-a camun, awo asujanni bassai. Koro tayi ye lǝmannadǝ gai sidagai,
2.13: jiɍi am gadea basarjanadǝ gai, tayi yea basarjai. Kǝlaɍiwonambu kausulan diodǝ kuronjan awo kǝji fandaye. Tayidǝ turno so, awo waada so, nayi-a rokko jawune casaiya, jambanjadǝye kǝjinju fanjai.
2.14: Simnja sawiso kǝla kǝnjǝnayen, biwu koljaiwawo, am kambǝrsenja duno bawoaa cadai, karwunja mangarlan alamgada. Tayidǝ tadawa baskuwada!
2.15: Jawal jireyen caluwe faccagane jawal Balaam tada Beyorrea jaana. Balaamdǝ alwasi jirenambuye cǝraana,
2.16: amma ayaunjudǝro tiro cakkadǝna, koronju mana cǝdiwawo kowo kamben manaje nanjoɍi nawidǝyero dapkeyeno.
2.17: Am ani sim ingiye ngamgada gai, tayidǝ fofou karuwaye cadǝna gai, duwu cǝlǝm pǝt tayiro gǝnaada.
2.18: Mana bowu rokuraye cade am duwon kǝndǝgai jambayenin kiaddin fǝrǝstagaidǝa mangar tiyiye so, nanjane soyen cadai.
2.19: Tayiro wadu nankam kǝlaye fandoye ngojaana, amma tayi kǝlanjama kaɍeawa siduwuye, awoa kam awo tia nasarjidǝye kaɍeanju wo.
2.20: Koro nodu Isa Almasiwu Kǝmande ye, Njǝkkayima yedǝyen kadawu duniayero kajana duwon, waldane kadawu duniaye adǝro kǝlanja casakkia, tayilan nasardaia, naptunjadǝ cayemaa kojǝnaro kuttaji.
2.21: Jawal jireyedǝa nojanalan wada tayir tayiro caddǝnadǝa ga wadudǝroa, jawaldǝa ngaltema nojannima tayiro ngalwo.
2.22: Ai, awo karau jireye wuljǝnadǝ tayiro wakkajǝgǝna: «Kǝri ye justunjuro waldǝna, alade kasaljana ye walde curo gajawayen fǝrwǝrdǝna.»

3.1: Kǝrawowuni, kǝrma wotiya kǝnyindiye adǝa ruwunjagakki. Tayi yindi samman karwundon taktu ngǝla deworo nayiro isatannjagakki,
3.2: mana nawiya tayir kuren wuljanadǝ ye, wada Kǝmande Njǝkkayimadǝ ci kǝngayamba nanjuro isanayen cinadǝ yea tangowo.
3.3: Burwo sallammin adǝa nonowo, jaman daryeyen rudu gǝnaduwumaso rudunjaa isane mangarnja diwi jagai.
3.4: Tayiye: «Isa isi cǝne wadu ngojǝnadǝ, nda ti? Tǝn kaariyande ro carǝmbǝnayen, awo samma badiduram alaktu duniayen tǝdi gai fuwu gǝrji,» cani.
3.5: Amma nonjin awo anilan suwadai: Kuren same ye mbeji, dunia ye mana Alayen ingilan kiluwo ye, ingiyen tǝdo ye,
3.6: koro ingi adǝma dunia cayedǝa lǝpce sijuwo.
3.7: Mana faldǝman koro same-a cidi-a kǝrmayedǝ kannuro gǝnaada, wotte yim sharaye-a siduwu ganambuwuye-aro gǝnaada.
3.8: Amma kǝrawowuni, bare awo fal adǝa ngessuwwi, yim fal na Kǝmandeyen kǝrwu dǝwu gai, koro kǝrwu dǝwu ye yim fal gai.
3.9: Kǝmande awo cǝdi cǝne wadu ngojǝnadǝa dioro nangǝrgǝdi bawoa, am laa nangǝrgǝdi ngojaidǝ gai, amma kanjindon kanadia, kam falma facciyiya, cǝraanni, amma am samma tuwaro isaiya, kirawo.
3.10: Adǝ yaye yim Kǝmandeyedǝ barwu gai isi, yim adǝn nuktu kuran same baworo walji, awo duwon tilan same-a cidi-a cadandǝnadǝ ye kannu jau fit warje juwui, koro cidi-a awo kǝladǝn tǝdǝna-a samma baworo waljai.
3.11: Awo ani samma ngai sidagaidǝ, naptu jiɍi fi gǝle wajimnjaana wo? Kǝndǝgai nantayirre so, nanmuminne so dewo,
3.12: kǝnde yim Alayedǝa gurenowo, yakkowo duwan iso, yim duwon ti nangaro same kannun wardi, koro kannu jau fit awo tilan same-a cidi-a cadandǝna sijiyidǝ.
3.13: Amma kǝla wadunjudǝyen same bǝɍin-a cidi bǝɍin-a na duwon nanjire dǝganadǝa gureniye.
3.14: Adǝ nangaro, kǝrawowuni, awo ania gurenuwidǝ, Ala nayia kadawu so, awo waada so bawoa nanlewan njawandoro kowoɍinowo.
3.15: Bulus kǝraminde rayiyenadǝ ye nanrashidu tiro tinadǝn nayiro ruwunjaanadǝ gai, kanadi Kǝmandeyedǝa njǝkkaworo ngonowo.
3.16: Curo wotiyanju samma kǝla lamarra aniyen manajidǝyen ngai wulji. Curodǝn awowa laa asudu jaua mbeji. Am alamdanni dunoaro dajannidǝ kitawuwa gadedǝa faljaidǝ gai, mananju yea faljane siduwunja kǝlanjaro gǝrjagai.
3.17: To, kǝrawowuni, awo adǝa caman nonuwwadǝ, hangal gǝnanowo, bare jawallan luwo tuɍuwuye nayia lenjane dunon dadundodǝlan yuruwwi,
3.18: amma ser-a nodu-a Isa Almasiwu Kǝmande ye, Njǝkkayimande yeyen wuranowo. Tiro kǝrma ye, har abada abadin yero daraja tio! Amin.

1.1: Awo tǝn badiduramnin dǝgana, awo fanniyena, awo simnden ruiyena, awo lawarniye mukkonde lejǝna, wotte lawar kǝla Kalma royedǝa nayiro wulnjagaiye.
1.2: Rodǝ fǝleyaada, koro tia ruiyena, koro tia shedaniye nayiro ro sawisoye Bawa-a rokko dasaana ye, andiro fǝledǝgǝna yedǝa wulnjagaiye.
1.3: Awo ruiye fanniyenadǝa nayi yero wulnjagaiye, ngainin nayi ye andi-a rokko naptu nanyaanaye diye. Ai, naptunde nanyaanayedǝn Bawa-a Tadanju Isa Almasiwu-a rokko kǝrgaiye.
1.4: Awo ania karwukǝjindedǝ kalkallo waljoro ruwuniye. Aladǝ nur
1.5: Awo na Isayen fanniyena nayiro wulnjagaiyedǝ, tima Aladǝ nur, koro tilan duwu tǝmmaro bawo.
1.6: Andi ti-a rokko naptu nanyaanaye diye niye duwon duwulan dǝgaiyea, kattuwu kammiyena, jire diyewawo.
1.7: Amma nurlan dǝgaiyea, ti kǝlanju nurlan dǝganadǝ gai, kattenden naptu nanyaanaye diye, koro bu Tadanju Isayedǝ andia biwu sammalan tayirro kalansai.
1.8: Biwunde bawo niyea, kǝlande jambaniyena, koro jiredǝ andilan bawo.
1.9: Amma biwuwande wulliyea, tidǝ amanma ye, jirema ye, andiro biwuwande gawursagane jirenambu sammalan tayirro kalansai.
1.10: Amma biwu diyende niyea, tia kattuwumaro kalangiyena, koro mananju andilan bawo.

2.1: Njuɍiyani, bare biwu diwwiro awo ania ruwunjagakki. Amma kam laa biwu cǝdiro walyenoa, ti Bawadǝro kǝlanden wulduwuma taiyena, tima Isa Almasiwu jiremadǝ wo.
2.2: Tima biwuwandedǝro laya fastu gǝrgadu Alayero waljo, koro kaande runjaro gǝni, dunia sammaye yero.
2.3: Wadawanju gaiyea, ngainin tia noniyenaro asuniye.
2.4: Kam tia nojǝna cǝni duwon wadawanju jǝgaiwawodǝ, ti kattuwuma, koro jiredǝ tilan bawo.
2.5: Amma kam mananju ngojimadǝ, jiremaro kǝrawo Alayedǝ tilan kalkallo walji. Ngainin andi tilan kǝrgaiyero noniyena.
2.6: Kam tilan dǝgai cǝnidǝ, ti yero kǝndǝgai Isa cǝdǝnadǝa dio wajipcǝgǝna. Wada bǝɍin
2.7: Kǝrawowuni, wada bǝɍin gǝni, wada caye tǝn badiduramnin fanduwwaa ruwunjagakki. Wada caye adǝ tima mana fannuwwadǝ wo.
2.8: Adǝ yaye wada bǝɍin ruwunjagakki, wada duwon Almasiwu yen jire, nayi yen jiredǝ, dalilnjudǝ duwudǝ kodu cǝdi, koro nur jireyedǝ kǝrmamaro wassi nangaro.
2.9: Kam ti nurlan dǝgana cǝni duwon kǝraminjua wajǝnamadǝ koro yaye duwulan kǝrga.
2.10: Kam kǝraminjua cǝraanamadǝ nurlan dǝgai, koro dalil talduye tilan bawo.
2.11: Amma kam kǝraminjua wajǝnamadǝ duwulan kǝrga, koro curo duwuyen dadaji, koro na lejimaa nojǝnni, dalilnjudǝ duwudǝ simnjua jakcǝna nangaro.
2.12: Njuɍiya, biwuwando kǝla cunjuyen gawurnjaana nangaro nayiro ruwunjagakki.
2.13: Bawawa, ti tǝn badiduramnin dǝganadǝa nonuwwa nangaro nayiro ruwunjagakki. Jairowa, Kǝladodǝn nasarduwwa nangaro nayiro ruwunjagakki.
2.14: Tadawa sanana, Bawadǝa nonuwwa nangaro nayiro ruwunjagakkǝna. Bawawa, ti tǝn badiduramnin dǝganadǝa nonuwwa nangaro nayiro ruwunjagakkǝna. Jairowa, nayi dunoa, koro mana Alaye nayin kǝrga, koro Kǝladodǝn nasarduwwa nangaro nayiro ruwunjagakkǝna.
2.15: Bare dunia bi awowa duniayea raawwi. Wundu duwon dunia cǝraanamadǝ, kǝrawo Bawayedǝ tilan bawo,
2.16: awoa awo duniaye samma, wotte mangar tiyiye so, mangar simbe so, rokura kǝndaye sodǝ Bawadǝyen gǝni, duniayen isi.
2.17: Dunia-a mangarnju-a baworo waljai, amma kam duwon rawo Alaye cǝdimadǝ sawisoro dǝgai. Waduma Almasiwuye
2.18: Tadawa sanana, sa daryeye cǝdǝna, koro waduma Almasiwuye isi fannuwwadǝ gai, kǝrma waduwu Almasiwuye kada isana, ngainin sa daryeyedǝa asuniye.
2.19: Dawunden keluwo, amma tayi kaande gǝni. Ca tayi kaandea, andi-a rokko dasaana, amma luwonjadǝ tayi samma kaande gǝniro fǝleji.
2.20: Amma ti Tayirdǝ nayiro Ruhunjua njadǝna, koro nayi samma asunuwwa.
2.21: Jiredǝa nonuwwi nangaro gǝni, amma nonuwwa nangaro, koro kattuwu fima jireyen isiwawo nangaro nayiro ruwunjagakkǝna.
2.22: Isama Almasiwudǝ woro angǝrjǝnama gǝnia, wundu kattuwumadǝ wo? Kam Bawadǝ-a Tadadǝ-aa angǝrjǝnamadǝ, tima waduma Almasiwuyedǝ wo.
2.23: Wundu duwon Tadadǝa angǝrjǝnamadǝ, Bawadǝ karwunjun bawo, amma wundu duwon Tadadǝa kasaccǝnamadǝ, Bawadǝ ye karwunjun kǝrga.
2.24: Nayidǝ, awo tǝn badiduramnin fannuwwadǝ nayilan dǝga. Awo tǝn badiduramnin fannuwwadǝ nayilan dǝgaia, nayi ye Tadadǝ-a Bawadǝ-alan dǝgawi.
2.25: Akko awo sadi cǝne wadu ngojǝnadǝ: ro sawisoye.
2.26: Awo ania kǝla am nayia jambanjane njawatkidǝyen nayiro ruwunjagakkǝna.
2.27: Nayidǝ, Ruhunju nayiro njadǝnadǝ nayin dǝgai, koro mǝradundo alamduye bawo. Amma Ruhunju nayiro kǝla awo sammayen alamnjagai, koro alamdunjudǝ kattuwu gǝni, jire. Alamnjaanadǝ gai, Almasiwulan dǝgaiwo. Tadawa Alaye
2.28: To, njuɍiya, tilan dǝgaiwo, ngainin fǝlediyiya, fuwunjun riniyewawo, koro kǝndenjun nangu fanniyewawo.
2.29: Tidǝa jiremaro nonuwwadǝ, wundu duwon jire cǝdimadǝ ye Alayen tambǝnaro nonuwwa.

3.1: Akko kǝrawo kura Bawadǝ andiro fǝlesaanadǝa ruiwo, har andia tadawa Alayelan bowosai, koro andi tadawanjudǝma! Dalil dunia andia nosannidǝ tia nojǝnni nangaro.
3.2: Kǝrawowuni, kǝrma andi tadawa Alaye, koro awiro walliyedǝa koroma fǝledǝgǝnni. Sa fǝlediyiya, andi ti gairo walliyero noniyena, tia naptunjun ruiye nangaro.
3.3: Wundu duwon tǝma adǝa tiro cakkǝnadǝ kǝlanjua tayirro kalakci, ti tayirdǝ gai.
3.4: Wundu duwon biwu cǝdimadǝ wada ganambuma, biwudǝ wada ganambu.
3.5: Amma biwu ngojoro fǝledǝgǝnaro nonuwwa, koro tilan biwu bawo.
3.6: Wundu duwon tilan dǝganadǝ biwu cǝdiwawo. Wundu duwon biwu cǝdimadǝ tia curunni ye, tia nojǝnni ye.
3.7: Njuɍiya, bare wunduma nayia jambanjane njawatkǝnni. Kam jire cǝdimadǝ jirema, ti kǝlanju jiremadǝ gai.
3.8: Kam biwu cǝdimadǝ Yiwulisse, Yiwulisdǝ tǝn badiduramnin biwu cǝdi. Dalil Tada Alaye fǝledǝgǝnadǝ, tima kǝndo Yiwulissedǝa siduwuro.
3.9: Wundu duwon Alayen tambǝnadǝ biwu cǝdiwawo, hal Alaye tilan kǝrga nangaro. Ai, rakce biwu cǝdiwawo, Alayen tambǝna nangaro.
3.10: Ngainin tadawa Alaye-a tadawa Yiwulisse-a asudai: Wundu duwon jire cǝdiwawomadǝ Alaye gǝni, koro kam kǝraminju cǝraannidǝ ye ngai. Amandea rawo
3.11: Kawuɍi tǝn badiduramnin fannuwwadǝ, tima amandea rayiyo!
3.12: Bare Kaabila-a camunno walliyende, tidǝ Kǝladodǝye, koro yaananjua roro kejo. Awiro tia kejo? Kǝndo kaanjudǝ diwi, yaananjuyedǝ ngǝla nangaro.
3.13: Kǝramiya, dunia nayia wanjanaro bare ajammuwwi.
3.14: Kǝramiyadǝa rayiyena nangaro, karmolan roaro walliyenaro noniyena. Kam duwon tilan kǝrawo bawomadǝ karmolan dǝgai.
3.15: Wundu duwon kǝraminjua wajǝnamadǝ kamceji, koro kamceji fima tilan ro sawisoye dǝganama baworo nonuwwa.
3.16: Ngainin kǝrawodǝa noniyena: Isa andi nangaro ronju kaino, andi ye ronde kǝramiya nangaro njodǝ wajimsaana.
3.17: Kam kǝnda duniaye cǝdana duwon, kǝraminjua curo jǝktuyen curui, amma tia njunojǝnnimadǝ, ndayin gǝle kǝrawo Alayedǝ tilan dǝgai?
3.18: Njuɍiya, mana-a tǝlam-alan gǝni, kǝndo-a jire-alan rayiyo!
3.19: Ngainin andidǝ jireyero noniyena, koro karwunde fuwunjun isabogǝiye,
3.20: karwunde saɍiwusai yaye, Aladǝ karwundero kura wo, koro awi yaye nojǝna.
3.21: Kǝrawowuni, karwunde saɍiwusaiwawoa, fuwu Alayen ridunde bawo,
3.22: koro wadawanju gaiye awo fuwunjun ardiyada diye nangaro, awi koriye yaye nanjun fandiye.
3.23: Wadanjudǝ tima cu Tadanju Isa Almasiwuyedǝa mǝrsaniyo, koro wada sadǝnadǝ gai amandea rayiyo.
3.24: Kam wadawanju jǝganadǝ tilan dǝgana, ti ye tilan dǝgana, koro Ruhunju sadǝnadǝyeman ti andilan dǝganadǝro noniyena.

4.1: Kǝrawowuni, nawiya kattuwuye kada duniaro caluwuna nangaro, bare ruhu fi yayea mǝrsanuwwi, amma tayi Alaye waro rijammowo.
4.2: Ngainin Ruhu Alayea nonuwi: Ruhu Isa Almasiwu tiyilan isǝnaro kasaccǝna samma Alaye,
4.3: koro ruhu Isaa kasaccǝnni samma Alaye gǝni. Tima ruhu waduma Almasiwuye wo, ti duwon isiro fannuwwa koro kǝrmama dunian mbejidǝ.
4.4: Njuɍiya, nayidǝ Alaye, koro kǝla nawiya kattuwuye aniyen kǝnnasar fanduwwa, awoa ti nayin dǝganadǝ ti curo duniayedǝa dunon kojǝna.
4.5: Tayidǝ duniaye, adǝmaro manajaiya, mana duniayen manajai, koro dunia ye tayia kǝrǝnji.
4.6: Andidǝ Alaye. Kam Alaa nojǝnadǝ andia kǝrǝnsai, kam duwon Alaye gǝnidǝ andia kǝrǝnsaiwawo. Ngainin Ruhu jireye-a ruhu jambaye-a asuniye. Aladǝ kǝrawo
4.7: Kǝrawowuni, amandea rayiyo! Kǝrawodǝ Alaye, koro wundu duwon kamanjua cǝraanamadǝ Alayen katambo, koro Alaa nojǝna.
4.8: Kam kamanjua cǝraannimadǝ Alaa nojǝnni, awoa Aladǝ kǝrawo.
4.9: Ngainin kǝrawo Alayedǝ dawunden fǝledǝgǝna: Ala Tadanju tilo lokken ro fandiyoro tia duniaro kinodo.
4.10: Kǝrawodǝ tima andi gǝni Alaa rayiye, amma tidǝ andia saraye biwuwande nangaro Tadanju laya fastu gǝrgadunjuyero walduro kinodo.
4.11: Kǝrawowu, Ala andia ngainin saraanadǝ, andi ye amandea rawo wajimsaana.
4.12: Wunduma ngalte Alaa curunni. Amandea rayiyenaa, Ala andilan dǝgai, koro kǝrawonjudǝ andilan kalkallo walji.
4.13: Adǝgainin tilan kǝrgaiye, ti ye andilan kǝrgaro noniyena, Ruhunju andiro sadǝnadǝro.
4.14: Andidǝ Bawa Tadanjua Njǝkkayima duniayero walduro juwajǝgǝnaro ruiyena ye, shedaniye ye.
4.15: Wundu duwon Isama Tada Alaye woro kasaccǝnamadǝ, Ala tilan dǝgana, ti ye Alalan dǝgana.
4.16: Andi Ala saraanaro noniyena ye, mǝrsaniyena ye. Aladǝ kǝrawo, kam kǝrawolan dǝganadǝ Alalan dǝgana, Ala ye tilan dǝgana.
4.17: Adǝgainin kǝrawodǝ andilan kalkallo waljǝna ye, yim sharayea riniyewawo ye, awoa Almasiwuye naptunjudǝ ngai, andi ye dunia adǝn ngai.
4.18: Kǝrawolan ridu bawo, awoa kǝrawo kalkaldǝ ridu duji. Ridulan wowomba, koro kam rijimadǝ kǝrawolan kalkaljǝnni.
4.19: Ala burwon andia saraana nangaro, andi ye amandea rayiyena.
4.20: Kam laaye: «Alaa raakkǝna,» cǝni duwon kǝraminjua wajǝnaa, ti kattuwuma. Kam kǝraminju curuidǝa cǝraannidǝ rakce Ala curunnidǝa cǝrayiwawo.
4.21: Akko wada tin fandiyenadǝ: Kam Alaa cǝraanamadǝ kǝraminju yea cǝrawo!

5.1: Wundu duwon Isama Almasiwu woro mǝrsajǝnamadǝ Alayen tambǝna, koro wundu duwon Bawaa cǝraanamadǝ ti Alayen tambǝnadǝ yea cǝraana.
5.2: Akko jiɍi tadawa Alayea rayiyenaro noniyenadǝ: Alaa rayiye wadawanju gaiye.
5.3: Alaa rawodǝ tima wadawanju ga, koro wadawanjudǝ kurwowu gǝni,
5.4: awoa wundu duwon Alayen tambǝnadǝ kǝla duniayen kǝnnasar cuwandi, koro kǝnnasar duniaa nasarjǝnadǝ kambǝrsende.
5.5: Wundu gǝle kǝla duniayen kǝnnasar cuwandi, kam Isama Tada Alaye woro mǝrsajǝnadǝ gǝnia? Sheda kǝla Tadadǝyen
5.6: Isa Almasiwudǝ tima ingi-a bu-ayen isǝnadǝ wo. Ingi runjuyen gǝni, ingi-a bu-ayen isǝna. Koro shedanjudǝ Ruhu Alaye, Ruhudǝ tima jiredǝ wo.
5.8: Ruhu-a ingi-a bu-a, koro tayi yakkudǝ shedanja tilo.
5.9: Sheda kambe kasaddiyea, sheda Alayedǝ kambea kojǝna, tima sheda duwon Ala kǝla Tadanjuyen cǝdǝnadǝ wo.
5.10: Kam Tada Alayea mǝrsajǝnamadǝ sheda adǝa karwunjun cǝdana. Kam Alaa mǝrsajǝnnimadǝ tia kattuwumaro kalakcǝna, sheda duwon Ala kǝla Tadanjuyen cǝdǝnadǝa kasaccǝnni nangaro.
5.11: Shedadǝ tima Ala andiro ro sawisoye sadǝna, koro ro adǝ Tadanjun kǝrga.
5.12: Kam duwon Tadadǝa cuwandǝnamadǝ ro cuwandǝna. Kam duwon Tada Alayea cuwandǝnnidǝ ro cuwandǝnni. Ro sawisoye fando
5.13: Nayi cu Tada Alayea mǝrsanuwwadǝro awo ania ruwunjagakkǝna, ngainin ro sawisoye fanduwwaro nonuwwa.
5.14: Awo nanjun ridu bawoaro yasaraiyenadǝ tima awo laaa kǝla rawonjuyen koriyea, andia kǝrǝnsai.
5.15: Koro awi koriye yaye kǝrǝnsairo noniyenadǝ, awo tia koriyenadǝa fandiyenaro noniyena.
5.16: Kam laa kǝraminju biwu laa karmoro cadǝnni cǝdi curuiro walyenoa, Alaa cuworo, tiro ro ci. Adǝ kǝla am duwon biwu karmoro cadiwawo cadidǝyen. Biwu karmoro cadi mbeji, amma kǝla biwu adǝyen gǝni cuwororo wulyekko.
5.17: Jirenambu sammadǝ biwu yaye, biwu laa karmoro cadiwawo mbeji.
5.18: Wundu duwon Alayen tambǝnadǝ biwu cǝdiwaworo noniyena, amma Tada Alayedǝ tia roji, koro Kǝladodǝ tia lejiwawo.
5.19: Andi Alaye ye, dunia samma fǝrdu kǝnduwo Kǝladodǝyen dasaana yero noniyena.
5.20: Koro Tada Alaye isǝna ye, andiro hangal ti jiremadǝa noduro sadǝna yero noniyena. Koro andi ti jiredǝlan kǝrgaiye, wotte Tadanju Isa Almasiwudǝlan. Tima Ala jireye ye, ro sawisoye ye wo.

1.1: Wuma amwurawaye falnjadǝ kamu kǝreyada-a yallanju-aro: Curo jireyen njaraakkǝna, koro wu runi gǝni, am jire nojana samma ye,
1.2: dalilnjudǝ jiredǝ curonden dǝgana, koro andi-a rokko har abadaro dǝgai nangaro.
1.3: Jire-a kǝrawo-alan Ala Bawa-a Isa Almasiwu Tada Bawadǝye-a andiro ser-a kanjimaɍi-a nanlewa-a sadi. Jire-a kǝrawo-a
1.4: Jiɍi Bawa andiro wada sadǝnadǝ gai, yallanǝmbe laanja kǝndǝgai jireye cadi nagǝkkǝna nangaro karwuni jauro kǝjiyeno.
1.5: To, kamu kǝreyada, kǝrma nia lowonjǝkki, wada bǝɍin gǝni, wada tǝn badiduramnin taiyenadǝa niro ruwunjǝgǝkki: Amandea rayiyo!
1.6: Kǝrawodǝ tima wadawanju gaiyo! Tǝn badiduramnin fannuwwadǝ gai, wadadǝ tima kǝrawolan dǝgaiwo!
1.7: Jambawu kada duniaro caluwuna, tayi duwon Isa Almasiwu tiyilan isǝnaro kasaccaiwawodǝ. Kam adǝ gai tima jambama ye, waduma Almasiwuye ye wo.
1.8: Bare awo ngǝnǝptiye fanduwwadǝa fudduwwi, amma mukowa cap fandoworo hangal gǝnanowo!
1.9: Wundu duwon kǝla alamdu Almasiwuyen dǝgannin fuwuro lejimadǝ karwunjun Ala bawo. Amma kam duwon alamdudǝlan dǝganamadǝ Bawa-a Tadanju-aa cuwandǝna.
1.10: Kam laa alamdu adǝa cuwudǝnnin nandoro isia, bare tia fanndon sawuwwi bi lewanuwwi,
1.11: awoa kam tia lewajǝnadǝ kidanju diwidǝro mukkonju cakki. Lewa daryeye
1.12: Awo ngǝwu nayiro ruwuduwuro takkǝna duwon, kakkadu-a tadduwa-alan gǝni, cujudǝro karwukǝjinde tai daje kǝjijoro, nandoro isǝkke sim-a sim-alan mananǝkkiya, tǝmakko.
1.13: Yalla yanǝmgǝna kǝreyadadǝye nia lewanjai.

1.1: Wuma amwurawaye falnjadǝ Gayus kam tǝraanadǝro: Jirelan njǝraakkǝna.
1.2: Kǝrawomani, ronǝm fuwu juwuidǝ gai, awi yayen fuwu bui ye, kǝlewa salainin dǝgai yero moduwa njǝddǝkki.
1.3: Sa kǝramiya laa isane kǝla jirenǝmben shedajanadǝn, jirelan kǝndǝgai dimidǝ gai, wu ye karwuni jauro kǝjiyeno.
1.4: Ai, njuɍiyani jirelan kǝndǝgai cadi fakkiya, nanin karwukǝji adǝa kojǝna bawo. Mowowu-a waduwu-a
1.5: Kǝrawomani, awo kǝramiyaro yiddǝmi samman, masammanno sikudowaro, amannaro fǝledǝgǝmma.
1.6: Fuwu jama Isaa gawuyen kǝrawonǝmdǝa shedajana. Jiɍi fuwu Alayen jussǝnalan tayia banagǝme bǝlawuronja cadiya, jauro ngǝla,
1.7: awoa awima na kǝrdiyayen camowonnin cu Isa Almasiwuye nangaro keluwo.
1.8: Adǝma nangaro am jiɍi adǝgaidǝa banaduwu wajimsaana, ngainin jiredǝ nangaro sawawanja kidayero walliye.
1.9: Jama Isaa gawudǝro wotiya ruwunǝkkǝna, amma Diyotarifis, ti duwon wundunja yayea kojǝnaro kǝlanju ngodu cǝraanadǝ, manande ngoduro wayeno.
1.10: Adǝ nangaro, isǝkkia, diwi duwon kǝla andiyen manakuttu wuljiaro cǝdidǝa isatangǝgǝkki. Ai, kǝla adǝyen dajǝnnin kǝramiyadǝa cǝmoyiwawo, koro am tayia mowo caraanadǝro dapciye tayia jamadǝlan cuttuluwi.
1.11: Kǝrawomani, misal awo diwiye gǝni, ngǝlaye gai! Ngǝla diomadǝ Alaye, diwi diomadǝ Alaa nojǝnni.
1.12: Dimitǝriyusdǝ, wundu yaye kǝlanjun mana ngǝla wulji, jire kǝlanjudǝma ngai wulji. Andi ye tia shedaniye, koro shedandedǝ jirero nonǝmma. Lewa daryeye
1.13: Awo ngǝwu niro ruwuduwuro raakkǝna, amma tadduwa-a ɍisiwu-alan faidadǝkkiya, raakkǝni.
1.14: Tussǝnnin nia kuroro tǝmakkǝna, daji sim-a sim-alan mananiye.
1.15: Nanlewa nilan dǝga. Sawawande samma nia lewanjai. Sawande fi yayea lewane.

1.1: Wuma Yahusa wolodi Isa Almasiwuye ye, yaana Yakubaye yedǝ am duwon Ala Bawa tayia cǝraana ye, Isa Almasiwuro tayia rojǝna ye, tayi bowowada yedǝro:
1.2: Kanjimaɍi-a nanlewa-a kǝrawo-a nayin ngǝwuja! Wowom malǝmba kattuwuye
1.3: Kǝrawowuni, kǝla njǝkkawo andi sammayedǝyen nayiro kasaduaro ruwuduwu raakkǝna duwon, nayiro ruwunǝme kambǝrse muminnaro tilo lonno tinadǝro mǝldǝnoworo lowodu wajimsǝgǝna.
1.4: Awoa am laa asǝrlan ngasaana, wowom adǝ tǝn kuren tayiro kadargaadadǝ. Tayidǝ ganambuwu, ser Alandeyea nanjanero kalakcane Isa Almasiwu ti Mainde tilo lon ye, Kǝmande yedǝa angǝrjai.
1.5: Nayidǝ, awo ani sammaa caman nonuwwa yaye, nayiro isatannjagakkiya, raakko: Kǝmande ngawo jamadǝa cǝkkaye lardu Masarren cuttuluwunadǝn tayi kambǝrsenambuwudǝa siyeyeno.
1.6: Koro malaiyawa kaalanjan dajanni kǝndǝgairam kǝlanjaye koljanadǝ, Kǝmande tayia saɍga sawisoyen curo duwuyen shara yim kurayedǝro rojǝna.
1.7: Jiɍi adǝgainin am bǝrni Sodombe-a Gomorre-a bǝlamaskinjaye-a kǝlanjaa kǝnjǝnaro sǝrǝccagane nanjane jiɍi gadea jaane misal am wowom kannu sawisoye casaidǝro waljana.
1.8: Ngaima duwon ganambuwu ani ye kǝla kǝnnasimnjayen tiyinja tayir gǝniro kalakcai, kǝnduwowua wajai, koro darajamasoa bassai.
1.9: Ti malaiya kura Mikailadǝma, sa kambiwuje Yiwulis-a kǝla kamin Nawi Musayen lawalajanadǝn, cinju mudu kaje shara radua tiro cǝddǝnni, amma tiye: «Kǝmande njǝkkado!» yeno.
1.10: Amma am ani awo nojanni sammaa bassai, koro awo samma halnjayen lǝmanna hangal bawoa gai nojanadǝ, tima tayia sijiyi.
1.11: Kuttunja, jawal Kaabilaye yea jaana, alwasi fandoro biwu Balaambe yero kǝlanja casakkǝna, koro tuɍu Koraye yen sidaana nangaro.
1.12: Am ani masǝnando nanyaanayen turno, nangujannin nayi-a rokko jawune casaiya, tayi kǝlanja ambadai. Tayidǝ fofou ingi bawoa karuwaye tǝmbalji gai, kǝskawa biyilan tada bawo mǝktane tǝgǝmbo sanuna gai.
1.13: Koro tayidǝ tǝmbaɍiya jau tekuye cawulǝkcai gai bilwu nangunjaye fijai, sillowuwa fofomjai gai duwu cǝlǝm pǝt har abadaro tayiro gǝnaada.
1.14: Nawi Idǝrisa ti duwon Nawi Adamnin tamiya kaduwu kǝntulurredǝ kǝlanjan nawinawi cǝde: «Akko Kǝmande jamanju mumin dǝwu kada kadami-a rokko isi,
1.15: am sammaro shara kamjiye kǝndonja ganambulan cadǝna-a mana raduye sammaa biwuwu ganambuwu kǝlanjun wuljana-aa biwuro wowomji,» cǝnna.
1.16: Am ani karwuwadamaso, karwukuttanja fǝlejane mangarnja diwi jagai, cinja yen mana rokuraye wuljane riwa kǝlanjaye fandoro amba jajakcai. Sǝmo kasta-a karwuro duno njo-a
1.17: Amma nayidǝ, kǝrawowuni, awo kǝngayamba Kǝmande Isa Almasiwuye wakkaji cǝne calan wuljanadǝa tangowo,
1.18: nayiro: «Jaman daryeyen am rudu gǝnaduwumaso isane mangarnja diwi jagai,» yera.
1.19: Am anima yaktu kudowu wo, Ruhu Alaye cadanni, hal adamgǝnaye jagai.
1.20: Amma nayidǝ, kǝrawowuni, kambǝrsendo jauro tayirdǝlan kǝlando dunoagǝnowo, Alaa Ruhulan korowo,
1.21: kǝrawo Alayen kǝlando ronowo, kanjimaɍi Kǝmande Isa Almasiwuye ro sawisoye kudomadǝa gurenowo.
1.23: am laaa kannun taiwo tuluwowo yǝkkawowo, laa yea Ala ridalan njunonowo, gǝmajenja hal tiyiyen kadawuadǝmaa wanowo. Lewa daryeye
1.24: To, ti duwon nanjun kǝnduwo nayia njuron kaduye ye, fuwu darajanjuyen karwukǝji dama bawoa-a saɍiwu bawoa-alan saduwuye ye mbejidǝ,
1.25: wotte Ala tilo Njǝkkayimandedǝ, Kǝmande Isa Almasiwuyen tiro daraja-a martawa-a kǝrmai-a kǝnduwo-a tio, tǝn kawu jaman burwoyen, kǝrma ye, har abada yero! Amin.

1.1: Akko wahayi Isa Almasiwuye, wahayi duwon Ala tiro awo tussiwawo fagat wakkajidǝa am tia gawuro fǝlejuworo cinadǝ. Ti ye malaiyanju laaa cunode wolodinju Yahayaro isanoyeyeno.
1.2: Yahaya ye awo kǝla mana Alaye-a sheda Isa Almasiwuye-ayen curuna sammaa shedayeno.
1.3: Bargaa kam mana kawuɍi nawinawi adǝyea kǝrajidǝ, koro bargaa ye tayi awo tilan ruwuwadadǝa fanjane ngojaidǝ, dalilnjudǝ sanju karǝnjǝna nangaro. Lewa
1.4: Wuma Yahayadǝ jama tulur Isaa gawu cidi Asiyayero: Salam! Ala duwon kǝrma ye mbeji, kure yen dǝgana, fuwu yen dǝgaidǝ ser-a nanlewa-a njado! Ruhu tulur fuwu kurisnju kǝrmaiyen dasaanadǝ ye ser-a nanlewa-a njado!
1.5: Koro Isa Almasiwu shedama amanna, karmolan burwon ciduma, koro maiya dunia sammayea nodomadǝ ye ser-a nanlewa-a njado! Isa Almasiwu ti duwon andia saraana ye, bunjuyen biwuwandelan sakkaana ye,
1.6: koro andia nodowu-a ɍimanna-a Ala Bawanjuyero sadǝna yedǝ, tiro daraja-a kǝnduwo-a har abada abadinno tio! Amin.
1.7: Akko curo fofouyen kǝnde cǝdi. Wundu yaye simnjun tia curui, har am tia sukcanadǝ, koro jama duniaye samma kǝla tiyen casiri. Adǝgaima. Amin.
1.8: Ala Kǝmandeye: «Wuma burwoye wo, daryeye ye wo, Martawama duwon kǝrma ye mbeji, kure yen dǝgana, fuwu yen dǝgaidǝ wo!» yeno. Wahayi Yahayaye
1.9: Wu Yahaya kǝramindo ye, kamando ye curo bone nja-a nodo bargaa-a nettu-a Isalan dasaanadǝyen, kǝla mana Alaye-a sheda Isaye-ayen cuku Batmos canilan kǝrgakko.
1.10: Ngai duwon, yim Kǝmayea Ruhu Alaye wuro jǝmsiye kowo kura kangadiye gai ngawonin nukci fangekko.
1.11: Kowodǝye wuro: «Awo rumidǝa kitawulan ruwune jama tulur Isaa gawu bǝrni aniyero juwagǝne: Afisa, Simirna, Birgamus, Tiyatira, Sardis, Filadelfiya, Lawudikiya.»
1.12: Daji wundu wuro manasiyiro kuroro suworgadakko. Suworgadakkǝniya, fatǝla dinarre tulur kirukko,
1.13: koro dawunjan awo laa adamgǝna-a camun daada mbeji. Kajǝmu kuruwu luwada, koro bel dinarre nganjinjuro tikkerǝna.
1.14: Kǝlanju-a kanduɍinju-a bul fok wulu bul gai, simnju ye tǝlam kannuye gai.
1.15: Sinju ye kullo kagǝlmadin cingada yiyiljiro kalakcǝnadǝ gai, kowonju ye ingi ngǝwu dunoaro cǝgasi gai.
1.16: Mukkonju kǝmboramlan sillowu tulurra, cinjulan kashagar tǝlam yindia ngǝlaro gallada luwo cǝdi. Fǝkkanju ye jauro nurra kǝngal kausu kǝla dawuye gai.
1.17: Tia kirukkǝniya, fuwunjun nukkǝna gai bǝp kirukko. Daji mukkonju kǝmboram gǝnasiye wuro: «Bare rinǝmmi! Wuma burwoye wo, wuma daryeye ye wo,
1.18: wuma Kǝndǝgaimadǝ wo. Calan nukkǝna, amma akkoni har abada abadinno roa kǝrgakko. Adǝgaima mukkonin cuwuram Karmo-a Leira-ayea takkǝna.
1.19: Adǝ nangaro awo rummadǝa ruwune, awo duwon kǝrma mbeji, koro awo ngawo awo aniyen wakkajaidǝ.
1.20: Akko maana asǝr sillowu tulur mukkoni kǝmboramlan rummadǝ-a fatǝla dinarre tulurdǝ-ayedǝ: Sillowu tulur ani tayima malaiyawa jama tulur wua gawudǝye wo, fatǝla tulur ani ye tayima jama tulurdǝ wo,» yeno.

2.1: «Malaiya jama wua gawu bǝrni Afisayen dasaanadǝyero awo ania ruwugǝne: Akko kawuɍi ti duwon mukkonju kǝmboramlan sillowu tulur cǝdanamadǝ, koro dawu fatǝla dinarre tulurren dadajimadǝyedǝ.
2.2: Kǝndonǝm-a ngǝnǝptuwunǝm-a nettunǝm-a nokkǝna, koro am diwia kasaddǝmbaworo nokkǝna. Tayi duwon kǝlanjaa kǝngayambaro ngojana, amma ngai gǝnidǝa rijammǝme jire gǝniro rumma.
2.3: Kǝla cuniyen neddǝmma ngaworo waldǝmmi, koro yimbarǝmmi.
2.4: Amma diwinǝm laa niro wulnjǝgǝkki, kǝrawonǝm burwoyedǝa kollǝmma.
2.5: Adǝ nangaro na yurummadǝa tange, tǝmme, kǝndo burwon dimidǝa de! Tǝmmǝmbawoa, nanǝmbo isǝkke fatǝlanǝmdǝa nanjulan ngokki.
2.6: Adǝ yaye nashanǝm laa ngǝla mbeji, kǝndo am Nikolawussa gawuyedǝa wanǝmma, wu ye wakkǝna.
2.7: Kam sǝmonjuamadǝ awo Ruhu Alaye jama wua gawu sammaro wuljiyidǝa fanjo! Kam kǝnnasar cuwandǝnamadǝro amari tada kǝska ro fandoye janna Alayen dǝganadǝa ngǝroye yikki.» Kawuɍi jama Isaa gawu bǝrni Simirnayero
2.8: «Malaiya jama wua gawu bǝrni Simirnayen dasaanadǝyero awo ania ruwugǝne: Akko kawuɍi ti burwoye ye, daryeye ye, ti nuna duwon roaro waljǝnamadǝyedǝ.
2.9: Bonenǝm-a nantalaanǝm-a nokkǝna, amma ni arsiyima. Am laa basnjairo nokkǝna, kǝlanjaa yaudiyaro ngojana, amma tayi ngai gǝni, tayi jama dandal Yiwulisse.
2.10: Bare bone fuwun yamidǝa rinǝmmi. Akko Yiwulis nayia rijapturo cakke amndo laaa kosoro casakke kawu mewuro bone yawi. Kambǝrsenǝmdǝa har karmoro tai, aɍiawu roye njikki.
2.11: Kam sǝmonjuamadǝ awo Ruhu Alaye jama wua gawu sammaro wuljiyidǝa fanjo! Kam kǝnnasar cuwandǝnamadǝa karmo yindiyedǝ lejiwawo.» Kawuɍi jama Isaa gawu bǝrni Birgamussero
2.12: «Malaiya jama wua gawu bǝrni Birgamussen dasaanadǝyero awo ania ruwugǝne: Akko kawuɍi kam duwon kashagar tǝlam yindia ngǝlaro gallada cǝdanamadǝyedǝ.
2.13: Nanǝm dǝgammaa nokkǝna, na kuris Yiwulissedǝ. Cuni ngǝlaro tamma, koro jaman duwon dawundon na Yiwulis dǝganalan shedamani amanna Antipassa roro ceyesǝnadǝman wua mǝrsadunǝm kollǝmmi.
2.14: Amma diwinǝm laa niro wulnjǝgǝkki, nanǝmnin am laa alamdu Balaambe jagai mbeji, kam duwon Israyilawu da sǝnǝmsoro tina jagaro ye, kǝnjǝna cado yero Mai Balakko bǝlaa tayiro laduwuro alamjǝgǝnadǝ.
2.15: Ngaima nanǝm yen am laa alamdu am Nikolawussa gawuyedǝa jagai mbeji.
2.16: Adǝ nangaro tǝmme! Adǝ gǝnia, tussǝnnin nanǝmbo isǝkke kashagar cinilan culuwidǝlan tayia lawalakki.
2.17: Kam sǝmonjuamadǝ awo Ruhu Alaye jama wua gawu sammaro wuljiyidǝa fanjo! Kam kǝnnasar cuwandǝnamadǝro kǝmbo gǝraada tiro man canidǝa yikki. Tiro kau bul laa ye kǝladǝn cu bǝɍin ruwuwada, cu duwon kam cuwandǝna gǝnia, kam gade nojǝnnidǝa yikki.» Kawuɍi jama Isaa gawu bǝrni Tiyatirayero
2.18: «Malaiya jama wua gawu bǝrni Tiyatirayen dasaanadǝyero awo ania ruwugǝne: Akko kawuɍi Tada Alaye, ti duwon simnju tǝlam kannuye gai, sinju ye kullo kagǝlmadin cingada gaidǝ.
2.19: Kǝndonǝm nokkǝna: kǝrawonǝm so, kambǝrsenǝm so, bananǝm so, nettunǝm so. Koro kidanǝm kǝrmayedǝ burwoyea kojǝnaro nokkǝna.
2.20: Amma diwinǝm laa niro wulnjǝgǝkki, Jejabel kamu kǝlanju nawiro ngojǝnadǝa kollǝme wolodiyania alamje kǝnjǝna cado da sǝnǝmsoro tinadǝa jagaro cǝne tayia jawalnin cuttuluwi.
2.21: Tiro dama tuwa dioye yikkǝna, amma kǝla kǝnjǝnanjudǝyen tuwa dioro cǝraanni.
2.22: Akko tia dǝgǝl kasuwayero figǝkki, koro am ti-a rokko kǝnjǝna cadidǝ, kǝla kǝndonjuyen tuwa cadiwawoa, tayi yea yakkǝkke bone jau fit casai,
2.23: koro tadawanju yea roro yejǝkki. Ngainin jama wua gawu samma wua awo karwun dǝgana kuromaro nosai, koro wundundo yayero kǝla kǝndonjuyen kalkallo yikki.
2.24: Amma nayi bǝrni Tiyatiraye gammuwwa duwon alamdu diwi adǝa gawwi, koro awo asǝr Yiwulisselan bowojaidǝa ngonuwwidǝ, nayiro wulnjagakki, kurwowu gade gǝnanjagakkiwawo,
2.25: amma awo tawwadǝa har isǝkkiro ngǝlaro ronowo!
2.26: Kam kǝnnasar cuwande kǝndoni har njerorambo cǝdimadǝro kǝnduwo kǝla jama duniayen yikke,
2.27: buleya fafaldai gai, ka suyea tayia cunodi,
2.28: wu ye kǝnduwo na Bawaniyen mowokkǝnadǝ gai, koro sillowu fajarredǝ yea tiro yikki.
2.29: Kam sǝmonjuamadǝ awo Ruhu Alaye jama wua gawu sammaro wuljiyidǝa fanjo!»

3.1: «Malaiya jama wua gawu bǝrni Sardissen dasaanadǝyero awo ania ruwugǝne: Akko kawuɍi ti duwon Ruhu tulur Alayedǝ-a sillowu tulurdǝ-a cǝdanamadǝyedǝ. Kǝndonǝm nokkǝna. Amso nia roaro ngonjana yaye, ronǝm bawo.
3.2: Faadaro dǝgai, awo gapcǝna no cǝdidǝa kibbagǝne, kǝndonǝm na Alaniyen kalkal gǝniro rukkǝna.
3.3: Adǝ nangaro awo fannǝme ngonǝmmadǝa tange rone, tǝmme! Faadaro dǝgambawoa, barwu gai isǝkki, koro sa fin nanǝmbo isǝkkiro nonǝmbawo.
3.4: Adǝ yaye nanǝmnin bǝrni Sardissen am laa kajǝmunja bannajanni tayir kasarga mbeji. Kajǝmu bulla wua sasadduwi, martawanjaa nangaro.
3.5: Ngainin kam kǝnnasar cuwandǝnamadǝ kajǝmu bul luji, koro tǝmmaro cunju curo kitawu royen cinnǝkkiwawo, amma fuwu Bawani-a malaiyawanju-ayen ti kakke nǝkki.
3.6: Kam sǝmonjuamadǝ awo Ruhu Alaye jama wua gawu sammaro wuljiyidǝa fanjo!» Kawuɍi jama Isaa gawu bǝrni Filadelfiyayero
3.7: «Malaiya jama wua gawu bǝrni Filadelfiyayen dasaanadǝyero awo ania ruwugǝne: Akko kawuɍi ti duwon tayir ye, jire ye, koro cuwuram Mai Daudaye cǝdanamadǝyedǝ, wotte ti duwon kajiya, wunduma jakciwawo, koro jakciya, wunduma kajiwawodǝ.
3.8: Kǝndonǝm nokkǝna. Akko cinna wunduma rakce jakciwawo kanjǝgǝkkǝna. Dunonǝm ganama, manani kasaddǝme ngonǝmma, koro cuni angǝrnǝmmi.
3.9: Akko awo tayi jama dandal Yiwulisse, tayi duwon yaudi cani, amma kattuwu yaudi gǝnidǝro yiddǝkkidǝ: Yakkǝkke isane fuwunǝmlan tungurumjane nia njǝraakkǝnaro nojai.
3.10: Manani nettuye kasaddǝme ngonǝmma nangaro, sa boneye adamgǝna sammaa rijapturo dunia ngaro isidǝn nia njǝɍiwukki.
3.11: Duwaman isǝkki. Awo tammadǝa ngǝlaro rone, bare wunduma aɍiawunǝm kǝnnasarre cǝmowonniro.
3.12: Kam kǝnnasar cuwandǝnamadǝa tamarmaɍi Fado Alaniyero dikke nadǝn tǝmmaro culuwiwawo. Tiyinjun cu Alaniye-a cu bǝrni Alaniye Jerujalem bǝɍin samen na Alaniyen jǝpcidǝye-a cuni bǝɍin-a ruwunǝkki.
3.13: Kam sǝmonjuamadǝ awo Ruhu Alaye jama wua gawu sammaro wuljiyidǝa fanjo!» Kawuɍi jama Isaa gawu bǝrni Lawudikiyayero
3.14: «Malaiya jama wua gawu bǝrni Lawudikiyayen dasaanadǝyero awo ania ruwugǝne: Akko kawuɍi ti duwon tiro Amin cani ye, ti shedama amanna, jireye ye, koro fǝrdu awo Ala alakcǝna sammayedǝyedǝ.
3.15: Kǝndonǝm nokkǝna. Ni samsu gǝni, kannua gǝni. Ca nidǝ samsu bi kannuaa, raakko!
3.16: Amma ni dǝgǝsu, kannua gǝni, samsu gǝni nangaro, cinilan nia tǝwanjǝkki.
3.17: Niye: “Wu gaɍiwu, arsiyi ngǝwu fandǝkkǝna, awima mausǝnni,” nǝmi, amma ni awo kanjimaɍiye ye, njunoduye ye, ngudi ye, kambu ye, fǝtku yero nonǝmmi.
3.18: Adǝ nangaro nia galanjǝkki, nanin dinar kannun kidaada yuwe gaɍiwuro walle. Kajǝmu bul ye yuwe tiyinǝm jange, bare wunduma asǝrnǝm curunniro. Koro karwun simbe ye yuwe samdǝne sim fande.
3.19: Am raakkǝnadǝro yikkadǝkke yaɍgaɍikki. Adǝ nangaro mǝldǝne tǝmme!
3.20: Akkoni, cinna fadoyen baktu dikki. Kam laa kowoni fanje cinnadǝa kajia, ngaakke ti-a rokko masǝna dikki, ti ye wu-a rokko cǝdi.
3.21: Kam kǝnnasar cuwandǝnamadǝro amargǝkke wu-a rokko kurisni kǝrmaiyen napci, jiɍi wu ye kǝnnasar fandǝkke Bawani-a rokko kurisnju kǝrmaiyen nammǝkkǝnadǝ gai.
3.22: Kam sǝmonjuamadǝ awo Ruhu Alaye jama wua gawu sammaro wuljiyidǝa fanjo!»

4.1: Ngawo adǝyen akko cinna samen kaada kirukko, koro kowo duwon kangadi gai burwon manasiyi fakkǝnadǝye wuro: «Are na adǝro tadde, awo fagatto ngawo adǝyen wakkajisodǝa fǝlenjǝgǝkke,» yeno.
4.2: Sadǝman Ruhu Alaye wuro jǝmseyeno. Akko samen kuris kǝrmaiye mbeji, koro kǝmanju kǝla kurisdǝyen napkada kirukko.
4.3: Ti napkadadǝ camunonju alama kauwa tamanna jasfa-a karneliya-a gai, koro marama yemerod gai kurisdǝa dirije kǝljǝna.
4.4: Kuris kǝrmaiye gade findi deri kurisdǝa dirijane kǝljana, koro kǝlanjan amwurawa findi deri kajǝmu bul luwada kǝlanjan aɍiawu dinarrea napkada mbeji.
4.5: Kurisdǝn fǝralma culuwe gǝgǝpti, kowo keyera gǝgǝrjiye ye fandi. Fuwu kurisdǝyen fatǝla tulur waskada casambi, tayima Ruhu tulur Alayedǝ wo.
4.6: Koro fuwu kurisdǝyen awo laa bǝrǝm gai tiyen awo samma farakko turui kudǝram gai mbeji. Dawu kurisse-a dirinǝmkǝllenju-an alau roa dewu mbeji, tiyinja fuwu-a ngawo-a ngan sim kadaa.
4.7: Alau burwoyedǝ alama ngam gai, alau yindiyedǝ alama dalo gai, alau yakkuyedǝ fǝkkanju fǝkka kambe gai, koro alau dewuyedǝ alama ngarmu fardu cǝdi gai.
4.8: Alau roa dewu ani finja yaye fefedo arakku arakkua, fefedonja kǝla-a cidiya-a ngan sim kadaa. Bune-a kausu-aro dadu baworo tayiye: «Tayir, tayir, tayir, Ala Kǝmande Martawama, ti duwon kuren dǝgana, kǝrma ye mbeji, fuwu yen dǝgaidǝ!» cani.
4.9: Koro sa duwon alauwa roadǝ ti har abada abadinno dǝgama kǝla kuris kǝrmaiyen napkadamadǝro daraja-a martawa-a wusedu-a cadiya,
4.10: amwurawa findi deridǝ ye fuwu ti kǝla kuris kǝrmaiyen napkadamadǝyen tǝmdane ti har abada abadinno dǝgamadǝro ambǝccagane aɍiawunja cattuluwe fuwu kuris kǝrmaiyen gǝnajane tiro:
4.11: «Ala Kǝmande, daraja-a martawa-a kǝnduwo-a fandonǝmdǝ jussǝna, dalilnjudǝ awo sammaa alangǝme, kǝla nianǝmben yojane alaktana nangaro,» cani.

5.1: Daji mukko kǝmboram ti kǝla kuris kǝrmaiyen napkadamadǝyen kakkadu kuruwu kǝɍiyada curonju-a ngawonju-a ngan ruwua na tulurlan karamalan tǝdana kirukko.
5.2: Koro malaiya kǝnduwoa laa kowo dunoaro sapce: «Wundu kakkadudǝa kadu-a karamanjudǝa wuidu-aro martawaa wo?» cǝne cuwori kirukko.
5.3: Amma wunduma samen, bi cidin, bi cidiya cidiyen kakkadudǝa rakce kajiwawo bi curuiwawo.
5.4: Kǝla wunduma kakkadudǝa kadu bi kuroro martawaa tuwandǝnnidǝyen tai dakke so badiyekko.
5.5: Daji amwurawadǝye falnja wuro: «Bare yirǝmmi! Akko Ngam jiɍi Yahudaye, kaduwu Mai Daudayedǝ kǝnnasar cuwandǝna, kakkadudǝ-a karamanju tulurdǝ-a kaji,» yeno.
5.6: Daji Tama laa alama duwaada gai katte kuris kǝrmaiyedǝ-a alau roa dewudǝ-ayen dawu amwurawadǝyen daada kirukko. Tamadǝ kangadi tulurra, koro sim tulurra. Tayima Ruhu tulur Alaye dunia ngaro juwaadadǝ wo.
5.7: Tamadǝ leje kakkadudǝa mukko kǝmboram ti kǝla kuris kǝrmaiyen napkadamadǝyen ngoyeno.
5.8: Kakkadudǝa ngoyenniya, alau roa dewudǝ-a amwurawa findi deridǝ-a fuwunjun tǝmgadara. Wundunja yaye kumbi-a tasa dinarre kaajin tǝmbǝɍǝna-a mukkon cǝdana. Kaajidǝ tima moduwa muminnayedǝ wo.
5.9: Adǝgaima aiya bǝɍin yejane: «Nidǝ kakkadudǝa ngonǝme karamanjudǝa kaduro martawaa, dalilnjudǝ nia duwanjane bunǝmlan jiɍi so, tǝlam so, jama so, lardu so samman amba Alaro merunǝmma nangaro.
5.10: Alandero tayia nodowu-a ɍimanna-aro dimma, koro dunialan kǝrmai canodi,» cani.
5.11: Ngai rukki duwon, kowo malaiyawa kada kadami kurisdǝ-a alauwa roadǝ-a amwurawadǝ-aa dirijane kǝljanaye fangekko. Nanngǝwunjadǝ dǝwuye dǝwunjuye dǝwu.
5.12: Kowo dunoaro sapcane: «Tama duwaadadǝ kǝnduwo-a arsiyi-a nanrashidu-a duno-a bǝrsǝm-a daraja-a njungoro-a moworo martawaa!» cani.
5.13: Daji alauwa sameye-a cidiye-a cidiya cidiye-a tekuye-a sammaye: «Ti kǝla kuris kǝrmaiyen napkadamadǝ-a Tamadǝ-aro njungoro-a bǝrsǝm-a daraja-a kǝnduwo-a har abada abadinno tio!» cani fangekko.
5.14: Alau roa dewudǝye: «Amin!» cani, koro amwurawadǝ ye tǝmdane ambǝtkera.

6.1: Rukki ngai duwon, Tamadǝ karama tulurdǝye falnjaa kayenniya, alau dewudǝye falnja kowo dunoa gǝrdu keyeraye gai: «Are!» cǝni fangekko.
6.2: Daji fǝr bul kirukko. Kǝmbamanju mukkon kabbia, tiro aɍiawu kǝrmaiye cade kǝnnasarma duwon kǝnnasar gade madaro leyeno.
6.3: Tamadǝ karama yindiyedǝa kayenniya, alau yindiyedǝ: «Are!» cǝni fangekko.
6.4: Daji fǝr gade kime kadio. Kǝmbamanjudǝro kǝnduwo dunialan nanlewa tuluwoye-a amba yakkǝme kattenjan njejoye-a kedo, koro kashagar kura tiro kedo.
6.5: Tamadǝ karama yakkuyedǝa kayenniya, alau yakkuyedǝ: «Are!» cǝni fangekko. Daji fǝr cǝlǝm kirukko. Kǝmbamanju mukkon sikella.
6.6: Dawu alau dewudǝyen kowo laa nukce: «Yakke kilo fal algamaye tamannju dinariyus fallo waljo, kilo yakku sayirre ye tamannju dinariyus fallo waljo, amma diben-a kǝndawu jaitunne-a bare lenǝmmi!» cǝni fangekko.
6.7: Tamadǝ karama dewuyedǝa kayenniya, alau dewuyedǝ: «Are!» cǝni fangekko.
6.8: Daji fǝr bidu kirukko. Kǝmbamanjuye cu Karmo, koro Leira ye tia jǝgai. Tayiro kǝnduwo kǝla na duniadǝye fal curo dewuyen kashagar so, kǝna so, wowa so, bundiya karaa solan amba roro njejoye kedo.
6.9: Tamadǝ karama uwuyedǝa kayenniya, cidiya laya duwaduramben ro am mana Alaye-a shedanja-a nangaro duwaadadǝyea kirukko.
6.10: Kowo dunoaro sapcane: «Kǝma tayir-a jirema-a, har yimbiro am dunialan dasaanadǝa sharanǝme ngaye bundeye mowombawodǝ?» cane keworo.
6.11: Daji wundunja yayero gǝmaje bul cade tayiro gana tussa sai amanja kidawu, wotte kǝramiyanja tayi gai roro ceyesidǝye nanngǝwunja cǝmbǝɍiya duwon yera.
6.12: Rukki ngai duwon, Tamadǝ karama arakkuyedǝa kayenniya, cidi tai daje loloyeno. Kǝngal ye cǝlǝm pǝt ajaja kanduɍilan tǝdǝna gairo walyeno, kumbal samma ye bu gairo walyeno,
6.13: koro karuwa dunoa ya tarmuyea bakce tadawanju bafǝnnidǝa fiji gai, sillowuwa sameye ye cidiro kesuro.
6.14: Same ye buji kǝɍijai gai sulat baworo walyeno, koro kau kuruwu kuruwu-a cukuwa-a samma nanja dasaanalan sǝnakkadara.
6.15: Daji maiya duniaye-a wurawa jamaye-a kajallawa kǝriwuye-a arsiyiwu-a kǝnduwowu-a kaɍea so, kambe so samma-a curo kul kauyeso-a na kau kura kuraso-alan gǝradane
6.16: kau kuruwu so, kura sodǝro: «Kǝlandero fidǝgǝnowo, fǝkka ti kǝla kuris kǝrmaiyen napkadamadǝye-a gǝrgadu Tamadǝye-aro gǝrasanowo!
6.17: Yim kura gǝrgadunjayedǝ isǝna, wundu gǝle rakce daji?» cani.

7.1: Ngawo adǝyen malaiya dewu talgǝmo dewu duniayen daada karuwa dewu duniayedǝa bare kǝla cidiyen bi tekuyen bi kǝska fiyeman fujanniro rojana kirukko.
7.2: Malaiya gade laa ye mukkon tawa Ala Kǝndǝgaimayea adinnamben samero tattu cǝdi kirukko. Daji kowo dunoaro sapce malaiya dewu kǝnduwo cidi-a bǝrǝm-a bannaduye cawandǝnadǝro:
7.3: «Bare cidi-a teku-a kǝska-adǝa bannanuwwi, sai wolodiya Alandeyero ngumnjan tawa gǝnayiyeya duwon!» yeno.
7.4: Daji am tayiro tawa gǝnajaanadǝye nanngǝwunja fangekko: Jiɍiya samma kaduwu Israyilayen am dǝwu mian fidewun deriro tawa gǝnajaana.
7.5: Jiɍi Yahudayen dǝwu mewun yindinno tawa gǝnayeyera, jiɍi Rubennen dǝwu mewun yindin, jiɍi Gadden dǝwu mewun yindin,
7.6: jiɍi Asherren dǝwu mewun yindin, jiɍi Naptaliyen dǝwu mewun yindin, jiɍi Manaseyen dǝwu mewun yindin,
7.7: jiɍi Simiyonnen dǝwu mewun yindin, jiɍi Lewiyen dǝwu mewun yindin, jiɍi Issakarren dǝwu mewun yindin,
7.8: jiɍi Jabulonnen dǝwu mewun yindin, jiɍi Isuwuyen dǝwu mewun yindin, jiɍi Biliyaminuyen dǝwu mewun yindin. Jama kada kadami duniaye samma
7.9: Ngawo adǝyen jama kada kadami wunduma rakce komjiwawo kirukko. Tayidǝ am larduwa so, jiɍiya so, jama so, tǝlamba so sammaye fuwu kuris kǝrmaiyedǝ-a Tamadǝ-ayen daada kajǝmu bul lujana ye, mukkon ngǝlai cadana ye,
7.10: kowo dunoaro sapcane: «Njǝkkawodǝ na Alande ti kǝla kuris kǝrmaiyen napkadamadǝ-a Tamadǝ-ayen isi!» cani.
7.11: Malaiyawa samma daada kurisdǝ-a amwurawadǝ-a alau dewudǝ-aa dirijane kǝljana duwon, fuwu kurisdǝyen tǝmdane ngumnja cidin gǝnajane Alaro ambǝccagane:
7.12: «Amin! Alandero njungoro-a daraja-a nanrashidu-a wusedu-a bǝrsǝm-a kǝnduwo-a duno-a har abada abadinno tio! Amin!» yera.
7.13: Daji amwurawadǝye falnja wuro: «Am kajǝmu bul lujana ani wunduso? Koro ndaran kadira?» cǝne siworo.
7.14: Tiro: «Kǝmani, nima nonǝmma wo!» yekkǝniya, wuro: «Am ani, tayima curo basari kura duniayedǝyen caluwunasodǝ wo. Bu Tamadǝyelan kajǝmunjaa tuljane bullo kedo.
7.15: Adǝma nangaro fuwu kuris kǝrmaiye Alayen daada bune-a kausu-aro Fado Alayen tiro ambǝccagaiaro dasayi, koro ti kǝla kuris kǝrmaiyen napkadamadǝ kǝndǝgairamnjun tayia jakci.
7.16: Kua adǝn fuwun kǝna so, ngudu so gadero fanjaiwawo, bi kǝngal so, bi kausu jau fit so tayia lejaiwawo,
7.17: dalilnjudǝ Tama dawu kuris kǝrmaiyen dǝganadǝ sǝninjaro walje tayia sim ingi ro fandoyedǝro cadi, koro Ala ye simalo sammaa sulat baworo simnjan cinji.»

8.1: Tamadǝ karama tulurredǝa kayenniya, reda saye gairo same gǝm kido. KANGADI TULUR
8.2: Daji malaiya tulur fuwu Alayen daadadǝa kirukko. Tayiro kangadi tulur kedo.
8.3: Malaiya gade mukkon kaaji wardaram dinarrea ise na laya duwaduramdǝyen dayeno. Tiro kaaji kadaa moduwa muminna sammayen kundenno kǝla laya duwaduram dinarre fuwu kuris kǝrmaiyen dǝganadǝyen cakkoro kedo.
8.4: Kange kaajidǝye moduwa muminnayen kundenno mukko malaiyadǝyen fuwu Alayen tǝɍǝn ciyeno.
8.5: Daji malaiyadǝ kaaji wardaramdǝa ngoje kannu laya duwadurambedǝn cǝmbǝɍe duniaro gǝpkeyenniya, keyera ye gǝgǝrji, kowo ye nukci, dunia ye cuwaldi, koro cidi ye loloji.
8.6: Daji malaiya tulur kangadi tulurradǝ tayia fuduro dabbargadara.
8.7: Burwoyedǝ fuyeno, koro mafi-a kannu-a bu tayiro kǝllaada-a duniaro fiyeyera. Duniadǝye nanju fal curo yakkuyen kannu giwo, kǝska yea fal curo yakkuyen kannu giwo, koro kajim kǝɍi ye sammaa kannu giwo.
8.8: Malaiya yindiyedǝ fuyeno, koro awo laa alama kau kuruwu kannu cǝdana gai tekuro gǝpkeyera. Ingi tekuyedǝye ci fal curo yakkuyen buro walyeno,
8.9: alauwa roa curo tekuyen dasaanadǝ ye fal curo yakkuyen kasuno, koro maara ingiye fal curo yakkuyen ye tǝgǝmbo bannaadara.
8.10: Malaiya yakkuyedǝ fuyeno, koro sillowu mafǝndi laa kannu gai cambi kǝla kuluwu fal curo yakkuyero, koro kǝla sim ingiyero samelan kikkuro.
8.11: Sillowu adǝye cunju Cǝm, koro ingiye ci fal curo yakkuyen cǝm fokko walyeno, cǝmbo waljǝna nangaro am casanaye ngǝwunja kasuno.
8.12: Malaiya dewuyedǝ fuyeno, koro ci fal curo yakkuyen kǝngalle-a kumballe-a sillowuwaye-a bakkera, har nurnjaye ye ci fal curo yakkuyen duwu cǝlǝm pǝtto walyeno, koro nur kausuyedǝ ye ci fal curo yakkuyen wassǝnni, buneyedǝ ye ngai.
8.13: Rukki ngai duwon, ngarmu laa same kuruwun farjiye kowonju fangekko. Kowo dunoaro sapce: «Kuttunja! Kuttunja! Kuttunja am dunialan dasaanadǝ, kowo kangadiye gapcana malaiya yakku fuwun fujaidǝ nangaro!» cǝni.

9.1: Malaiya uwuyedǝ fuyeno, koro sillowu laa samelan cidiro cukkurǝna kirukko. Cuwuram ci bǝlaa daduram bawoayedǝa tiro kedo.
9.2: Bǝlaa daduram bawoadǝa kaje kange kagǝlmadi kuraye gai tǝɍǝn cije kange bǝlaayedǝ kǝngal-a kasam-aa cakke duwuro walyera.
9.3: Daji curo kangedǝyen kawiya caluwe duniaro tatargaadara. Tayiro duno kedo, duno kǝlanji duniaye gai,
9.4: koro tayiro am duwon tawa Alaye ngumnjan bawoadǝa gǝnia, bare kajim duniaye-a kǝɍijuwo-a kǝska-a fimaa bannajanni yera.
9.5: Tayiro am ania njejoro gǝni, kǝndawu uwuro ajawu gǝnaduwuro amari kedo. Jau ajawunjayedǝ alama jau kǝlanjiye kamba jǝgǝrǝna gai.
9.6: Yim anin amso karmo majai, amma cawandiwawo. Sanuiya, carayi, amma karmodǝ tayin kuruwunno cǝgasi.
9.7: Kawiya ani fǝrra kǝriwuro dabbargada-a camun. Kǝlanjan awo laa aɍiawu kǝrmaiye dinarre gaia, fǝkkanja ye fǝkka kambe-a camun.
9.8: Kanduɍinja kanduɍi kamuye gai, koro sheɍinja ye sheɍi ngambe gai.
9.9: Nganjinja sulwe suyen jakkada gai, koro kalala fefedowanjaye amalenkeya kǝriwuye fǝr ngǝwu gǝrjana lawalaro cakkasi gai.
9.10: Ngawarenja alama ngaware kǝlanjiye gai kaɍia, koro ngawarenjadǝn kǝnduwo kǝndawu uwuro amba basarduye cadana.
9.11: Malaiya bǝlaa daduram bawoayedǝ mainja, tǝlam yaudiyaudin cunju Abaddon, tǝlam Gǝresselan Afolliyon.
9.12: Masiwa burwoyedǝ kojǝna, akko ngawo adǝyen masiwa gade yindi gapco.
9.13: Malaiya arakkuyedǝ fuyeno, koro kowo laa koyo dewu laya duwaduram dinarre fuwu Alayen dǝganadǝyen nukci fangekko.
9.14: Malaiya arakkuye kangadinjuadǝro: «Malaiya dewu ci bǝrǝm kura Yufaratten tikkerǝnadǝa wuine!» yeno.
9.15: Adǝgaima malaiya dewu har sa adǝ-a yim adǝ-a kǝndawu adǝ-a saa adǝ-aro caman dabbargadadǝa leja adamgǝna sammaye fal curo yakkuyen ceyesoro wuiyera.
9.16: Sojiyanja fǝrwudǝye nanngǝwunjadǝ miliyo yer yindi, nanngǝwunjadǝa fangekko.
9.17: Akko alama fǝrra-a fǝrwunja-a wahayilan rukkǝnayedǝ: Fǝrwudǝ sulwe kime cit so, ɍiwulla so, kurnum so casakkǝna. Kǝla fǝrradǝyedǝ kǝla ngambe-a camun, cinja yen kannu-a kange-a kau kannu kimejǝgǝna-a caluwi.
9.18: Masiwa yakku anilan adamgǝnaye fal curo yakkuyen keyeso: kannu-a kange-a kau kannu kimejǝgǝna-a cinjan caluwidǝ.
9.19: Kǝnduwo fǝrrayedǝ cinja-a ngawarenja-alan kǝrga. Ngawarenjadǝ kadi gai kǝlaa, tayilan amba basarjai.
9.20: Amma adamgǝna gapcana masiwa anin sanunnidǝ kǝla awo mukkonjan cadandǝnayen tuwa cadǝnni, koro sedanna-a gumkiya dinarre so, ɍiwullaye so, kulloye so, kauye so, kǝskaye so-aro ambǝccagaidǝa koljanni, gumkiya duwon rakcane kuro-a fandu-a ledu-a cadiwawodǝ.
9.21: Koro kam njejo so, sagawu dio so, kǝnjǝna so, nambarwu soyen tuwa cadǝnni.

10.1: Daji malaiya gade dunoa samelan jǝpci kirukko. Fofoulan jaktǝna, koro maramalan kǝla kǝleyadaa. Fǝkkanju kǝngal gai, siyelnju ye tamarmaɍi kannuye gai.
10.2: Mukkonjun kitawu tǝngǝɍi kaadaa. Sinju kǝmboramdǝa kǝla tekuyen gǝnaje wailadǝa cidilan gǝnayeno.
10.3: Kowo dunoaro sapce ngam ciri gai burwu kekko. Burwu kekkǝnniya, radu tulurdǝ kowonja nukkera.
10.4: Radu tulurdǝ nukkeranniya, ruwudu makki duwon, kowo laa samelan nukce wuro: «Awo radu tulurdǝ wuljanadǝa asǝrlan rone, bare ruwunǝmmi!» cǝni fangekko.
10.5: Daji malaiya kǝla teku-a cidi-ayen daada rukkǝnadǝ mukkonju kǝmboram samero sapce
10.6: kǝla ti har abada abadinno dǝgama, ti duwon same-a awowa curonjun dasaana-a cidi-a awowa curonjun dasaana-a teku-a awowa curonjun dasaana-aa alakcǝnadǝyen kansi juwe: «Kua adǝn fuwun guredu bawo!
10.7: Yim malaiya tulurre kowo nukcidǝn, kangadinju fujiya, asǝr Alayedǝ wakkaji, wolodiyanju nawiyadǝro wuljǝgǝnadǝ gai,» yeno.
10.8: Daji kowo samelan nukce fakkǝnadǝ walde wuro: «Lene, kitawu kaada mukko malaiya kǝla teku-a cidi-ayen dajǝnadǝyedǝn moye!» yeno.
10.9: Na malaiyadǝyero lekke kitawu tǝngǝɍidǝa sio nǝkke kiworǝkkǝniya, wuro: «Akko tai ngǝre! Curonǝmlan cǝm fokko walji, amma cinǝmlan kǝji con kǝmagǝn gai fannǝmi,» yeno.
10.10: Kitawu tǝngǝɍidǝa mukko malaiyadǝyen mowokke gigǝrǝkko. Cinilan kǝji con kǝmagǝn gai fangekko, amma gigǝrǝkkǝniya, curoni cǝm fokko walyeno.
10.11: Daji wuro: «Koro yaye sai kǝla jama-a larduwa-a tǝlamba-a maiya-a gadegade kadayen nawinawi dimiya!» yeno.

11.1: Daji kangale ka ngalduram gai sade wuro: «Cine, Fado Alaye-a laya duwaduramdǝ-a ngalle, koro am ambǝttuwuwu curodǝn dasaanadǝa komme!
11.2: Amma balballa Fado Alaye deyan dǝganadǝa kolle, bare ngallǝmmi, dalilnjudǝ tia mukko jama kǝrdiyayero casakkǝna, koro kǝndawu fidewun yindinno bǝrni tayirdǝa guguwaccai nangaro.
11.3: Shedamani yindidǝro kǝnduwo yikke kawu dǝwun yer yindin firakkunno ajaja luwadaa nawinawi cadi,» yeno.
11.4: Shedama yindi ani, tayima ya jaitunne yindi-a fatǝla yindi-a fuwu Kǝma duniayen dasaanadǝ wo.
11.5: Kam laa tayia basardu cǝraanaa, kannu cinjan culuwe kǝladowanjaa rǝmǝs juwui. Kam laa tayia basardu cǝraanaa, dole jiɍi adǝgainin nui.
11.6: Tayi yindi ani nanjan kǝnduwo samea jaktuye mbeji, bare jaman nawinawinjayedǝn ingi sameye cudurǝnniro, koro kǝnduwonja sa caraanalan ingia buro kalaktuye-a duniaro masiwa jiɍi fi yaye kudoye-a mbeji.
11.7: Sa shedanja njodǝ ceriya, bundi duwon bǝlaa daduram bawoalan culuwimadǝ tayiro kǝriwu cǝkkade nasarde tayia roro ceji.
11.8: Kaminnjadǝa farsam bǝrni kurayelan koljagai, bǝrni duwon tiro misallo Sodom-a Masar-a cani, na Kǝmanjadǝa kǝskaro jajagane ceyesǝnadǝ.
11.9: Adǝgaima am jamaye so, jiɍiyaye so, tǝlambaye so, larduwaye so kaminnjadǝa kawu yakku redaaro carune sittǝradu wajai.
11.10: Am duniaye karmonjaye jauro kǝji fanjai, ngǝmǝri karwukǝjiye cadi, koro kattenja yen kǝnjoso cadi, dalilnjudǝ nawiya yindi ani tayiro ajawu gǝnajaana nangaro.
11.11: Amma ngawo kawu yakku redaa aniyen Ala tayiro ro fujiye cijane dayera, koro am tayia caruna samma jauro riyera.
11.12: Daji kowo dunoa laa samelan nukce tayiro: «Arowo na adǝro taddowo!» cǝni fangera. Kǝladowanja tayia carui ngai duwon, curo fofouyen samero takkera.
11.13: Sadǝman cidi jauro loloje bǝrnidǝye ci fal curo mewuyen wurde am dǝwu tulur kasuno. Am gapcanadǝ karwunja tai daje kamde Ala Mai Samemaro daraja kedo.
11.14: Masiwa yindiyedǝ kojǝna, akko masiwa yakkuyedǝ nagatto isi. Kangadi tulurredǝ
11.15: Malaiya tulurredǝ fuyeno, koro kowo dunoa dunoa laa samelan nukcane: «Kǝrmai duniayedǝ Kǝmandeye-a Almasiwunjuye-aro walyeno, koro har abada abadinno kǝrmai cunodi,» yera.
11.16: Amwurawa findi deri fuwu Alayen kǝla kurisnja kǝrmaiyen napkadadǝ tǝmdane ngumnja cidin gǝnajane Alaro ambǝccagane
11.17: tiro: «Kǝmande Ala Martawama, ni kure yen dǝgamma, kǝrma ye mbejidǝ, wusenjiyena, awoa kǝnduwonǝm dunoa ngonǝme kǝrmainǝm nodo badinǝmma.
11.18: Jama kǝrdiyaye gǝrgajǝna, amma sa gǝrgadunǝmbedǝ isǝna. Aaa, sa am sanunaro shara njǝddoye cǝdǝna, sa duwon wolodiyanǝm nawiyadǝ-a muminnadǝ-a am cunǝm rijane njaana kuran ganan samma-aro mukowa yime am dunia bannajanadǝa siduwuyedǝ!» yera.
11.19: Daji Fado Alaye samelan dǝganadǝ fǝrǝmde sanduwu amannjuyedǝ Fado Alayen turui kǝrga. Sadǝman dunia ye cuwaldi, kowo laa ye nukcai, keyera ye gǝgǝrji, cidi ye loloji, koro mafi kura kura ye cuduri.

12.1: Daji alama jaumaro ajabba laa samelan fǝleyaada: Kamu kǝngallan jaktǝna, cidiya sinjuyen kumballa, koro kǝlanjuro aɍiawu kǝrmaiye sillowu mewun yindinnea.
12.2: Kamudǝ curoa, curodǝ tia lejǝna nanjauro burwu cakki.
12.3: Koro alama laa gade samelan fǝleyaada: Kadi mafǝndi kime cit kǝla tulurra, kangadi mewua, koro kǝlanju samman aɍiawu maila tulurra.
12.4: Ngawarenju sillowuwa sameye ci fal curo yakkuyen fǝraje duniaro gǝpkeyeno. Kadidǝ ise kamu curo lejǝnadǝ cambiyama, tadanjudǝa cundi cǝne fuwunjun dayeno.
