12.5: Kamudǝ tada kongwa kembo, tada duwon jama duniaye sammaa ka suyen cunodidǝ. Koro tadadǝa cadane na Alaye-a kurisnju kǝrmaiye-aro kesado.
12.6: Daji kamudǝ karaa dǝɍiro ngǝrǝmgeno, na duwon Ala kawu dǝwun yer yindin firakkunno tiro kistuwuyero dabbarjǝgǝnadǝ.
12.7: Daji kǝriwu laa samelan wakkayeno. Mikaila-a malaiyawanju-a kadidǝa lawalayera. Kadidǝ-a malaiyawanju-a ye tayia lawalayera,
12.8: amma rakcane nasardanni, koro gadero samelan na cawandǝnni.
12.9: Kadi mafǝndidǝa duniaro gǝpkeyera, ti duwon kadi kureye tiro Sedan koro Yiwulis cani, am duniaye sammaa jambadumadǝ. Tia duniaro gǝpkeyera, malaiyawanjua tin kundenno gǝpkeyera.
12.10: Daji kowo dunoa laa samelan nukce fangekko. Tiye: «Kǝrma njǝkkawo-a duno-a kǝrmai-a Alaye ye, kǝnduwo Almasiwunjuye yedǝ isǝna, dalilnjudǝ ngadarduma ti duwon bune-a kausu-aro kǝramiyandea fuwu Alayen ngadarjidǝa cidiro gǝpcaana nangaro.
12.11: Kǝramiyandedǝ bu Tamadǝye-a mana shedanjaye-alan kǝnnasar kǝlanjun cawandǝna, koro har karmoro ronja njo wajanni.
12.12: Adǝma nangaro, ni same-a nayi samelan dǝgawwa-aso, kǝji fannowo! Amma kuttundo, nayi cidi-a teku-aso, dalilnjudǝ Yiwulis jauro gǝrgaada nandoro jǝpcǝgǝna, kawu ganama tiro gapcuworo nojǝna nangaro,» yeno.
12.13: Kadi mafǝndidǝ tia duniaro gǝpcaanaro kirunniya, kamu tada kongwa cambǝnadǝa kadudu badiyeno.
12.14: Amma kamudǝ karaa dǝɍi na kadidǝn kuruwunno farjo lejoro, fefedo yindi ngarmu jauro kuraye tiro kedo, na duwon tiro kǝrwu yakku redaaro kistuwuye dabbardǝgǝnadǝ.
12.15: Daji kadidǝ cinjun ingi kuluwu cǝgasi gai kamudǝa cadoro ngawonjun fiyeno.
12.16: Amma cididǝ kamudǝro banajiye fǝrǝmde kuluwu kadi cinjun fijǝnadǝa kiano.
12.17: Kadidǝ kamudǝro jauro gǝrgajiye cije kaduwunju gapcana, wotte tayi wada Alaye jaana-a Isaa shedajana-adǝro kǝriwu njǝkkadoro leyeno.
12.18: Koro kǝla cidi kesa ci tekuyen dayeno.

13.1: Daji bundi laa tekudǝlan culuwi kirukko. Tidǝ kangadi mewua, kǝla tulurra. Kangadinjulan aɍiawu maila mewua, koro kǝlanju fin yaye kaala Alaa bastuye ruwuwada.
13.2: Bundi rukkǝnadǝ jajǝrma gai, sinju ye bulduye gai, cinju ye ngambe gai. Kadi mafǝndidǝ tiro dunonju-a kurisnju-a kǝnduwonju kura-aa kaino.
13.3: Kǝlanju fal nuna gairo lorudǝna yaye, ngajǝna. Am duniaye samma bundidǝa ajapcane jaane
13.4: kadidǝro ambǝtkeyera, bundidǝro kǝnduwo cina nangaro. Koro bundidǝ yero ambǝtkeyera, tayiye: «Wundu bundidǝ gai wo? Koro wundu tia rakce lawalaji?» cani.
13.5: Tiro ci mana rokuraye dime Alaa bastuye kedo, koro tiro amari kǝndawu fidewun yindinno kǝrmai nodoye kedo.
13.6: Daji bundidǝ cinju kaje Alaa bastu badiyeno. Alaye cunju-a kǝndǝgairamnju-a amnju samen dasaana-aa baskeno.
13.7: Tiro amari muminnaro kǝriwu yikkadǝme kǝnnasar kǝlanjan fandoye kedo, koro tiro kǝnduwo kǝla jiɍi so, jama so, tǝlam so, lardu so fiyen yaye kedo.
13.8: Adǝgaima am dunian dasaana samma bundidǝro ambǝccagai, am duwon cunja tǝn dunia alaktǝnayen curo kitawu roye Tama duwaadadǝyen ruwudǝnnidǝ.
13.10: Kam kadaranju kaɍearo waldudǝ fagatto tia cadane kaɍearo kalakcai. Kam kadaranju kashagarlan tia njejodǝ fagatto kashagarlan tia ceyesi. Akko sa nettu-a kambǝrse-a muminnaye.
13.11: Daji bundi gade laa cididǝn culuwi kirukko. Tidǝ kangadi yindia ngǝlaro gai, koro kadi mafǝndi gai manaji.
13.12: Kǝnduwo bundi burwoye sammalan fuwunjun faidade dunia-a am tilan dasaana-aa cakke bundi burwoye lorunju karmoyen ngajǝnadǝro ambǝccagai.
13.13: Koro alama ajabba ajabba cǝde, har cakke kannu samelan cidiro fuwu amben jǝpciyi.
13.14: Am dunian dasaanaro bundi kashagarlan loruwada roa dǝganadǝro gumki cadando cǝne alama fuwunjun tiro amarjagane cǝdidǝlan tayia jambaji.
13.15: Bundi yindiyedǝro amari cade gumki bundi burwoyedǝro ro cakke har mana cǝde am tiro ambǝttuwu wajana sammaa cakke ceyesi.
13.16: Koro bundi yindiyedǝ cakke am kuran ganan so, gaɍiwun ngudin so, kamben kaɍean so sammaye mukko kǝmborambo bi ngumbo tawa gǝnajagai.
13.17: Ngainin kam tawadǝa cǝdana gǝnia, wunduma rakce cuwuiwawo bi cǝladiwawo. Tawa adǝ cu bundidǝye bi lamba cunjuye.
13.18: Akko lamar nanrashiduye: Kam hangal kǝjiadǝ lamba bundidǝyea gayirjo! Lamba adǝ lamba kambe, koro lambanju yer arakkun firakkun lukko arakkun.

14.1: Daji kirukkǝniya, akko Tamadǝ kǝla kau kuruwu tiro Siyon canidǝyen daada, koro rokkonjun am dǝwu mian fidewun dewun ngumnjan cunju-a cu Bawanjuye-a ruwuwadaa.
14.2: Kowo laa ingi ngǝwu dunoaro cǝgasi so, keyera jauro gǝgǝrji so gai samelan nukci fangekko, koro kowo fakkǝnadǝ alama kumbiwu kumbinja jajai gai.
14.3: Fuwu kuris kǝrmaiyedǝ-a alau roa dewudǝ-a amwurawadǝ-ayen aiya bǝɍin yejai. Tayi dǝwu mian fidewun dewun dunian merujanadǝro kajia, wunduma rakce aiya adǝa cǝɍiwawo.
14.4: Tayima am kamulan kadawu ngojannidǝ wo, tayidǝ tayir nangaro. Koro tayima am Tamadǝa na leji sammaro jagaidǝ wo. Nema burwoye Ala-a Tamadǝ-aro cadidǝro waljaro curo adamgǝnayen am ania merujana,
14.5: koro cinjalan kattuwu fima culuwunni, tayilan awo waada bawo. Malaiya yakku-a kawuɍinja-a
14.6: Daji malaiya gade laa same kuruwun farji kirukko, nanjun kawuɍi kǝji sawisoye am dunian dasaanaro njǝddoro mbeji, wotte am lardu so, jiɍi so, tǝlam so, jama so sammaye.
14.7: Kowo dunoaro sapce: «Alaa rinowo, tiro daraja yowo, sanju shara njǝddoye cǝdǝna nangaro. Ti duwon same-a cidi-a teku-a sim ingiye-aa alakcǝnadǝro ambǝtkǝnowo!» yeno.
14.8: Malaiya yindiye laa ye tia jǝgane: «Sidǝgǝna! Bǝrni kura Babilayedǝ sidǝgǝna, ti duwon jama duniaye sammaa cakke diben kǝnjǝnanju sukcǝna yea casanadǝ,» yeno.
14.9: Malaiya yakkuye laa ye tayia jǝgane kowo dunoaro sapce: «Wundu duwon bundidǝ-a gumkinju-aro ambǝcciye tawa ngumnjuro bi mukkonjuro gǝnajagaidǝ,
14.10: ti ye diben dunoa ingilan tusadǝnni curo kǝnjaram gǝrgadu Alayero fijaana ken cai, koro fuwu malaiyawa Alaye-a Tamadǝ-ayen kannu-a kau kannu kimejǝgǝna-a kamdǝa jawune ajawu cai.
14.11: Adǝgaima kange ajawunjayedǝ har abada abadinno ciji. Bune yen kal, kausu yen kal, afu cawandiwawo, am duwon bundidǝ-a gumkinju-aro ambǝccaana, koro wundu yaye tawa cunjuye tiyinjuro gǝnajaanadǝ!» yeno.
14.12: Akko sa nettu muminnaye, tayi duwon wadawa Alayea jaane kambǝrsenja Isalan rojanadǝ.
14.13: Daji kowo laa samelan nukci fangekko, tiye: «Adǝa ruwune: Barganja am Kǝmandelan dasaana adǝn fuwun sanuidǝ!» yenniya, Ruhu Alayeye: «Aaa, ngǝnǝwunjan tussa, kǝndonja tayia jǝgai nangaro,» yeno. Kala duniaye
14.14: Daji kirukkǝniya, akko fofou bul laa mbeji, koro kǝla fofoudǝyen ti Tada Kambe gai napkada, kǝlanjun aɍiawu kǝrmaiye dinarrea, mukkonju yen tayida timiaa.
14.15: Malaiya gade laa Fado Alayen culuwe kowo dunoaro sapce ti kǝla fofouyen napkadadǝro: «Sa kalaye cǝdǝna. Tayidanǝm ngone kalane, nema duniayedǝ bafǝna nangaro,» yeno.
14.16: Daji ti kǝla fofouyen napkadadǝ tayidanju duniaro gǝpciye nema duniayedǝa kalayeno.
14.17: Daji malaiya gade laa Fado Alaye sameyedǝn kiluwo, ti ye mukkonjun tayida timiaa.
14.18: Malaiya gade laa nanjun kǝnduwo kǝla kannuyen mbejidǝ laya duwaduramdǝn culuwe kowo dunoaro sapce ti tayida timiaa cǝdanadǝro: «Tayidanǝm ngone tadawa ya inabbe duniayedǝa kamme, tadawanju basawuna nangaro,» yeno.
14.19: Daji malaiyadǝ tayidanju duniaro gǝpciye tadawa ya inabbe duniayedǝa kamje curo inab guwatturam kura gǝrgadu Alayedǝyero fiyeyeno.
14.20: Guwatturamdǝn ngawo bǝrniyen guguwaccane bu tilan kiluwo, dadunju har ɍijam fǝrre, nankuruwunju ka ngalduramlan dǝwu fal yer arakkua.

15.1: Daji samelan alama gade kura ye, ajabba yea kirukko: Malaiya tulur masiwa daryeye tulurra, masiwa duwon tayilan gǝrgadu Alaye ceridǝ.
15.2: Koro awo laa teku kudǝrambe kannu-a tusaada gai kirukko, koro kǝla tekudǝyen am duwon kǝla bundidǝ-a gumkinju-a lamba cunjuye-ayen kǝnnasar cawandǝnadǝ mukkonjan kumbiya Alayea daada.
15.3: Aiya Nawi Musa wolodi Alayedǝ-a aiya Tamadǝyedǝ-aa yejane: «Ala Kǝma Martawama, kǝndonǝm darajaa jauro ajabba ajabba! Ala Mai jama dunia sammaye, jawalnǝm nan'adal-a jire-aa!
15.4: Kǝmande, wundu nia rinje niro daraja njiwawodǝ? Awoa ni tilonǝmma tayir wo. Jama duniaye samma isane fuwunǝmlan ambǝnnjagai, kǝndonǝm nanjireye fǝleyaada nangaro,» cani.
15.5: Ngawo adǝyen Fado Alaye, wotte leima shedaye samelan dǝganadǝ fǝrǝmgada kirukko,
15.6: koro malaiya tulur masiwa tulurradǝ Fado Alayedǝn keluwo. Kajǝmu linne bul fok lujana, nganjinjaro bel dinarre tikkerǝna.
15.7: Alau dewu roadǝye falnja malaiya tulurdǝro tasa dinarre tulur gǝrgadu Ala har abada abadinno dǝgamayen fer casambǝɍǝna kaino.
15.8: Adǝgaima daraja Alaye-a dunonju-a nangaro Fado Alayedǝ kangen kimbǝɍo, koro wunduma rakce Fado Alayedǝro ngayiwawo, sai masiwa tulur malaiya tulurredǝ wakkajane ceseriya.

16.1: Daji kowo dunoa laa Fado Alayen nukce malaiya tulurdǝro: «Lenowo, tasa tulur gǝrgadu Alayedǝa duniaro figǝnowo!» cǝni fangekko.
16.2: Burwoyedǝ leje tasanjudǝa duniaro fiyeyeno, koro tuno kuttu ye, diwi ye am duwon tawa bundidǝyea tayiro gǝnajagane gumkinjuro ambǝccagaidǝlan keluwo.
16.3: Yindiyedǝ tasanjudǝa tekuro fiyeyeno, koro ingidǝ bu alama kam nunaye gairo walje alauwa roa curo tekuyen dasaana samma kasuno.
16.4: Yakkuyedǝ tasanjudǝa kuluwu so, sim ingiye so sammaro fiyeyeno, koro ingidǝ buro walyeno.
16.5: Daji malaiya ingiso kuromaye: «Ni jirema, ni duwon kure yen dǝgamma, kǝrma yen mbejidǝ, ni Tayirdǝ, awoa wowom ania kalkallo kammǝmma.
16.6: Tayidǝ bu muminnaye-a nawiyaye-aa fijana, koro casaro tayiro bu yimmadǝ, jussǝna,» cǝni fangekko.
16.7: Koro laya duwaduramdǝn kowo laaye: «Aaa, Ala Kǝmande Martawama, sharanǝm jire ye, kalkal ye,» cǝni fangekko.
16.8: Dewuyedǝ tasanjudǝa kǝngallo fiyeyeno, koro kǝngaldǝro kǝnduwo amba kannun warduye kedo.
16.9: Amdǝ kannu jau fitnin wargadara ye, cu Ala kǝla masiwa aniyen kǝnduwoayedǝa baskera ye, amma tuwa dime tiro daraja njo wayera.
16.10: Uwuyedǝ tasanjudǝa kǝla kuris kǝrmaiye bundidǝyero fiyeyeno, koro na cunodi samma duwuro walyeno. Sǝrǝnnja nangaro amdǝ tǝlamnjaa sheɍin naljane
16.11: jaunja-a tunonja-a nangaro Ala Mai Samemaa baskera, amma kǝla kǝndonjayen tuwa cadǝnni.
16.12: Arakkuyedǝ tasanjudǝa bǝrǝm kura Yufarattedǝro fiyeyeno, koro jawal maiya adinnambedǝro dabbarduwuro inginju ngamgeno.
16.13: Daji ci kadi mafǝndidǝyen-a ci bundidǝyen-a ci nawi kattuwuyedǝyen-a sedan yakku koko-a camun caluwi kirukko.
16.14: Tayidǝ sedanna alama ajabba ajabba diowu, na maiya duniaye sammayero lejane tayia kǝriwu yim kura Ala Martawamayedǝro capcagai.
16.15: «Akko barwu gai nanǝmbo isǝkki! Barganju kam duwon bare tiyinju dea dadaje jama asǝrnju carunniro faadaro dǝgane kajǝmunju lujǝnamadǝ!»
16.16: Daji sedannadǝ maiyadǝa na tiro tǝlam yaudiyaudin Armagedon canidǝlan capkera.
16.17: Tulurredǝ tasanjudǝa kasambo fiyeyeno, koro kowo dunoa laa kuris kǝrmaiye Fado Alayedǝn nukce: «Cerǝna!» yeno.
16.18: Daji fǝralma culuwe gǝgǝpti, kowo keyera gǝgǝrjiye ye fandi, cidi dama baworo kawu adamgǝna alaktǝnaman ngaltema lolojǝnniro loloyeno.
16.19: Bǝrni kuradǝ yakkuro yakte bǝrniya jama duniaye samma ye wurgadara. Adǝgaima Ala bǝrni kura Babilayedǝa takce kǝnjaram diben gǝrgadunju jau fittedǝa tiro kaino.
16.20: Cuku samma baworo walyera, koro kau kuruwu fima gadero turunni.
16.21: Mafi mafǝndi mafǝndi jaumaro kurwowu samelan kǝla ambero cudurǝna, koro masiwa mafiyedǝro amdǝ Alaa baskera, masiwa adǝ jauro jau nangaro.

17.1: Daji malaiya tulur tasa tulurradǝye falnja naniro ise wuro: «Are, niro wowom duwon jawar kura kǝla ingi ngǝwuyen napcǝnamadǝro gǝnajagaidǝa fǝlenjǝgǝkki.
17.2: Maiya duniayedǝ ti-a rokko kǝnjǝna cadǝna, koro am dunian dasaanadǝ ye diben kǝnjǝnanjuyelan sagarandana,» yeno.
17.3: Daji Ruhu Alaye wuro jǝmsiye, wahayilan malaiyadǝ wua karaaro suttuluwo, koro kamu laa kǝla bundi kime citten napkada kirukko. Bundidǝ tiyinju ngan cuwa gadegade Alaa bastuyen jakkada, kǝlanju tulur, kangadi mewua.
17.4: Kamudǝ kajǝmu kime cit lujǝna, kare kawaraye dinar so, kari so, mursam solan tǝdǝna cakkǝna. Mukkonjun kǝnjaram dinarrea curonjun awo jauro waada kǝnjǝnanjuyelan cǝmbǝɍǝna.
17.5: Ngumnjun cu asǝrre ruwuwada: «BƎRNI KURA BABILAYE, YA JAWARRA SO, AWO WAADA DUNIAYE SOYE.»
17.6: Daji kamudǝ bu muminnaye-a bu shedawu Isaye-a cane sagarandǝnaro kirukko. Tia kirukkǝniya, jauro ajapkekko.
17.7: Amma malaiyadǝye wuro: «Awiro gǝle ajapkem? Asǝr kamudǝye-a bundi duwon kǝlanjuro juwana kǝla tulurra kangadi mewuadǝye-a niro bayinjǝgǝkki.
17.8: Bundi rumma adǝ kure yen dǝgana, kǝrma ye bawo, koro fuwu yen bǝlaa daduram bawoalan culuwe siduwuro leji. Am dunian dasaana duwon cunja curo kitawu royen tǝn dunia alaktǝnaman ruwudǝnnidǝ bundidǝa caruiya, ajapcai, ti kure yen dǝgana, kǝrma ye bawo, koro fuwu yen walde isi nangaro.
17.9: Akko lamar hangalkǝji-a nanrashidu-aye: Kǝla tulurdǝ kau kuruwu tulur duwon kǝlanjan kamudǝ napcǝnadǝ. Koro tayidǝ mai tulur:
17.10: Uwunjaye kǝrmai cerǝna, falnja kǝrma mbeji, falnja fuwun isi. Isiya, ngǝwuro tussiwawo.
17.11: Bundi kure yen dǝgana kǝrma ye bawodǝ, tidǝ mai wuskuye, amma ti tulurdǝye, koro siduwuro leji.
17.12: Kangadi mewu rummadǝ maiya mewu koroma kǝrmai cawandǝnni, amma sa fallo bundidǝ-a rokko kǝrmai cawandi.
17.13: Tayi ani samma nianja tilo, kǝnduwonja-a kǝrmainja-a mukko bundidǝyero casakki.
17.14: Tamadǝro kǝriwu cakkadi, amma Tamadǝ kǝla tayiyen kǝnnasar cuwandi, tima Kǝma kǝmawaye, koro Mai maiyaye wo nangaro, koro am tia jaanadǝ bowowada ye, kǝreyada ye, amanna ye,» yeno.
17.15: Koro malaiyadǝ walde wuro: «Ingi ngǝwu na jawar napcǝna rummadǝ, tayima jama so, cammo so, larduwa so, tǝlamba so wo.
17.16: Kangadi mewu rummadǝ-a bundidǝ-aso jawardǝa wul wajai. Karenju sammaa camoye tia ɍinjai, koro danju jagare kannun tia rǝmǝs warjai.
17.17: Awoa Ala karwunjaa cakke nianju dioro fandane kǝrmainja bundidǝro cadi, har mana Alaye wakkajiro.
17.18: Kamu rummadǝ bǝrni kura duwon maiya duniayea cunodidǝ,» yeno.

18.1: Ngawo adǝyen malaiya gade jauro kǝnduwoa samelan jǝpci kirukko, koro duniadǝ darajanjulan waskada.
18.2: Malaiyadǝ kowo dunoaro sapce: «Sidǝgǝna! Bǝrni kura Babilayedǝ sidǝgǝna! Kǝndǝgairam sedannaye ye, jongo karuwa batti sammaye ye, jongo ngudo batti sammaye ye, jongo bundi batti waada sammaye yero waljǝna,
18.3: dalilnjudǝ jama duniaye samma ye diben dunoa kǝnjǝnanjuyen casana, maiya duniaye ye ti-a rokko kǝnjǝna cadǝna, koro sawurwu duniaye ye arsiyinju na kojǝnayelan gaɍiwuro waljana nangaro,» yeno.
18.4: Daji kowo gade laa samelan nukce: «Jamani, tilan luwowo! Bare biwuwanjuro mukko yakkuwwi bi masiwanju nayia lenjanni,
18.5: dalilnjudǝ biwuwanju har samero taccana, koro Ala ye ayauwanjudǝa takcǝna nangaro.
18.6: Jiɍi cǝdǝnadǝ gai, ti yero yiddowo, koro kǝndonju kawakyindi tiro kalakkǝgǝnowo, kǝnjaram dijǝnadǝlan tiro kawakyindiro digǝnowo!
18.7: Jiɍi rokura ye cǝdǝna, arsiyi ye na kojǝnaro capcǝnadǝ gai, yakkowo ajawu ca dama baworo karwunju kuttajo! Awoa karwunjun: “Wu mai kamuye, napkada kǝrmai nodǝkki. Wu kamu kwa faccǝgǝnaa gǝni, koro lagaran tǝmmaro dikkiwawo,” cǝni.
18.8: Adǝ nangaro curo kawu fallen masiwa tia cuwandi: karmo-a karwukutta-a kǝna-a. Koro kannu tia juwe cotto sijiyi. Nonowo, Ala Kǝmande wowom tiro gǝnajǝgǝnadǝ kǝnduwoma!» cǝni fangekko.
18.9: Daji maiya duniaye ti-a rokko kǝnjǝna cade kǝji arsiyinju dama bawoaye fanjanadǝ kange kannu tia juwuiyedǝa caruiya, kǝla tiyen tai dajane burwu casakke casiri.
18.10: Ajawu tia cuwandǝnadǝa rijana nangaro, tin kuruwunin dajane: «Kuttu! Kuttu! Bǝrni kura, bǝrni kǝnduwoa Babilaye! Awoa curo sa fallen sharanǝm isǝna,» cani.
18.11: Sawurwu duniayeso ye kǝla tiyen tai dajane burwu casakke casiri, wunduma karenja gadero cuwuiwawo nangaro.
18.12: Karedǝ dinar, ɍiwulla, jǝmma, mursam, yadi linne ngalwo, batta kime, shadda, batta kime cit, kǝskawa buwuccai jiɍi jiɍi, awo sheɍi kǝmagǝnne so, kǝska tamanna so, kullo so, su so, kau shawa solan tǝgarǝna jiɍi jiɍi,
18.13: awowa jauro buwuccai, kare yajiye, kawudi so, fula samduye so, kaaji so, koro diben, kǝndawu jaitunne, rungo, algama, dalo, ngǝlaro, fǝr, amalenke, kaɍea, ro kambe.
18.14: Tayiye: «Awo kǝji con ronǝm cǝraana samma bawo faccaana. Karenǝm tamanna tamanna yiyiljaidǝ faccaana, koro gadero fandǝmbawo,» cani.
18.15: Sawurwu karedǝyeso barga bǝrni adǝyen gaɍiwuro waljanadǝ ajawu tia cuwandǝnadǝa rijana nangaro, tin kuruwunin dajane kǝla tiyen tai dajane burwu casakke casiri:
18.16: «Kuttu, kuttu, bǝrni kura, bǝrni duwon kajǝmu linne ngalwo-a kime-a kime cit-aa lujǝna, kare kawaraye dinar so, kari so, mursam solan tǝdǝna cakkǝnadǝ!
18.17: Awoa curo sa fallen arsiyinju ani sammaa cotto sidǝgǝna!» Adǝgaima wurawa maara ingiye so, bǝlawurowu so, maarawu so, am barga ingiyen manǝmbui cadi samma tin kuruwunin dajane
18.18: kange kannu tia juwuiyedǝa caruiya, yiljane: «Bǝrni fi bǝrni kura adǝ-a camun wo?» cani.
18.19: Katti kǝlanjaro fijagane kǝla tiyen tai dajane burwu casakke casiri: «Kuttu, kuttu, bǝrni kura, arsiyinju duwon am tekulan maaranjaa sammaa gaɍiwuro cǝdǝnadǝ! Awoa curo sa fallen tia cotto sijaana!»
18.20: «Ni same ye, nayi muminna so, kǝngayamba so, nawiya so ye, kǝla tiyen kǝji fannowo, Ala nayiro shara kǝla tiyen njaddǝna nangaro.»
18.21: Daji malaiya dunoa laa kau laa kau neduram mafǝndi gai ngoje tekuro gǝpciye: «Adǝgainin bǝrni kura Babilayedǝa duno bul foknin gǝpcai, koro gadero tuwandiwawo.
18.22: Kumbi jadu so, aiya yedu so, algaida-a kangadi-a fudu so gadero curonǝmnin fandiwawo, saniama mukkoye jiɍi fima gadero curonǝmnin tuwandiwawo, kowo kau nedurambe gadero curonǝmnin fandiwawo,
18.23: nur fatǝlaye gadero curonǝmnin wassiwawo, koro kowo mai larusaye so, njuduye so gadero curonǝmnin fandiwawo. Awoa calan sawurwunǝmdǝ wurawa duniaye, koro sagawunǝmlan jama duniaye sammaa jambanǝme jawallan tuluwumma,
18.24: koro curonjuman bu nawiyaye-a muminnaye-a am dunia ngan ronja cattuluwunaye-adǝ tuwandǝna,» yeno.

19.1: Ngawo adǝyen kowo kura laa alama am kada kadami captanaye gai samelan nukci fangekko. Tayiye: «Alleluya! Njǝkkawo-a daraja-a kǝnduwo-a Alaye,
19.2: awoa sharanju jire ye, kalkal ye. Jawar kura kǝnjǝnanjulan duniadǝa bannajǝnadǝro Ala shara kamjǝgǝna, koro bu wolodiyanjuye tia cuwore ngayenja cǝmowona,» yera.
19.3: Koro caye gai kowo sapcane: «Alleluya! Kangenju har abada abadinno samero tǝɍǝn ciji,» yera.
19.4: Daji amwurawa findi deridǝ-a alau roa dewudǝ-a tǝmdane Ala kǝla kurisnju kǝrmaiyen napkadamadǝro ambǝccagane: «Amin. Alleluya!» yera. KƎNNASAR DARYEYE Larusa Tamadǝye
19.5: Kuris kǝrmaiyedǝn kowo laa nukce: «Alandea yungorowo, wolodiyanju samma, nayi duwon tia rinuwi kuran ganansodǝ!» yeno.
19.6: Daji kowo kura laa alamanju jama kada kadami captana so, ingi ngǝwu dunoaro cǝgasi so, gǝrdu dunoa keyeraye soye gai nukci fangekko. Tayiye: «Alleluya! Ala Kǝmande Martawama kǝrmai cunodi, diye!
19.7: Kǝji fanniyo, karwu kǝjiaro walliyo, tiro daraja yiyo, dalilnjudǝ sa larusa Tamadǝye cǝdǝna, tǝmajinju ye dabbardǝna nangaro.
19.8: Tiro kajǝmu linne ngalwo bul fok yiyilji cade lujǝna,» yera. Awoa kajǝmu linne ngalwodǝ kǝndo nanjireye muminnaye.
19.9: Daji malaiyadǝye wuro: «Ruwune: Barganja am duwon maskaru larusa Tamadǝyero tayia dojanadǝ!» yeno. Koro walde: «Mana adǝ jiremaro Alaye,» yeno.
19.10: Daji tiro ambǝttuwuro fuwunjun tǝmgadakkǝniya, wuro: «Bare dimmi! Wu ye wolodi Alaye, ni-a kǝramiyanǝm shedawu Isaye-a gai. Alaro ambǝtkǝne! Awoa sheda Isayedǝma mana duwon nawiyadǝa simojǝgǝnadǝ wo,» yeno. Fǝr bul-a kǝmbamanju-a
19.11: Daji same fǝrǝmgada kirukko. Akko fǝr bul mbeji. Kǝmbamanjudǝa Amanma-a Jirema-alan bowojai, koro jawal jireyen shara ye kamji, kǝriwu ye cadi.
19.12: Simnju tǝlam kannu cambiye gai, koro kǝlanjun aɍiawu maila kadaa. Cu laa ti gǝnia wunduma nojǝnni ruwuwadaa.
19.13: Kajǝmu bulan dallaada lujǝna, koro cu Kalma Alayedǝlan tia bowojai.
19.14: Kǝriwuwu sameye kajǝmu linne bul fok kadawu bawoa lujana, koro kǝla fǝrra bullen tia jagai.
19.15: Cinjunlan kashagar timia culuwi, ngainin tilan jama duniaye sammaa cacalji. Tayia ka suyen kǝnduwoaro cunodi, koro inab guwatturam diben gǝrgadu jau fit Ala Martawamayedǝn guguwacci.
19.16: Kǝla kajǝmunju-a dunonju-ayen cu adǝ ruwuwada: «MAI MAIYAYE, KORO KƎMA KƎMAWAYE.»
19.17: Daji malaiya laa kǝla kǝngallen daada kirukko. Kowo dunoaro sapce ngudowa samen mareajai sammaro: «Arowo, masǝna kura Alayedǝro captǝnowo!
19.18: Da maiyaye-a da kajallawa kǝriwuye-a da kǝriwuwu kura kuraye-a da fǝrraye-a fǝrwunjaye-a da kambeye yen kal, kaɍeaye yen kal, kuran ganan am sammaye-aa ngǝrowo!» yeno.
19.19: Daji bundidǝ-a maiya duniaye-a kǝwuwanja kǝriwuye-a cijane ti kǝla fǝrren napkadama-a kǝriwuwunju-aro kǝriwu njǝkkadoro captana kirukko.
19.20: Bundidǝa keda, nawi kattuwuyedǝa ti-a rokko, ti duwon fuwu bundidǝyen alama ajabba ajabba cǝdǝna ye, am tayiro tawa bundidǝye gǝnajagane gumkinjuro ambǝccaanadǝa jambajǝna yedǝ wo. Tayi yindiso ronjaa bǝrǝm kannuye kau kannuye kimejǝgǝnaaro gǝpkeyera.
19.21: Tayi gapcanadǝa kashagar duwon ci ti kǝla fǝrren napkadadǝyen culuwimadǝn keyeso, koro ngudowa nga danja jagare kulyera.

20.1: Daji malaiya laa mukkonjun cuwuram ci bǝlaa daduram bawoayedǝ-a saɍga jauro mafǝndi-aa samelan jǝpci kirukko.
20.2: Kadi mafǝndi, wotte kadi kureye, ti duwon tiro Sedan koro Yiwulis canidǝa cǝdane kǝrwu dǝwuro saɍgadǝlan kikkero.
20.3: Tia bǝlaa daduram bawoadǝro gǝpciye jakce kǝladǝro tawaa gǝnayeyeno, bare har kǝrwu dǝwudǝ kojiro Yiwulis jama duniayea gadero jambaje jawallan cattuluwunniro. Ngawo awo aniyen dole sa ganaro tia koljane culuwi.
20.4: Daji kurissa kǝrmaiyea kirukko, koro kǝlanjan am duwon tayiro Ala kǝnduwo shara kamduye cinadǝ napkadaa. Am duwon shedanja Isaye-a mana Alaye-a nangaro kǝlanja kamjanadǝ yea kirukko. Am ani bundidǝ-a gumkinju-aro ambǝccaganni, koro tawa bundidǝye ngumnjaro bi mukkonjaro gǝnadǝgǝnni. Roaro waljane kǝrwu dǝwuro Almasiwu-a rokko kǝrmai kenodo.
20.5: Amma am sanuna gapcanadǝ roaro waljanni, sai ngawo kǝrwu dǝwu ani kojanayen. Adǝma cinowo burwoye wo.
20.6: Barganja koro tayir am cinowo burwoye adǝn nuwanjaasodǝ! Tayilan karmo yindiyedǝ kǝnduwonju bawo, amma ɍimanna Ala-a Almasiwu-ayero waljane kǝrwu dǝwuro Almasiwu-a rokko kǝrmai canodi. Ajawu Yiwulisse
20.7: Kǝrwu dǝwu ani kojaiya, Yiwulissa kosonjun koljane
20.8: culuwe jama talgǝmo duniaye dewulan dasaana, wotte am tayiro Gog-a Magog-a canidǝa jambaduro leje tayia kǝriwuro cacapci. Nanngǝwunjadǝ cidi kesa ci tekuye gai.
20.9: Daji cidi ngaa jakcane isane jongo muminnayedǝ-a bǝrni Ala cǝraanadǝ-a dirijane kǝlyera, amma kannu samelan jǝpce tayia rǝmǝs giwo.
20.10: Yiwulis tayia jambajǝnadǝa cadane bǝrǝm kannuye-a kau kannu kimejǝgǝnaye-a na bundidǝ-a nawi kattuwuyedǝ-a dasaanadǝro gǝpkeyera, koro bune-a kausu-aro har abada abadinno ajawu casai. Shara daryeye fuwu kuris kǝrmaiye bul kurayen
20.11: Daji kuris kǝrmaiye bul kura-a ti kǝlanjun napkadamadǝ-aa kirukko. Fuwunjun same-a cidi-a fatkeyera, koro gadero na cawandǝnni.
20.12: Koro am sanuna kuran ganan fuwu kurisdǝyen daada kirukko. Kitawuwa kayera, koro kitawu gade kayera, tima kitawu royedǝ wo. Am sanunadǝro kǝla kǝndonja kitawuwadǝlan ruwuwadadǝyen shara keddo.
20.13: Teku am sanuna curonjun rojǝnadǝa kolje keluwo, koro Karmo-a Leira-a ye am sanuna rojanadǝa koljane keluwo. Wundu yayero kǝla kǝndonjayen shara keddo.
20.14: Daji Karmo-a Leira-aa bǝrǝm kannuyero gǝpkeyera. Bǝrǝm kannuyedǝ, tima karmo yindiyedǝ wo.
20.15: Wundu duwon cunju curo kitawu royen ruwuwada tuwandǝnnidǝ, ti yea bǝrǝm kannuyedǝro gǝpkeyera.

21.1: Daji same bǝɍin-a cidi bǝɍin-a kirukko. Same burwoye-a cidi burwoye-adǝ baworo waljana, koro teku ye gadero bawo.
21.2: Koro bǝrni tayir tiro Jerujalem bǝɍin canidǝa samelan na Alayen jǝpci kirukko. Bǝrnidǝ njudu kwanju nangaro kawara cǝdǝnadǝ gai dabbargada.
21.3: Kowo kura laa kuris kǝrmaiyedǝlan nukci fangekko. Tiye: «Akko kǝndǝgairam Alaye na amben, koro tayi-a rokko dǝgai. Tayi jamanjuro waljai, koro Ala kǝlanju tayi-a rokko dǝgai ye, Alanjaro walji ye.
21.4: Simalonja sammaa simnjan cinji. Kua adǝn fuwun karmo ye bawo, lagaran ye bawo, koro so dio ye bawo, bone nja ye bawo, dalilnjudǝ awowa cayedǝ baworo waljana nangaro,» yeno.
21.5: Daji ti kǝla kuris kǝrmaiyen napkadamadǝye: «Akko awo sammaa bǝɍinno dio dikki!» yeno. Koro wuro: «Ruwune, awoa mana ani awo mǝrsaduye ye, jire ye,» yeno.
21.6: Koro walde wuro: «Cerǝna! Wuma burwoye ye, daryeye ye wo. Wuma badiduram ye, njeroram ye wo. Wu kam nguduadǝro sim ingi ro fandoyen dero kǝnjaro yikki.
21.7: Kam kǝnnasar cuwandǝnamadǝ awo ania warasaji, koro wu Alanjuro wallǝkki, ti ye tadaniro walji.
21.8: Amma am koiwu so, aman bowu so, am haramgada so, kamceji so, kǝnjǝnawu so, boka so, sǝnǝmgu so, kattuwu kamdawu samma sodǝ, nuwanja bǝrǝm kannuye-a kau kannu kimejǝgǝnaye-a. Adǝma karmo yindiyedǝ wo.» JERUJALEM BƎɌIN
21.9: Daji malaiya tulur tasa tulur masiwa tulur daryeyelan casambǝɍǝna mukkonnadǝye falnja ise mana sadde wuro: «Are, niro njudu wotte kamu Tamayedǝa fǝlenjǝgǝkki,» yeno.
21.10: Ruhu Alaye wuro jǝmsiye wahayilan malaiyadǝ kǝla kau kuruwu kura laayero sade bǝrni tayir Jerujalembe samelan na Alayen jǝpci fǝleseyeno.
21.11: Bǝrnidǝ daraja Alayea nangaro jauro nurra alama kau tamanna tiyen awi yaye turui tiro jasfa canidǝ gai warak yiyilji,
21.12: koro garu kura ye, kuruwu ye cinna ngaworam mewun yindinna. Cinnawadǝlan malaiya mewun yindin mbeji, koro cinnawadǝlan cu jiɍi mewun yindin tadawa Israyilaye ruwuwada ye mbeji.
21.13: Adinnamlan cinna yakku mbeji, yalalan cinna yakku, anǝmlan cinna yakku, fǝdelan cinna yakku.
21.14: Garu bǝrnidǝyedǝ fǝrdu mewun yindinna, koro kǝlanjan cu mewun yindin kǝngayam mewun yindin Tamadǝyedǝ ruwuwada.
21.15: Malaiya wuro manasiyidǝ bǝrnidǝ-a cinnawanju-a garunju-a ngalduro mukkonjun ngalduram ka dinarrea.
21.16: Bǝrnidǝ kǝrkǝm cǝk dewua, nankuruwunju-a nanfaraknju-a samma tilo. Malaiyadǝ tia ka ngalduramnjun ngalyenniya, ngal dǝwu mewun yindin. Nankuruwunju-a nanfaraknju-a dadunju-a samma tilo.
21.17: Ngal kambelan, wotte ngal malaiyayelan faidade garu bǝrniyedǝa ngalyenniya, ja mian fidewun deri.
21.18: Garudǝ kau tamanna tiro jasfa canilan tǝdandǝna, bǝrnidǝ ye dinar ngalwo, kudǝram tiyen awi yaye turui-a camun.
21.19: Fǝrduwa garu bǝrnidǝyedǝ kau tamanna jiɍi jiɍilan janeyada. Burwoyedǝ kau tamanna jasfa canilan janeyada, yindiyedǝ safirlan, yakkuyedǝ agetlan, dewuyedǝ yemerodlan,
21.20: uwuyedǝ oniklan, arakkuyedǝ karneliyalan, tulurredǝ kǝrasolailan, wuskuyedǝ birillan, lǝgarredǝ tofaslan, mewuyedǝ kǝrasofaraslan, mewun tilonnedǝ jasinlan, mewun yindinnedǝ amatislan.
21.21: Cinna mewun yindindǝ mursam mewun yindin, finja yaye mursam fal. Farsam bǝrniyedǝ dinar ngalwo, kudǝram tiyen awi yaye turui-a camun.
21.22: Bǝrnidǝlan Fado Alaye rukkǝni, awoa Ala Kǝmande Martawama-a Tama-adǝ tayima Fado Alaye bǝrnidǝyedǝ wo.
21.23: Bǝrnidǝ nur kǝngalle-a kumballe-alan mǝradunju bawo, awoa daraja Alaye nur gai tia wassǝna, koro Tamadǝ ye fatǝlanju.
21.24: Jama duniaye samma nur bǝrnidǝyedǝn kǝndǝgai cadi, koro maiya duniaye ye darajanjaa bǝrnidǝro cawudi.
21.25: Cinnawa bǝrniyedǝ kausu tǝmmaro jaktaiwawo, awoa bune nadǝn bawo.
21.26: Daraja-a martawa-a jama duniaye sammaa curodǝro cawudi.
21.27: Awima tayir gǝni curodǝro ngayiwawo, koro kam awo waada dioma so, kattuwuma so ye curodǝro ngasayiwawo, sai am duwon cunja curo kitawu roye Tamadǝyen ruwuwadadǝ.

22.1: Daji malaiyadǝ wuro kuluwu ingi ro fandoye yiyilji kudǝram gai tiyen awi yaye turui kuris kǝrmaiye Ala-a Tamadǝ-ayen culuwidǝa fǝleseyeno.
22.2: Dawu farsam bǝrnidǝyen ci yindi kuluwudǝyen kǝska ro fandoye mbeji. Saa falnin kǝskadǝ mewun yindinno tada cakki, kǝndawu fin yaye tada cakki, koro kalunjudǝ jama duniayea isangaduwuro faidaa.
22.3: Kua adǝn fuwun awima baskuwada bawo. Kuris kǝrmaiye Ala-a Tamadǝ-ayedǝ nadǝn dǝgai, wolodiyanju ye tiro ambǝccagane
22.4: fǝkkanju carui, koro cunju ngumnjan ruwuwada mbeji.
22.5: Kua adǝn fuwun bune bawo, koro nur fatǝlaye-a kǝngalle-alan mǝradunja bawo, awoa Ala Kǝmandedǝma tayia wassi. Ngaiman har abada abadinno kǝrmai canodi. Kǝnde Isaye
22.6: Daji malaiyadǝye wuro: «Mana ani awo mǝrsaduye ye, jire ye. Kǝmande Ala Ruhunju karwu nawiyayero njakkomadǝ awowa tussiwawo dole wakkajaidǝa wolodiyanjuro isanoduwuro malaiyanjua kinodo,» yeno.
22.7: «Akkoni duwan isǝkki. Barganju kam duwon mana nawinawi kitawu adǝyea fanje ngojǝnamadǝ.»
22.8: Wuma Yahaya awo ania fakke kirukko. Fakke kirukkǝniya, fuwu malaiya awo ania fǝlesǝgǝnadǝyen tiro ambǝttuwuro tǝmgadakko.
22.9: Amma wuro: «Bare dimmi! Wu ye wolodi Alaye, koro wu-a ni-a kǝramiyanǝm nawiyadǝ-a am mana kitawu adǝn ruwuwada ngodawu-a samma tilo. Alaro ambǝtkǝne!» yeno.
22.10: Koro walde wuro: «Bare mana nawinawi adǝyedǝa gǝranǝmmi, sanju del karǝnjǝna nangaro.
22.11: Kam jirenambumadǝ jirenambunjun dǝga, kam tayir gǝnidǝ ye tayirnambunjun dǝga. Kam jiremadǝ ye jirenjun dǝga, kam mumindǝ ye nanmuminnjun dǝga,» yeno.
22.12: «Akkoni duwan isǝkki. Adǝgaima alwasini kudǝkke wundu yayero kǝla awo cǝdǝnadǝyen kalkallo yikki.
22.13: Wuma alfa ye, omega ye wo. Wuma burwoye ye, daryeye ye wo. Wuma badiduram ye, njeroram ye wo.
22.14: Barganja am kajǝmunja tuljana, ngainin amari kǝska ro fandoyen ngǝroye-a bǝrnidǝro cinnanjuyen ngawoye-a cawandidǝ!
22.15: Tawar so, sagawuwu so, kǝnjǝnawu so, kamceji so, sǝnǝmgu so, am jirenambuwu kattuwu rawowu samma so deyan.
22.16: «Wuma Isa, nayi jama wua gawuro awo ania isanonjaaro malaiyania kinodǝkko. Wuma Mai Daudaye fǝrdunju ye, kaduwunju yedǝ wo, wuma Sillowu Fajarre Bul Fokdǝ wo.»
22.17: Ruhu Alaye-a njududǝ-aye: «Are!» cani. Kam fanjǝnamadǝye: «Are!» wuljo. Kam ngudunjuamadǝ iso, koro kam cǝraanamadǝ ingi ro fandoye dero ca!
22.18: Wundu duwon mana nawinawi kitawu adǝyedǝa fanjidǝro shedagǝkki, kam laa awo laaa mana adǝro cǝrgaia, Ala tiro masiwa kitawu adǝn ruwuwadadǝa gǝrjiyi.
22.19: Koro kam laa awo laaa mana nawinawi kitawu adǝyedǝn cuttuluwia, Ala nuwanju kǝska ro fandoye-a bǝrni darajaadǝye-a kitawu adǝn ruwuwadadǝa cuttuluwi.
22.20: Ti awo ania shedajidǝye: «Aaa, duwan isǝkki,» cǝni. Amin. Are, Kǝma Isa!
22.21: Ser Kǝma Isaye am sammalan dǝga! Amin.
